papers.title: Inside the Scaffold: A Source-Code Taxonomy of Coding Agent Architectures
papers.abstract: LLM-based coding agents can localize bugs, generate patches, and run tests with diminishing human oversight, yet the scaffolding code that surrounds the language model (the control loop, tool definitions, state management, and context strategy) remains poorly understood. Existing surveys classify agents by abstract capabilities (tool use, planning, reflection) that cannot distinguish between architecturally distinct systems, and trajectory studies observe what agents do without examining the scaffold code that determines why. This paper presents a source-code-level architectural taxonomy derived from analysis of 13 open-source coding agent scaffolds at pinned commit hashes. Each agent is characterized across 12 dimensions organized into three layers: control architecture, tool and environment interface, and resource management. The analysis reveals that scaffold architectures resist discrete classification: control strategies range from fixed pipelines to Monte Carlo Tree Search, tool counts range from 0 to 37, and context compaction spans seven distinct strategies. Five loop primitives (ReAct, generate-test-repair, plan-execute, multi-attempt retry, tree search) function as composable building blocks that agents layer in different combinations; 11 of 13 agents compose multiple primitives rather than relying on a single control structure. Dimensions converge where external constraints dominate (tool capability categories, edit formats, execution isolation) and diverge where open design questions remain (context compaction, state management, multi-model routing). All taxonomic claims are grounded in file paths and line numbers, providing a reusable reference for researchers studying agent behavior and practitioners designing new scaffolds.

analysis.tldr: 对13个开源编码Agent的脚手架代码进行系统分析，提出12维度的源代码级架构分类法，揭示控制循环、工具接口和资源管理层的设计模式与差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究通过抽象能力或行为轨迹分类编码Agent，但忽略了决定其行为的脚手架代码（控制循环、工具定义、状态管理、上下文策略），导致无法区分架构不同的系统。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM编码Agent脚手架代码的系统性、细粒度分类和理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 脚手架架构难以离散分类：控制策略从固定流水线到蒙特卡洛树搜索不等，工具数量0-37，上下文压缩有7种策略；5种循环原语（ReAct、生成-测试-修复、计划-执行、多次重试、树搜索）可组合使用，13个Agent中11个组合了多个原语；维度在外部约束主导处趋同（工具能力类别、编辑格式、执行隔离），在开放设计问题处分歧（上下文压缩、状态管理、多模型路由）。
analysis.method: 对13个开源编码Agent脚手架（固定commit哈希）进行源代码级分析，从控制架构、工具与环境接口、资源管理三个层面，沿12个维度进行特征提取和分类。
contributions: 提出了首个源代码级的编码Agent脚手架分类法，覆盖12个维度、3个层次。
识别出5种可组合的循环原语，并发现多数Agent组合使用多个原语。
提供了基于文件路径和行号的分类依据，可作为可复用的参考资源。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了分类法的构建过程和观察到的现象。
limitations: 仅分析13个开源脚手架，可能不覆盖所有现有架构。
分类基于固定commit，未考虑后续版本变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对13个开源编码Agent的脚手架代码进行系统分析，提出12维度的源代码级架构分类法，揭示控制循环、工具接口和资源管理层的设计模式与差异。

papers.title: ActionNex: A Virtual Outage Manager for Cloud Computing
papers.abstract: Outage management in large-scale cloud operations remains heavily manual, requiring rapid triage, cross-team coordination, and experience-driven decisions under partial observability. We present \textbf{ActionNex}, a production-grade agentic system that supports end-to-end outage assistance, including real-time updates, knowledge distillation, and role- and stage-conditioned next-best action recommendations. ActionNex ingests multimodal operational signals (e.g., outage content, telemetry, and human communications) and compresses them into critical events that represent meaningful state transitions. It couples this perception layer with a hierarchical memory subsystem: long-term Key-Condition-Action (KCA) knowledge distilled from playbooks and historical executions, episodic memory of prior outages, and working memory of the live context. A reasoning agent aligns current critical events to preconditions, retrieves relevant memories, and generates actionable recommendations; executed human actions serve as an implicit feedback signal to enable continual self-evolution in a human-agent hybrid system. We evaluate ActionNex on eight real Azure outages (8M tokens, 4,000 critical events) using two complementary ground-truth action sets, achieving 71.4\% precision and 52.8-54.8\% recall. The system has been piloted in production and has received positive early feedback.

analysis.tldr: ActionNex 是一个面向云计算的虚拟中断管理器，通过多模态感知、分层记忆和推理代理实现端到端中断辅助。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模云操作中的中断管理高度依赖人工，需要快速分类、跨团队协调和基于经验的决策，但部分可观测性导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个生产级代理系统，支持端到端中断辅助，包括实时更新、知识蒸馏和基于角色与阶段的下一个最佳动作推荐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ActionNex 系统包含感知层（将多模态信号压缩为关键事件）、分层记忆子系统（长期KCA知识、情景记忆和工作记忆）以及推理代理（对齐前提、检索记忆并生成可操作建议），并通过人类执行动作作为隐式反馈实现持续自我进化。
contributions: 提出 ActionNex，一个生产级代理系统，用于云中断管理的端到端辅助。
设计分层记忆架构，结合长期知识、情景记忆和工作记忆。
在8个真实Azure中断上评估，达到71.4%精确率和52.8-54.8%召回率。
analysis.experiments: 在8个真实Azure中断（8M tokens，4000个关键事件）上使用两个互补的真实动作集进行评估，达到71.4%精确率和52.8-54.8%召回率。系统已在生产环境中试点并获得积极反馈。
limitations: 召回率相对较低（52.8-54.8%），可能遗漏关键动作。
评估仅基于Azure平台，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ActionNex 是一个面向云计算的虚拟中断管理器，通过多模态感知、分层记忆和推理代理实现端到端中断辅助。

papers.title: BioAlchemy: Distilling Biological Literature into Reasoning-Ready Reinforcement Learning Training Data
papers.abstract: Despite the large corpus of biology training text, the impact of reasoning models on biological research generally lags behind math and coding. In this work, we show that biology questions from current large-scale reasoning datasets do not align well with modern research topic distributions in biology, and that this topic imbalance may negatively affect performance. In addition, we find that methods for extracting challenging and verifiable research problems from biology research text are a critical yet underdeveloped ingredient in applying reinforcement learning for better performance on biology research tasks. We introduce BioAlchemy, a pipeline for sourcing a diverse set of verifiable question-and-answer pairs from a scientific corpus of biology research text. We curate BioAlchemy-345K, a training dataset containing over 345K scientific reasoning problems in biology. Then, we demonstrate how aligning our dataset to the topic distribution of modern scientific biology can be used with reinforcement learning to improve reasoning performance. Finally, we present BioAlchemist-8B, which improves over its base reasoning model by 9.12% on biology benchmarks. These results demonstrate the efficacy of our approach for developing stronger scientific reasoning capabilities in biology. The BioAlchemist-8B model is available at: https://huggingface.co/BioAlchemy.

analysis.tldr: 通过从生物文献中蒸馏可验证的问答对并匹配现代研究主题分布，BioAlchemy 提升了生物推理模型的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前推理模型在生物研究领域的应用落后于数学和编程，主要原因是现有大规模推理数据集中的生物问题与现代研究主题分布不匹配，且缺乏从生物文本中提取可验证研究问题的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从生物科学文献中自动提取多样化、可验证的问答对，并利用其通过强化学习提升模型在生物研究任务上的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有生物推理数据集存在主题不平衡问题，与当前生物研究主题分布不一致，这可能负面影响模型性能。
analysis.method: 提出 BioAlchemy 流水线，从生物科学文献中提取可验证的问答对，构建包含 345K 问题的数据集 BioAlchemy-345K，并通过强化学习使数据集与生物研究主题分布对齐以提升推理性能。
contributions: 揭示了当前生物推理数据集的主题分布与现代生物研究不匹配的问题。
提出了 BioAlchemy 流水线，用于从生物文献中自动生成多样化、可验证的问答对。
构建了 BioAlchemy-345K 数据集，并训练出 BioAlchemist-8B 模型，在生物基准上提升 9.12%。
analysis.experiments: 在生物基准上评估 BioAlchemist-8B，相比基础推理模型提升 9.12%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅适用于生物领域，泛化性未验证。
数据集构建依赖文献质量，可能存在噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过从生物文献中蒸馏可验证的问答对并匹配现代研究主题分布，BioAlchemy 提升了生物推理模型的性能。

papers.title: Multimodal Urban Tree Detection from Satellite and Street-Level Imagery via Annotation-Efficient Deep Learning Strategies
papers.abstract: Beyond the immediate biophysical benefits, urban trees play a foundational role in environmental sustainability and disaster mitigation. Precise mapping of urban trees is essential for environmental monitoring, post-disaster assessment, and strengthening policy. However, the transition from traditional, labor-intensive field surveys to scalable automated systems remains limited by high annotation costs and poor generalization across diverse urban scenarios. This study introduces a multimodal framework that integrates high-resolution satellite imagery with ground-level Google Street View to enable scalable and detailed urban tree detection under limited-annotation conditions. The framework first leverages satellite imagery to localize tree candidates and then retrieves targeted ground-level views for detailed detection, significantly reducing inefficient street-level sampling. To address the annotation bottleneck, domain adaptation is used to transfer knowledge from an existing annotated dataset to a new region of interest. To further minimize human effort, we evaluated three learning strategies: semi-supervised learning, active learning, and a hybrid approach combining both, using a transformer-based detection model. The hybrid strategy achieved the best performance with an F1-score of 0.90, representing a 12% improvement over the baseline model. In contrast, semi-supervised learning exhibited progressive performance degradation due to confirmation bias in pseudo-labeling, while active learning steadily improved results through targeted human intervention to label uncertain or incorrect predictions. Error analysis further showed that active and hybrid strategies reduced both false positives and false negatives. Our findings highlight the importance of a multimodal approach and guided annotation for scalable, annotation-efficient urban tree mapping to strengthen sustainable city planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态框架结合卫星与街景图像，通过混合半监督与主动学习策略实现高效城市树木检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统城市树木检测依赖人工实地调查，成本高且难以规模化；现有自动化方法受限于标注数据不足和泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限标注条件下实现跨场景、可扩展的城市树木检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 半监督学习因伪标签确认偏差导致性能逐渐下降；主动学习通过人工干预稳定提升；混合策略结合两者优势。
analysis.method: 多模态框架：先利用卫星图像定位候选树，再检索街景图像进行精细检测；采用领域自适应迁移标注知识；评估半监督、主动学习及混合三种策略。
contributions: 提出融合卫星与街景图像的多模态城市树木检测框架，减少无效街景采样。
系统比较半监督、主动学习及混合策略，发现混合策略最优（F1=0.90，提升12%）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，仅报告F1-score为0.90，相比基线提升12%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定区域标注数据，跨区域泛化性需进一步验证。
混合策略的标注成本与收益平衡未详细量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态框架结合卫星与街景图像，通过混合半监督与主动学习策略实现高效城市树木检测。

papers.title: The Augmentation Trap: AI Productivity and the Cost of Cognitive Offloading
papers.abstract: Experimental evidence confirms that AI tools raise worker productivity, but also that sustained use can erode the expertise on which those gains depend. We develop a dynamic model in which a decision-maker chooses AI usage intensity for a worker over time, trading immediate productivity against the erosion of worker skill. We decompose the tool's productivity effect into two channels, one independent of worker expertise and one that scales with it. The model produces three main results. First, even a decision-maker who fully anticipates skill erosion rationally adopts AI when front-loaded productivity gains outweigh long-run skill costs, producing steady-state loss: the worker ends up less productive than before adoption. Second, when managers are short-termist or worker skill has external value, the decision-maker's optimal policy turns steady-state loss into the augmentation trap, leaving the worker worse off than if AI had never been adopted. Third, when AI productivity depends less on worker expertise, workers can permanently diverge in skill: experienced workers realize their full potential while less experienced workers deskill to zero. Small differences in managerial incentives can determine which path a worker takes. The productivity decomposition classifies deployments into five regimes that separate beneficial adoption from harmful adoption and identifies which deployments are vulnerable to the trap.

analysis.tldr: AI工具虽提升短期生产力，但长期可能因技能侵蚀导致工人陷入“增强陷阱”，最终比未采用AI时更差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有实验证据表明AI工具能提高工人生产力，但长期使用可能侵蚀工人技能，而现有研究缺乏对这种动态权衡的理论建模。
analysis.problem: 如何建模决策者在AI使用强度与工人技能侵蚀之间的动态权衡，并识别导致工人陷入“增强陷阱”的条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论模型揭示了三个关键结果：稳态损失、增强陷阱、技能分化。
analysis.method: 构建动态模型，将AI生产力效应分解为独立于工人专业知识的渠道和随专业知识变化的渠道，分析决策者最优策略。
contributions: 提出动态模型解释AI工具短期收益与长期技能侵蚀的权衡
识别出“增强陷阱”现象：工人最终比未采用AI时更差
将AI部署分类为五个制度，区分有益与有害采用
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型假设可能简化了现实中的技能动态
未考虑工人学习或适应策略
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI工具虽提升短期生产力，但长期可能因技能侵蚀导致工人陷入“增强陷阱”，最终比未采用AI时更差。

papers.title: Resource-Conscious Modeling for Next- Day Discharge Prediction Using Clinical Notes
papers.abstract: Timely discharge prediction is essential for optimizing bed turnover and resource allocation in elective spine surgery units. This study evaluates the feasibility of lightweight, fine-tuned large language models (LLMs) and traditional text-based models for predicting next-day discharge using postoperative clinical notes. We compared 13 models, including TF-IDF with XGBoost and LGBM, and compact LLMs (DistilGPT-2, Bio_ClinicalBERT) fine-tuned via LoRA. TF-IDF with LGBM achieved the best balance, with an F1-score of 0.47 for the discharge class, a recall of 0.51, and the highest AUC-ROC (0.80). While LoRA improved recall in DistilGPT2, overall transformer-based and generative models underperformed. These findings suggest interpretable, resource-efficient models may outperform compact LLMs in real-world, imbalanced clinical prediction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 轻量级模型在临床出院预测中优于紧凑型LLM，TF-IDF+LGBM取得最佳平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 及时出院预测对优化床位周转和资源分配至关重要，但现有方法在资源受限的临床环境中可能不够高效或可解释。
analysis.problem: 利用术后临床笔记预测次日出院，并评估轻量级模型与紧凑型LLM在资源效率和性能上的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到TF-IDF+LGBM在F1、召回率和AUC-ROC上优于紧凑型LLM（如DistilGPT-2、Bio_ClinicalBERT），LoRA虽提升召回但整体Transformer和生成模型表现不佳。
analysis.method: 比较13种模型，包括TF-IDF+XGBoost/LGBM和紧凑型LLM（DistilGPT-2、Bio_ClinicalBERT）经LoRA微调。
contributions: 系统评估轻量级模型与紧凑型LLM在临床出院预测任务上的性能与资源效率。
发现TF-IDF+LGBM在类别不平衡的临床预测中优于紧凑型LLM，强调可解释性和资源效率的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在择期脊柱手术单元的真实临床数据上比较13种模型，报告了F1、召回率和AUC-ROC。
limitations: 仅针对脊柱手术单元，可能不适用于其他临床场景。
未探索更大规模LLM或更先进的微调方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 轻量级模型在临床出院预测中优于紧凑型LLM，TF-IDF+LGBM取得最佳平衡。

papers.title: Sim2Real-AD: A Modular Sim-to-Real Framework for Deploying VLM-Guided Reinforcement Learning in Real-World Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Deploying reinforcement learning policies trained in simulation to real autonomous vehicles remains a fundamental challenge, particularly for VLM-guided RL frameworks whose policies are typically learned with simulator-native observations and simulator-coupled action semantics that are unavailable on physical platforms. This paper presents Sim2Real-AD, a modular framework for zero-shot sim-to-real transfer of CARLA-trained VLM-guided RL policies to full-scale vehicles without any real-world RL training data. The framework decomposes the transfer problem into four components: a Geometric Observation Bridge (GOB) that converts monocular front-view images into simulator-compatible bird's-eye-view (BEV) observations, a Physics-Aware Action Mapping (PAM) that translates policy outputs into platform-agnostic physical commands, a Two-Phase Progressive Training (TPT) strategy that stabilizes adaptation by separating action-space and observation-space transfer, and a Real-time Deployment Pipeline (RDP) that integrates perception, policy inference, control conversion, and safety monitoring for closed-loop execution. Simulation experiments show that the framework preserves the relative performance ordering of representative RL algorithms across different reward paradigms and validate the contribution of each module. Zero-shot deployment on a full-scale Ford E-Transit achieves success rates of 90%, 80%, and 75% in car-following, obstacle avoidance, and stop-sign interaction scenarios, respectively. To the best of our knowledge, this study is among the first to demonstrate zero-shot closed-loop deployment of a CARLA-trained VLM-guided RL policy on a full-scale real vehicle without any real-world RL training data. The demo video and code are available at: https://zilin-huang.github.io/Sim2Real-AD-website/.

analysis.tldr: 提出模块化Sim2Real框架，实现CARLA训练的VLM引导RL策略零样本迁移到真实全尺寸车辆。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟训练的RL策略部署到真实自动驾驶车辆时，面临观测和动作语义不匹配的挑战，现有方法通常需要真实数据或微调，限制了实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何实现CARLA训练的VLM引导RL策略零样本迁移到真实全尺寸车辆，无需真实RL训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Sim2Real-AD框架，包含四个模块：几何观测桥（GOB）将单目图像转为BEV观测、物理感知动作映射（PAM）将策略输出转为平台无关命令、两阶段渐进训练（TPT）分离动作和观测空间迁移、实时部署流水线（RDP）集成感知推理控制与安全监控。
contributions: 首个实现CARLA训练的VLM引导RL策略零样本闭环部署到全尺寸真实车辆的工作。
提出模块化Sim2Real框架，包含GOB、PAM、TPT、RDP四个组件，无需真实RL训练数据。
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验验证了框架保持算法相对性能排序及各模块贡献；零样本部署在福特E-Transit上，跟车、避障、停车标志交互场景成功率分别为90%、80%、75%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定场景（跟车、避障、停车标志）验证，复杂城市环境未测试。
依赖单目图像转BEV的精度，极端光照或遮挡下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模块化Sim2Real框架，实现CARLA训练的VLM引导RL策略零样本迁移到真实全尺寸车辆。

papers.title: Beyond Predefined Schemas: TRACE-KG for Context-Enriched Knowledge Graphs from Complex Documents
papers.abstract: Knowledge graph construction typically relies either on predefined ontologies or on schema-free extraction. Ontology-driven pipelines enforce consistent typing but require costly schema design and maintenance, whereas schema-free methods often produce fragmented graphs with weak global organization, especially in long technical documents with dense, context-dependent information. We propose TRACE-KG (Text-dRiven schemA for Context-Enriched Knowledge Graphs), a multimodal framework that jointly constructs a context-enriched knowledge graph and an induced schema without assuming a predefined ontology. TRACE-KG captures conditional relations through structured qualifiers and organizes entities and relations using a data-driven schema that serves as a reusable semantic scaffold while preserving full traceability to the source evidence. Experiments show that TRACE-KG produces structurally coherent, traceable knowledge graphs and offers a practical alternative to both ontology-driven and schema-free construction pipelines.

analysis.tldr: TRACE-KG 提出无需预定义本体的多模态框架，联合构建上下文增强知识图谱与数据驱动模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱构建方法要么依赖预定义本体（成本高、维护难），要么无模式提取（导致图碎片化、全局组织弱），尤其在长技术文档中问题突出。
analysis.problem: 如何在不预定义本体的前提下，从复杂文档中构建结构连贯、可追溯且具有上下文增强的知识图谱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TRACE-KG 多模态框架，通过结构化限定符捕获条件关系，并利用数据驱动模式组织实体和关系，同时保留到源证据的完整可追溯性。
contributions: 提出无需预定义本体的联合构建上下文增强知识图谱与诱导模式的方法
通过结构化限定符和可重用语义支架实现结构连贯与可追溯性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖文档类型或领域，泛化性需验证
数据驱动模式的可解释性可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE-KG 提出无需预定义本体的多模态框架，联合构建上下文增强知识图谱与数据驱动模式。

papers.title: RAIN-FIT: Learning of Fitting Surfaces and Noise Distribution from Large Data Sets
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a method for estimating a surface that contains a given set of points from noisy measurements. More precisely, by assuming that the surface is described by the zero set of a function in the span of a given set of features and a parametric description of the distribution of the noise, a computationally efficient method is described that estimates both the surface and the noise distribution parameters. In the provided examples, polynomial and sinusoidal basis functions were used. However, any chosen basis that satisfies the outlined conditions mentioned in the paper can be approximated as a combination of trigonometric, exponential, and/or polynomial terms, making the presented approach highly generalizable. The proposed algorithm exhibits linear computational complexity in the number of samples. Our approach requires no hyperparameter tuning or data preprocessing and effectively handles data in dimensions beyond 2D and 3D. The theoretical results demonstrating the convergence of the proposed algorithm have been provided. To highlight the performance of the proposed method, comprehensive numerical results are conducted, evaluating our method against state-of-the-art algorithms, including Poisson Reconstruction and the Neural Network-based Encoder-X, on 2D and 3D shapes. The results demonstrate the superiority of our method under the same conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种线性复杂度的表面拟合与噪声分布联合估计方法，无需调参且可扩展至高维。
analysis.research_motivation: 从含噪测量点云中估计表面是计算机视觉和图形学中的基础问题，现有方法如泊松重建和神经网络方法存在计算复杂度高、需调参或难以处理高维数据等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从大规模含噪点云数据中同时估计隐式表面和噪声分布参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 假设表面为给定特征函数（如多项式、三角函数）的零集，噪声分布有参数化形式，通过联合优化表面函数系数和噪声参数进行估计，算法具有线性计算复杂度。
contributions: 提出一种线性复杂度的表面与噪声联合估计方法，无需超参数调优和数据预处理。
理论证明了算法的收敛性，并在2D/3D形状上实验优于泊松重建和神经网络方法。
analysis.experiments: 在2D和3D形状上，与泊松重建和基于神经网络的Encoder-X方法对比，结果显示所提方法在相同条件下性能更优。
limitations: 方法依赖于噪声分布参数化假设，实际噪声可能更复杂。
仅测试了2D和3D形状，更高维或更复杂表面的泛化性未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种线性复杂度的表面拟合与噪声分布联合估计方法，无需调参且可扩展至高维。

papers.title: VisionClaw: Always-On AI Agents through Smart Glasses
papers.abstract: We present VisionClaw, an always-on wearable AI agent that integrates live egocentric perception with agentic task execution. Running on Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses, VisionClaw continuously perceives real-world context and enables in-situ, speech-driven action initiation and delegation via OpenClaw AI agents. Therefore, users can directly execute tasks through the smart glasses, such as adding real-world objects to an Amazon cart, generating notes from physical documents, receiving meeting briefings on the go, creating events from posters, or controlling IoT devices. We evaluate VisionClaw through a controlled laboratory study (N=12) and a longitudinal deployment study (N=5). Results show that integrating perception and execution enables faster task completion and reduces interaction overhead compared to non-always-on and non-agent baselines. Beyond performance gains, deployment findings reveal a shift in interaction: tasks are initiated opportunistically during ongoing activities, and execution is increasingly delegated rather than manually controlled. These results suggest a new paradigm for wearable AI agents, where perception and action are continuously coupled to support situated, hands-free interaction.

analysis.tldr: VisionClaw 通过智能眼镜实现始终在线的 AI 代理，融合感知与执行，支持语音驱动的任务操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可穿戴 AI 代理通常需要用户主动触发，缺乏持续感知和即时执行能力，导致交互开销大、任务完成效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个始终在线的可穿戴 AI 代理，将实时自我中心感知与任务执行无缝集成，以支持情境化、免提交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 部署研究发现，用户倾向于在活动中机会性地发起任务，并越来越多地将执行委托给代理而非手动控制，表明感知与执行的持续耦合能改变交互范式。
analysis.method: VisionClaw 系统：基于 Meta Ray-Ban 智能眼镜，持续感知现实世界上下文，通过语音驱动动作发起，并委托给 OpenClaw AI 代理执行任务。
contributions: 提出 VisionClaw，首个将始终在线感知与代理任务执行集成的可穿戴 AI 代理系统。
通过实验室和纵向部署研究证明，集成感知与执行能加快任务完成、减少交互开销，并揭示新的交互范式。
analysis.experiments: 在受控实验室研究（N=12）和纵向部署研究（N=5）中评估，结果显示相比非始终在线和非代理基线，任务完成更快、交互开销更低。
limitations: 样本量较小（N=12 和 N=5），可能限制泛化性。
仅基于 Meta Ray-Ban 眼镜，硬件依赖性可能影响可移植性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VisionClaw 通过智能眼镜实现始终在线的 AI 代理，融合感知与执行，支持语音驱动的任务操作。

papers.title: Large Language Models Align with the Human Brain during Creative Thinking
papers.abstract: Creative thinking is a fundamental aspect of human cognition, and divergent thinking-the capacity to generate novel and varied ideas-is widely regarded as its core generative engine. Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated impressive performance on divergent thinking tests and prior work has shown that models with higher task performance tend to be more aligned to human brain activity. However, existing brain-LLM alignment studies have focused on passive, non-creative tasks. Here, we explore brain alignment during creative thinking using fMRI data from 170 participants performing the Alternate Uses Task (AUT). We extract representations from LLMs varying in size (270M-72B) and measure alignment to brain responses via Representational Similarity Analysis (RSA), targeting the creativity-related default mode and frontoparietal networks. We find that brain-LLM alignment scales with model size (default mode network only) and idea originality (both networks), with effects strongest early in the creative process. We further show that post-training objectives shape alignment in functionally selective ways: a creativity-optimized \texttt{Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct} preserves alignment with high-creativity neural responses while reducing alignment with low-creativity ones; a human behavior fine-tuned model elevates alignment with both; and a reasoning-trained variant shows the opposite pattern, suggesting chain-of-thought training steers representations away from creative neural geometry toward analytical processing. These results demonstrate that post-training objectives selectively reshape LLM representations relative to the neural geometry of human creative thought.

analysis.tldr: LLM在创造性思维任务中的脑对齐程度随模型规模和想法原创性增加，且后训练目标会选择性重塑这种对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 创造性思维是人类认知的核心，LLM在发散思维测试中表现优异，但现有脑-LLM对齐研究仅关注被动非创造性任务，缺乏对创造性思维过程中神经对齐的探索。
analysis.problem: 探究LLM在创造性思维任务（Alternate Uses Task）中与人类大脑活动的对齐程度及其影响因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 脑-LLM对齐程度随模型规模（仅默认模式网络）和想法原创性（两个网络）增加，且效果在创造性过程早期最强；后训练目标（创造力优化、人类行为微调、推理训练）以功能选择性方式改变对齐模式。
analysis.method: 使用fMRI数据（170名被试执行AUT任务），通过表征相似性分析（RSA）比较不同规模（270M-72B）和后训练目标的LLM表征与大脑默认模式网络和额顶网络的活动。
contributions: 首次在创造性思维任务中验证脑-LLM对齐随模型规模和想法原创性扩展。
揭示后训练目标（创造力优化、行为微调、推理训练）选择性重塑LLM与创造性神经几何的对齐模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及使用170名被试的fMRI数据、多种LLM规模和后训练变体进行RSA分析。
limitations: 仅关注发散思维任务（AUT），未涉及其他创造性类型。
模型规模上限为72B，更大模型的对齐趋势未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在创造性思维任务中的脑对齐程度随模型规模和想法原创性增加，且后训练目标会选择性重塑这种对齐。

papers.title: Contextual Control without Memory Growth in a Context-Switching Task
papers.abstract: Context-dependent sequential decision making is commonly addressed either by providing context explicitly as an input or by increasing recurrent memory so that contextual information can be represented internally. We study a third alternative: realizing contextual dependence by intervening on a shared recurrent latent state, without enlarging recurrent dimensionality. To this end, we introduce an intervention-based recurrent architecture in which a recurrent core first constructs a shared pre-intervention latent state, and context then acts through an additive, context-indexed operator. We evaluate this idea on a context-switching sequential decision task under partial observability. We compare three model families: a label-assisted baseline with direct context access, a memory baseline with enlarged recurrent state, and the proposed intervention model, which uses no direct context input to the recurrent core and no memory growth. On the main benchmark, the intervention model performs strongly without additional recurrent dimensions. We also evaluate the models using the conditional mutual information (I(C;O | S)) as a theorem-motivated operational probe of contextual dependence at fixed latent state. For task-relevant phase-1 outcomes, the intervention model exhibits positive conditional contextual information. Together, these results suggest that intervention on a shared recurrent state provides a viable alternative to recurrent memory growth for contextual control in this setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过干预共享循环隐状态实现上下文依赖的架构，无需增大记忆维度，在上下文切换任务中表现良好。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文依赖的序列决策通常需要显式输入上下文或增大循环记忆容量，但前者可能不现实，后者带来计算开销。探索第三种替代方案：通过干预共享循环隐状态实现上下文控制，避免记忆增长。
analysis.problem: 如何在部分可观测的上下文切换序列决策任务中，在不增大循环记忆维度的情况下实现有效的上下文依赖控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于干预的循环架构：循环核心先构建共享的干预前隐状态，然后通过一个上下文索引的加性算子施加上下文干预，不向循环核心输入直接上下文标签，也不增加循环维度。
contributions: 提出一种无需记忆增长的干预式循环架构，用于上下文切换任务。
在基准任务上验证了该架构与直接上下文输入和增大记忆的基线相比具有竞争力。
使用条件互信息作为理论驱动的探针，证明干预模型在任务相关阶段表现出正的条件上下文信息。
analysis.experiments: 在上下文切换序列决策任务（部分可观测）上比较了三种模型：标签辅助基线（直接上下文访问）、记忆基线（增大循环状态）和干预模型。干预模型在主要基准上表现强劲，无需额外循环维度。还使用条件互信息评估了上下文依赖性。
limitations: 仅在单一上下文切换任务上验证，泛化性未知。
干预算子的设计可能依赖任务特性，需要进一步研究通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过干预共享循环隐状态实现上下文依赖的架构，无需增大记忆维度，在上下文切换任务中表现良好。

papers.title: Fine-tuning DeepSeek-OCR-2 for Molecular Structure Recognition
papers.abstract: Optical Chemical Structure Recognition (OCSR) is critical for converting 2D molecular diagrams from printed literature into machine-readable formats. While Vision-Language Models have shown promise in end-to-end OCR tasks, their direct application to OCSR remains challenging, and direct full-parameter supervised fine-tuning often fails. In this work, we adapt DeepSeek-OCR-2 for molecular optical recognition by formulating the task as image-conditioned SMILES generation. To overcome training instabilities, we propose a two-stage progressive supervised fine-tuning strategy: starting with parameter-efficient LoRA and transitioning to selective full-parameter fine-tuning with split learning rates. We train our model on a large-scale corpus combining synthetic renderings from PubChem and realistic patent images from USPTO-MOL to improve coverage and robustness. Our fine-tuned model, MolSeek-OCR, demonstrates competitive capabilities, achieving exact matching accuracies comparable to the best-performing image-to-sequence model. However, it remains inferior to state-of-the-art image-to-graph modelS. Furthermore, we explore reinforcement-style post-training and data-curation-based refinement, finding that they fail to improve the strict sequence-level fidelity required for exact SMILES matching.

analysis.tldr: 通过两阶段渐进微调策略将DeepSeek-OCR-2适配到分子结构识别，MolSeek-OCR在SMILES生成上达到有竞争力的精确匹配精度，但后训练和数据筛选未能进一步提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学化学结构识别（OCSR）对于将文献中的2D分子图转换为机器可读格式至关重要，但现有视觉语言模型直接应用于OCSR存在挑战，且全参数监督微调常失败。
analysis.problem: 如何有效微调视觉语言模型DeepSeek-OCR-2以准确识别分子结构并生成SMILES序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接全参数微调导致训练不稳定；强化学习后训练和数据筛选无法改善严格的序列级SMILES匹配精度。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段渐进微调策略：先使用参数高效的LoRA，再过渡到选择性全参数微调并采用分学习率；将任务建模为图像条件SMILES生成。
contributions: 提出两阶段渐进微调策略，稳定训练并提升性能
构建大规模训练语料，结合PubChem合成渲染图和USPTO-MOL专利图像
实验表明后训练和数据筛选对严格序列匹配无效
analysis.experiments: 在PubChem合成数据和USPTO-MOL专利图像上训练，与最佳图像到序列模型相比达到相当精确匹配精度，但劣于图像到图模型。
limitations: 模型在精确SMILES匹配上仍不如图像到图模型
后训练和数据筛选未能提升序列级保真度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过两阶段渐进微调策略将DeepSeek-OCR-2适配到分子结构识别，MolSeek-OCR在SMILES生成上达到有竞争力的精确匹配精度，但后训练和数据筛选未能进一步提升。

papers.title: Evolutionary Search for Automated Design of Uncertainty Quantification Methods
papers.abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods for large language models are predominantly designed by hand based on domain knowledge and heuristics, limiting their scalability and generality. We apply LLM-powered evolutionary search to automatically discover unsupervised UQ methods represented as Python programs. On the task of atomic claim verification, our evolved methods outperform strong manually-designed baselines, achieving up to 6.7% relative ROC-AUC improvement across 9 datasets while generalizing robustly out-of-distribution. Qualitative analysis reveals that different LLMs employ qualitatively distinct evolutionary strategies: Claude models consistently design high-feature-count linear estimators, while Gpt-oss-120B gravitates toward simpler and more interpretable positional weighting schemes. Surprisingly, only Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.5 reliably leverage increased method complexity to improve performance -- Opus 4.6 shows an unexpected regression relative to its predecessor. Overall, our results indicate that LLM-powered evolutionary search is a promising paradigm for automated, interpretable hallucination detector design.

analysis.tldr: 用LLM驱动的进化搜索自动设计不确定性量化方法，在原子声明验证任务上超越手工基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法依赖手工设计，受限于领域知识和启发式，缺乏可扩展性和通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何自动发现高效、可泛化的无监督不确定性量化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同LLM采用不同进化策略：Claude模型设计高特征计数线性估计器，Gpt-oss-120B偏向简单可解释的位置加权方案；仅Sonnet 4.5和Opus 4.5能可靠利用复杂度提升性能，Opus 4.6出现性能倒退。
analysis.method: 使用LLM驱动的进化搜索，将无监督UQ方法表示为Python程序，通过进化优化自动发现。
contributions: 提出LLM驱动的进化搜索框架自动设计UQ方法
在9个数据集上实现6.7%相对ROC-AUC提升，且分布外泛化鲁棒
analysis.experiments: 在原子声明验证任务上，使用9个数据集评估，与强手工基线对比，报告了ROC-AUC改进和定性分析。
limitations: 仅针对原子声明验证任务，未验证其他UQ场景
进化搜索计算成本可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用LLM驱动的进化搜索自动设计不确定性量化方法，在原子声明验证任务上超越手工基线。

papers.title: Vocabulary Dropout for Curriculum Diversity in LLM Co-Evolution
papers.abstract: Co-evolutionary self-play, where one language model generates problems and another solves them, promises autonomous curriculum learning without human supervision. In practice, the proposer quickly converges to a narrow distribution of problems that satisfy the reward function. This diversity collapse renders the curriculum uninformative for the solver, stalling the co-evolutionary loop. We introduce vocabulary dropout, a random mask applied to the proposer's output logits during both policy training and curriculum generation, as a lightweight mechanism to sustain diversity. The mask is hard and non-stationary, preventing the proposer from locking into fixed token sequences. Training Qwen3-4B and Qwen3-8B on mathematical reasoning via R-Zero, we find that vocabulary dropout sustains proposer diversity across lexical, semantic, and functional metrics throughout training, and yields solver improvements averaging +4.4 points at 8B, with the largest gains on competition-level benchmarks. Our findings suggest that explicit action-space constraints, analogous to the structural role that game rules play in classical self-play, can help sustain productive co-evolution in language. Vocabulary dropout is one simple instantiation of this principle.

analysis.tldr: 提出词汇丢弃法，通过在生成器输出logits上施加随机掩码，维持LLM共进化中的问题多样性，避免多样性崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 共进化自博弈中，生成器快速收敛到狭窄的问题分布，导致多样性崩溃，使求解器无法获得有信息量的课程，阻碍共进化循环。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM共进化自博弈中生成器多样性崩溃的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成器在满足奖励函数后迅速收敛到固定问题模式，多样性在词汇、语义和功能维度上下降。
analysis.method: 词汇丢弃法：在生成器策略训练和课程生成期间，对其输出logits施加硬性非平稳随机掩码，阻止其锁定固定token序列。
contributions: 提出词汇丢弃法作为轻量级机制，维持共进化中生成器的问题多样性。
在数学推理任务上验证了该方法能持续保持多样性，并提升求解器性能，平均+4.4分（8B模型），竞赛级基准提升最大。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-8B上使用R-Zero进行数学推理训练，评估了词汇、语义和功能多样性指标，并报告了求解器准确率提升。
limitations: 仅针对数学推理任务验证，其他领域效果未知。
掩码策略的通用性和最优配置需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出词汇丢弃法，通过在生成器输出logits上施加随机掩码，维持LLM共进化中的问题多样性，避免多样性崩溃。

papers.title: SpectralSplat: Appearance-Disentangled Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting for Driving Scenes
papers.abstract: Feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting methods have achieved impressive reconstruction quality for autonomous driving scenes, yet they entangle scene geometry with transient appearance properties such as lighting, weather, and time of day. This coupling prevents relighting, appearance transfer, and consistent rendering across multi-traversal data captured under varying environmental conditions. We present SpectralSplat, a method that disentangles appearance from geometry within a feed-forward Gaussian Splatting framework. Our key insight is to factor color prediction into an appearance-agnostic base stream and and appearance-conditioned adapted stream, both produced by a shared MLP conditioned on a global appearance embedding derived from DINOv2 features. To enforce disentanglement, we train with paired observations generated by a hybrid relighting pipeline that combines physics-based intrinsic decomposition with diffusion based generative refinement, and supervise with complementary consistency, reconstruction, cross-appearance, and base color losses. We further introduce an appearance-adaptable temporal history that stores appearance-agnostic features, enabling accumulated Gaussians to be re-rendered under arbitrary target appearances. Experiments demonstrate that SpectralSplat preserves the reconstruction quality of the underlying backbone while enabling controllable appearance transfer and temporally consistent relighting across driving sequences.

analysis.tldr: SpectralSplat通过外观解耦的前馈3D高斯泼溅实现驾驶场景的可控光照迁移与一致渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈3D高斯泼溅方法在自动驾驶场景中纠缠了几何与瞬态外观属性（如光照、天气），导致无法进行重光照、外观迁移及跨多变环境的多遍历数据一致渲染。
analysis.problem: 如何在前馈高斯泼溅框架中解耦外观与几何，实现可控外观迁移和时序一致的重光照。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpectralSplat，将颜色预测分解为外观无关的基础流和外观条件适应的适配流，两者由共享MLP生成，并基于DINOv2特征提取全局外观嵌入；通过混合重光照管线（物理本征分解+扩散生成精化）生成配对观测训练，结合互补一致性、重建、跨外观和基础颜色损失；引入外观可适应时序历史存储外观无关特征，实现累积高斯在任意目标外观下重渲染。
contributions: 提出外观解耦的前馈高斯泼溅框架，实现几何与外观分离。
设计混合重光照管线生成配对数据，并引入多种损失函数强制解耦。
提出外观可适应时序历史，支持跨驾驶序列的时序一致重光照。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖DINOv2特征和混合重光照管线，可能增加计算开销。
外观解耦效果可能受限于训练数据的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpectralSplat通过外观解耦的前馈3D高斯泼溅实现驾驶场景的可控光照迁移与一致渲染。

papers.title: RDFace: A Benchmark Dataset for Rare Disease Facial Image Analysis under Extreme Data Scarcity and Phenotype-Aware Synthetic Generation
papers.abstract: Rare diseases often manifest with distinctive facial phenotypes in children, offering valuable diagnostic cues for clinicians and AI-assisted screening systems. However, progress in this field is severely limited by the scarcity of curated, ethically sourced facial data and the high similarity among phenotypes across different conditions. To address these challenges, we introduce RDFace, a curated benchmark dataset comprising 456 pediatric facial images spanning 103 rare genetic conditions (average 4.4 samples per condition). Each ethically verified image is paired with standardized metadata. RDFace enables the development and evaluation of data-efficient AI models for rare disease diagnosis under real-world low-data constraints. We benchmark multiple pretrained vision backbones using cross-validation and explore synthetic augmentation with DreamBooth and FastGAN. Generated images are filtered via facial landmark similarity to maintain phenotype fidelity and merged with real data, improving diagnostic accuracy by up to 13.7% in ultra-low-data regimes. To assess semantic validity, phenotype descriptions generated by a vision-language model from real and synthetic images achieve a report similarity score of 0.84. RDFace establishes a transparent, benchmark-ready dataset for equitable rare disease AI research and presents a scalable framework for evaluating both diagnostic performance and the integrity of synthetic medical imagery.

analysis.tldr: RDFace是一个面向罕见病面部图像分析的基准数据集，包含456张覆盖103种罕见遗传病的儿童面部图像，并验证了合成增强在极低数据场景下可将诊断准确率提升13.7%。
analysis.research_motivation: 罕见病常伴随独特的面部表型，但高质量、伦理合规的面部数据极度稀缺，且不同疾病间表型高度相似，严重限制了AI辅助诊断系统的发展。
analysis.problem: 在极端数据稀缺条件下，如何构建和评估数据高效的罕见病面部图像分析模型，并验证合成数据增强的有效性与语义保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含456张图像、103种罕见病的基准数据集RDFace；使用DreamBooth和FastGAN进行合成数据增强，并通过面部关键点相似度过滤生成图像以保持表型保真度；采用交叉验证评估多个预训练视觉骨干模型。
contributions: 发布了首个面向罕见病面部图像分析的基准数据集RDFace，包含103种罕见病、456张儿童面部图像及标准化元数据。
提出了一种结合合成数据增强与表型保真度过滤的框架，在极低数据场景下将诊断准确率提升13.7%。
通过视觉-语言模型生成的表型描述评估合成图像的语义有效性，报告相似度达0.84。
analysis.experiments: 在RDFace数据集上使用交叉验证对多个预训练视觉骨干模型进行基准测试，并验证了DreamBooth和FastGAN合成增强的效果，在极低数据场景下诊断准确率提升13.7%。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（456张图像），可能限制模型泛化能力。
仅评估了面部图像，未涉及其他模态（如基因数据）的融合。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RDFace是一个面向罕见病面部图像分析的基准数据集，包含456张覆盖103种罕见遗传病的儿童面部图像，并验证了合成增强在极低数据场景下可将诊断准确率提升13.7%。

papers.title: ExpressEdit: Fast Editing of Stylized Facial Expressions with Diffusion Models in Photoshop
papers.abstract: Facial expressions of characters are a vital component of visual storytelling. While current AI image editing models hold promise for assisting artists in the task of stylized expression editing, these models introduce global noise and pixel drift into the edited image, preventing the integration of these models into professional image editing software and workflows. To bridge this gap, we introduce ExpressEdit, a fully open-source Photoshop plugin that is free from common artifacts of proprietary image editing models and robustly synergizes with native Photoshop operations such as Liquify. ExpressEdit seamlessly edits an expression within 3 seconds on a single consumer-grade GPU, significantly faster than popular proprietary models. Moreover, to support the generation of diverse expressions according to different narrative needs, we compile a comprehensive expression database of 135 expression tags enriched with example stories and images designed for retrieval-augmented generation. We open source the code and dataset to facilitate future research and artistic exploration.

analysis.tldr: ExpressEdit 是一个开源 Photoshop 插件，利用扩散模型在 3 秒内完成风格化面部表情编辑，并附带 135 种表情标签数据库。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 AI 图像编辑模型在风格化表情编辑中引入全局噪声和像素漂移，无法集成到专业图像编辑软件和工作流中。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无伪影、快速、与专业软件兼容的风格化面部表情编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前模型存在全局噪声和像素漂移问题，导致无法与 Photoshop 等专业软件集成。
analysis.method: 开发 ExpressEdit 开源 Photoshop 插件，结合扩散模型与检索增强生成，利用 135 种表情标签数据库实现快速编辑。
contributions: 提出 ExpressEdit，一个开源 Photoshop 插件，可在 3 秒内完成表情编辑，无常见伪影。
构建包含 135 种表情标签的数据库，支持检索增强生成以生成多样化表情。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于风格化面部表情，泛化性未知。
依赖扩散模型，可能对极端表情或复杂场景效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ExpressEdit 是一个开源 Photoshop 插件，利用扩散模型在 3 秒内完成风格化面部表情编辑，并附带 135 种表情标签数据库。

papers.title: Measuring LLM Trust Allocation Across Conflicting Software Artifacts
papers.abstract: LLM-based software engineering assistants fail not only by producing incorrect outputs, but also by allocating trust to the wrong artifact when code, documentation, and tests disagree. Existing evaluations focus mainly on downstream outcomes and therefore cannot reveal whether a model recognized degraded evidence, identified the unreliable source, or calibrated its trust across artifacts. We present TRACE (Trust Reasoning over Artifacts for Calibrated Evaluation), a framework that elicits structured artifact-level trust traces over Javadoc, method signatures, implementations, and test prefixes under blind perturbations. Using 22,339 valid traces from seven models on 456 curated Java method bundles, we evaluate per-artifact quality assessment, inconsistency detection, affected artifact attribution, and source prioritization. Across all models, quality penalties are largely localized to the perturbed artifact and increase with severity, but sensitivity is asymmetric across artifact types: documentation bugs induce a substantially larger heavy-to-subtle gap than implementation faults (0.152-0.253 vs. 0.049-0.123). Models detect explicit documentation bugs well (67-94%) and Javadoc and implementation contradictions at 50-91%, yet show a systematic blind spot when only the implementation drifts while the documentation remains plausible, with detection dropping by 7-42 percentage points. Confidence is poorly calibrated for six of seven models. These findings suggest that current LLMs are better at auditing natural-language specifications than at detecting subtle code-level drift, motivating explicit artifact-level trust reasoning before correctness-critical downstream use.

analysis.tldr: 提出TRACE框架评估LLM在冲突软件工件间的信任分配，发现模型对自然语言规范审计优于代码级漂移检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估主要关注下游结果，无法揭示模型是否识别了降级证据、定位不可靠来源或校准跨工件的信任，导致LLM在代码、文档和测试不一致时可能错误分配信任。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估LLM在冲突软件工件（代码、文档、测试）间的信任分配能力，包括质量评估、不一致检测、归因和来源优先级排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 质量惩罚局部化于扰动工件且随严重性增加，但敏感性不对称：文档错误导致更大的重-微差距（0.152-0.253 vs 0.049-0.123）；模型检测显式文档错误良好（67-94%），但对仅实现漂移而文档合理的盲点检测下降7-42个百分点；六分之七模型置信度校准差。
analysis.method: 提出TRACE框架，通过盲扰动在Javadoc、方法签名、实现和测试前缀上引出结构化工件级信任轨迹，使用22,339条有效轨迹评估7个模型在456个Java方法束上的表现。
contributions: 提出TRACE框架，用于评估LLM在冲突软件工件间的信任分配。
系统评估了7个模型在质量评估、不一致检测、归因和来源优先级排序上的表现。
揭示了模型对文档错误敏感但对代码级漂移存在系统性盲点，且置信度校准差。
analysis.experiments: 使用22,339条有效轨迹，7个模型（未具体列出），456个Java方法束，评估了每工件质量评估、不一致检测、受影响工件归因和来源优先级排序。
limitations: 仅针对Java方法束，可能不泛化到其他语言或更大规模软件。
未探讨模型内部机制或提供改进方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TRACE框架评估LLM在冲突软件工件间的信任分配，发现模型对自然语言规范审计优于代码级漂移检测。

papers.title: Agile Story-Point Estimation: Is RAG a Better Way to Go?
papers.abstract: The sprint-based iterative approach in the Agile software development method allows continuous feedback and adaptation. One of the crucial Agile software development activities is the sprint planning session where developers estimate the effort required to complete tasks through a consensus-based estimation technique such as Planning Poker. In the Agile software development method, a common unit of measuring development effort is Story Point (SP) which is assigned to tasks to understand the complexity and development time needed to complete them. Despite the benefits of this process, it is an extremely time-consuming manual process. To mitigate this issue, in this study, we investigated if this manual process can be automated using Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) which comprises a "Retriever" and a "Generator". We applied two embedding models - bge-large-en-v1.5, and Sentence-Transformers' all-mpnet-base-v2 on 23 open-source software projects of varying sizes and examined four key aspects: 1) how retrieval hyper-parameters influence the performance, 2) whether estimation accuracy differs across different sizes of the projects, 3) whether embedding model choice affects accuracy, and 4) how the RAG-based approach compares to the existing baselines. Although the RAG-based approach outperformed the baseline models in several occasions, our results did not exhibit statistically significant differences in performance across the projects or across the embedding models. This highlights the need for further studies and refinement of the RAG, and model adaptation strategies for better accuracy in automatically estimating user stories.

analysis.tldr: 探索RAG在敏捷故事点估计中的自动化潜力，发现虽优于基线但统计差异不显著。
analysis.research_motivation: 敏捷开发中故事点估计是耗时的手动过程，自动化可提升效率，现有方法精度不足。
analysis.problem: 能否用检索增强生成（RAG）自动化故事点估计，并分析其性能影响因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RAG方法在多个场景下优于基线，但项目规模与嵌入模型选择对性能无统计显著影响。
analysis.method: 采用RAG框架，使用bge-large-en-v1.5和all-mpnet-base-v2两种嵌入模型，在23个开源项目上评估检索超参数、项目规模、嵌入模型及与基线对比。
contributions: 系统评估RAG在故事点估计中的性能，涵盖超参数、项目规模和嵌入模型的影响。
揭示RAG虽优于基线但统计差异不显著，指明需进一步研究的方向。
analysis.experiments: 在23个不同规模的开源软件项目上实验，对比两种嵌入模型和基线，分析检索超参数影响。
limitations: 未提供具体实验数值结果，仅定性描述。
统计显著性不足，方法泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索RAG在敏捷故事点估计中的自动化潜力，发现虽优于基线但统计差异不显著。

papers.title: MetaSAEs: Joint Training with a Decomposability Penalty Produces More Atomic Sparse Autoencoder Latents
papers.abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are increasingly used for safety-relevant applications including alignment detection and model steering. These use cases require SAE latents to be as atomic as possible. Each latent should represent a single coherent concept drawn from a single underlying representational subspace. In practice, SAE latents blend representational subspaces together. A single feature can activate across semantically distinct contexts that share no true common representation, muddying an already complex picture of model computation. We introduce a joint training objective that directly penalizes this subspace blending. A small meta SAE is trained alongside the primary SAE to sparsely reconstruct the primary SAE's decoder columns; the primary SAE is penalized whenever its decoder directions are easy to reconstruct from the meta dictionary. This occurs whenever latent directions lie in a subspace spanned by other primary directions. This creates gradient pressure toward more mutually independent decoder directions that resist sparse meta-compression. On GPT-2 large (layer 20), the selected configuration reduces mean $|\varphi|$ by 7.5% relative to an identical solo SAE trained on the same data. Automated interpretability (fuzzing) scores improve by 7.6%, providing external validation of the atomicity gain independent of the training and co-occurrence metrics. Reconstruction overhead is modest. Results on Gemma 2 9B are directional. On not-fully-converged SAEs, the same parameterization yields the best results, a $+8.6\%$ $Δ$Fuzz. Though directional, this is an encouraging sign that the method transfers to a larger model. Qualitative analysis confirms that features firing on polysemantic tokens are split into semantically distinct sub-features, each specializing in a distinct representational subspace.

analysis.tldr: 提出MetaSAEs，通过联合训练和分解性惩罚使稀疏自编码器潜在变量更原子化。
analysis.research_motivation: SAE用于安全相关应用（如对齐检测和模型引导）时，需要潜在变量尽可能原子化，即每个潜在变量代表单一连贯概念。但实践中SAE潜在变量会混合表示子空间，导致同一特征在不同语义上下文中激活，混淆模型计算分析。
analysis.problem: 解决SAE潜在变量原子性不足、表示子空间混合的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SAE潜在变量会混合表示子空间，单个特征在语义不同的上下文中激活，缺乏原子性。
analysis.method: 引入联合训练目标，在训练主SAE的同时训练一个小型元SAE，元SAE稀疏重构主SAE的解码器列；当主SAE的解码器方向容易被元字典重构时，对主SAE施加惩罚，促使解码器方向更相互独立。
contributions: 提出MetaSAEs联合训练方法，通过分解性惩罚提升SAE潜在变量的原子性。
在GPT-2 large和Gemma 2 9B上验证了方法有效性，降低了平均|φ|并提升了可解释性分数。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 large（layer 20）上，所选配置相比相同数据训练的独立SAE，平均|φ|降低7.5%，自动可解释性（fuzzing）分数提升7.6%。在Gemma 2 9B上，未完全收敛的SAE中，相同参数化取得最佳结果，ΔFuzz提升8.6%。定性分析证实多义token上的特征被拆分为语义不同的子特征。
limitations: Gemma 2 9B上的结果仅为方向性，未完全收敛。
重建开销虽小但未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MetaSAEs，通过联合训练和分解性惩罚使稀疏自编码器潜在变量更原子化。

papers.title: Inference-Path Optimization via Circuit Duplication in Frozen Visual Transformers for Marine Species Classification
papers.abstract: Automated underwater species classification is constrained by annotation cost and environmental variation that limits the transferability of fully supervised models. Recent work has shown that frozen embeddings from self-supervised vision foundation models already provide a strong label-efficient baseline for marine image classification. Here we investigate whether this frozen-embedding regime can be improved at inference time, without fine-tuning or changing model weights. We apply Circuit Duplication, an inference-time method originally proposed for Large Language Models, in which a selected range of transformer layers is traversed twice during the forward pass. We evaluate on the class-imbalanced AQUA20 benchmark using frozen DINOv3 embeddings under two settings: global circuit selection, where a single duplicated circuit is chosen for the full dataset, and class-specific circuit selection, where each species may receive a different optimal circuit. Both settings use simple semi-supervised downstream classifiers. Circuit Duplication consistently improves over the standard frozen forward pass. At the maximum label budget, class-specific selection reaches a macro F1 of 0.875, closing the gap to the fully supervised ConvNeXt benchmark (0.889) to 1.4 points without any gradient-based training. Four species exceed their fully supervised reference, with octopus improving by +12.1 F1 points. Across all budgets, roughly 75% of classes prefer a class-specific circuit, indicating a genuinely class-dependent benefit. To our knowledge, this is the first application of Circuit Duplication to computer vision.

analysis.tldr: 在冻结的视觉Transformer中应用电路复制（Circuit Duplication）推理方法，无需微调即可提升海洋物种分类性能，接近全监督水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下物种分类受限于标注成本高和环境变化大，全监督模型迁移性差；自监督视觉基础模型的冻结嵌入虽已提供强基线，但能否在推理时进一步提升性能尚待探索。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需微调或改变模型权重的情况下，提升冻结视觉Transformer在海洋物种分类上的推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同物种对最优电路复制层有不同偏好，约75%的类别在类特定电路选择下获益，表明电路复制的效果具有类别依赖性。
analysis.method: 在冻结的DINOv3视觉Transformer中，对选定的连续Transformer层（电路）进行两次前向遍历，并采用全局电路选择（全数据集共享）或类特定电路选择（每类最优）两种策略，结合半监督下游分类器。
contributions: 首次将电路复制（Circuit Duplication）方法应用于计算机视觉领域，验证其在冻结视觉Transformer中的有效性。
提出类特定电路选择策略，在AQUA20基准上达到macro F1 0.875，仅比全监督ConvNeXt低1.4个点，且四个物种超过全监督参考。
analysis.experiments: 在类不平衡的AQUA20基准上，使用冻结DINOv3嵌入，评估全局和类特定电路复制策略，并与标准冻结前向传递及全监督ConvNeXt对比。摘要未提供具体实验设置细节。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集（AQUA20）上验证，泛化性未知。
类特定电路选择需要为每类搜索最优电路，计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在冻结的视觉Transformer中应用电路复制（Circuit Duplication）推理方法，无需微调即可提升海洋物种分类性能，接近全监督水平。

papers.title: Automated Segmentation and Tracking of Group Housed Pigs Using Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Foundation models (FM) are reshaping computer vision by reducing reliance on task-specific supervised learning and leveraging general visual representations learned at scale. In precision livestock farming, most pipelines remain dominated by supervised learning models that require extensive labeled data, repeated retraining, and farm-specific tuning. This study presents an FM-centered workflow for automated monitoring of group-housed nursery pigs, in which pretrained vision-language FM serve as general visual backbones and farm-specific adaptation is achieved through modular post-processing. Grounding-DINO was first applied to 1,418 annotated images to establish a baseline detection performance. While detection accuracy was high under daytime conditions, performance degraded under night-vision and heavy occlusion, motivating the integration of temporal tracking logic. Building on these detections, short-term video segmentation with Grounded-SAM2 was evaluated on 550 one-minute video clips; after post-processing, over 80% of 4,927 active tracks were fully correct, with most remaining errors arising from inaccurate masks or duplicated labels. To support identity consistency over an extended time, we further developed a long-term tracking pipeline integrating initialization, tracking, matching, mask refinement, re-identification, and post-hoc quality control. This system was evaluated on a continuous 132-minute video and maintained stable identities throughout. On 132 uniformly sampled ground-truth frames, the system achieved a mean region similarity (J) of 0.83, contour accuracy (F) of 0.92, J&F of 0.87, MOTA of 0.99, and MOTP of 90.7%, with no identity switches. Overall, this work demonstrates how FM prior knowledge can be combined with lightweight, task-specific logic to enable scalable, label-efficient, and long-duration monitoring in pig production.

analysis.tldr: 利用基础模型（Grounding-DINO + Grounded-SAM2）实现群养猪的自动化分割与长期跟踪，在132分钟连续视频上达到高精度且无身份切换。
analysis.research_motivation: 精准畜牧业中现有监督学习模型依赖大量标注数据、重复训练和农场特定调参，缺乏可扩展性和标签效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用基础模型的通用视觉表征，结合轻量级后处理，实现群养猪的自动化检测、分割与长期身份跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 白天检测精度高，但夜视和严重遮挡下性能下降，需引入时序跟踪逻辑；短时分割后80%以上轨迹完全正确，剩余错误源于不准确掩码或重复标签。
analysis.method: FM中心工作流：Grounding-DINO做检测，Grounded-SAM2做短时视频分割，再开发长时跟踪流水线（含初始化、跟踪、匹配、掩码细化、重识别、后验质量控制）。
contributions: 提出基于基础模型的群养猪自动化监控流程，减少对大规模标注和农场特定训练的依赖。
开发长时跟踪流水线，在132分钟连续视频上实现无身份切换的稳定跟踪。
analysis.experiments: 在1,418张标注图像上评估检测，550个1分钟视频片段上评估短时分段，132分钟连续视频上评估长时跟踪；指标包括J、F、J&F、MOTA、MOTP。
limitations: 夜视和严重遮挡下检测性能仍有限。
后处理依赖手工规则，可能难以泛化到其他农场或物种。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用基础模型（Grounding-DINO + Grounded-SAM2）实现群养猪的自动化分割与长期跟踪，在132分钟连续视频上达到高精度且无身份切换。

papers.title: AEGIS: Scaling Long-Sequence Homomorphic Encrypted Transformer Inference via Hybrid Parallelism on Multi-GPU Systems
papers.abstract: Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables privacy-preserving Transformer inference, but long-sequence encrypted Transformers quickly exceed single-GPU memory capacity because encoded weights are already large and encrypted activations grow rapidly with sequence length. Multi-GPU execution therefore becomes unavoidable, yet scaling remains challenging because communication is jointly induced by application-level aggregation and encryption-level RNS coupling. Existing approaches either synchronize between devices frequently or replicate encrypted tensors across devices, leading to excessive communication and latency. We present AEGIS, an Application-Encryption Guided Inference System for scalable long-sequence encrypted Transformer inference on multi-GPU platforms. AEGIS derives device placement from ciphertext dependencies jointly induced by Transformer dataflow and CKKS polynomial coupling, co-locating modulus-coherent and token-coherent data so that communication is introduced only when application dependencies require it, while reordering polynomial operators to overlap the remaining collectives with computation. On 2048-token inputs, AEGIS reduces inter-GPU communication by up to 57.9% in feed-forward networks and 81.3% in self-attention versus prior state-of-the-art designs. On four GPUs, it achieves up to 96.62% scaling efficiency, 3.86x end-to-end speedup, and 69.1% per-device memory reduction. These results establish coordinated application-encryption parallelism as a practical foundation for scalable homomorphic Transformer inference.

analysis.tldr: AEGIS通过混合并行策略在多GPU上实现长序列同态加密Transformer推理，显著减少通信并提升扩展效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 长序列同态加密Transformer推理中，单GPU内存不足，多GPU扩展因应用层聚合和加密层RNS耦合导致的通信开销巨大，现有方法频繁同步或复制张量，延迟过高。
analysis.problem: 如何设计多GPU系统上的并行策略，以最小化通信开销并实现高效的长序列同态加密Transformer推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，长序列加密Transformer中，编码权重已很大，加密激活随序列长度快速增长，导致单GPU内存不足；多GPU扩展时，通信由应用层聚合和加密层RNS耦合共同引起，现有方法通信和延迟过高。
analysis.method: AEGIS从密文依赖关系（由Transformer数据流和CKKS多项式耦合共同决定）推导设备放置，共置模一致和令牌一致的数据，仅在应用依赖需要时引入通信，并通过重排序多项式算子将剩余集合操作与计算重叠。
contributions: 提出应用-加密引导的推理系统AEGIS，实现多GPU上长序列同态加密Transformer推理的可扩展并行。
通过共置模一致和令牌一致数据减少通信，并利用算子重排序重叠集合操作，在2048令牌输入下，前馈网络通信减少57.9%，自注意力通信减少81.3%。
在四GPU上达到96.62%的扩展效率，3.86倍端到端加速，每设备内存减少69.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在2048令牌输入上评估，与先前最优设计相比，前馈网络通信减少57.9%，自注意力通信减少81.3%；四GPU上扩展效率96.62%，端到端加速3.86倍，每设备内存减少69.1%。
limitations: 可能仅针对CKKS加密方案和特定Transformer架构，泛化性需验证。
未讨论不同加密参数或更长序列下的性能表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AEGIS通过混合并行策略在多GPU上实现长序列同态加密Transformer推理，显著减少通信并提升扩展效率。

papers.title: Zero-Shot Quantization via Weight-Space Arithmetic
papers.abstract: We show that robustness to post-training quantization (PTQ) is a transferable direction in weight space. We call this direction the quantization vector: extracted from a donor task by simple weight-space arithmetic, it can be used to patch a receiver model and improve post-PTQ Top-1 accuracy by up to 60 points in a 3-bit setting, without receiver-side quantization-aware training (QAT). Because the method requires no receiver training data, it provides a zero-shot, low-cost alternative to QAT for extremely low-bit deployment. Across four ViT scales and 22 image classification tasks, donor quantization vectors often yield substantial gains even when donor and receiver tasks differ markedly. We further prove rigorously that quantization vectors are well-defined and do not suffer from reparameterization symmetries, and provide a local geometric account of their effect. Together, these results suggest that quantization robustness can be partially isolated, reused, and transferred through simple weight-space algebra.

analysis.tldr: 通过权重空间算术提取量化向量，实现零样本后训练量化鲁棒性迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 后训练量化（PTQ）在极低比特部署中精度损失严重，而量化感知训练（QAT）需要大量数据和计算，成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用接收端训练数据的情况下，提升极低比特PTQ的精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量化鲁棒性在权重空间中具有可迁移的方向性，即量化向量，且该向量在不同任务间有效。
analysis.method: 从捐赠任务中通过权重空间算术提取量化向量，将其修补到接收模型中以提升PTQ精度。
contributions: 发现量化鲁棒性是可迁移的权重空间方向，并定义量化向量。
提出零样本、低成本的PTQ增强方法，无需接收端训练数据或QAT。
在多种ViT规模和22个图像分类任务上验证有效性，精度提升高达60点（3-bit）。
严格证明量化向量的良定义性，并提供局部几何解释。
analysis.experiments: 在四种ViT规模和22个图像分类任务上评估，3-bit设置下Top-1精度提升高达60点。
limitations: 仅适用于后训练量化场景，未探索训练中量化。
量化向量的提取依赖捐赠任务，可能受捐赠任务质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过权重空间算术提取量化向量，实现零样本后训练量化鲁棒性迁移。

papers.title: KiToke: Kernel-based Interval-aware Token Compression for Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) achieve strong performance on video understanding tasks but suffer from high inference costs due to the large number of visual tokens. We propose KiToke, a training-free, query-agnostic token compression approach that reduces spatiotemporal redundancy while preserving critical visual information. Our method estimates token diversity globally using a kernel-based redundancy measure, enabling content-adaptive selection that remains effective under extreme token budgets, and further introduces a lightweight temporal interval construction with interval-aware token merging to maintain temporal coherence. Unlike prior methods that rely on local or segment-level heuristics, KiToke explicitly captures global redundancy across an entire video, leading to more efficient token utilization. Extensive experiments on multiple video understanding benchmarks and Video LLM backbones demonstrate that KiToke consistently outperforms existing training-free compression methods, with particularly large gains at aggressive retention ratios down to 1%.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、查询无关的核密度估计+时间区间感知的视觉令牌压缩方法，在极低保留率下仍保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大语言模型推理成本高，主要瓶颈在于大量视觉令牌带来的计算开销，现有压缩方法多依赖局部或分段启发式，全局冗余利用不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲视频理解性能的前提下，高效压缩视频大语言模型中的视觉令牌数量，尤其是应对极低令牌预算场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出KiToke方法，包含两个核心组件：1) 基于核的全局冗余度量，用于内容自适应选择令牌；2) 轻量级时间区间构建与区间感知令牌合并，保持时间连贯性。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、查询无关的令牌压缩方法，利用核密度估计全局捕获视频冗余。
引入时间区间感知的令牌合并策略，在极低保留率（如1%）下仍能保持性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视频理解基准和视频LLM骨干网络上进行实验，KiToke一致优于现有无需训练的压缩方法，尤其在激进保留率下增益显著。
limitations: 可能对极长视频或高动态场景的适应性需进一步验证。
核函数选择与超参数可能影响压缩效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、查询无关的核密度估计+时间区间感知的视觉令牌压缩方法，在极低保留率下仍保持性能。

papers.title: Generative AI for material design: A mechanics perspective from burgers to matter
papers.abstract: Generative artificial intelligence offers a new paradigm to design matter in high-dimensional spaces. However, its underlying mechanisms remain difficult to interpret and limit adoption in computational mechanics. This gap is striking because its core tools-diffusion, stochastic differential equations, and inverse problems-are fundamental to the mechanics of materials. Here we show that diffusion-based generative AI and computational mechanics are rooted in the same principles. We illustrate this connection using a three-ingredient burger as a minimal benchmark for material design in a low-dimensional space, where both forward and reverse diffusion admit analytical solutions: Markov chains with Bayesian inversion in the discrete case and the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process with score-based reversal in the continuous case. We extend this framework to a high-dimensional design space with 146 ingredients and 8.9x10^43 possible configurations, where analytical solutions become intractable. We therefore learn the discrete and continuous reverse processes using neural network models that infer inverse dynamics from data. We train the models on only 2,260 recipes and generate one million samples that capture the statistical structure of the data, including ingredient prevalence and quantitative composition. We further generate five new burgers and validate them in a restaurant-based sensory study with 100 participants, where three of the AI-designed burgers outperform the classical Big Mac in overall liking, flavor, and texture. These results establish diffusion-based generative modeling as a physically grounded approach to design in high-dimensional spaces. They position generative AI as a natural extension of computational mechanics, with applications from burgers to matter, and establish a path toward data-driven, physics-informed generative design.

analysis.tldr: 扩散生成模型与计算力学同源，可设计高维材料，从汉堡配方到物质设计均有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成AI在材料设计中潜力巨大，但其机制难以解释，限制了在计算力学中的应用；而扩散、随机微分方程等核心工具正是力学的基础。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合生成AI与计算力学之间的理论鸿沟，并验证扩散模型在高维材料设计中的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过理论证明扩散生成模型与计算力学同源，并用低维（3种成分）和高维（146种成分）汉堡配方设计作为基准，学习离散和连续逆过程的神经网络模型。
contributions: 理论证明扩散生成模型与计算力学共享相同原理。
在低维和高维空间中验证了扩散模型用于材料设计，并通过餐厅感官研究证明AI设计的汉堡优于经典产品。
analysis.experiments: 在146种成分、8.9×10^43种可能配置的高维空间中，仅用2260个配方训练模型，生成100万个样本；并生成5个新汉堡，经100名参与者感官测试，其中3个在整体喜好、风味和质地方面优于经典Big Mac。
limitations: 仅以汉堡配方为例，其他材料（如合金、聚合物）的泛化性未验证。
感官研究样本量较小（100人），且仅针对单一产品类别。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 扩散生成模型与计算力学同源，可设计高维材料，从汉堡配方到物质设计均有效。

papers.title: DRIFT: Deep Restoration, ISP Fusion, and Tone-mapping
papers.abstract: Smartphone cameras have gained immense popularity with the adoption of high-resolution and high-dynamic range imaging. As a result, high-performance camera Image Signal Processors (ISPs) are crucial in generating high-quality images for the end user while keeping computational costs low. In this paper, we propose DRIFT (Deep Restoration, ISP Fusion, and Tone-mapping): an efficient AI mobile camera pipeline that generates high quality RGB images from hand-held raw captures. The first stage of DRIFT is a Multi-Frame Processing (MFP) network that is trained using a adversarial perceptual loss to perform multi-frame alignment, denoising, demosaicing, and super-resolution. Then, the output of DRIFT-MFP is processed by a novel deep-learning based tone-mapping (DRIFT-TM) solution that allows for tone tunability, ensures tone-consistency with a reference pipeline, and can be run efficiently for high-resolution images on a mobile device. We show qualitative and quantitative comparisons against state-of-the-art MFP and tone-mapping methods to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个高效的AI手机相机流水线DRIFT，包含多帧处理网络和深度学习色调映射，用于从手持原始拍摄生成高质量RGB图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能手机相机需要高性能图像信号处理器（ISP）以生成高质量图像，同时保持低计算成本，现有方法在效率和效果上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效的AI移动相机流水线，实现多帧对齐、去噪、去马赛克、超分辨率和色调映射，以生成高质量RGB图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DRIFT流水线，第一阶段为多帧处理网络（DRIFT-MFP），使用对抗感知损失训练，执行多帧对齐、去噪、去马赛克和超分辨率；第二阶段为基于深度学习的色调映射（DRIFT-TM），支持色调可调性、与参考流水线的色调一致性，并在移动设备上高效运行。
contributions: 提出DRIFT，一个高效的AI移动相机流水线，结合多帧处理和深度学习色调映射。
DRIFT-MFP使用对抗感知损失进行多帧处理，DRIFT-TM实现色调可调性和一致性。
analysis.experiments: 与最先进的多帧处理和色调映射方法进行了定性和定量比较，展示了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定硬件或移动设备优化。
色调映射的可调性范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个高效的AI手机相机流水线DRIFT，包含多帧处理网络和深度学习色调映射，用于从手持原始拍摄生成高质量RGB图像。

papers.title: Can LLMs Reason About Attention? Towards Zero-Shot Analysis of Multimodal Classroom Behavior
papers.abstract: Understanding student engagement usually requires time-consuming manual observation or invasive recording that raises privacy concerns. We present a privacy-preserving pipeline that analyzes classroom videos to extract insights about student attention, without storing any identifiable footage. Our system runs on a single GPU, using OpenPose for skeletal extraction and Gaze-LLE for visual attention estimation. Original video frames are deleted immediately after pose extraction, thus only geometric coordinates (stored as JSON) are retained, ensuring compliance with FERPA. The extracted pose and gaze data is processed by QwQ-32B-Reasoning, which performs zero-shot analysis of student behavior across lecture segments. Instructors access results through a web dashboard featuring attention heatmaps and behavioral summaries. Our preliminary findings suggest that LLMs may show promise for multimodal behavior understanding, although they still struggle with spatial reasoning about classroom layouts. We discuss these limitations and outline directions for improving LLM spatial comprehension in educational analytics contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐私保护的课堂视频分析流程，用LLM零样本分析学生注意力，但空间推理能力不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统课堂参与度分析依赖耗时的人工观察或侵犯隐私的录像，需要一种隐私保护且自动化的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保护隐私的前提下，利用LLM对课堂视频进行零样本行为分析，并克服其空间推理局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM在零样本多模态行为理解上表现出潜力，但在课堂布局的空间推理上仍存在困难。
analysis.method: 隐私保护流程：OpenPose提取骨骼+Gaze-LLE估计视觉注意力，删除原始帧仅保留几何坐标，再由QwQ-32B-Reasoning进行零样本分析，结果通过Web仪表盘展示。
contributions: 提出一种隐私保护的课堂视频分析流程，符合FERPA法规。
初步探索LLM在零样本多模态行为理解中的应用，并指出空间推理局限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: LLM在课堂布局空间推理上表现不足。
仅初步发现，缺乏大规模定量评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出隐私保护的课堂视频分析流程，用LLM零样本分析学生注意力，但空间推理能力不足。

papers.title: Banana100: Breaking NR-IQA Metrics by 100 Iterative Image Replications with Nano Banana Pro
papers.abstract: The multi-step, iterative image editing capabilities of multi-modal agentic systems have transformed digital content creation. Although latest image editing models faithfully follow instructions and generate high-quality images in single-turn edits, we identify a critical weakness in multi-turn editing, which is the iterative degradation of image quality. As images are repeatedly edited, minor artifacts accumulate, rapidly leading to a severe accumulation of visible noise and a failure to follow simple editing instructions. To systematically study these failures, we introduce Banana100, a comprehensive dataset of 28,000 degraded images generated through 100 iterative editing steps, including diverse textures and image content. Alarmingly, image quality evaluators fail to detect the degradation. Among 21 popular no-reference image quality assessment (NR-IQA) metrics, none of them consistently assign lower scores to heavily degraded images than to clean ones. The dual failures of generators and evaluators may threaten the stability of future model training and the safety of deployed agentic systems, if the low-quality synthetic data generated by multi-turn edits escape quality filters. We release the full code and data to facilitate the development of more robust models, helping to mitigate the fragility of multi-modal agentic systems.

analysis.tldr: 多轮迭代编辑导致图像质量严重退化，但现有NR-IQA指标无法检测到这种退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态智能体系统的多步迭代图像编辑能力已改变数字内容创作，但现有研究主要关注单轮编辑质量，忽略了多轮编辑中图像质量逐步退化的问题，这种退化可能威胁模型训练和系统安全。
analysis.problem: 多轮迭代图像编辑中图像质量严重退化，且现有无参考图像质量评估（NR-IQA）指标无法检测到这种退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过100轮迭代编辑，图像质量快速退化，出现可见噪声累积和指令遵循失败；21种流行NR-IQA指标均无法区分严重退化图像与干净图像。
analysis.method: 构建Banana100数据集，包含28,000张通过100轮迭代编辑生成的退化图像，涵盖多种纹理和内容，用于系统研究多轮编辑中的质量退化问题。
contributions: 识别并系统研究了多轮迭代图像编辑中的质量退化问题
构建了Banana100数据集，包含28,000张退化图像
揭示了21种NR-IQA指标均无法检测多轮编辑退化
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅基于特定编辑模型和流程，可能不覆盖所有退化模式
未提出改进NR-IQA指标或生成模型的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多轮迭代编辑导致图像质量严重退化，但现有NR-IQA指标无法检测到这种退化。

papers.title: TABQAWORLD: Optimizing Multimodal Reasoning for Multi-Turn Table Question Answering
papers.abstract: Multimodal reasoning has emerged as a powerful framework for enhancing reasoning capabilities of reasoning models. While multi-turn table reasoning methods have improved reasoning accuracy through tool use and reward modeling, they rely on fixed text serialization for table state readouts. This introduces representation errors in table encoding that significantly accumulate over multiple turns. Such accumulation is alleviated by tabular grounding methods in the expense of inference compute and cost, rendering real world deployment impractical. To address this, we introduce TABQAWORLD, a table reasoning framework that jointly optimizes tabular action through representation and estimation. For representation, TABQAWORLD employs an action-conditioned multimodal selection policy, which dynamically switches between visual and textual representations to maximize table state readout reliability. For estimation, TABQAWORLD optimizes stepwise reasoning trajectory through table metadata including dimension, data types and key values, safely planning trajectory and compressing low-complexity actions to reduce conversation turns and latency. Designed as a training-free framework, empirical evaluations show that TABQAWORLD achieves state-of-the-art performance with 4.87% accuracy improvements over baselines, with 5.42% accuracy gain and 33.35% inference latency reduction over static settings, establishing a new standard for reliable and efficient table reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出TABQAWORLD框架，通过动态多模态选择策略和元数据引导的轨迹优化，在无需训练的情况下提升多轮表格问答的准确率和推理效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格推理方法在多轮交互中因固定文本序列化导致表示误差累积，而表格定位方法虽能缓解但推理成本过高，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 多轮表格问答中表格状态读出的表示误差累积以及推理效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定文本序列化在多轮交互中导致表示误差显著累积；表格定位方法虽能缓解但增加了推理计算和成本。
analysis.method: 提出TABQAWORLD框架，包含动作条件多模态选择策略（动态切换视觉/文本表示）和基于表格元数据（维度、数据类型、关键值）的逐步推理轨迹优化，压缩低复杂度动作以减少轮次和延迟。
contributions: 提出动作条件多模态选择策略，动态切换视觉和文本表示以最大化表格状态读出可靠性。
利用表格元数据优化推理轨迹，压缩低复杂度动作，减少对话轮次和推理延迟。
在无需训练的情况下实现SOTA性能，准确率提升4.87%，同时降低33.35%推理延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在多个表格问答基准上评估，TABQAWORLD相比基线准确率提升4.87%，相比静态设置准确率提升5.42%，推理延迟降低33.35%。
limitations: 可能依赖表格元数据的完整性和准确性。
多模态选择策略的泛化性可能受限于表格类型和领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TABQAWORLD框架，通过动态多模态选择策略和元数据引导的轨迹优化，在无需训练的情况下提升多轮表格问答的准确率和推理效率。

papers.title: Hume's Representational Conditions for Causal Judgment: What Bayesian Formalization Abstracted Away
papers.abstract: Hume's account of causal judgment presupposes three representational conditions: experiential grounding (ideas must trace to impressions), structured retrieval (association must operate through organized networks exceeding pairwise connection), and vivacity transfer (inference must produce felt conviction, not merely updated probability). This paper extracts these conditions from Hume's texts and argues that they are integral to his causal psychology. It then traces their fate through the formalization trajectory from Hume to Bayesian epistemology and predictive processing, showing that later frameworks preserve the updating structure of Hume's insight while abstracting away these further representational conditions. Large language models serve as an illustrative contemporary case: they exhibit a form of statistical updating without satisfying the three conditions, thereby making visible requirements that were previously background assumptions in Hume's framework.

analysis.tldr: 从休谟因果判断的三个表征条件出发，分析贝叶斯形式化如何抽象掉这些条件，并以LLM为例说明其缺失。
analysis.research_motivation: 休谟的因果判断理论隐含了经验基础、结构化检索和生动性转移三个表征条件，但后续贝叶斯形式化抽象掉了这些条件，导致对因果认知的理解可能不完整。
analysis.problem: 揭示休谟因果判断理论中被贝叶斯形式化抽象掉的表征条件，并论证其重要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 从休谟文本中提取三个表征条件，追踪它们在贝叶斯形式化中的命运，并以LLM作为当代案例进行说明。
contributions: 从休谟文本中系统提取并论证了因果判断的三个表征条件。
分析了贝叶斯形式化如何抽象掉这些条件，并以LLM为例展示了缺失这些条件的后果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏对贝叶斯形式化优势的充分讨论。
LLM案例的类比可能不够精确。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从休谟因果判断的三个表征条件出发，分析贝叶斯形式化如何抽象掉这些条件，并以LLM为例说明其缺失。

papers.title: ViBA: Implicit Bundle Adjustment with Geometric and Temporal Consistency for Robust Visual Matching
papers.abstract: Most existing image keypoint detection and description methods rely on datasets with accurate pose and depth annotations, limiting scalability and generalization, and often degrading navigation and localization performance. We propose ViBA, a sustainable learning framework that integrates geometric optimization with feature learning for continuous online training on unconstrained video streams. Embedded in a standard visual odometry pipeline, it consists of an implicitly differentiable geometric residual framework: (i) an initial tracking network for inter-frame correspondences, (ii) depth-based outlier filtering, and (iii) differentiable global bundle adjustment that jointly refines camera poses and feature positions by minimizing reprojection errors. By combining geometric consistency from BA with long-term temporal consistency across frames, ViBA enforces stable and accurate feature representations. We evaluate ViBA on EuRoC and UMA datasets. Compared with state-of-the-art methods such as SuperPoint+SuperGlue, ALIKED, and LightGlue, ViBA reduces mean absolute translation error (ATE) by 12-18% and absolute rotation error (ARE) by 5-10% across sequences, while maintaining real-time inference speeds (FPS 36-91). When evaluated on unseen sequences, it retains over 90% localization accuracy, demonstrating robust generalization. These results show that ViBA supports continuous online learning with geometric and temporal consistency, consistently improving navigation and localization in real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: ViBA将隐式可微光束法平差与特征学习结合，在视频流上实现持续在线训练，显著提升视觉匹配与定位精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像关键点检测与描述方法依赖带精确位姿和深度标注的数据集，限制了可扩展性和泛化能力，且在导航和定位任务中性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在无约束视频流上实现持续在线训练，同时保持几何与时间一致性以提升视觉匹配鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ViBA框架，包含初始跟踪网络、基于深度的离群点过滤和可微全局光束法平差，通过最小化重投影误差联合优化相机位姿和特征位置，并融合几何一致性与长期时间一致性。
contributions: 提出一种可持续学习框架，将几何优化与特征学习集成，支持在无约束视频流上在线训练。
设计隐式可微几何残差框架，包括跟踪网络、离群点过滤和可微光束法平差。
在EuRoC和UMA数据集上，相比SuperPoint+SuperGlue等方法，平均平移误差降低12-18%，旋转误差降低5-10%，且保持实时推理速度。
analysis.experiments: 在EuRoC和UMA数据集上评估，与SuperPoint+SuperGlue、ALIKED、LightGlue等方法对比，ViBA在多个序列上降低ATE 12-18%、ARE 5-10%，FPS为36-91，且在未见序列上保持90%以上定位精度。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或动态场景敏感。
依赖初始跟踪网络的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViBA将隐式可微光束法平差与特征学习结合，在视频流上实现持续在线训练，显著提升视觉匹配与定位精度。

papers.title: VERT: Reliable LLM Judges for Radiology Report Evaluation
papers.abstract: Current literature on radiology report evaluation has focused primarily on designing LLM-based metrics and fine-tuning small models for chest X-rays. However, it remains unclear whether these approaches are robust when applied to reports from other modalities and anatomies. Which model and prompt configurations are best suited to serve as LLM judges for radiology evaluation? We conduct a thorough correlation analysis between expert and LLM-based ratings. We compare three existing LLM-as-a-judge metrics (RadFact, GREEN, and FineRadScore) alongside VERT, our proposed LLM-based metric, using open- and closed-source models (reasoning and non-reasoning) of different sizes across two expert-annotated datasets, RadEval and RaTE-Eval, spanning multiple modalities and anatomies. We further evaluate few-shot approaches, ensembling, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning using RaTE-Eval. To better understand metric behavior, we perform a systematic error detection and categorization study to assess alignment of these metrics against expert judgments and identify areas of lower and higher agreement. Our results show that VERT improves correlation with radiologist judgments by up to 11.7% relative to GREEN. Furthermore, fine-tuning Qwen3 30B yield gains of up to 25% using only 1,300 training samples. The fine-tuned model also reduces inference time up to 37.2 times. These findings highlight the effectiveness of LLM-based judges and demonstrate that reliable evaluation can be achieved with lightweight adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 提出VERT指标，通过微调Qwen3 30B模型在放射学报告评估中与专家判断的相关性提升高达11.7%，推理速度提升37.2倍。
