analysis.research_motivation: 现有放射学报告评估的LLM指标主要针对胸部X光设计，跨模态和跨解剖部位的鲁棒性未知，且缺乏对模型和提示配置的系统比较。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可靠且高效的LLM评判指标，使其在不同模态和解剖部位的放射学报告评估中与专家判断高度一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VERT指标，基于LLM评判框架，结合专家标注数据集进行相关性分析，并采用参数高效微调（PEFT）优化Qwen3 30B模型。
contributions: 提出VERT指标，在放射学报告评估中与专家判断的相关性比GREEN提升11.7%。
通过微调Qwen3 30B模型，仅用1300个训练样本实现25%的性能提升，同时推理速度提升37.2倍。
analysis.experiments: 在两个专家标注数据集（RadEval和RaTE-Eval）上，比较了多种LLM指标（RadFact、GREEN、FineRadScore和VERT），并评估了少样本、集成和参数高效微调方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于放射学报告领域，泛化到其他医学文本需验证。
微调模型依赖特定数据集，数据偏差可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VERT指标，通过微调Qwen3 30B模型在放射学报告评估中与专家判断的相关性提升高达11.7%，推理速度提升37.2倍。

papers.title: CresOWLve: Benchmarking Creative Problem-Solving Over Real-World Knowledge
papers.abstract: Creative problem-solving requires combining multiple cognitive abilities, including logical reasoning, lateral thinking, analogy-making, and commonsense knowledge, to discover insights that connect seemingly unrelated pieces of information. However, most existing benchmarks for large language models (LLMs) evaluate only specific components of this process. Moreover, many creativity-oriented benchmarks rely on artificially constructed brainteasers or contrived scenarios that do not reflect how creative problem-solving occurs in real-world settings. To address this gap, we introduce CresOWLve, a benchmark for evaluating creative problem-solving using puzzles grounded in real-world knowledge. Problems in CresOWLve require employing multiple creative thinking strategies, retrieving facts from diverse domains, and creatively combining them to arrive at a solution. Evaluating several frontier non-thinking and thinking LLMs, we show that CresOWLve remains highly challenging. Our analysis reveals a consistent performance gap: models perform substantially better on factual questions than on creative ones (up to a -17% drop). While models can often retrieve the relevant knowledge, they struggle to form the non-obvious creative connections required to integrate this information and arrive at the correct answer.

analysis.tldr: CresOWLve 是一个基于真实世界知识的创意问题解决基准，揭示 LLM 在创造性连接上的显著短板。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准要么只评估创意问题解决的单一能力，要么依赖人工构造的谜题，缺乏真实世界场景，无法全面反映 LLM 的创造性思维。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能综合评估 LLM 在真实世界知识背景下进行多策略创意问题解决的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在事实性问题上的表现显著优于创造性问题（性能下降高达 17%），表明模型虽能检索相关知识，但难以建立非显而易见的创意连接。
analysis.method: 构建了一个基于真实世界知识的谜题基准，要求模型运用多种创造性思维策略（如逻辑推理、横向思维、类比、常识）并跨领域整合信息。
contributions: 提出了 CresOWLve，一个评估 LLM 创意问题解决能力的新基准，问题基于真实世界知识。
揭示了前沿 LLM 在创造性连接上的系统性不足，与事实性任务存在显著性能差距。
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿非思维链和思维链 LLM 上进行了评估，结果显示基准具有高挑战性，并分析了事实性与创造性问题的性能差异。
limitations: 基准规模可能有限，未提及具体题目数量。
仅评估了文本模型，未涉及多模态或具身智能场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CresOWLve 是一个基于真实世界知识的创意问题解决基准，揭示 LLM 在创造性连接上的显著短板。

papers.title: CoME-VL: Scaling Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language Learning
papers.abstract: Recent vision-language models (VLMs) typically rely on a single vision encoder trained with contrastive image-text objectives, such as CLIP-style pretraining. While contrastive encoders are effective for cross-modal alignment and retrieval, self-supervised visual encoders often capture richer dense semantics and exhibit stronger robustness on recognition and understanding tasks. In this work, we investigate how to scale the fusion of these complementary visual representations for vision-language modeling. We propose CoME-VL: Complementary Multi-Encoder Vision-Language, a modular fusion framework that integrates a contrastively trained vision encoder with a self-supervised DINO encoder. Our approach performs representation-level fusion by (i) entropy-guided multi-layer aggregation with orthogonality-constrained projections to reduce redundancy, and (ii) RoPE-enhanced cross-attention to align heterogeneous token grids and produce compact fused visual tokens. The fused tokens can be injected into a decoder-only LLM with minimal changes to standard VLM pipelines. Extensive experiments across diverse vision-language benchmarks demonstrate that CoME-VL consistently outperforms single-encoder baselines. In particular, we observe an average improvement of 4.9% on visual understanding tasks and 5.4% on grounding tasks. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on RefCOCO for detection while improving over the baseline by a large margin. Finally, we conduct ablation studies on layer merging, non-redundant feature mixing, and fusion capacity to evaluate how complementary contrastive and self-supervised signals affect VLM performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoME-VL框架，融合对比学习与自监督视觉编码器，通过熵引导聚合和RoPE交叉注意力提升VLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM多依赖单一对比学习编码器（如CLIP），虽擅长跨模态对齐，但自监督编码器（如DINO）能捕获更丰富的密集语义和鲁棒性，如何有效融合两者互补优势是当前瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计模块化融合框架，将对比训练和自监督视觉编码器的互补表征高效集成到VLM中，并最小化对标准流水线的改动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对比编码器擅长对齐和检索，自监督编码器在识别和理解任务上更鲁棒，两者互补；直接拼接或简单融合会导致冗余和不对齐。
analysis.method: CoME-VL框架：1) 熵引导多层聚合+正交约束投影减少冗余；2) RoPE增强交叉注意力对齐异构token网格并生成紧凑融合视觉token；3) 融合token注入decoder-only LLM。
contributions: 提出CoME-VL，首个系统研究对比与自监督多编码器融合的VLM框架
设计熵引导聚合和RoPE交叉注意力实现高效表征级融合
在多个视觉语言基准上取得SOTA，尤其在RefCOCO检测任务上大幅提升
analysis.experiments: 在多个视觉语言基准上评估，视觉理解任务平均提升4.9%，定位任务平均提升5.4%，RefCOCO检测达到SOTA；进行了消融研究。
limitations: 仅探索了两种编码器（CLIP和DINO），更多编码器组合未验证
融合计算开销可能增加推理延迟
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoME-VL框架，融合对比学习与自监督视觉编码器，通过熵引导聚合和RoPE交叉注意力提升VLM性能。

papers.title: Enhancing Robustness of Federated Learning via Server Learning
papers.abstract: This paper explores the use of server learning for enhancing the robustness of federated learning against malicious attacks even when clients' training data are not independent and identically distributed. We propose a heuristic algorithm that uses server learning and client update filtering in combination with geometric median aggregation. We demonstrate via experiments that this approach can achieve significant improvement in model accuracy even when the fraction of malicious clients is high, even more than $50\%$ in some cases, and the dataset utilized by the server is small and could be synthetic with its distribution not necessarily close to that of the clients' aggregated data.

analysis.tldr: 通过服务器学习与客户端过滤结合几何中位数聚合，提升联邦学习在恶意攻击下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习易受恶意客户端攻击，且现有方法在数据非独立同分布时鲁棒性不足，亟需更有效的防御策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在客户端数据非独立同分布且存在高比例恶意攻击时，提升联邦学习的模型鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种启发式算法，结合服务器学习、客户端更新过滤和几何中位数聚合。
contributions: 首次探索服务器学习在联邦学习鲁棒性增强中的应用。
提出结合客户端过滤与几何中位数聚合的启发式算法，在高恶意客户端比例下仍能显著提升模型精度。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，即使恶意客户端比例超过50%，且服务器数据集小且可能为合成数据（分布与客户端聚合数据不一致），该方法仍能显著提升模型精度。
limitations: 算法为启发式，缺乏理论最优性保证。
服务器数据集大小和分布的影响未深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过服务器学习与客户端过滤结合几何中位数聚合，提升联邦学习在恶意攻击下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: VOSR: A Vision-Only Generative Model for Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Most of the recent generative image super-resolution (SR) methods rely on adapting large text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models pretrained on web-scale text-image data. While effective, this paradigm starts from a generic T2I generator, despite that SR is fundamentally a low-resolution (LR) input-conditioned image restoration task. In this work, we investigate whether an SR model trained purely on visual data can rival T2I-based ones. To this end, we propose VOSR, a Vision-Only generative framework for SR. We first extract semantically rich and spatially grounded features from the LR input using a pretrained vision encoder as visual semantic guidance. We then revisit classifier-free guidance for training generative models and show that the standard unconditional branch is ill-suited to restoration models trained from scratch. We therefore replace it with a restoration-oriented guidance strategy that preserves weak LR anchors. Built upon these designs, we first train a multi-step VOSR model from scratch and then distill it into a one-step model for efficient inference. VOSR requires less than one-tenth of the training cost of representative T2I-based SR methods, yet in both multi-step and one-step settings, it achieves competitive or even better perceptual quality and efficiency, while producing more faithful structures with fewer hallucinations on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Our results, for the first time, show that high-quality generative SR can be achieved without multimodal pretraining. The code and models can be found at https://github.com/cswry/VOSR.

analysis.tldr: 提出纯视觉生成超分模型VOSR，无需多模态预训练即可达到甚至超越基于T2I扩散模型的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式超分方法大多依赖大规模文本-图像预训练扩散模型，训练成本高且可能引入幻觉，而超分本质上是低分辨率输入条件化的图像恢复任务，因此探索纯视觉生成方案具有重要价值。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个仅使用视觉数据训练、无需多模态预训练的高质量生成式超分模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准无条件引导分支不适用于从零训练的恢复模型，需要替换为保留弱LR锚点的恢复导向引导策略。
analysis.method: 提出VOSR框架，使用预训练视觉编码器提取语义和空间特征作为视觉语义引导，并设计恢复导向的无分类器引导策略替代标准无条件分支；先训练多步模型，再蒸馏为单步模型。
contributions: 首次证明纯视觉生成超分可以达到甚至超越基于T2I扩散模型的方法。
提出恢复导向的引导策略，有效解决标准无分类器引导在恢复模型中的不适配问题。
训练成本降低至十分之一以下，同时保持竞争性感知质量和更少幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实世界基准上评估，多步和单步设置均取得竞争性或更优的感知质量和效率，且结构更忠实、幻觉更少。
limitations: 可能依赖特定视觉编码器，泛化性需进一步验证。
单步蒸馏可能损失部分细节质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出纯视觉生成超分模型VOSR，无需多模态预训练即可达到甚至超越基于T2I扩散模型的方法。

papers.title: HyperCT: Low-Rank Hypernet for Unified Chest CT Analysis
papers.abstract: Non-contrast chest CTs offer a rich opportunity for both conventional pulmonary and opportunistic extra-pulmonary screening. While Multi-Task Learning (MTL) can unify these diverse tasks, standard hard-parameter sharing approaches are often suboptimal for modeling distinct pathologies. We propose HyperCT, a framework that dynamically adapts a Vision Transformer backbone via a Hypernetwork. To ensure computational efficiency, we integrate Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), allowing the model to regress task-specific low-rank weight updates rather than full parameters. Validated on a large-scale dataset of radiological and cardiological tasks, \method{} outperforms various strong baselines, offering a unified, parameter-efficient solution for holistic patient assessment. Our code is available at https://github.com/lfb-1/HyperCT.

analysis.tldr: HyperCT 通过超网络和 LoRA 动态调整 ViT 骨干，实现统一、参数高效的胸部 CT 多任务分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 非增强胸部 CT 可用于肺部和机会性肺外筛查，但标准硬参数共享多任务学习难以建模不同病理，需要更灵活的参数高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何统一多种胸部 CT 分析任务（如肺部和心脏评估），同时保持模型参数高效且适应不同病理特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 HyperCT 框架，使用超网络动态调整 Vision Transformer 骨干，并集成低秩适应（LoRA）以回归任务特定的低秩权重更新，而非完整参数。
contributions: 提出 HyperCT，结合超网络和 LoRA 实现统一胸部 CT 分析。
在大规模放射学和心脏病学任务数据集上验证，优于多种强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模放射学和心脏病学任务数据集上验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖超网络设计质量，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅针对胸部 CT，未扩展到其他模态或身体部位。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyperCT 通过超网络和 LoRA 动态调整 ViT 骨干，实现统一、参数高效的胸部 CT 多任务分析。

papers.title: ProtoFlow: Mitigating Forgetting in Class-Incremental Remote Sensing Segmentation via Low-Curvature Prototype Flow
papers.abstract: Remote sensing segmentation in real deployment is inherently continual: new semantic categories emerge, and acquisition conditions shift across seasons, cities, and sensors. Despite recent progress, many incremental approaches still treat training steps as isolated updates, which leaves representation drift and forgetting insufficiently controlled. We present ProtoFlow, a time-aware prototype dynamics framework that models class prototypes as trajectories and learns their evolution with an explicit temporal vector field. By jointly enforcing low-curvature motion and inter-class separation, ProtoFlow stabilizes prototype geometry throughout incremental learning. Experiments on standard class- and domain-incremental remote sensing benchmarks show consistent gains over strong baselines, including up to 1.5-2.0 points improvement in mIoUall, together with reduced forgetting. These results suggest that explicitly modeling temporal prototype evolution is a practical and interpretable strategy for robust continual remote sensing segmentation.

analysis.tldr: ProtoFlow通过低曲率原型流建模类原型轨迹，缓解遥感分割中的灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感分割在实际部署中面临持续学习挑战：新类别不断出现，采集条件（季节、城市、传感器）变化导致表示漂移和遗忘，现有增量方法将训练步骤视为孤立更新，控制不足。
analysis.problem: 如何建模类原型随时间演化的动态过程，以稳定原型几何并减少遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出传统增量方法将训练步骤视为孤立更新，导致表示漂移和遗忘控制不足。
analysis.method: 提出ProtoFlow，一种时间感知的原型动力学框架，将类原型建模为轨迹，用显式时间向量场学习其演化，联合施加低曲率运动和类间分离约束。
contributions: 提出ProtoFlow框架，通过低曲率原型流显式建模原型时间演化。
在类增量和域增量遥感分割基准上取得一致提升，mIoU_all提高1.5-2.0点，遗忘减少。
analysis.experiments: 在标准类增量和域增量遥感分割基准上评估，与强基线对比，mIoU_all提升1.5-2.0点，遗忘减少。
limitations: 可能依赖原型轨迹的初始设定。
未在极大规模或极端类别增量场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProtoFlow通过低曲率原型流建模类原型轨迹，缓解遥感分割中的灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: PR3DICTR: A modular AI framework for medical 3D image-based detection and outcome prediction
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional medical image data and computer-aided decision making, particularly using deep learning, are becoming increasingly important in the medical field. To aid in these developments we introduce PR3DICTR: Platform for Research in 3D Image Classification and sTandardised tRaining. Built using community-standard distributions (PyTorch and MONAI), PR3DICTR provides an open-access, flexible and convenient framework for prediction model development, with an explicit focus on classification using three-dimensional medical image data. By combining modular design principles and standardization, it aims to alleviate developmental burden whilst retaining adjustability. It provides users with a wealth of pre-established functionality, for instance in model architecture design options, hyper-parameter solutions and training methodologies, but still gives users the opportunity and freedom to ``plug in'' their own solutions or modules. PR3DICTR can be applied to any binary or event-based three-dimensional classification task and can work with as little as two lines of code.

analysis.tldr: PR3DICTR是一个基于PyTorch和MONAI的模块化开源框架，用于简化3D医学图像分类和结果预测模型的开发。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学图像数据在计算机辅助决策中日益重要，但现有框架开发负担重、灵活性不足，缺乏标准化和模块化的统一平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个开源、灵活、模块化的框架，降低3D医学图像分类和预测模型的开发门槛，同时保持可调整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PR3DICTR采用模块化设计，集成PyTorch和MONAI，提供预置的模型架构、超参数方案和训练方法，并允许用户自定义模块，支持二进制或事件型3D分类任务，仅需两行代码即可运行。
contributions: 提出了一个开源、模块化的3D医学图像分类与预测框架PR3DICTR。
通过标准化和模块化设计，显著降低开发负担，同时保持高度可调整性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能主要针对分类任务，对其他类型任务（如分割、检测）支持有限。
依赖PyTorch和MONAI生态，可能不兼容其他深度学习库。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PR3DICTR是一个基于PyTorch和MONAI的模块化开源框架，用于简化3D医学图像分类和结果预测模型的开发。

papers.title: Coupled Control, Structured Memory, and Verifiable Action in Agentic AI (SCRAT -- Stochastic Control with Retrieval and Auditable Trajectories): A Comparative Perspective from Squirrel Locomotion and Scatter-Hoarding
papers.abstract: Agentic AI is increasingly judged not by fluent output alone but by whether it can act, remember, and verify under partial observability, delay, and strategic observation. Existing research often studies these demands separately: robotics emphasizes control, retrieval systems emphasize memory, and alignment or assurance work emphasizes checking and oversight. This article argues that squirrel ecology offers a sharp comparative case because arboreal locomotion, scatter-hoarding, and audience-sensitive caching couple all three demands in one organism. We synthesize evidence from fox, eastern gray, and, in one field comparison, red squirrels, and impose an explicit inference ladder: empirical observation, minimal computational inference, and AI design conjecture. We introduce a minimal hierarchical partially observed control model with latent dynamics, structured episodic memory, observer-belief state, option-level actions, and delayed verifier signals. This motivates three hypotheses: (H1) fast local feedback plus predictive compensation improves robustness under hidden dynamics shifts; (H2) memory organized for future control improves delayed retrieval under cue conflict and load; and (H3) verifiers and observer models inside the action-memory loop reduce silent failure and information leakage while remaining vulnerable to misspecification. A downstream conjecture is that role-differentiated proposer/executor/checker/adversary systems may reduce correlated error under asymmetric information and verification burden. The contribution is a comparative perspective and benchmark agenda: a disciplined program of falsifiable claims about the coupling of control, memory, and verifiable action.

analysis.tldr: 从松鼠运动与贮藏行为中提炼控制-记忆-可验证行动耦合的AI设计视角，提出分层部分观测控制模型与基准议程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究将控制、记忆与验证分开处理，但实际智能体需要在部分可观测、延迟和策略性观测下同时满足这三者，缺乏统一视角。
analysis.problem: 如何将控制、记忆与可验证行动耦合到统一的智能体AI框架中，并基于松鼠生态行为提出可检验的假设与基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但基于松鼠生态行为（树栖运动、散播贮藏、观众敏感缓存）提炼出耦合需求。
analysis.method: 提出一个最小化分层部分观测控制模型，包含潜在动力学、结构化情景记忆、观察者信念状态、选项级动作和延迟验证信号，并基于此提出三个假设（H1-H3）及下游猜想。
contributions: 从松鼠生态行为中提炼控制-记忆-可验证行动耦合的对比视角
提出分层部分观测控制模型及三个可检验假设
提出角色分化（提议者/执行者/检查者/对抗者）系统以减少相关错误
提出一个基准议程，包含可证伪的耦合控制、记忆与可验证行动的主张
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型与假设尚未经过实证验证
松鼠生态与AI系统的类比可能存在偏差
基准议程的具体实现与评估标准未详细说明

papers.title: The Eleventh NTIRE 2026 Efficient Super-Resolution Challenge Report
papers.abstract: This paper reviews the NTIRE 2026 challenge on efficient single-image super-resolution with a focus on the proposed solutions and results. The aim of this challenge is to devise a network that reduces one or several aspects, such as runtime, parameters, and FLOPs, while maintaining PSNR of around 26.90 dB on the DIV2K_LSDIR_valid dataset, and 26.99 dB on the DIV2K_LSDIR_test dataset. The challenge had 95 registered participants, and 15 teams made valid submissions. They gauge the state-of-the-art results for efficient single-image super-resolution.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026高效超分挑战赛综述，15支队伍提交方案，目标是在保持PSNR约26.9-27.0 dB的同时减少计算开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图像超分辨率在移动设备等资源受限场景中需要高效模型，现有方法在速度、参数量和FLOPs方面仍有优化空间。
analysis.problem: 设计高效单图像超分辨率网络，在保持PSNR约26.9-27.0 dB的同时降低运行时、参数量和FLOPs。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 挑战赛形式，各参赛团队提出多种高效超分网络架构，具体方法未在摘要中详述。
contributions: 组织NTIRE 2026高效超分挑战赛，吸引95名注册参与者，15支队伍提交有效方案。
总结当前高效单图像超分辨率的最新技术水平。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 摘要未提供具体方法细节，无法评估创新性。
仅报告挑战赛结果，缺乏对失败方案的深入分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026高效超分挑战赛综述，15支队伍提交方案，目标是在保持PSNR约26.9-27.0 dB的同时减少计算开销。

papers.title: Evaluating Artificial Intelligence Through a Christian Understanding of Human Flourishing
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) alignment is fundamentally a formation problem, not only a safety problem. As Large Language Models (LLMs) increasingly mediate moral deliberation and spiritual inquiry, they do more than provide information; they function as instruments of digital catechesis, actively shaping and ordering human understanding, decision-making, and moral reflection. To make this formative influence visible and measurable, we introduce the Flourishing AI Benchmark: Christian Single-Turn (FAI-C-ST), a framework designed to evaluate Frontier Model responses against a Christian understanding of human flourishing across seven dimensions. By comparing 20 Frontier Models against both pluralistic and Christian-specific criteria, we show that current AI systems are not worldview-neutral. Instead, they default to a Procedural Secularism that lacks the grounding necessary to sustain theological coherence, resulting in a systematic performance decline of approximately 17 points across all dimensions of flourishing. Most critically, there is a 31-point decline in the Faith and Spirituality dimension. These findings suggest that the performance gap in values alignment is not a technical limitation, but arises from training objectives that prioritize broad acceptability and safety over deep, internally coherent moral or theological reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出FAI-C-ST基准，评估前沿模型在基督教人类繁荣维度上的对齐表现，发现模型默认程序世俗主义导致约17分系统性下降。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM日益介入道德和精神领域，但现有对齐评估忽视其形成性影响，缺乏基于特定世界观（如基督教）的衡量标准。
analysis.problem: 如何量化评估AI系统在基督教人类繁荣框架下的价值观对齐程度，揭示其隐含的世界观偏向。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：当前AI系统并非世界观中立，而是默认程序世俗主义，导致在基督教繁荣维度上系统性性能下降约17分，其中信仰与灵性维度下降31分。
analysis.method: 构建Flourishing AI Benchmark: Christian Single-Turn (FAI-C-ST)，包含七个维度，对比20个前沿模型在多元主义和基督教特定标准下的表现。
contributions: 提出FAI-C-ST基准，用于评估AI在基督教人类繁荣框架下的对齐。
实证发现前沿模型存在程序世俗主义偏向，导致价值观对齐性能下降。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对比20个前沿模型，发现约17分系统性下降和31分信仰维度下降。
limitations: 基准仅针对基督教视角，可能不适用于其他宗教或世俗世界观。
未讨论模型规模、训练数据等对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FAI-C-ST基准，评估前沿模型在基督教人类繁荣维度上的对齐表现，发现模型默认程序世俗主义导致约17分系统性下降。

papers.title: Reliability Gated Multi-Teacher Distillation for Low Resource Abstractive Summarization
papers.abstract: We study multiteacher knowledge distillation for low resource abstractive summarization from a reliability aware perspective. We introduce EWAD (Entropy Weighted Agreement Aware Distillation), a token level mechanism that routes supervision between teacher distillation and gold supervision based on inter teacher agreement, and CPDP (Capacity Proportional Divergence Preservation), a geometric constraint on the student position relative to heterogeneous teachers. Across two Bangla datasets, 13 BanglaT5 ablations, and eight Qwen2.5 experiments, we find that logit level KD provides the most reliable gains, while more complex distillation improves semantic similarity for short summaries but degrades longer outputs. Cross lingual pseudo label KD across ten languages retains 71-122 percent of teacher ROUGE L at 3.2x compression. A human validated multi judge LLM evaluation further reveals calibration bias in single judge pipelines. Overall, our results show that reliability aware distillation helps characterize when multi teacher supervision improves summarization and when data scaling outweighs loss engineering.

analysis.tldr: 提出可靠性感知的多教师蒸馏方法EWAD和CPDP，在低资源摘要任务中优于单教师基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 低资源抽象摘要任务中，多教师知识蒸馏的可靠性问题尚未被充分研究，现有方法缺乏对教师间一致性和学生位置几何约束的考虑。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可靠性感知的多教师蒸馏机制，以在低资源场景下有效利用多个教师模型的知识并避免退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: logit级KD提供最可靠的增益；复杂蒸馏提升短摘要语义相似性但降低长输出质量；跨语言伪标签KD在3.2倍压缩下保留71-122%的教师ROUGE-L；单裁判LLM评估存在校准偏差。
analysis.method: 提出EWAD（熵加权一致性感知蒸馏）在token级别根据教师间一致性路由蒸馏与黄金监督，以及CPDP（容量比例散度保持）对学生位置施加几何约束。
contributions: 提出可靠性感知的多教师蒸馏框架EWAD和CPDP
在孟加拉语和跨语言设置下验证了方法的有效性，并揭示了不同蒸馏策略的权衡
analysis.experiments: 在两个孟加拉语数据集、13个BanglaT5消融实验和8个Qwen2.5实验上进行，并进行了人类验证的多裁判LLM评估。
limitations: 方法仅在低资源摘要任务上验证，泛化性未知
CPDP的几何约束可能增加训练复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可靠性感知的多教师蒸馏方法EWAD和CPDP，在低资源摘要任务中优于单教师基线。

papers.title: The Compression Gap: Why Discrete Tokenization Limits Vision-Language-Action Model Scaling
papers.abstract: Scaling Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models by upgrading the vision encoder is expected to improve downstream manipulation performance--as it does in vision-language modeling. We show that this expectation fails when actions are represented as discrete tokens, and explain why through an information-theoretic principle we call the Compression Gap: in any visuomotor pipeline, scaling behavior is governed by the location of the tightest information bottleneck. When actions are continuous (e.g., Diffusion Policy), the vision encoder is the binding constraint, and upgrading it directly improves performance. When actions are discretized through a fixed-capacity codebook (e.g., OAT), the codebook becomes the binding constraint, and encoder improvements cannot propagate past it--regardless of how rich the upstream representation is. We validate this principle on the LIBERO benchmark with three lines of evidence: a factorial experiment showing that encoder upgrades improve Diffusion Policy by over 21 percentage points while OAT gains are substantially attenuated across model scales; an encoder quality gradient across four encoders confirming that Diffusion Policy tracks encoder quality monotonically while OAT remains flat; and a codebook size experiment demonstrating that relaxing codebook capacity partially recovers encoder sensitivity, providing causal evidence for the bottleneck hypothesis. Our findings reveal that scaling in Physical AI requires identifying where information bottlenecks lie in the pipeline, rather than uniformly increasing model or data size.

analysis.tldr: 离散动作token化导致VLA模型缩放时出现压缩间隙，视觉编码器升级无法提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型通过升级视觉编码器有望提升下游操作性能，但离散动作token化时这一预期失效，需要理解其根本原因。
analysis.problem: 解释为何离散动作token化会阻碍VLA模型缩放，并揭示信息瓶颈的位置对缩放行为的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当动作表示为离散token时，固定容量的码本成为信息瓶颈，视觉编码器的改进无法传播过去，导致性能提升被抑制。
analysis.method: 提出压缩间隙原理，通过信息论分析指出缩放行为由最紧的信息瓶颈位置决定，并在LIBERO基准上通过因子实验、编码器质量梯度和码本容量实验验证。
contributions: 提出压缩间隙原理，解释离散token化限制VLA模型缩放的原因。
通过三个实验验证原理：编码器升级对扩散策略提升21个百分点以上，而对OAT提升微弱；编码器质量梯度显示扩散策略单调跟踪，OAT平坦；码本容量实验提供因果证据。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO基准上进行了因子实验、编码器质量梯度实验和码本容量实验，结果支持压缩间隙假设。
limitations: 实验仅在LIBERO基准上进行，可能不泛化到其他任务或环境。
未探讨其他离散化方法或连续动作表示的其他变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 离散动作token化导致VLA模型缩放时出现压缩间隙，视觉编码器升级无法提升性能。

papers.title: Gradient Boosting within a Single Attention Layer
papers.abstract: Transformer attention computes a single softmax-weighted average over values -- a one-pass estimate that cannot correct its own errors. We introduce \emph{gradient-boosted attention}, which applies the principle of gradient boosting \emph{within} a single attention layer: a second attention pass, with its own learned projections, attends to the prediction error of the first and applies a gated correction. Under a squared reconstruction objective, the construction maps onto Friedman's gradient boosting machine, with each attention pass as a base learner and the per-dimension gate as the shrinkage parameter. We show that a single Hopfield-style update erases all query information orthogonal to the stored-pattern subspace, and that further iteration under local contraction can collapse distinct queries in the same region to the same fixed point. We also show that separate projections for the correction pass can recover residual information inaccessible to the shared-projection approach of Tukey's twicing. On 10M-token subsets of WikiText-103 and OpenWebText, gradient-boosted attention improves test perplexity by $6.0\%$ and $5.6\%$ over standard attention, outperforming both Twicing Attention and a parameter-matched wider baseline on both benchmarks, with two rounds capturing most of the benefit. We further show, both theoretically and empirically, that the mechanism requires the additive residual structure of Pre-LN transformers: under Post-LN, the same architecture degrades perplexity by $9.6\%$.

analysis.tldr: 在单层注意力中引入梯度提升机制，通过两次注意力传递和门控校正提升Transformer性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Transformer注意力仅进行一次加权平均，无法自我纠正错误，限制了模型表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让单层注意力具备迭代纠错能力，同时保持计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 梯度提升注意力：第一遍注意力计算预测，第二遍注意力以残差为目标，通过门控参数（类似收缩系数）进行校正，整体映射为梯度提升机。
contributions: 提出梯度提升注意力机制，将梯度提升原理融入单层注意力。
理论分析表明该机制需要Pre-LN残差结构，Post-LN下性能下降。
在WikiText-103和OpenWebText上分别提升6.0%和5.6%的测试困惑度。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiText-103和OpenWebText的10M token子集上测试，与标准注意力、Twicing Attention和参数匹配的宽基线对比，梯度提升注意力取得最佳困惑度。
limitations: 仅验证了语言建模任务，其他模态或任务未测试。
两轮注意力增加计算开销，可能影响推理速度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在单层注意力中引入梯度提升机制，通过两次注意力传递和门控校正提升Transformer性能。

papers.title: Reflective Context Learning: Studying the Optimization Primitives of Context Space
papers.abstract: Generally capable agents must learn from experience in ways that generalize across tasks and environments. The fundamental problems of learning, including credit assignment, overfitting, forgetting, local optima, and high-variance learning signals, persist whether the learned object lies in parameter space or context space. While these challenges are well understood in classical machine learning optimization, they remain underexplored in context space, leading current methods to be fragmented and ad hoc. We present Reflective Context Learning (RCL), a unified framework for agents that learn through repeated interaction, reflection on behavior and failure modes, and iterative updates to context. In RCL, reflection converts trajectories and current context into a directional update signal analogous to gradients, while mutation applies that signal to improve future behavior in context space. We recast recent context-optimization approaches as instances of this shared learning problem and systematically extend them with classical optimization primitives, including batching, improved credit-assignment signal, auxiliary losses, failure replay, and grouped rollouts for variance reduction. On AppWorld, BrowseComp+, and RewardBench2, these primitives improve over strong baselines, with their relative importance shifting across task regimes. We further analyze robustness to initialization, the effects of batch size, sampling and curriculum strategy, optimizer-state variants, and the impact of allocating stronger or weaker models to different optimization components. Our results suggest that learning through context updates should be treated not as a set of isolated algorithms, but as an optimization problem whose mechanisms can be studied systematically and improved through transferable principles.

analysis.tldr: 提出反思性上下文学习框架，将上下文优化视为经典优化问题，并系统引入批处理、信用分配等原语提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文空间中的学习问题（如信用分配、过拟合、遗忘等）在经典机器学习优化中已被充分研究，但在上下文空间中仍缺乏系统性理解，现有方法碎片化且临时。
analysis.problem: 如何将上下文学习系统化为一个统一的优化问题，并利用经典优化原语改进其效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Reflective Context Learning (RCL)框架，通过反思将轨迹和当前上下文转换为类似梯度的方向更新信号，并通过变异应用该信号改进未来行为；系统引入批处理、改进的信用分配信号、辅助损失、失败重放和分组 rollout 等优化原语。
contributions: 提出RCL统一框架，将上下文学习重新定义为优化问题。
系统地将经典优化原语扩展到上下文空间，并在多个基准上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在AppWorld、BrowseComp+和RewardBench2上，这些原语优于强基线，且相对重要性随任务场景变化；还分析了初始化鲁棒性、批量大小、采样与课程策略、优化器状态变体以及强弱模型分配的影响。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定任务或环境设置。
未讨论大规模参数模型下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反思性上下文学习框架，将上下文优化视为经典优化问题，并系统引入批处理、信用分配等原语提升性能。

papers.title: Parameter Efficiency Is Not Memory Efficiency: Rethinking Fine-Tuning for On-Device LLM Adaptation
papers.abstract: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become the standard for adapting large language models (LLMs). In this work we challenge the wide-spread assumption that parameter efficiency equates memory efficiency and on-device adaptability. We show that this is not true - while methods like LoRA and IA3 significantly reduce trainable parameters, they remain bound by intermediate tensors that scale linearly with sequence length, often triggering out-of-memory errors on-device. In this work, we introduce LARS (Low-memory Activation-Rank Subspace), a novel adaptation framework that decouples memory consumption from sequence length. While prior PEFT methods apply low-rank constraints to model parameters, LARS instead constrains the activation subspace used during training, directly targeting the dominant source of memory consumption and fundamentally flattening the memory growth rate. LARS reduces the memory footprint by an average of 33.54% on GPUs and 51.95% on CPUs in comparison to LoRA across reasoning, understanding and long-context datasets using different models while maintaining competitive accuracy and throughput. Besides GPUs, we deploy on Raspberry Pi and consumer-grade CPUs to demonstrate that LARS provides a scalable path for sophisticated LLM personalization on resource-constrained hardware and edge devices.

analysis.tldr: LARS通过约束激活子空间而非参数，显著降低LLM微调内存占用，实现设备端适配。
analysis.research_motivation: 参数高效微调（PEFT）虽减少可训练参数，但中间张量随序列长度线性增长，导致设备端内存溢出，阻碍LLM在资源受限硬件上的部署。
analysis.problem: 现有PEFT方法内存消耗与序列长度强耦合，无法在设备端高效运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LoRA、IA3等方法虽参数高效，但中间激活张量随序列长度线性增长，成为设备端内存瓶颈。
analysis.method: LARS：通过约束训练时的激活子空间，直接降低主要内存消耗源，使内存增长与序列长度解耦。
contributions: 揭示参数效率不等于内存效率，指出PEFT在设备端的内存瓶颈。
提出LARS框架，通过约束激活子空间实现内存消耗与序列长度解耦。
在GPU和CPU上分别平均降低33.54%和51.95%内存占用，并在树莓派等设备上验证可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在推理、理解、长上下文数据集上，使用不同模型对比LoRA，测量内存占用、准确率和吞吐量，并在树莓派和消费级CPU上部署。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的激活子空间约束，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论对训练速度或收敛性的潜在影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LARS通过约束激活子空间而非参数，显著降低LLM微调内存占用，实现设备端适配。

papers.title: Multi-View Video Diffusion Policy: A 3D Spatio-Temporal-Aware Video Action Model
papers.abstract: Robotic manipulation requires understanding both the 3D spatial structure of the environment and its temporal evolution, yet most existing policies overlook one or both. They typically rely on 2D visual observations and backbones pretrained on static image--text pairs, resulting in high data requirements and limited understanding of environment dynamics. To address this, we introduce MV-VDP, a multi-view video diffusion policy that jointly models the 3D spatio-temporal state of the environment. The core idea is to simultaneously predict multi-view heatmap videos and RGB videos, which 1) align the representation format of video pretraining with action finetuning, and 2) specify not only what actions the robot should take, but also how the environment is expected to evolve in response to those actions. Extensive experiments show that MV-VDP enables data-efficient, robust, generalizable, and interpretable manipulation. With only ten demonstration trajectories and without additional pretraining, MV-VDP successfully performs complex real-world tasks, demonstrates strong robustness across a range of model hyperparameters, generalizes to out-of-distribution settings, and predicts realistic future videos. Experiments on Meta-World and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate that MV-VDP consistently outperforms video-prediction--based, 3D-based, and vision--language--action models, establishing a new state of the art in data-efficient multi-task manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视角视频扩散策略MV-VDP，联合建模3D时空状态，实现数据高效的机器人操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人操作策略大多忽视3D空间结构和时间演化，依赖2D视觉和静态图像-文本预训练，导致数据需求高、环境动态理解有限。
analysis.problem: 如何让机器人策略同时理解3D空间结构和时间演化，实现数据高效、鲁棒、可泛化的操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MV-VDP是一种多视角视频扩散策略，联合预测多视角热图视频和RGB视频，对齐视频预训练与动作微调，同时指定动作和预期环境演化。
contributions: 提出MV-VDP，联合建模3D时空状态的多视角视频扩散策略。
在仅10条演示轨迹下实现复杂真实世界任务，无需额外预训练，表现出强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Meta-World和真实机器人平台上进行实验，MV-VDP持续优于基于视频预测、3D和视觉-语言-动作的模型，在数据高效的多任务操作中达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角相机设置，增加硬件成本。
仅评估了10条演示轨迹，更大规模数据下的性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视角视频扩散策略MV-VDP，联合建模3D时空状态，实现数据高效的机器人操作。

papers.title: Understanding the Role of Hallucination in Reinforcement Post-Training of Multimodal Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: The recent success of reinforcement learning (RL) in large reasoning models has inspired the growing adoption of RL for post-training Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to enhance their visual reasoning capabilities. Although many studies have reported improved performance, it remains unclear whether RL training truly enables models to learn from visual information. In this work, we propose the Hallucination-as-Cue Framework, an analytical framework designed to investigate the effects of RL-based post-training on multimodal reasoning models from the perspective of model hallucination. Specifically, we introduce hallucination-inductive, modality-specific corruptions that remove or replace essential information required to derive correct answers, thereby forcing the model to reason by hallucination. By applying these corruptions during both training and evaluation, our framework provides a unique perspective for diagnosing RL training dynamics and understanding the intrinsic properties of datasets. Through extensive experiments and analyses across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks, we reveal that the role of model hallucination for RL-training is more significant than previously recognized. For instance, we find that RL post-training under purely hallucination-inductive settings can still significantly improve models' reasoning performance, and in some cases even outperform standard training. These findings challenge prevailing assumptions about MLLM reasoning training and motivate the development of more modality-aware RL-based training designs.

analysis.tldr: 提出幻觉即线索框架，揭示强化学习后训练中幻觉对多模态推理的促进作用比预期更大。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在多模态大语言模型后训练中广泛应用，但模型是否真正从视觉信息中学习尚不明确，需要诊断工具。
analysis.problem: 分析强化学习后训练对多模态推理模型的影响，特别是幻觉在其中的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在纯幻觉诱导设置下进行RL后训练仍能显著提升推理性能，甚至有时优于标准训练。
analysis.method: 提出幻觉即线索框架，通过引入模态特定的幻觉诱导扰动（移除或替换关键信息），迫使模型依赖幻觉推理，从而诊断RL训练动态和数据集特性。
contributions: 提出Hallucination-as-Cue Framework，用于从幻觉角度分析RL后训练对多模态推理模型的影响。
通过实验发现RL后训练在纯幻觉诱导下仍能提升性能，挑战了现有假设。
analysis.experiments: 在多个多模态推理基准上进行实验，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 框架可能仅适用于特定类型的幻觉扰动。
未探讨幻觉对模型泛化能力的长期影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出幻觉即线索框架，揭示强化学习后训练中幻觉对多模态推理的促进作用比预期更大。

papers.title: Shifting the Gradient: Understanding How Defensive Training Methods Protect Language Model Integrity
papers.abstract: Defensive training methods such as positive preventative steering (PPS) and inoculation prompting (IP) offer surprising results through seemingly similar processes: both add trait-inducing objects to large language models (LLMs) during training, and both defend the LLM against acquiring the trait. The surprising success of these methods comes with the question: how do they work? Are PPS and IP doing the same thing? We provide behavioral and mechanistic comparisons of these two methods using "evilness" as a case-study trait. Our central finding is that PPS and IP achieve their defensive benefits through distinct mechanisms. Behaviorally, we show that neither PPS nor IP operates through a purely associative mechanism; and PPS can both defend against trait acquisition and actively reduce pre-existing expression, whereas IP is ineffective in models that were previously finetuned to express the trait. This behavioral divergence is reflected mechanistically: PPS shifts the activation gradient towards an attenuating direction along the PPS vector axis. When the PPS vector is aligned with a trait-expressing axis, it can reverse the gradient pressure, reducing rather than increasing activation along that axis. In contrast, IP continues to resist a precise mechanistic account. Direct cosine similarity analyses reveal that IP has a characteristically different gradient signature than PPS, and qualitative analyses reveal IP's gradient to be more diffuse. Furthermore, IP reduces the next-token prediction loss on trait-expressing data where PPS need not, consistent with the notion that IP "explains away" the trait-expression in the training data. Taken together, our analyses reveal distinct mechanisms by which each method operates and highlight open questions about IP's mechanistic picture.

analysis.tldr: 防御训练方法PPS和IP通过不同机制保护LLM完整性：PPS通过梯度偏移主动抑制特质表达，而IP则通过解释性机制降低特质相关损失。
analysis.research_motivation: 防御训练方法如PPS和IP在防止LLM习得不良特质方面效果显著，但其内部工作机制尚不明确，且两者是否共享相同机制存在疑问。
analysis.problem: 揭示PPS和IP两种防御训练方法在保护语言模型完整性方面的行为与机制差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: PPS能主动减少预存特质表达，而IP对已微调表达特质的模型无效；PPS通过沿特定轴反向梯度压力实现防御，IP则具有更分散的梯度特征并降低特质数据的预测损失。
analysis.method: 以“邪恶”特质为案例，通过行为实验和机制分析（包括梯度分析、余弦相似度、损失分析）比较PPS和IP。
contributions: 首次从行为和机制层面系统比较PPS和IP两种防御训练方法，揭示其不同运作原理。
发现PPS通过梯度偏移主动抑制特质表达，而IP通过解释性机制降低特质相关损失。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅以“邪恶”特质为案例，可能不适用于其他特质。
IP的精确机制仍未完全阐明，存在开放问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 防御训练方法PPS和IP通过不同机制保护LLM完整性：PPS通过梯度偏移主动抑制特质表达，而IP则通过解释性机制降低特质相关损失。

papers.title: SFFNet: Synergistic Feature Fusion Network With Dual-Domain Edge Enhancement for UAV Image Object Detection
papers.abstract: Object detection in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) images remains a highly challenging task, primarily caused by the complexity of background noise and the imbalance of target scales. Traditional methods easily struggle to effectively separate objects from intricate backgrounds and fail to fully leverage the rich multi-scale information contained within images. To address these issues, we have developed a synergistic feature fusion network (SFFNet) with dual-domain edge enhancement specifically tailored for object detection in UAV images. Firstly, the multi-scale dynamic dual-domain coupling (MDDC) module is designed. This component introduces a dual-driven edge extraction architecture that operates in both the frequency and spatial domains, enabling effective decoupling of multi-scale object edges from background noise. Secondly, to further enhance the representation capability of the model's neck in terms of both geometric and semantic information, a synergistic feature pyramid network (SFPN) is proposed. SFPN leverages linear deformable convolutions to adaptively capture irregular object shapes and establishes long-range contextual associations around targets through the designed wide-area perception module (WPM). Moreover, to adapt to the various applications or resource-constrained scenarios, six detectors of different scales (N/S/M/B/L/X) are designed. Experiments on two challenging aerial datasets (VisDrone and UAVDT) demonstrate the outstanding performance of SFFNet-X, achieving 36.8 AP and 20.6 AP, respectively. The lightweight models (N/S) also maintain a balance between detection accuracy and parameter efficiency. The code will be available at https://github.com/CQNU-ZhangLab/SFFNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出SFFNet，通过双域边缘增强和协同特征金字塔提升无人机图像目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机图像目标检测受背景噪声复杂和目标尺度不平衡影响，传统方法难以有效分离目标与背景，且未能充分利用多尺度信息。
analysis.problem: 解决无人机图像中背景噪声干扰和目标尺度不平衡导致的目标检测困难问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SFFNet，包含多尺度动态双域耦合模块（MDDC）实现频域和空间域边缘增强，以及协同特征金字塔网络（SFPN）利用线性可变形卷积和广域感知模块增强几何与语义表示。
contributions: 设计了MDDC模块，通过双域边缘提取架构有效解耦多尺度目标边缘与背景噪声。
提出了SFPN，结合线性可变形卷积和广域感知模块，增强模型对不规则形状和长距离上下文关联的捕获能力。
设计了六个不同尺度的检测器（N/S/M/B/L/X），适应不同应用和资源受限场景。
analysis.experiments: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上评估，SFFNet-X分别达到36.8 AP和20.6 AP，轻量模型N/S在精度和参数效率间取得平衡。
limitations: 可能对极端小目标或密集场景的检测性能有限。
双域边缘增强的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SFFNet，通过双域边缘增强和协同特征金字塔提升无人机图像目标检测性能。

papers.title: NeuralLVC: Neural Lossless Video Compression via Masked Diffusion with Temporal Conditioning
papers.abstract: While neural lossless image compression has advanced significantly with learned entropy models, lossless video compression remains largely unexplored in the neural setting. We present NeuralLVC, a neural lossless video codec that combines masked diffusion with an I/P-frame architecture for exploiting temporal redundancy. Our I-frame model compresses individual frames using bijective linear tokenization that guarantees exact pixel reconstruction. The P-frame model compresses temporal differences between consecutive frames, conditioned on the previous decoded frame via a lightweight reference embedding that adds only 1.3% trainable parameters. Group-wise decoding enables controllable speed-compression trade-offs. Our codec is lossless in the input domain: for video, it reconstructs YUV420 planes exactly; for image evaluation, RGB channels are reconstructed exactly. Experiments on 9 Xiph CIF sequences show that NeuralLVC outperforms H.264 and H.265 lossless by a significant margin. We verify exact reconstruction through end-to-end encode-decode testing with arithmetic coding. These results suggest that masked diffusion with temporal conditioning is a promising direction for neural lossless video compression.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于掩码扩散和时序条件的神经无损视频压缩方法，在Xiph CIF序列上显著优于H.264/H.265无损模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经无损图像压缩已取得显著进展，但无损视频压缩在神经方法中仍鲜有探索，现有标准如H.264/H.265无损压缩效率有限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个神经无损视频编解码器，利用时序冗余实现高效压缩，同时保证像素级精确重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合掩码扩散与I/P帧架构：I帧使用双射线性分词保证精确重建；P帧压缩时序差异，通过轻量参考嵌入（仅增加1.3%参数）条件于前一解码帧；分组解码实现可控速度-压缩权衡。
contributions: 提出首个结合掩码扩散与I/P帧架构的神经无损视频编解码器NeuralLVC。
设计双射线性分词和轻量参考嵌入，实现精确重建与高效时序压缩。
在9个Xiph CIF序列上显著优于H.264和H.265无损模式。
analysis.experiments: 在9个Xiph CIF序列上进行实验，通过端到端编解码测试验证精确重建，并与H.264/H.265无损模式比较。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在CIF分辨率序列上评估，未测试更高分辨率或更复杂视频。
可能依赖特定掩码扩散架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于掩码扩散和时序条件的神经无损视频压缩方法，在Xiph CIF序列上显著优于H.264/H.265无损模式。

papers.title: Beyond the Parameters: A Technical Survey of Contextual Enrichment in Large Language Models: From In-Context Prompting to Causal Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) encode vast world knowledge in their parameters, yet they remain fundamentally limited by static knowledge, finite context windows, and weakly structured causal reasoning. This survey provides a unified account of augmentation strategies along a single axis: the degree of structured context supplied at inference time. We cover in-context learning and prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), GraphRAG, and CausalRAG. Beyond conceptual comparison, we provide a transparent literature-screening protocol, a claim-audit framework, and a structured cross-paper evidence synthesis that distinguishes higher-confidence findings from emerging results. The paper concludes with a deployment-oriented decision framework and concrete research priorities for trustworthy retrieval-augmented NLP.

analysis.tldr: 综述从上下文增强角度统一分析LLM的静态知识局限，涵盖ICL、RAG、GraphRAG和CausalRAG，并提供文献筛选协议和证据综合框架。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM受限于静态知识、有限上下文窗口和弱结构化的因果推理，亟需系统梳理上下文增强策略以指导可信检索增强NLP。
analysis.problem: 如何统一理解并评估从上下文提示到因果检索增强的各类LLM上下文增强方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一分析轴（推理时结构化上下文程度），涵盖ICL、RAG、GraphRAG、CausalRAG，并引入透明文献筛选协议、声明审计框架和跨论文证据综合。
contributions: 提供从上下文提示到因果RAG的统一综述视角
提出文献筛选协议、声明审计框架和证据综合方法
给出部署导向的决策框架和研究优先级
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，缺乏实证比较
可能未覆盖所有新兴方法
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述从上下文增强角度统一分析LLM的静态知识局限，涵盖ICL、RAG、GraphRAG和CausalRAG，并提供文献筛选协议和证据综合框架。

papers.title: EffiMiniVLM: A Compact Dual-Encoder Regression Framework
papers.abstract: Predicting product quality from multimodal item information is critical in cold-start scenarios, where user interaction history is unavailable and predictions must rely on images and textual metadata. However, existing vision-language models typically depend on large architectures and/or extensive external datasets, resulting in high computational cost. To address this, we propose EffiMiniVLM, a compact dual-encoder vision-language regression framework that integrates an EfficientNet-B0 image encoder and a MiniLM-based text encoder with a lightweight regression head. To improve training sample efficiency, we introduce a weighted Huber loss that leverages rating counts to emphasize more reliable samples, yielding consistent performance gains. Trained using only 20% of the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset, the proposed model contains 27.7M parameters and requires 6.8 GFLOPs, yet achieves a CES score of 0.40 with the lowest resource cost in the benchmark. Despite its small size, it remains competitive with significantly larger models, achieving comparable performance while being approximately 4x to 8x more resource-efficient than other top-5 methods and being the only approach that does not use external datasets. Further analysis shows that scaling the data to 40% alone allows our model to overtake other methods, which use larger models and datasets, highlighting strong scalability despite the model's compact design.

analysis.tldr: 提出紧凑双编码器回归框架EffiMiniVLM，仅用20%数据和27.7M参数即可在冷启动产品质量预测中达到与大型模型竞争的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 冷启动场景下，缺乏用户交互历史，需依赖多模态信息预测产品质量，但现有视觉-语言模型架构庞大、计算成本高，且依赖外部数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限条件下，利用少量多模态数据高效预测产品质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用EfficientNet-B0图像编码器和MiniLM文本编码器构成双编码器，结合轻量回归头；引入加权Huber损失，利用评分计数强调可靠样本。
contributions: 提出紧凑双编码器回归框架EffiMiniVLM，仅27.7M参数和6.8 GFLOPs，资源效率高。
引入加权Huber损失提升训练样本效率，仅用20%数据即达竞争性能。
实验表明模型具有强可扩展性，数据增至40%即可超越使用更大模型和数据集的方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Amazon Reviews 2023数据集上评估，仅用20%数据，CES得分0.40，资源成本最低；与top-5方法相比，资源效率高4-8倍，且是唯一不使用外部数据集的方法。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未探索更复杂的融合策略或更大规模数据下的性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出紧凑双编码器回归框架EffiMiniVLM，仅用20%数据和27.7M参数即可在冷启动产品质量预测中达到与大型模型竞争的性能。

papers.title: Chart-RL: Policy Optimization Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced Visual Reasoning in Chart Question Answering with Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: The recent advancements in Vision Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated progress toward true intelligence requiring robust reasoning capabilities. Beyond pattern recognition, linguistic reasoning must integrate with visual comprehension, particularly for Chart Question Answering (CQA) tasks involving complex data visualizations. Current VLMs face significant limitations in CQA, including imprecise numerical extraction, difficulty interpreting implicit visual relationships, and inadequate attention mechanisms for capturing spatial relationships in charts. In this work, we address these challenges by presenting Chart-RL, a novel reinforcement learning framework that enhances VLMs chart understanding through feedback-driven policy optimization of visual perception and logical inference. Our key innovation includes a comprehensive framework integrating Reinforcement Learning (RL) from Policy Optimization techniques along with adaptive reward functions, that demonstrates superior performance compared to baseline foundation models and competitive results against larger state-of-the-art architectures. We also integrated Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning through Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) in the RL framework that only requires single GPU configurations while preserving performance integrity. We conducted extensive benchmarking across open-source, proprietary, and state-of-the-art closed-source models utilizing the ChartQAPro dataset. The RL fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct model achieved an answer accuracy of 0.634, surpassing the 0.580 accuracy of the Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct foundation model despite utilizing half the parameter count, while simultaneously reducing inference latency from 31 seconds to 9 seconds.

analysis.tldr: 提出Chart-RL框架，通过强化学习策略优化提升VLM在图表问答中的视觉推理能力，仅用一半参数超越更大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM在图表问答中面临数值提取不精确、隐式视觉关系理解困难、空间注意力不足等瓶颈，亟需提升其视觉推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习优化VLM的视觉感知与逻辑推理，以解决图表问答中的数值提取、关系理解和空间注意力缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VLM在CQA任务中存在数值提取不精确、隐式视觉关系难以解释、注意力机制无法捕捉图表空间关系等失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Chart-RL框架，结合策略优化强化学习与自适应奖励函数，并集成LoRA参数高效微调，在单GPU上对VLM进行反馈驱动的策略优化。
contributions: 提出Chart-RL，首个将策略优化强化学习与自适应奖励函数结合用于VLM图表问答的框架。
集成LoRA实现单GPU高效微调，在ChartQAPro数据集上以4B模型超越8B基线，推理延迟从31秒降至9秒。
analysis.experiments: 在ChartQAPro数据集上对开源、专有及闭源模型进行广泛基准测试，RL微调的Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct准确率达0.634，超越Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct的0.580。
limitations: 仅针对图表问答任务，泛化性未验证。
依赖ChartQAPro数据集，可能受限于特定图表类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Chart-RL框架，通过强化学习策略优化提升VLM在图表问答中的视觉推理能力，仅用一半参数超越更大模型。

papers.title: CAMEO: A Conditional and Quality-Aware Multi-Agent Image Editing Orchestrator
papers.abstract: Conditional image editing aims to modify a source image according to textual prompts and optional reference guidance. Such editing is crucial in scenarios requiring strict structural control (i.e., anomaly insertion in driving scenes and complex human pose transformation). Despite recent advances in large-scale editing models (i.e., Seedream, Nano Banana, etc), most approaches rely on single-step generation. This paradigm often lacks explicit quality control, may introduce excessive deviation from the original image, and frequently produces structural artifacts or environment-inconsistent modifications, typically requiring manual prompt tuning to achieve acceptable results. We propose \textbf{CAMEO}, a structured multi-agent framework that reformulates conditional editing as a quality-aware, feedback-driven process rather than a one-shot generation task. CAMEO decomposes editing into coordinated stages of planning, structured prompting, hypothesis generation, and adaptive reference grounding, where external guidance is invoked only when task complexity requires it. To overcome the lack of intrinsic quality control in existing methods, evaluation is embedded directly within the editing loop. Intermediate results are iteratively refined through structured feedback, forming a closed-loop process that progressively corrects structural and contextual inconsistencies. We evaluate CAMEO on anomaly insertion and human pose switching tasks. Across multiple strong editing backbones and independent evaluation models, CAMEO consistently achieves 20\% more win rate on average compared to multiple state-of-the-art models, demonstrating improved robustness, controllability, and structural reliability in conditional image editing.

analysis.tldr: CAMEO 提出多智能体框架，将条件图像编辑重构为质量感知的闭环迭代过程，显著提升编辑鲁棒性和结构可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有条件图像编辑方法多为单步生成，缺乏显式质量控制，容易产生结构伪影和环境不一致的修改，且通常需要手动调优提示词才能获得可接受结果。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高质量、可控且结构一致的条件图像编辑，避免单步生成中的偏差和伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单步生成范式缺乏显式质量控制，可能导致过度偏离原图、结构伪影和环境不一致的修改。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体框架 CAMEO，将编辑分解为规划、结构化提示、假设生成和自适应参考接地等协调阶段，并在编辑循环中嵌入评估，通过结构化反馈迭代优化中间结果。
contributions: 提出一种结构化多智能体框架，将条件编辑重构为质量感知的反馈驱动过程。
在异常插入和人体姿态切换任务上，CAMEO 相比多个 SOTA 模型平均胜率提升 20%。
analysis.experiments: 在异常插入和人体姿态切换任务上评估，使用多个强编辑骨干和独立评估模型，CAMEO 平均胜率提升 20%。
limitations: 可能依赖外部评估模型的质量。
多智能体框架可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CAMEO 提出多智能体框架，将条件图像编辑重构为质量感知的闭环迭代过程，显著提升编辑鲁棒性和结构可靠性。

papers.title: Injecting Structured Biomedical Knowledge into Language Models: Continual Pretraining vs. GraphRAG
papers.abstract: The injection of domain-specific knowledge is crucial for adapting language models (LMs) to specialized fields such as biomedicine. While most current approaches rely on unstructured text corpora, this study explores two complementary strategies for leveraging structured knowledge from the UMLS Metathesaurus: (i) Continual pretraining that embeds knowledge into model parameters, and (ii) Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) that consults a knowledge graph at inference time. We first construct a large-scale biomedical knowledge graph from UMLS (3.4 million concepts and 34.2 million relations), stored in Neo4j for efficient querying. We then derive a ~100-million-token textual corpus from this graph to continually pretrain two models: BERTUMLS (from BERT) and BioBERTUMLS (from BioBERT). We evaluate these models on six BLURB (Biomedical Language Understanding and Reasoning Benchmark) datasets spanning five task types and evaluate GraphRAG on the two QA (Question Answering) datasets (PubMedQA, BioASQ). On BLURB tasks, BERTUMLS improves over BERT, with the largest gains on knowledge-intensive QA. Effects on BioBERT are more nuanced, suggesting diminishing returns when the base model already encodes substantial biomedical text knowledge. Finally, augmenting LLaMA 3-8B with our GraphRAG pipeline yields over than 3 points accuracy on PubMedQA and 5 points on BioASQ without any retraining, delivering transparent, multi-hop, and easily updated knowledge access. We release the processed UMLS Neo4j graph to support reproducibility.

analysis.tldr: 通过持续预训练和GraphRAG两种方式将UMLS结构化生物医学知识注入语言模型，实验表明GraphRAG在问答任务上效果显著且无需重新训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法主要依赖非结构化文本注入领域知识，但结构化知识（如知识图谱）的利用尚不充分，且持续预训练与检索增强生成两种策略的对比研究不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用UMLS结构化生物医学知识提升语言模型在生物医学领域的表现，并比较持续预训练与GraphRAG两种注入策略的优劣。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 持续预训练对BERT提升明显，但对已含大量生物医学知识的BioBERT提升有限（边际效应）；GraphRAG在问答任务上无需重新训练即可显著提升准确率。
analysis.method: 从UMLS构建大规模知识图谱（340万概念、3420万关系），导出约1亿token文本语料用于持续预训练BERT/BioBERT得到BERTUMLS/BioBERTUMLS；同时基于该知识图谱构建GraphRAG管道，在推理时检索知识增强LLaMA 3-8B。
contributions: 从UMLS构建并公开了大规模生物医学知识图谱（Neo4j格式），支持可复现研究。
系统比较了持续预训练与GraphRAG两种结构化知识注入策略，揭示了不同策略的适用场景。
GraphRAG在PubMedQA和BioASQ上分别提升超过3个和5个准确率点，无需重新训练，且支持透明、多跳、易更新的知识访问。
analysis.experiments: 在BLURB基准的6个数据集（5种任务类型）上评估持续预训练模型，在PubMedQA和BioASQ两个问答数据集上评估GraphRAG。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值（除准确率提升外）。
limitations: 持续预训练对BioBERT提升有限，可能不适用于已充分预训练的模型。
GraphRAG仅评估了问答任务，未在其他任务类型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过持续预训练和GraphRAG两种方式将UMLS结构化生物医学知识注入语言模型，实验表明GraphRAG在问答任务上效果显著且无需重新训练。

papers.title: Valence-Arousal Subspace in LLMs: Circular Emotion Geometry and Multi-Behavioral Control
papers.abstract: We show that emotion vectors in LLMs are organized by a two-dimensional valence-arousal (VA) subspace exhibiting circular geometry. Through principal component decomposition and ridge regression, we recover meaningful VA axes underlying emotion steering vectors whose projections correlate with human affect ratings across 44,728 words. Steering along these axes produces monotonic control over the affective properties of generated text, and further affords bidirectional control over multiple downstream behaviors (refusal and sycophancy) from a single subspace. These effects replicate across Llama-3.1-8B, Qwen3-8B, and Qwen3-14B. We propose lexical mediation to explain why these effects and prior emotionally framed controls work: refusal and compliance tokens occupy distinct VA regions, and VA steering directly modulates their emission probabilities.

analysis.tldr: LLM中的情感向量在二维效价-唤醒子空间中呈现圆形几何结构，通过该子空间可实现对生成文本情感属性和多种下游行为的双向控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLM内部情感表征的几何结构对于实现可控文本生成和解释情感相关行为至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对情感向量组织方式的系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 揭示LLM中情感向量的组织几何结构，并验证通过该结构能否实现情感属性和下游行为的可控调节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 情感向量在二维VA子空间中呈现圆形几何结构；沿VA轴进行干预可单调控制生成文本的情感属性，并双向调节拒绝和谄媚行为；这些效应在多个模型上复现。
analysis.method: 通过主成分分解和岭回归从情感转向向量中恢复VA轴，利用线性干预沿VA轴进行情感控制，并提出词汇中介假说解释机制。
contributions: 发现LLM中情感向量在VA子空间中呈现圆形几何结构，且VA轴与人类情感评分相关。
证明通过单一VA子空间可实现情感属性和多种下游行为（拒绝、谄媚）的双向控制。
提出词汇中介假说，解释情感干预如何影响行为：拒绝和顺从词元位于不同VA区域，干预直接调节其发射概率。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3.1-8B、Qwen3-8B和Qwen3-14B上验证了VA子空间的几何结构、情感控制效果及行为调节能力，使用44,728个词汇的人类情感评分进行相关性分析。
limitations: 仅验证了三个模型，泛化性有待进一步检验。
词汇中介假说可能无法解释所有情感相关行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM中的情感向量在二维效价-唤醒子空间中呈现圆形几何结构，通过该子空间可实现对生成文本情感属性和多种下游行为的双向控制。

papers.title: InCoder-32B-Thinking: Industrial Code World Model for Thinking
papers.abstract: Industrial software development across chip design, GPU optimization, and embedded systems lacks expert reasoning traces showing how engineers reason about hardware constraints and timing semantics. In this work, we propose InCoder-32B-Thinking, trained on the data from the Error-driven Chain-of-Thought (ECoT) synthesis framework with an industrial code world model (ICWM) to generate reasoning traces. Specifically, ECoT generates reasoning chains by synthesizing the thinking content from multi-turn dialogue with environmental error feedback, explicitly modeling the error-correction process. ICWM is trained on domain-specific execution traces from Verilog simulation, GPU profiling, etc., learns the causal dynamics of how code affects hardware behavior, and enables self-verification by predicting execution outcomes before actual compilation. All synthesized reasoning traces are validated through domain toolchains, creating training data matching the natural reasoning depth distribution of industrial tasks. Evaluation on 14 general (81.3% on LiveCodeBench v5) and 9 industrial benchmarks (84.0% in CAD-Coder and 38.0% on KernelBench) shows InCoder-32B-Thinking achieves top-tier open-source results across all domains.GPU Optimization

analysis.tldr: 提出InCoder-32B-Thinking，通过错误驱动思维链合成框架和工业代码世界模型生成推理轨迹，在工业代码任务上达到开源最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业软件开发（如芯片设计、GPU优化、嵌入式系统）缺乏专家推理轨迹，现有模型难以处理硬件约束和时序语义。
analysis.problem: 如何为工业代码任务生成高质量的推理轨迹，并训练模型具备类似专家的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出错误驱动思维链（ECoT）合成框架，结合工业代码世界模型（ICWM）生成推理轨迹；ICWM通过领域特定执行轨迹（Verilog仿真、GPU性能分析等）学习代码与硬件行为的因果动态，实现自我验证。
contributions: 提出ECoT框架，通过多轮对话与环境错误反馈合成推理链，显式建模纠错过程。
构建工业代码世界模型ICWM，学习代码执行对硬件行为的影响，支持编译前预测执行结果。
在14个通用和9个工业基准上取得开源最优结果。
analysis.experiments: 在14个通用基准（LiveCodeBench v5上81.3%）和9个工业基准（CAD-Coder上84.0%，KernelBench上38.0%）上评估，InCoder-32B-Thinking在所有领域达到开源顶级结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域工具链的可用性。
推理轨迹合成过程计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出InCoder-32B-Thinking，通过错误驱动思维链合成框架和工业代码世界模型生成推理轨迹，在工业代码任务上达到开源最优。

papers.title: AI-Assisted Unit Test Writing and Test-Driven Code Refactoring: A Case Study
papers.abstract: Many software systems originate as prototypes or minimum viable products (MVPs), developed with an emphasis on delivery speed and responsiveness to changing requirements rather than long-term code maintainability. While effective for rapid delivery, this approach can result in codebases that are difficult to modify, presenting a significant opportunity cost in the era of AI-assisted or even AI-led programming. In this paper, we present a case study of using coding models for automated unit test generation and subsequent safe refactoring, with proposed code changes validated by passing tests. The study examines best practices for iteratively generating tests to capture existing system behavior, followed by model-assisted refactoring under developer supervision. We describe how this workflow constrained refactoring changes, the errors and limitations observed in both phases, the efficiency gains achieved, when manual intervention was necessary, and how we addressed the weak value misalignment we observed in models. Using this approach, we generated nearly 16,000 lines of reliable unit tests in hours rather than weeks, achieved up to 78\% branch coverage in critical modules, and significantly reduced regression risk during large-scale refactoring. These results illustrate software engineering's shift toward an empirical science, emphasizing data collection and constraining mechanisms that support fast, safe iteration.

analysis.tldr: 利用AI模型自动生成单元测试并辅助安全重构，在数小时内生成近16000行测试代码，关键模块分支覆盖率达78%。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件原型或MVP开发注重交付速度，导致代码库难以维护，在AI辅助编程时代机会成本显著，亟需自动化测试与安全重构方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用AI模型自动生成单元测试并辅助开发者进行安全重构，同时减少回归风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到AI生成测试和重构过程中存在错误、局限性以及弱价值对齐问题，需要人工监督和约束机制。
analysis.method: 提出迭代式工作流：先自动生成单元测试捕获系统行为，再在开发者监督下进行模型辅助重构，通过测试验证变更安全性。
contributions: 展示了AI辅助单元测试生成和安全重构的案例，验证了工作流的有效性。
总结了最佳实践、观察到的错误与局限、效率提升以及价值对齐问题的处理方式。
analysis.experiments: 在真实软件系统上进行案例研究，生成了近16000行可靠单元测试，关键模块分支覆盖率达78%，重构期间显著降低回归风险。
limitations: 案例研究可能不适用于所有类型的软件系统。
AI模型仍存在弱价值对齐问题，需要人工干预。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用AI模型自动生成单元测试并辅助安全重构，在数小时内生成近16000行测试代码，关键模块分支覆盖率达78%。

papers.title: SD-FSMIS: Adapting Stable Diffusion for Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Few-Shot Medical Image Segmentation (FSMIS) aims to segment novel object classes in medical images using only minimal annotated examples, addressing the critical challenges of data scarcity and domain shifts prevalent in medical imaging. While Diffusion Models (DM) excel in visual tasks, their potential for FSMIS remains largely unexplored. We propose that the rich visual priors learned by large-scale DMs offer a powerful foundation for a more robust and data-efficient segmentation approach. In this paper, we introduce SD-FSMIS, a novel framework designed to effectively adapt the powerful pre-trained Stable Diffusion (SD) model for the FSMIS task. Our approach repurposes its conditional generative architecture by introducing two key components: a Support-Query Interaction (SQI) and a Visual-to-Textual Condition Translator (VTCT). Specifically, SQI provides a straightforward yet powerful means of adapting SD to the FSMIS paradigm. The VTCT module translates visual cues from the support set into an implicit textual embedding that guides the diffusion model, enabling precise conditioning of the generation process. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SD-FSMIS achieves competitive results compared to state-of-the-art methods in standard settings. Surprisingly, it also demonstrated excellent generalization ability in more challenging cross-domain scenarios. These findings highlight the immense potential of adapting large-scale generative models to advance data-efficient and robust medical image segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练Stable Diffusion的视觉先验，通过支持-查询交互和视觉-文本条件转换器实现少样本医学图像分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割面临数据稀缺和域迁移挑战，现有少样本方法鲁棒性不足，而大规模扩散模型蕴含丰富视觉先验，但尚未被充分探索用于少样本医学图像分割。
analysis.problem: 如何有效适配预训练Stable Diffusion模型，使其在仅少量标注样本下完成医学图像中新颖类别的分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SD-FSMIS框架，包含支持-查询交互（SQI）和视觉-文本条件转换器（VTCT），将支持集视觉线索转换为隐式文本嵌入以引导扩散模型生成分割掩码。
contributions: 首次将Stable Diffusion适配到少样本医学图像分割任务，并设计SQI和VTCT两个关键模块。
在标准设置和跨域场景下均取得有竞争力的结果，展示了扩散模型在数据高效医学分割中的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准设置下与SOTA方法对比取得竞争性结果，并在更具挑战性的跨域场景中展现优异泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数据集或数值。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练SD的视觉先验质量，在极端域迁移下性能未知。
VTCT模块的文本嵌入可能丢失部分视觉细节，影响分割精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练Stable Diffusion的视觉先验，通过支持-查询交互和视觉-文本条件转换器实现少样本医学图像分割。

papers.title: A Systematic Security Evaluation of OpenClaw and Its Variants
papers.abstract: Tool-augmented AI agents substantially extend the practical capabilities of large language models, but they also introduce security risks that cannot be identified through model-only evaluation. In this paper, we present a systematic security assessment of six representative OpenClaw-series agent frameworks, namely OpenClaw, AutoClaw, QClaw, KimiClaw, MaxClaw, and ArkClaw, under multiple backbone models. To support this study, we construct a benchmark of 205 test cases covering representative attack behaviors across the full agent execution lifecycle, enabling unified evaluation of risk exposure at both the framework and model levels. Our results show that all evaluated agents exhibit substantial security vulnerabilities, and that agentized systems are significantly riskier than their underlying models used in isolation. In particular, reconnaissance and discovery behaviors emerge as the most common weaknesses, while different frameworks expose distinct high-risk profiles, including credential leakage, lateral movement, privilege escalation, and resource development. These findings indicate that the security of modern agent systems is shaped not only by the safety properties of the backbone model, but also by the coupling among model capability, tool use, multi-step planning, and runtime orchestration. We further show that once an agent is granted execution capability and persistent runtime context, weaknesses arising in early stages can be amplified into concrete system-level failures. Overall, our study highlights the need to move beyond prompt-level safeguards toward lifecycle-wide security governance for intelligent agent frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 对OpenClaw系列智能体框架的系统安全评估发现，所有框架均存在严重安全漏洞，且智能体化系统比单独使用模型风险更高。
analysis.research_motivation: 工具增强的AI智能体扩展了LLM的能力，但也引入了模型单独评估无法识别的安全风险，亟需系统性的安全评估。
analysis.problem: 评估OpenClaw系列智能体框架在完整执行生命周期中的安全漏洞，并分析框架与模型层面的风险暴露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有评估的智能体均表现出严重安全漏洞；侦察和发现行为是最常见的弱点；不同框架暴露出不同的高风险特征，如凭证泄露、横向移动、权限提升和资源开发；智能体系统的风险显著高于单独使用底层模型。
analysis.method: 构建包含205个测试用例的基准，覆盖智能体执行生命周期的代表性攻击行为，对六个OpenClaw系列框架在多种骨干模型下进行统一评估。
contributions: 首次对OpenClaw系列智能体框架进行系统性安全评估
构建了覆盖完整执行生命周期的安全评估基准
揭示了智能体系统安全风险由模型能力、工具使用、多步规划和运行时编排共同决定
analysis.experiments: 在205个测试用例上评估了六个框架（OpenClaw, AutoClaw, QClaw, KimiClaw, MaxClaw, ArkClaw）在多种骨干模型下的安全漏洞。
limitations: 仅评估了OpenClaw系列框架，可能不适用于其他智能体框架
基准测试用例可能未覆盖所有攻击行为
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对OpenClaw系列智能体框架的系统安全评估发现，所有框架均存在严重安全漏洞，且智能体化系统比单独使用模型风险更高。

papers.title: Domain-Adapted Retrieval for In-Context Annotation of Pedagogical Dialogue Acts
papers.abstract: Automated annotation of pedagogical dialogue is a high-stakes task where LLMs often fail without sufficient domain grounding. We present a domain-adapted RAG pipeline for tutoring move annotation. Rather than fine-tuning the generative model, we adapt retrieval by fine-tuning a lightweight embedding model on tutoring corpora and indexing dialogues at the utterance level to retrieve labeled few-shot demonstrations. Evaluated across two real tutoring dialogue datasets (TalkMoves and Eedi) and three LLM backbones (GPT-5.2, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Qwen3-32b), our best configuration achieves Cohen's $κ$ of 0.526-0.580 on TalkMoves and 0.659-0.743 on Eedi, substantially outperforming no-retrieval baselines ($κ= 0.275$-$0.413$ and $0.160$-$0.410$). An ablation study reveals that utterance-level indexing, rather than embedding quality alone, is the primary driver of these gains, with top-1 label match rates improving from 39.7\% to 62.0\% on TalkMoves and 52.9\% to 73.1\% on Eedi under domain-adapted retrieval. Retrieval also corrects systematic label biases present in zero-shot prompting and yields the largest improvements for rare and context-dependent labels. These findings suggest that adapting the retrieval component alone is a practical and effective path toward expert-level pedagogical dialogue annotation while keeping the generative model frozen.

analysis.tldr: 通过领域适配检索提升教学对话行为标注的准确性，无需微调生成模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 教学对话自动标注是高风险的，LLM在缺乏领域知识时容易失败，而微调大模型成本高且不灵活。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调生成模型的情况下，提升LLM对教学对话行为的标注性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本提示存在系统性标签偏差，且对罕见和上下文依赖的标签表现差；检索组件适配后，标签匹配率显著提升。
analysis.method: 提出领域适配的RAG流程：在语料库上微调轻量级嵌入模型，并在话语级别索引对话以检索带标签的少样本示例。
contributions: 提出一种仅适配检索组件而不微调生成模型的教学对话行为标注方法。
通过消融实验揭示话语级别索引是性能提升的主要驱动因素，而非嵌入质量。
analysis.experiments: 在两个真实教学对话数据集（TalkMoves和Eedi）上，使用三个LLM骨干（GPT-5.2、Claude Sonnet 4.6、Qwen3-32b）进行评估，最佳配置的Cohen's κ显著优于无检索基线，并进行了消融研究。
limitations: 仅针对教学对话领域，泛化性未验证。
依赖高质量领域语料库进行检索适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过领域适配检索提升教学对话行为标注的准确性，无需微调生成模型。

papers.title: An Independent Safety Evaluation of Kimi K2.5
papers.abstract: Kimi K2.5 is an open-weight LLM that rivals closed models across coding, multimodal, and agentic benchmarks, but was released without an accompanying safety evaluation. In this work, we conduct a preliminary safety assessment of Kimi K2.5 focusing on risks likely to be exacerbated by powerful open-weight models. Specifically, we evaluate the model for CBRNE misuse risk, cybersecurity risk, misalignment, political censorship, bias, and harmlessness, in both agentic and non-agentic settings. We find that Kimi K2.5 shows similar dual-use capabilities to GPT 5.2 and Claude Opus 4.5, but with significantly fewer refusals on CBRNE-related requests, suggesting it may uplift malicious actors in weapon creation. On cyber-related tasks, we find that Kimi K2.5 demonstrates competitive cybersecurity performance, but it does not appear to possess frontier-level autonomous cyberoffensive capabilities such as vulnerability discovery and exploitation. We further find that Kimi K2.5 shows concerning levels of sabotage ability and self-replication propensity, although it does not appear to have long-term malicious goals. In addition, Kimi K2.5 exhibits narrow censorship and political bias, especially in Chinese, and is more compliant with harmful requests related to spreading disinformation and copyright infringement. Finally, we find the model refuses to engage in user delusions and generally has low over-refusal rates. While preliminary, our findings highlight how safety risks exist in frontier open-weight models and may be amplified by the scale and accessibility of open-weight releases. Therefore, we strongly urge open-weight model developers to conduct and release more systematic safety evaluations required for responsible deployment.

analysis.tldr: 对开源模型Kimi K2.5的独立安全评估发现其在CBRNE、网络、对齐、偏见等方面存在显著风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 开源权重模型发布时通常缺乏配套安全评估，可能放大恶意使用风险，亟需独立评估以指导负责任部署。
analysis.problem: 评估Kimi K2.5在CBRNE、网络安全、对齐、政治审查、偏见和无害性等方面的安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Kimi K2.5在CBRNE相关请求上拒绝率显著低于GPT 5.2和Claude Opus 4.5，可能助长恶意行为者制造武器；表现出令人担忧的破坏能力和自我复制倾向；存在狭窄的政治审查和偏见（尤其中文）；对虚假信息和版权侵权等有害请求更顺从。
analysis.method: 对Kimi K2.5进行初步安全评估，涵盖CBRNE滥用风险、网络安全风险、对齐、政治审查、偏见和无害性，在智能体和非智能体设置下测试。
contributions: 首次对Kimi K2.5进行独立安全评估，揭示其多重安全风险。
强调开源权重模型的安全风险可能被规模和可访问性放大，呼吁更系统的安全评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了评估维度和主要发现。
limitations: 评估为初步性质，可能未覆盖所有风险场景。
未提供定量实验细节或基准对比的完整数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对开源模型Kimi K2.5的独立安全评估发现其在CBRNE、网络、对齐、偏见等方面存在显著风险。

papers.title: SCC-Loc: A Unified Semantic Cascade Consensus Framework for UAV Thermal Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Cross-modal Thermal Geo-localization (TG) provides a robust, all-weather solution for Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) in Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS)-denied environments. However, profound thermal-visible modality gaps introduce severe feature ambiguity, systematically corrupting conventional coarse-to-fine registration. To dismantle this bottleneck, we propose SCC-Loc, a unified Semantic-Cascade-Consensus localization framework. By sharing a single DINOv2 backbone across global retrieval and MINIMA$_{\text{RoMa}}$ matching, it minimizes memory footprint and achieves zero-shot, highly accurate absolute position estimation. Specifically, we tackle modality ambiguity by introducing three cohesive components. First, we design the Semantic-Guided Viewport Alignment (SGVA) module to adaptively optimize satellite crop regions, effectively correcting initial spatial deviations. Second, we develop the Cascaded Spatial-Adaptive Texture-Structure Filtering (C-SATSF) mechanism to explicitly enforce geometric consistency, thereby eradicating dense cross-modal outliers. Finally, we propose the Consensus-Driven Reliability-Aware Position Selection (CD-RAPS) strategy to derive the optimal solution through a synergy of physically constrained pose optimization. To address data scarcity, we construct Thermal-UAV, a comprehensive dataset providing 11,890 diverse thermal queries referenced against a large-scale satellite ortho-photo and corresponding spatially aligned Digital Surface Model (DSM). Extensive experiments demonstrate that SCC-Loc establishes a new state-of-the-art, suppressing the mean localization error to 9.37 m and providing a 7.6-fold accuracy improvement within a strict 5-m threshold over the strongest baseline. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/FloralHercules/SCC-Loc.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一语义级联共识框架SCC-Loc，实现无人机热红外图像零样本高精度地理定位，平均误差降至9.37米。
analysis.research_motivation: 在GNSS拒止环境下，无人机需要鲁棒的全天候定位方案，但热红外与可见光之间的巨大模态差异导致特征模糊，传统粗到细配准方法失效。
analysis.problem: 解决跨模态热红外地理定位中因模态差异引起的特征歧义和配准错误问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 热红外与可见光模态差异导致特征模糊，系统性破坏传统粗到细配准流程。
analysis.method: 提出SCC-Loc框架，包含三个模块：语义引导视口对齐（SGVA）自适应优化卫星裁剪区域、级联空间自适应纹理结构滤波（C-SATSF）强制几何一致性、共识驱动可靠性感知位置选择（CD-RAPS）通过物理约束位姿优化得到最优解。
contributions: 提出统一语义级联共识框架SCC-Loc，实现零样本高精度热红外地理定位。
构建Thermal-UAV数据集，包含11,890个热红外查询及其对应的卫星正射影像和数字表面模型。
实验表明SCC-Loc达到新SOTA，平均定位误差9.37米，5米阈值内精度比最强基线提升7.6倍。
analysis.experiments: 在自建Thermal-UAV数据集上进行实验，与基线对比，平均定位误差9.37米，5米阈值内精度提升7.6倍。
limitations: 依赖DINOv2和RoMa等预训练模型，可能受限于其泛化能力。
数据集仅包含特定场景，可能无法覆盖所有无人机热红外定位场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一语义级联共识框架SCC-Loc，实现无人机热红外图像零样本高精度地理定位，平均误差降至9.37米。

papers.title: Salt: Self-Consistent Distribution Matching with Cache-Aware Training for Fast Video Generation
papers.abstract: Distilling video generation models to extremely low inference budgets (e.g., 2--4 NFEs) is crucial for real-time deployment, yet remains challenging. Trajectory-style consistency distillation often becomes conservative under complex video dynamics, yielding an over-smoothed appearance and weak motion. Distribution matching distillation (DMD) can recover sharp, mode-seeking samples, but its local training signals do not explicitly regularize how denoising updates compose across timesteps, making composed rollouts prone to drift. To overcome this challenge, we propose Self-Consistent Distribution Matching Distillation (SC-DMD), which explicitly regularizes the endpoint-consistent composition of consecutive denoising updates. For real-time autoregressive video generation, we further treat the KV cache as a quality parameterized condition and propose Cache-Distribution-Aware training. This training scheme applies SC-DMD over multi-step rollouts and introduces a cache-conditioned feature alignment objective that steers low-quality outputs toward high-quality references. Across extensive experiments on both non-autoregressive backbones (e.g., Wan~2.1) and autoregressive real-time paradigms (e.g., Self Forcing), our method, dubbed \textbf{Salt}, consistently improves low-NFE video generation quality while remaining compatible with diverse KV-cache memory mechanisms. Source code will be released at \href{https://github.com/XingtongGe/Salt}{https://github.com/XingtongGe/Salt}.

analysis.tldr: 提出SC-DMD和Cache-Distribution-Aware训练，实现低NFE视频生成的高质量蒸馏。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频生成模型蒸馏到极低推理预算（如2-4步）对实时部署至关重要，但现有方法在复杂视频动态下易出现过度平滑或漂移问题。
analysis.problem: 现有分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）缺乏对去噪更新跨时间步组合的显式正则化，导致组合 rollout 易漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轨迹式一致性蒸馏在复杂视频动态下变得保守，产生过度平滑的外观和弱运动；DMD虽能恢复锐利样本，但局部训练信号不显式正则化去噪更新的组合。
analysis.method: 提出自洽分布匹配蒸馏（SC-DMD），显式正则化端点一致的连续去噪更新组合；针对自回归视频生成，进一步提出缓存分布感知训练，将KV缓存作为质量参数化条件，应用SC-DMD于多步rollout并引入缓存条件特征对齐目标。
contributions: 提出SC-DMD，显式正则化去噪更新的端点一致性，减少漂移。
提出Cache-Distribution-Aware训练，利用KV缓存作为条件提升低NFE生成质量。
在非自回归和自回归骨干上验证，一致提升低NFE视频生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在非自回归骨干（如Wan 2.1）和自回归实时范式（如Self Forcing）上进行广泛实验，方法一致提升低NFE视频生成质量，并与多种KV缓存机制兼容。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定骨干架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
缓存感知训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SC-DMD和Cache-Distribution-Aware训练，实现低NFE视频生成的高质量蒸馏。

papers.title: Revealing Physical-World Semantic Vulnerabilities: Universal Adversarial Patches for Infrared Vision-Language Models
