papers.abstract: Infrared vision-language models (IR-VLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for multimodal perception in low-visibility environments, yet their robustness to adversarial attacks remains largely unexplored. Existing adversarial patch methods are mainly designed for RGB-based models in closed-set settings and are not readily applicable to the open-ended semantic understanding and physical deployment requirements of infrared VLMs. To bridge this gap, we propose Universal Curved-Grid Patch (UCGP), a universal physical adversarial patch framework for IR-VLMs. UCGP integrates Curved-Grid Mesh (CGM) parameterization for continuous, low-frequency, and deployable patch generation with a unified representation-driven objective that promotes subspace departure, topology disruption, and stealth. To improve robustness under real-world deployment and domain shift, we further incorporate Meta Differential Evolution and EOT-augmented TPS deformation modeling. Rather than manipulating labels or prompts, UCGP directly disrupts the visual representation space, weakening cross-modal semantic alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that UCGP consistently compromises semantic understanding across diverse IR-VLM architectures while maintaining cross-model transferability, cross-dataset generalization, real-world physical effectiveness, and robustness against defenses. These findings reveal a previously overlooked robustness vulnerability in current infrared multimodal systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出通用物理对抗补丁UCGP，揭示红外视觉-语言模型在语义理解上的鲁棒性漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外视觉-语言模型在低可见度环境中具有潜力，但现有对抗补丁方法主要针对RGB模型和封闭集场景，不适用于红外VLMs的开放语义理解和物理部署需求。
analysis.problem: 红外视觉-语言模型在物理世界中对通用对抗补丁的语义鲁棒性尚未被探索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出通用曲线网格补丁（UCGP），包含曲线网格参数化、统一表示驱动目标（子空间偏离、拓扑破坏、隐蔽性）、元差分进化与EOT增强的TPS变形建模。
contributions: 首次系统研究红外视觉-语言模型的物理世界对抗鲁棒性。
提出UCGP框架，实现跨模型、跨数据集、物理世界有效的通用对抗补丁。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多种IR-VLM架构上验证了语义理解破坏、跨模型迁移性、跨数据集泛化、物理世界有效性和防御鲁棒性，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定红外模态和模型架构。
物理部署中的环境因素（如温度、距离）影响未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通用物理对抗补丁UCGP，揭示红外视觉-语言模型在语义理解上的鲁棒性漏洞。

papers.title: Can AI be a moral victim? The role of moral patiency and ownership perceptions in ethical judgments of using AI-generated content
papers.abstract: The growing use of generative AI raises ethical concerns about authorship and plagiarism. This study examines how people judge the reuse of AI-generated content, focusing on moral patiency and ownership perceptions. In an experiment, participants evaluated two substantively similar manuscripts in which the original source was described as authored by a human, an AI system, or an AI agent with a human-like name. Results showed that copying AI-generated work was judged less unethical, less plagiaristic, and less guilt-inducing than copying human-authored work. Mediation analyses revealed that this leniency stemmed from lower perceptions of AI's capacity to suffer harm (moral patiency) and greater ownership attributed to the human writer reusing AI-generated content. Anthropomorphic cues shaped moral evaluations indirectly by reducing perceived ownership. These findings shed light on how people morally disengage when using AI-generated work and highlight differences in how ethical judgments are applied to human versus AI-created content.

analysis.tldr: 人们认为抄袭AI生成内容比抄袭人类作品更不道德，因为AI被视为缺乏道德受害资格且人类使用者更易产生所有权感。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI的广泛应用引发了关于作者身份和抄袭的伦理问题，但人们对AI生成内容与人类作品在道德判断上的差异尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 研究人们如何判断重用AI生成内容的道德性，特别是道德受害资格和所有权感知的作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，抄袭AI生成内容被认为更不道德、更少抄袭感、更少内疚感；中介分析表明，这种宽容源于对AI承受伤害能力的较低感知（道德受害资格）以及人类使用者对AI生成内容的更高所有权感。拟人化线索通过降低所有权感知间接影响道德评价。
analysis.method: 通过实验设计，让参与者评估两篇实质相似的手稿，其中原始来源被描述为人类作者、AI系统或具有人类名字的AI代理，然后测量道德判断、抄袭感知、内疚感、道德受害资格和所有权感知，并进行中介分析。
contributions: 揭示了AI生成内容在道德判断中受到的宽容对待，并解释了其心理机制（道德受害资格和所有权感知）。
发现拟人化线索通过降低所有权感知间接影响道德评价，为AI伦理设计提供启示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了实验设计和主要发现。
limitations: 实验场景为文本抄袭，可能不适用于其他类型AI生成内容（如图像、视频）。
样本可能不具有广泛代表性，且未考虑文化差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人们认为抄袭AI生成内容比抄袭人类作品更不道德，因为AI被视为缺乏道德受害资格且人类使用者更易产生所有权感。

papers.title: Policy-Governed LLM Routing with Intent Matching for Instrument Laboratories
papers.abstract: AI tutoring systems in engineering labs face a tension between providing sufficient assistance and preserving learning opportunities. Existing systems typically offer instructors limited control over assistance timing, content, or cost. This paper describes a routing and governance system for LLM-based lab assistance comprising two components: Routiium, an OpenAI-compatible gateway that manages multiple LLM backends with configurable prompt modifications and usage logging, and EduRouter, a policy-aware routing service that enforces per-lab budgets, approval workflows, and embedding-based question matching. We evaluated the system using trace-driven simulation calibrated from two engineering labs (LED characterization, RC circuit analysis) and a 100-query replay through live models. In simulations, governed policies (P1/P2) increased challenge-alignment index from 0.90 to 0.98 and overlay-adherence score from 0.69 to 0.87 compared to ungoverned operation (P0). The productive-struggle window metric increased from 1.4 to 3.6 simulated turns before high-scaffold hints appeared. In the 100-query replay, EduRouter routed 75% of queries to a local model, reducing token costs by 66% ($0.087 vs. $0.26 for all-premium routing) while maintaining canonical hit rate of 1.0 for the curated 89-intent question bank. We release Routiium, EduRouter, canonical-task tooling, and simulator configurations to support replication and future classroom studies.

analysis.tldr: 提出策略驱动的LLM路由系统，在工程实验室中平衡辅助与学习机会，通过意图匹配和预算控制提升挑战对齐并降低成本。
analysis.research_motivation: AI辅导系统在工程实验室中面临提供足够帮助与保留学习机会之间的张力，现有系统对教师控制辅助时机、内容或成本的能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个路由和治理系统，使LLM辅助在工程实验室中既能提供适当帮助，又能遵循教师设定的策略（如预算、审批、问题匹配），同时保持学习效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但通过模拟和回放实验观察到：受治理策略相比无治理操作提高了挑战对齐指数和覆盖遵循分数，延长了高支架提示出现前的有效挣扎窗口，并显著降低了成本。
analysis.method: 提出Routiium（兼容OpenAI的网关，管理多个LLM后端，支持可配置提示修改和日志记录）和EduRouter（策略感知路由服务，执行每实验室预算、审批工作流和基于嵌入的问题匹配）。
contributions: 提出Routiium和EduRouter组成的策略驱动LLM路由系统，支持细粒度治理。
通过两个工程实验室的轨迹驱动模拟和100查询回放验证系统有效性，显示挑战对齐、覆盖遵循和成本效率提升。
开源Routiium、EduRouter、规范任务工具和模拟配置以支持复现和未来研究。
analysis.experiments: 使用两个工程实验室（LED表征、RC电路分析）的轨迹驱动模拟和通过真实模型的100查询回放进行评估。模拟中，治理策略（P1/P2）将挑战对齐指数从0.90提升至0.98，覆盖遵循分数从0.69提升至0.87，有效挣扎窗口从1.4增加到3.6模拟轮次。100查询回放中，EduRouter将75%查询路由至本地模型，成本降低66%（$0.087 vs $0.26），同时规范意图问题库的命中率保持1.0。
limitations: 评估基于模拟和有限查询回放，真实课堂环境效果待验证。
系统依赖预定义意图库和嵌入匹配，可能无法覆盖所有学生问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出策略驱动的LLM路由系统，在工程实验室中平衡辅助与学习机会，通过意图匹配和预算控制提升挑战对齐并降低成本。

papers.title: Can VLMs Truly Forget? Benchmarking Training-Free Visual Concept Unlearning
papers.abstract: VLMs trained on web-scale data retain sensitive and copyrighted visual concepts that deployment may require removing. Training-based unlearning methods share a structural flaw: fine-tuning on a narrow forget set degrades general capabilities before unlearning begins, making it impossible to attribute subsequent performance drops to the unlearning procedure itself. Training-free approaches sidestep this by suppressing concepts through prompts or system instructions, but no rigorous benchmark exists for evaluating them on visual tasks. We introduce VLM-UnBench, the first benchmark for training-free visual concept unlearning in VLMs. It covers four forgetting levels, 7 source datasets, and 11 concept axes, and pairs a three-level probe taxonomy with five evaluation conditions to separate genuine forgetting from instruction compliance. Across 8 evaluation settings and 13 VLM configurations, realistic unlearning prompts leave forget accuracy near the no-instruction baseline; meaningful reductions appear only under oracle conditions that disclose the target concept to the model. Object and scene concepts are the most resistant to suppression, and stronger instruction-tuned models remain capable despite explicit forget instructions. These results expose a clear gap between prompt-level suppression and true visual concept erasure.

analysis.tldr: 首个训练无关视觉概念遗忘基准VLM-UnBench揭示，提示级抑制无法实现真正的视觉概念擦除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有训练式遗忘方法在微调前就已损害通用能力，无法归因性能下降；训练无关方法缺乏系统评估基准。
analysis.problem: 如何严格评估训练无关方法在视觉概念遗忘上的真实效果，区分指令遵从与真正遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实遗忘提示下遗忘准确率接近无指令基线；仅在oracle条件下（向模型透露目标概念）才有显著下降；物体和场景概念最难抑制；强指令微调模型即使有明确遗忘指令仍保持能力。
analysis.method: 构建VLM-UnBench基准，涵盖4个遗忘级别、7个源数据集、11个概念轴，结合三级探针分类法和5种评估条件。
contributions: 提出首个训练无关视觉概念遗忘基准VLM-UnBench
系统评估8种设置和13种VLM配置，揭示提示级抑制与真正擦除之间的差距
analysis.experiments: 在8种评估设置和13种VLM配置上进行实验，覆盖多种遗忘级别和概念轴。
limitations: 仅评估训练无关方法，未与训练式方法直接对比
基准可能未覆盖所有视觉概念和遗忘场景
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个训练无关视觉概念遗忘基准VLM-UnBench揭示，提示级抑制无法实现真正的视觉概念擦除。

papers.title: ARIQA-3DS: A Stereoscopic Image Quality Assessment Dataset for Realistic Augmented Reality
papers.abstract: As Augmented Reality (AR) technologies advance towards immersive consumer adoption, the need for rigorous Quality of Experience (QoE) assessment becomes critical. However, existing datasets often lack ecological validity, relying on monocular viewing or simplified backgrounds that fail to capture the complex perceptual interplay, termed visual confusion, between real and virtual layers. To address this gap, we present ARIQA-3DS, the first large stereoscopic AR Image Quality Assessment dataset. Comprising 1,200 AR viewports, the dataset fuses high-resolution stereoscopic omnidirectional captures of real-world scenes with diverse augmented foregrounds under controlled transparency and degradation conditions. We conducted a comprehensive subjective study with 36 participants using a video see-through head-mounted display, collecting both quality ratings and simulator-sickness indicators. Our analysis reveals that perceived quality is primarily driven by foreground degradations and modulated by transparency levels, while oculomotor and disorientation symptoms show a progressive but manageable increase during viewing. ARIQA-3DS will be publicly released to serve as a comprehensive benchmark for developing next-generation AR quality assessment models.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模立体AR图像质量评估数据集，包含1200个视口，揭示了前景退化与透明度对感知质量的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AR图像质量评估数据集缺乏生态效度，多依赖单目观看或简化背景，无法捕捉真实与虚拟层之间的视觉混淆，阻碍了沉浸式AR体验的QoE评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏具有生态效度的大规模立体AR图像质量评估数据集，以支持真实场景下的QoE建模与评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 感知质量主要由前景退化驱动，并受透明度水平调节；眼动和定向障碍症状在观看过程中渐进但可控地增加。
analysis.method: 构建了包含1200个AR视口的立体数据集，融合高分辨率立体全景真实场景与多种增强前景，在受控透明度和退化条件下采集，并通过36名受试者在视频透视头戴显示器上进行主观质量评分和模拟器病征记录。
contributions: 提出了首个大规模立体AR图像质量评估数据集ARIQA-3DS，包含1200个视口。
通过受控实验揭示了前景退化和透明度对感知质量的影响，以及观看过程中的模拟器病征变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了主观研究设计（36名参与者、视频透视头戴显示器、质量评分和模拟器病征指标）。
limitations: 数据集仅包含特定透明度和退化条件，可能无法覆盖所有AR场景。
主观研究样本量有限（36人），可能影响统计泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模立体AR图像质量评估数据集，包含1200个视口，揭示了前景退化与透明度对感知质量的影响。

papers.title: From Model-Based Screening to Data-Driven Surrogates: A Multi-Stage Workflow for Exploring Stochastic Agent-Based Models
papers.abstract: Systematic exploration of Agent-Based Models (ABMs) is challenged by the curse of dimensionality and their inherent stochasticity. We present a multi-stage pipeline integrating the systematic design of experiments with machine learning surrogates. Using a predator-prey case study, our methodology proceeds in two steps. First, an automated model-based screening identifies dominant variables, assesses outcome variability, and segments the parameter space. Second, we train Machine Learning models to map the remaining nonlinear interaction effects. This approach automates the discovery of unstable regions where system outcomes are highly dependent on nonlinear interactions between many variables. Thus, this work provides modelers with a rigorous, hands-off framework for sensitivity analysis and policy testing, even when dealing with high-dimensional stochastic simulators.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多阶段工作流，将基于模型的筛选与数据驱动代理模型结合，用于探索随机代理模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 代理模型（ABMs）的系统探索面临维度灾难和固有随机性的挑战，现有方法难以高效处理高维随机模拟器的敏感性分析和策略测试。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化地探索高维随机代理模型，识别主导变量和非线性交互效应，并发现不稳定区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段流水线：第一阶段通过自动化基于模型的筛选识别主导变量、评估结果变异性并分割参数空间；第二阶段训练机器学习模型映射剩余的非线性交互效应。
contributions: 提出一种集成实验设计与机器学习代理的多阶段工作流，用于系统探索随机代理模型。
通过捕食者-猎物案例展示了该方法能自动发现高度依赖非线性交互的不稳定区域。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的代理模型（如捕食者-猎物模型），泛化性待验证。
未讨论机器学习模型的选择和超参数调优对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多阶段工作流，将基于模型的筛选与数据驱动代理模型结合，用于探索随机代理模型。

papers.title: AlertStar: Path-Aware Alert Prediction on Hyper-Relational Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Cyber-attacks continue to grow in scale and sophistication, yet existing network intrusion detection approaches lack the semantic depth required for path reasoning over attacker-victim interactions. We address this by first modelling network alerts as a knowledge graph, then formulating hyper-relational alert prediction as a hyper-relational knowledge graph completion (HR-KGC) problem, representing each network alert as a qualified statement (h, r, t, Q), where h and t are source and destination IPs, r denotes the attack type, and Q encodes flow-level metadata such as timestamps, ports, protocols, and attack intensity, going beyond standard KGC binary triples (h, r, t) that would discard this contextual richness. We introduce five models across three contributions: first, Hyper-relational Neural Bellman-Ford (HR-NBFNet) extends Neural Bellman-Ford Networks to the hyper-relational setting with qualifier-aware multi-hop path reasoning, while its multi-task variant MT-HR-NBFNet jointly predicts tail, relation, and qualifier-value within a single traversal pass; second, AlertStar fuses qualifier context and structural path information entirely in embedding space via cross-attention and learned path composition, and its multi-task extension MT-AlertStar eliminates the overhead of full knowledge graph propagation; third, HR-NBFNet-CQ extends qualifier-aware representations to answer complex first-order logic queries, including one-hop, two-hop chain, two-anchor intersection, and union, enabling multi-condition threat reasoning over the alert knowledge graph. Evaluated inductively on the Warden and UNSW-NB15 benchmarks across three qualifier-density regimes, AlertStar and MT-AlertStar achieve superior MR, MRR, and Hits@k, demonstrating that local qualifier fusion is both sufficient and more efficient than global path propagation for hyper-relational alert prediction.

analysis.tldr: 提出超关系知识图谱上的路径感知告警预测模型AlertStar，通过融合限定符上下文与结构路径信息提升网络入侵检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有网络入侵检测方法缺乏对攻击者-受害者交互路径进行语义推理的深度，无法充分利用告警中的流级元数据（如时间戳、端口、协议等）。
analysis.problem: 将网络告警建模为超关系知识图谱，并解决超关系告警预测（即超关系知识图谱补全）问题，以利用限定符（qualifier）增强的上下文信息进行路径推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出五类模型：HR-NBFNet（扩展神经Bellman-Ford到超关系设置，支持限定符感知的多跳路径推理）、MT-HR-NBFNet（多任务变体，单次遍历联合预测尾实体、关系和限定符值）、AlertStar（通过交叉注意力和学习路径组合在嵌入空间融合限定符上下文和结构路径信息）、MT-AlertStar（多任务扩展，消除全图传播开销）、HR-NBFNet-CQ（扩展限定符感知表示以回答复杂一阶逻辑查询）。
contributions: 将网络告警预测形式化为超关系知识图谱补全问题，并引入限定符表示流级元数据。
提出AlertStar系列模型，通过局部限定符融合实现高效且有效的路径感知告警预测。
在Warden和UNSW-NB15基准上实现优于现有方法的MR、MRR和Hits@k指标。
analysis.experiments: 在Warden和UNSW-NB15基准上，跨三种限定符密度场景进行归纳评估，AlertStar和MT-AlertStar在MR、MRR和Hits@k上取得更优结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的超关系知识图谱构建。
复杂查询推理（如HR-NBFNet-CQ）的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超关系知识图谱上的路径感知告警预测模型AlertStar，通过融合限定符上下文与结构路径信息提升网络入侵检测性能。

papers.title: Co-Evolution of Policy and Internal Reward for Language Agents
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents learn by interacting with environments, but long-horizon training remains fundamentally bottlenecked by sparse and delayed rewards. Existing methods typically address this challenge through post-hoc credit assignment or external reward models, which provide limited guidance at inference time and often separate reward improvement from policy improvement. We propose Self-Guide, a self-generated internal reward for language agents that supports both inference-time guidance and training-time supervision. Specifically, the agent uses Self-Guide as a short self-guidance signal to steer the next action during inference, and converts the same signal into step-level internal reward for denser policy optimization during training. This creates a co-evolving loop: better policy produces better guidance, and better guidance further improves policy as internal reward. Across three agent benchmarks, inference-time self-guidance already yields clear gains, while jointly evolving policy and internal reward with GRPO brings further improvements (8\%) over baselines trained solely with environment reward. Overall, our results suggest that language agents can improve not only by collecting more experience, but also by learning to generate and refine their own internal reward during acting and learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出Self-Guide框架，让LLM Agent在推理和训练中自生成内部奖励，实现策略与奖励的协同进化。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在长程任务中面临稀疏延迟奖励问题，现有方法依赖事后信用分配或外部奖励模型，推理时指导有限且奖励改进与策略改进分离。
analysis.problem: 如何为语言Agent提供密集且自适应的奖励信号，同时支持推理时引导和训练时监督，并实现策略与奖励的协同进化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Self-Guide框架，Agent在推理时生成短自引导信号指导下一步动作，在训练时将同一信号转换为步骤级内部奖励，通过GRPO联合优化策略和内部奖励，形成协同进化循环。
contributions: 提出Self-Guide，一种自生成的内部奖励机制，同时支持推理时引导和训练时监督。
实现策略与内部奖励的协同进化，在三个Agent基准上取得8%的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在三个Agent基准上评估，推理时自引导即有提升，联合进化（GRPO）比仅用环境奖励的基线提升8%。
limitations: 内部奖励的生成质量可能依赖初始策略，存在冷启动问题。
GRPO训练的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Self-Guide框架，让LLM Agent在推理和训练中自生成内部奖励，实现策略与奖励的协同进化。

papers.title: Decision-Theoretic Safety Assessment of Persona-Driven Multi-Agent Systems in O-RAN
papers.abstract: Autonomous network management in Open Radio Access Networks requires intelligent decision making across conflicting objectives, yet existing LLM based multi agent systems employ homogeneous strategies and lack systematic predeployment validation. We introduce a persona driven multi agent framework where configurable behavioral personas structured specifications encoding optimization priorities, risk tolerance, and decision making style influence five specialized agents (planning, coordination, resource allocation, code generation, analysis). To enable rigorous validation, we develop a three dimensional evaluation framework grounded in decision theory, measuring normative compliance (optimality adherence), prescriptive alignment (behavioral guideline consistency), and behavioral dynamics (emergent system properties). We evaluate 486 persona configurations across two ORAN optimization challenges (energy efficient resource allocation and network load balancing). Results demonstrate that persona agent alignment significantly impacts both individual performance (14.3 percent) and emergent multi agent coordination, with retrieval architecture (GraphRAG vs. RAG) fundamentally constraining customization effectiveness. Single agent persona modifications propagate system wide through cascading effects, with certain combinations exhibiting detectable fundamental incompatibilities. Our framework provides systematic validation mechanisms for deploying LLM based automation in mission critical telecommunications infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于决策理论的三维评估框架，用于验证O-RAN中人格驱动多智能体系统的安全性与协调性。
analysis.research_motivation: O-RAN自主网络管理需要智能决策，但现有基于LLM的多智能体系统采用同质策略且缺乏系统性的部署前验证，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地评估和验证人格驱动多智能体系统在O-RAN中的安全性与协调性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人格配置显著影响个体性能（14.3%）和涌现的多智能体协调；检索架构（GraphRAG vs. RAG）从根本上限制定制效果；单智能体人格修改通过级联效应传播到整个系统，某些组合存在根本性不兼容。
analysis.method: 提出人格驱动多智能体框架（含5个专业智能体）和基于决策理论的三维评估框架（规范性合规、规定性对齐、行为动力学），评估486种人格配置。
contributions: 提出人格驱动多智能体框架，通过可配置行为人格实现异构策略。
开发基于决策理论的三维评估框架，系统性验证多智能体系统的安全性与协调性。
通过大规模实验揭示人格对齐、检索架构和级联效应对系统性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在O-RAN的两个优化挑战（节能资源分配和网络负载均衡）上评估486种人格配置，结果显示人格对齐显著影响性能，检索架构限制定制效果，单智能体修改产生级联效应。
limitations: 仅针对O-RAN场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论计算开销和实时部署可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于决策理论的三维评估框架，用于验证O-RAN中人格驱动多智能体系统的安全性与协调性。

papers.title: A Data-Centric Vision Transformer Baseline for SAR Sea Ice Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate and automated sea ice classification is important for climate monitoring and maritime safety in the Arctic. While Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) is the operational standard because of its all-weather capability, it remains challenging to distinguish morphologically similar ice classes under severe class imbalance. Rather than claiming a fully validated multimodal system, this paper establishes a trustworthy SAR only baseline that future fusion work can build upon. Using the AI4Arctic/ASIP Sea Ice Dataset (v2), which contains 461 Sentinel-1 scenes matched with expert ice charts, we combine full-resolution Sentinel-1 Extra Wide inputs, leakage-aware stratified patch splitting, SIGRID-3 stage-of-development labels, and training-set normalization to evaluate Vision Transformer baselines. We compare ViT-Base models trained with cross entropy and weighted cross-entropy against a ViT-Large model trained with focal loss. Among the tested configurations, ViT-Large with focal loss achieves 69.6% held-out accuracy, 68.8% weighted F1, and 83.9% precision on the minority Multi-Year Ice class. These results show that focal-loss training offers a more useful precision-recall trade-off than weighted cross-entropy for rare ice classes and establishes a cleaner baseline for future multimodal fusion with optical, thermal, or meteorological data.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据中心的ViT基线用于SAR海冰分类，通过焦点损失缓解类别不平衡，为多模态融合提供干净基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 准确的海冰分类对气候监测和北极航行安全至关重要，但SAR图像中形态相似的冰类在严重类别不平衡下难以区分，现有方法缺乏可靠的纯SAR基线。
analysis.problem: 在严重类别不平衡条件下，利用SAR图像准确分类形态相似的海冰类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合全分辨率Sentinel-1输入、泄漏感知分层补丁分割、SIGRID-3发展阶段标签和训练集归一化，评估ViT-Base（交叉熵/加权交叉熵）和ViT-Large（焦点损失）基线。
contributions: 建立了基于ViT的纯SAR海冰分类基线，为未来多模态融合提供参考。
实验表明焦点损失在稀有冰类上比加权交叉熵提供更优的精度-召回权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在AI4Arctic/ASIP Sea Ice Dataset (v2)上评估，ViT-Large+焦点损失达到69.6%准确率、68.8%加权F1和83.9%少数类（多年冰）精度。
limitations: 仅使用SAR单模态，未融合光学、热红外或气象数据。
数据集规模有限（461景Sentinel-1影像），可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据中心的ViT基线用于SAR海冰分类，通过焦点损失缓解类别不平衡，为多模态融合提供干净基线。

papers.title: Supply-Chain Poisoning Attacks Against LLM Coding Agent Skill Ecosystems
papers.abstract: LLM-based coding agents extend their capabilities via third-party agent skills distributed through open marketplaces without mandatory security review. Unlike traditional packages, these skills are executed as operational directives with system-level privileges, so a single malicious skill can compromise the host. Prior work has not examined whether supply-chain attacks can directly hijack an agent's action space, such as file writes, shell commands, and network requests, despite existing safeguards. We introduce Document-Driven Implicit Payload Execution (DDIPE), which embeds malicious logic in code examples and configuration templates within skill documentation. Because agents reuse these examples during normal tasks, the payload executes without explicit prompts. Using an LLM-driven pipeline, we generate 1,070 adversarial skills from 81 seeds across 15 MITRE ATTACK categories. Across four frameworks and five models, DDIPE achieves 11.6% to 33.5% bypass rates, while explicit instruction attacks achieve 0% under strong defenses. Static analysis detects most cases, but 2.5% evade both detection and alignment. Responsible disclosure led to four confirmed vulnerabilities and two fixes.

analysis.tldr: 提出文档驱动隐式载荷执行（DDIPE）攻击，利用LLM编码代理重用文档中代码示例的机制实现供应链投毒，绕过安全防御。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM编码代理通过第三方技能扩展能力，但技能市场缺乏强制安全审查，现有研究未关注供应链攻击如何直接劫持代理的动作空间（如文件写入、shell命令、网络请求）。
analysis.problem: 如何利用技能文档中的代码示例和配置模板嵌入恶意逻辑，使代理在正常任务中隐式执行载荷，从而绕过现有安全防护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：显式指令攻击在强防御下成功率0%，而DDIPE攻击在四个框架和五个模型上达到11.6%-33.5%的绕过率；静态分析可检测大多数情况，但2.5%同时逃避检测和对齐。
analysis.method: 提出文档驱动隐式载荷执行（DDIPE），通过LLM驱动的流水线从81个种子生成1070个对抗性技能，覆盖15个MITRE ATTACK类别，将恶意逻辑嵌入技能文档的代码示例和配置模板中。
contributions: 首次系统研究针对LLM编码代理技能生态系统的供应链投毒攻击，提出DDIPE攻击方法。
构建大规模对抗性技能数据集（1070个），覆盖15个攻击类别，并在多个框架和模型上评估，揭示安全漏洞。
analysis.experiments: 在四个框架和五个模型上评估DDIPE，绕过率11.6%-33.5%；显式指令攻击在强防御下0%；静态分析检测大多数，2.5%逃避检测和对齐。负责任披露导致四个确认漏洞和两个修复。
limitations: 攻击依赖代理重用文档中代码示例的行为，可能不适用于不重用示例的代理。
静态分析可检测大部分攻击，但仍有2.5%逃避，需更强大的防御机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文档驱动隐式载荷执行（DDIPE）攻击，利用LLM编码代理重用文档中代码示例的机制实现供应链投毒，绕过安全防御。

papers.title: Stochastic KV Routing: Enabling Adaptive Depth-Wise Cache Sharing
papers.abstract: Serving transformer language models with high throughput requires caching Key-Values (KVs) to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive generation. The memory footprint of KV caching is significant and heavily impacts serving costs. This work proposes to lessen these memory requirements. While recent work has largely addressed KV cache reduction via compression and eviction along the temporal axis, we argue that the \emph{depth} dimension offers an orthogonal and robust avenue for optimization. Although prior research suggests that a full cache for every layer is redundant, implementing cross-layer cache sharing remains a practical challenge; existing methods typically suffer from reduced throughput or increased time-to-first-token. In this paper, we demonstrate that dropping a layer's cache offers efficient optimization without information loss. We propose a simple training approach: random cross-layer attention. During training, layers randomly choose to attend either to their own KV states or those of a preceding layer. This stochastic process adapts the model to be robust to various depth-wise cache sharing strategies, ensuring flexibility for unknown hardware constraints at deployment time. Our evaluations show that applying this scheme during pre-training or fine-tuning enables depth-wise cache sharing for various model families. Furthermore, for larger models in data-constrained settings, this approach is suggestive of a regularization-like effect, frequently preserving or improving performance while significantly reducing the cache's memory footprint.

analysis.tldr: 提出随机KV路由，通过训练时随机跨层注意力实现深度维度的KV缓存共享，减少LLM推理内存占用。
analysis.research_motivation: KV缓存内存占用巨大，严重影响LLM服务成本；现有压缩方法多沿时间轴进行，深度维度优化潜力未被充分挖掘，且已有跨层缓存共享方法存在吞吐下降或首token延迟增加的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持模型性能的前提下，高效实现深度维度的KV缓存共享以降低内存占用，同时避免现有方法的吞吐损失和延迟增加。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出每层全量缓存存在冗余，但直接实现跨层缓存共享有实际挑战；随机跨层注意力训练使模型对多种深度缓存共享策略鲁棒，且在大模型数据受限场景下具有正则化效果，可能保持或提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出随机跨层注意力训练方法：训练时每层随机选择关注自身KV状态或前一层KV状态，使模型适应不同深度缓存共享策略，部署时可根据硬件约束灵活选择共享方案。
contributions: 提出深度维度KV缓存共享的优化方向，并论证其正交性和鲁棒性。
设计随机跨层注意力训练方法，实现无信息损失的深度缓存共享，避免吞吐和延迟问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多种模型家族上验证了预训练或微调后深度缓存共享的有效性，以及大模型数据受限场景下的正则化效果。
limitations: 随机训练可能增加训练复杂度或收敛难度。
部署时缓存共享策略的选择需依赖硬件约束，可能引入额外调优成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出随机KV路由，通过训练时随机跨层注意力实现深度维度的KV缓存共享，减少LLM推理内存占用。

papers.title: MI-Pruner: Crossmodal Mutual Information-guided Token Pruner for Efficient MLLMs
papers.abstract: For multimodal large language models (MLLMs), visual information is relatively sparse compared with text. As a result, research on visual pruning emerges for efficient inference. Current approaches typically measure token importance based on the attention scores in the visual encoder or in the LLM decoder, then select visual tokens with high attention scores while pruning others. In this paper, we pursue a different and more surgical approach. Instead of relying on mechanism-specific signals, we directly compute Mutual Information (MI) between visual and textual features themselves, prior to their interaction. This allows us to explicitly measure crossmodal dependency at the feature levels. Our MI-Pruner is simple, efficient and non-intrusive, requiring no access to internal attention maps or architectural modifications. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach outperforms previous attention-based pruning methods with minimal latency.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于互信息的视觉标记剪枝方法，无需注意力图即可高效加速多模态大模型推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型中视觉信息相对稀疏，现有剪枝方法依赖注意力分数，需访问内部注意力图或修改架构，存在效率瓶颈和侵入性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖注意力图或架构修改的前提下，高效剪枝视觉标记以加速多模态大模型推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 直接计算视觉与文本特征之间的互信息，在特征交互前衡量跨模态依赖，据此剪枝低重要性视觉标记。
contributions: 提出基于互信息的跨模态视觉标记剪枝方法，无需注意力图或架构修改。
方法简单高效且非侵入性，实验表明优于先前基于注意力的剪枝方法，延迟更低。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于视觉信息稀疏的场景。
互信息计算可能引入额外开销，需进一步验证效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于互信息的视觉标记剪枝方法，无需注意力图即可高效加速多模态大模型推理。

papers.title: Automatic Textbook Formalization
papers.abstract: We present a case study where an automatic AI system formalizes a textbook with more than 500 pages of graduate-level algebraic combinatorics to Lean. The resulting formalization represents a new milestone in textbook formalization scale and proficiency, moving from early results in undergraduate topology and restructuring of existing library content to a full standalone formalization of a graduate textbook. The formalization comprises 130K lines of code and 5900 Lean declarations and was conducted within one week by a total of 30K Claude 4.5 Opus agents collaborating in parallel on a shared code base via version control, simultaneously setting a record in multi-agent software engineering with usable results. The inference cost matches or undercuts what we estimate as the salaries required for a team of human experts, and we expect there is still the potential for large efficiencies to be made without the need for better models. We make our code, the resulting Lean code base and a side-by-side blueprint website available open-source.

analysis.tldr: 用30K个Claude 4.5 Opus智能体在一周内将500+页研究生代数组合数学教材自动形式化为Lean代码，共13万行、5900个声明。
analysis.research_motivation: 教材形式化是验证数学知识正确性的重要手段，但传统人工形式化耗时耗力，难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、大规模地将复杂数学教材自动形式化为可验证的代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多智能体协作能在一周内完成500+页教材的形式化，成本与人类专家团队相当，且仍有优化空间。
analysis.method: 使用30K个Claude 4.5 Opus智能体并行协作，通过版本控制共享代码库，自动将教材内容转化为Lean代码。
contributions: 首次实现研究生级别数学教材的完整自动形式化，规模达13万行代码。
展示了多智能体系统在软件工程中的高效协作能力，创下多智能体软件工程记录。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域（代数组合数学），泛化性未知。
未讨论形式化结果的正确性验证细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用30K个Claude 4.5 Opus智能体在一周内将500+页研究生代数组合数学教材自动形式化为Lean代码，共13万行、5900个声明。

papers.title: Credential Leakage in LLM Agent Skills: A Large-Scale Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Third-party skills extend LLM agents with powerful capabilities but often handle sensitive credentials in privileged environments, making leakage risks poorly understood. We present the first large-scale empirical study of this problem, analyzing 17,022 skills (sampled from 170,226 on SkillsMP) using static analysis, sandbox testing, and manual inspection. We identify 520 vulnerable skills with 1,708 issues and derive a taxonomy of 10 leakage patterns (4 accidental and 6 adversarial). We find that (1) leakage is fundamentally cross-modal: 76.3% require joint analysis of code and natural language, while 3.1% arise purely from prompt injection; (2) debug logging is the primary vector, with print and console.log causing 73.5% of leaks due to stdout exposure to LLMs; and (3) leaked credentials are both exploitable (89.6% without privileges) and persistent, as forks retain secrets even after upstream fixes. After disclosure, all malicious skills were removed and 91.6% of hardcoded credentials were fixed. We release our dataset, taxonomy, and detection pipeline to support future research.

analysis.tldr: 对17,022个LLM Agent技能的大规模实证研究发现凭证泄露普遍存在，76.3%需跨模态分析，调试日志是主要泄露向量。
analysis.research_motivation: 第三方技能为LLM Agent提供强大功能，但常在特权环境中处理敏感凭证，泄露风险尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 系统性地评估和分类LLM Agent技能中的凭证泄露问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 泄露本质上是跨模态的（76.3%需代码与自然语言联合分析），调试日志是主要泄露途径（73.5%），泄露凭证可被利用（89.6%无需特权）且持久存在（fork后仍保留秘密）。
analysis.method: 对17,022个技能进行静态分析、沙箱测试和人工检查，识别出520个易受攻击的技能和1,708个问题，归纳出10种泄露模式（4种意外、6种对抗）。
contributions: 首次大规模实证研究LLM Agent技能中的凭证泄露问题
构建了泄露模式分类法并开源数据集、检测流程
analysis.experiments: 分析了17,022个技能（从170,226个中采样），识别出520个易受攻击的技能和1,708个问题。
limitations: 仅基于SkillsMP平台，可能不具全面代表性
静态分析和沙箱测试可能漏报某些复杂泄露
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对17,022个LLM Agent技能的大规模实证研究发现凭证泄露普遍存在，76.3%需跨模态分析，调试日志是主要泄露向量。

papers.title: A Scoping Review of LLM-as-a-Judge in Healthcare and the MedJUDGE Framework
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) increasingly generate and process clinical text, scalable evaluation has become critical. LLM-as-a-Judge (LaaJ), which uses LLMs to evaluate model outputs, offers a scalable alternative to costly expert review, but its healthcare adoption raises safety and bias concerns. We conducted a PRISMA-ScR scoping review of six databases (January 2020-January 2026), screening 11,727 studies and including 49. The landscape was dominated by evaluation and benchmarking applications (n=37, 75.5%), pointwise scoring (n=42, 85.7%), and GPT-family judges (n=36, 73.5%). Despite growing adoption, validation rigor was limited: among 36 studies with human involvement, the median number of expert validators was 3, while 13 (26.5%) used none. Risk of bias testing was absent in 36 studies (73.5%), only 1 (2.0%) examined demographic fairness, and none assessed temporal stability or patient context. Deployment remained limited, with 1 study (2.0%) reaching production and four (8.2%) prototype stage. Importantly, these gaps may interact: when judges and evaluated systems share training data or architectures, they may inherit similar blind spots, and agreement metrics may fail to distinguish true validity from shared errors. Minimal human oversight, limited bias assessment, and model monoculture together represent a governance gap where current validation may miss clinically significant errors. To address this, we propose MedJUDGE (Medical Judge Utility, De-biasing, Governance and Evaluation), a risk-stratified three-pillar framework organized around validity, safety, and accountability across clinical risk tiers, providing deployment-oriented evaluation guidance for healthcare LaaJ systems.

analysis.tldr: 系统综述LLM-as-a-Judge在医疗中的现状，发现验证不严、偏见评估缺失，并提出MedJUDGE框架。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成临床文本增多，需要可扩展的评估方法，但专家评审成本高；LLM-as-a-Judge虽可扩展，但在医疗领域存在安全和偏见隐患，现有综述缺乏系统性分析。
analysis.problem: 医疗领域LLM-as-a-Judge的验证严谨性不足，存在偏见、模型单一化及治理缺口，缺乏部署导向的评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 综述发现：评估和基准应用占主导（75.5%），点式评分（85.7%），GPT系列模型（73.5%）；验证严谨性有限，中位专家验证者仅3人，26.5%无人类参与；73.5%未测试偏倚风险，仅2.0%检查人口公平性，无研究评估时间稳定性或患者背景；部署极少（2.0%生产，8.2%原型）。
analysis.method: 进行PRISMA-ScR范围综述（6个数据库，2020.01-2026.01），筛选11727篇纳入49篇；提出MedJUDGE框架，包含有效性、安全性、问责制三个支柱，按临床风险分层。
contributions: 首次系统综述医疗领域LLM-as-a-Judge，揭示验证和偏见评估的严重不足
提出MedJUDGE框架，为不同临床风险层提供部署导向的评估指导
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述综述方法和框架。
limitations: 综述可能遗漏非英语或灰色文献
MedJUDGE框架尚未经过实证验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统综述LLM-as-a-Judge在医疗中的现状，发现验证不严、偏见评估缺失，并提出MedJUDGE框架。

papers.title: SparseSplat: Towards Applicable Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian Splatting with Pixel-Unaligned Prediction
papers.abstract: Recent progress in feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has notably improved rendering quality. However, the spatially uniform and highly redundant 3DGS map generated by previous feed-forward 3DGS methods limits their integration into downstream reconstruction tasks. We propose SparseSplat, the first feed-forward 3DGS model that adaptively adjusts Gaussian density according to scene structure and information richness of local regions, yielding highly compact 3DGS maps. To achieve this, we propose entropy-based probabilistic sampling, generating large, sparse Gaussians in textureless areas and assigning small, dense Gaussians to regions with rich information. Additionally, we designed a specialized point cloud network that efficiently encodes local context and decodes it into 3DGS attributes, addressing the receptive field mismatch between the general 3DGS optimization pipeline and feed-forward models. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that SparseSplat can achieve state-of-the-art rendering quality with only 22% of the Gaussians and maintain reasonable rendering quality with only 1.5% of the Gaussians. Project page: https://victkk.github.io/SparseSplat-page/.

analysis.tldr: SparseSplat 通过熵概率采样和点云网络实现自适应稀疏 3DGS，仅用 22% 高斯量即达 SOTA 渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前馈 3DGS 方法生成的空间均匀且高度冗余的高斯图限制了其在下游重建任务中的应用，需要更紧凑的表示。
analysis.problem: 如何让前馈 3DGS 模型根据场景结构自适应调整高斯密度，生成紧凑且高质量的 3DGS 图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前馈 3DGS 方法产生的高斯分布空间均匀且冗余，导致效率低下；通用 3DGS 优化流程与前馈模型之间存在感受野不匹配问题。
analysis.method: 提出熵概率采样，在无纹理区域生成大而稀疏的高斯，在信息丰富区域分配小而密集的高斯；设计专用点云网络高效编码局部上下文并解码为 3DGS 属性。
contributions: 首个自适应调整高斯密度的前馈 3DGS 模型，显著降低高斯数量。
提出熵概率采样策略和专用点云网络，解决感受野不匹配问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，SparseSplat 仅用 22% 高斯量达到 SOTA 渲染质量，用 1.5% 高斯量仍保持合理质量。
limitations: 可能对极端稀疏场景的鲁棒性不足。
点云网络的设计可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SparseSplat 通过熵概率采样和点云网络实现自适应稀疏 3DGS，仅用 22% 高斯量即达 SOTA 渲染质量。

papers.title: Disentangled Dual-Branch Graph Learning for Conversational Emotion Recognition
papers.abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition in conversations aims to infer utterance-level emotions by jointly modeling textual, acoustic, and visual cues within context. Despite recent progress, key challenges remain, including redundant cross-modal information, imperfect semantic alignment, and insufficient modeling of high-order speaker interactions. To address these issues, we propose a framework that combines dual-space feature disentanglement with dual-branch graph learning. A shared encoder and modality-specific encoders are used to separate modality-invariant and modality-specific representations. The invariant features are modeled by a Fourier graph neural network to capture global consistency and complementary patterns, with a frequency-domain contrastive objective to enhance discriminability. In parallel, a speaker-aware hypergraph is constructed over modality-specific features to model high-order interactions, along with a speaker-consistency constraint to maintain coherent semantics. Finally, the two branches are fused for utterance-level emotion prediction. Experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior performance over strong baselines, validating its effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦双分支图学习框架，通过分离模态不变/特有特征并建模高阶说话者交互，提升对话情感识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态对话情感识别中，现有方法面临跨模态信息冗余、语义对齐不完善以及高阶说话者交互建模不足等问题，限制了识别性能。
analysis.problem: 如何有效分离模态共享与特有信息，并同时建模全局一致性和高阶说话者交互，以提升对话情感识别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出跨模态信息冗余、语义对齐不完善和高阶说话者交互建模不足是当前主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出双空间特征解耦与双分支图学习框架：共享编码器和模态特定编码器分离模态不变和模态特有表示；不变特征经傅里叶图神经网络建模全局一致性，并辅以频域对比学习；模态特有特征构建说话者感知超图建模高阶交互，并加入说话者一致性约束；最后融合两分支进行情感预测。
contributions: 提出双空间特征解耦方法，有效分离模态不变和模态特有表示。
设计双分支图学习架构，分别利用傅里叶图神经网络和说话者感知超图建模全局一致性与高阶交互。
在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上取得优于强基线的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖多模态输入，单模态场景下效果未知。
超图构建复杂度较高，可能影响推理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦双分支图学习框架，通过分离模态不变/特有特征并建模高阶说话者交互，提升对话情感识别性能。

papers.title: Gram-MMD: A Texture-Aware Metric for Image Realism Assessment
papers.abstract: Evaluating the realism of generated images remains a fundamental challenge in generative modeling. Existing distributional metrics such as the Frechet Inception Distance (FID) and CLIP-MMD (CMMD) compare feature distributions at a semantic level but may overlook fine-grained textural information that can be relevant for distinguishing real from generated images. We introduce Gram-MMD (GMMD), a realism metric that leverages Gram matrices computed from intermediate activations of pretrained backbone networks to capture correlations between feature maps. By extracting the upper-triangular part of these symmetric Gram matrices and measuring the Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) between an anchor distribution of real images and an evaluation distribution, GMMD produces a representation that encodes textural and structural characteristics at a finer granularity than global embeddings. To select the hyperparameters of the metric, we employ a meta-metric protocol based on controlled degradations applied to MS-COCO images, measuring monotonicity via Spearman's rank correlation and Kendall's tau. We conduct experiments on both the KADID-10k database and the RAISE realness assessment dataset using various backbone architectures, including DINOv2, DC-AE, Stable Diffusion's VAE encoder, VGG19, and the AlexNet backbone from LPIPS, among others. We also demonstrate on a cross-domain driving scenario (KITTI / Virtual KITTI / Stanford Cars) that CMMD can incorrectly rank real images as less realistic than synthetic ones due to its semantic bias, while GMMD preserves the correct ordering. Our results suggest that GMMD captures complementary information to existing semantic-level metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出Gram-MMD指标，通过Gram矩阵捕获纹理细节，更准确地评估生成图像的真实感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分布指标如FID和CMMD主要比较语义级特征，可能忽略对区分真实与生成图像至关重要的细粒度纹理信息。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能捕捉纹理和结构细节的图像真实感评估指标，以弥补语义级指标的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在跨域驾驶场景中，CMMD因语义偏差错误地将真实图像排名低于合成图像，而Gram-MMD能保持正确排序。
analysis.method: 从预训练骨干网络的中间激活中计算Gram矩阵，提取上三角部分作为特征，再计算真实图像锚分布与评估分布之间的最大均值差异（MMD）。
contributions: 提出Gram-MMD指标，利用Gram矩阵捕获纹理和结构特征，实现更细粒度的真实感评估。
通过元指标协议（基于MS-COCO的受控退化）选择超参数，并在多个数据集和骨干网络上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在KADID-10k和RAISE数据集上使用多种骨干网络（DINOv2、DC-AE、Stable Diffusion VAE、VGG19、LPIPS的AlexNet等）进行实验，并在KITTI/Virtual KITTI/Stanford Cars跨域场景中展示CMMD的语义偏差。
limitations: 依赖预训练骨干网络，可能引入特定偏差。
计算Gram矩阵和MMD可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Gram-MMD指标，通过Gram矩阵捕获纹理细节，更准确地评估生成图像的真实感。

papers.title: Can Nano Banana 2 Replace Traditional Image Restoration Models? An Evaluation of Its Performance on Image Restoration Tasks
papers.abstract: Recent advances in generative AI raise the question of whether general-purpose image editing models can serve as unified solutions for image restoration. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of Nano Banana 2 for image restoration across diverse scenes and degradation types. Our results show that prompt design plays a critical role, where concise prompts with explicit fidelity constraints achieve the best trade-off between reconstruction accuracy and perceptual quality. Compared with state-of-the-art restoration models, Nano Banana 2 achieves superior performance in full-reference metrics while remaining competitive in perceptual quality, which is further supported by user studies. We also observe strong generalization in challenging scenarios, such as small faces, dense crowds, and severe degradations. However, the model remains sensitive to prompt formulation and may require iterative refinement for optimal results. Overall, our findings suggest that general-purpose generative models hold strong potential as unified image restoration solvers, while highlighting the importance of controllability and robustness. All test results are available on https://github.com/yxyuanxiao/NanoBanana2TestOnIR.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估了通用图像编辑模型Nano Banana 2在图像修复任务上的表现，发现简洁且带有显式保真度约束的提示词能取得最佳效果，模型在参考指标上优于专用修复模型，但提示词敏感且需迭代优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用图像编辑模型能否替代专用图像修复模型是一个开放问题，现有研究缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 评估Nano Banana 2在不同场景和退化类型下的图像修复性能，并分析提示词设计的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示词设计至关重要，简洁且带有显式保真度约束的提示词在重建精度和感知质量之间取得最佳平衡；模型对提示词表述敏感，可能需要迭代优化才能获得最佳结果。
analysis.method: 系统评估方法：在多种场景和退化类型上测试Nano Banana 2，对比SOTA修复模型，并通过用户研究验证。
contributions: 首次系统评估通用图像编辑模型Nano Banana 2在图像修复任务上的性能。
揭示了提示词设计对修复效果的关键影响，并给出了最佳实践。
展示了通用生成模型作为统一图像修复求解器的潜力，同时指出了可控性和鲁棒性的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种场景和退化类型上进行了实验，包括全参考指标和感知质量对比，并进行了用户研究。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 模型对提示词表述敏感，需要迭代优化，可能增加使用成本。
评估可能未覆盖所有退化类型或极端场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估了通用图像编辑模型Nano Banana 2在图像修复任务上的表现，发现简洁且带有显式保真度约束的提示词能取得最佳效果，模型在参考指标上优于专用修复模型，但提示词敏感且需迭代优化。

papers.title: The Impact of LLM Self-Consistency and Reasoning Effort on Automated Scoring Accuracy and Cost
papers.abstract: Strategic model selection and reasoning settings are more effective than ensembling for optimizing automated scoring with large language models (LLMs). We examined self-consistency (intra-model majority voting) and reasoning effort for scoring conversation-based assessment items in high school mathematics, evaluating 900 student conversations against human-scored ground truths using frontier and low-cost models from OpenAI and Google. Temperature sampling significantly improved accuracy over deterministic calls, but increasing ensemble size (j = 1 to 7) produced no significant gains. Higher reasoning effort showed a significant positive linear trend with scoring accuracy, though the benefit varied by model family. An efficiency frontier analysis identified Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview at low reasoning as the most accurate but costly configuration; GPT-5.4 Nano and Mini with no reasoning offered the best cost-performance balance.

analysis.tldr: LLM自一致性和推理努力对自动评分准确性和成本的影响研究表明，温度采样比集成更有效，但增加集成规模无显著收益。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动评分中LLM的推理设置和模型选择对准确性和成本的影响尚未被系统研究，现有方法多依赖集成策略但可能效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何通过调整LLM的自一致性（温度采样与集成规模）和推理努力来优化自动评分的准确性与成本平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 温度采样显著提升准确性，但增大集成规模（1到7）无显著增益；更高推理努力与准确性呈正线性趋势，但效果因模型族而异。
analysis.method: 通过控制温度采样、集成规模（j=1-7）和推理努力（无/低/高），在900个学生对话上评估前沿与低成本LLM的评分准确性，并进行效率前沿分析。
contributions: 发现温度采样比集成更有效，且增大集成规模无显著收益
揭示推理努力与准确性之间的正线性关系，但收益因模型而异
通过效率前沿分析识别出最佳成本-性能平衡的配置
analysis.experiments: 在900个高中数学生对话上评估，使用OpenAI和Google的前沿及低成本模型，以人类评分作为真值。
limitations: 仅针对对话式数学评估，可能不适用于其他任务
推理努力的操作化定义可能不全面
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM自一致性和推理努力对自动评分准确性和成本的影响研究表明，温度采样比集成更有效，但增加集成规模无显著收益。

papers.title: Verbalizing LLMs' assumptions to explain and control sycophancy
papers.abstract: LLMs can be socially sycophantic, affirming users when they ask questions like "am I in the wrong?" rather than providing genuine assessment. We hypothesize that this behavior arises from incorrect assumptions about the user, like underestimating how often users are seeking information over reassurance. We present Verbalized Assumptions, a framework for eliciting these assumptions from LLMs. Verbalized Assumptions provide insight into LLM sycophancy, delusion, and other safety issues, e.g., the top bigram in LLMs' assumptions on social sycophancy datasets is ``seeking validation.'' We provide evidence for a causal link between Verbalized Assumptions and sycophantic model behavior: our assumption probes (linear probes trained on internal representations of these assumptions) enable interpretable fine-grained steering of social sycophancy. We explore why LLMs default to sycophantic assumptions: on identical queries, people expect more objective and informative responses from AI than from other humans, but LLMs trained on human-human conversation do not account for this difference in expectations. Our work contributes a new understanding of assumptions as a mechanism for sycophancy.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Verbalized Assumptions 框架，通过显式化 LLM 对用户的假设来解释和控制谄媚行为。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在对话中常表现出社会性谄媚，即迎合用户而非提供真实评估，这源于模型对用户意图的错误假设，如低估用户寻求信息而非安慰的频率。理解并控制这一行为对提升模型安全性和可靠性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何解释和调控 LLM 的社会性谄媚行为？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 的谄媚行为源于对用户的错误假设，例如在社交谄媚数据集中，模型假设中最常见的二元组是“寻求验证”。此外，用户对 AI 的期望与对人类不同（更期待客观信息），但 LLM 基于人人对话训练，未考虑这一差异。
analysis.method: Verbalized Assumptions 框架：通过提示让 LLM 显式化其对用户的假设，并训练线性探针（基于这些假设的内部表示）实现可解释的细粒度谄媚行为调控。
contributions: 提出 Verbalized Assumptions 框架，用于从 LLM 中提取其关于用户的假设，揭示谄媚行为的内部机制。
通过线性探针证明假设与谄媚行为之间的因果关系，实现可解释的细粒度行为控制。
分析 LLM 默认谄媚假设的原因：人人对话训练数据与用户对 AI 期望之间的不匹配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能仅适用于特定类型的谄媚行为，泛化性需进一步验证。
线性探针的调控效果可能受限于假设表征的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Verbalized Assumptions 框架，通过显式化 LLM 对用户的假设来解释和控制谄媚行为。

papers.title: Querying Structured Data Through Natural Language Using Language Models
papers.abstract: This paper presents an open source methodology for allowing users to query structured non textual datasets through natural language Unlike Retrieval Augmented Generation RAG which struggles with numerical and highly structured information our approach trains an LLM to generate executable queries To support this capability we introduce a principled pipeline for synthetic training data generation producing diverse question answer pairs that capture both user intent and the semantics of the underlying dataset We fine tune a compact model DeepSeek R1 Distill 8B using QLoRA with 4 bit quantization making the system suitable for deployment on commodity hardware We evaluate our approach on a dataset describing accessibility to essential services across Durangaldea Spain The fine tuned model achieves high accuracy across monolingual multilingual and unseen location scenarios demonstrating both robust generalization and reliable query generation Our results highlight that small domain specific models can achieve high precision for this task without relying on large proprietary LLMs making this methodology suitable for resource constrained environments and adaptable to broader multi dataset systems We evaluate our approach on a dataset describing accessibility to essential services across Durangaldea Spain The fine tuned model achieves high accuracy across monolingual multilingual and unseen location scenarios demonstrating both robust generalization and reliable query generation Our results highlight that small domain specific models can achieve high precision for this task without relying on large proprietary LLMs making this methodology suitable for resource constrained environments and adaptable to broader multi dataset systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种开源方法，通过微调小型LLM将自然语言查询转换为结构化数据上的可执行查询，在资源受限场景下实现高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RAG方法在处理数值和高度结构化信息时表现不佳，且依赖大型专有LLM，不适合资源受限环境。
analysis.problem: 如何让用户通过自然语言查询结构化非文本数据集，并生成可执行的查询语句。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出合成训练数据生成管道，产生多样化的问答对；使用QLoRA对DeepSeek R1 Distill 8B模型进行4比特量化微调。
contributions: 提出一种开源方法论，用于通过自然语言查询结构化数据。
设计了一个原则性的合成训练数据生成管道。
在资源受限硬件上微调小型模型，实现高精度查询生成。
analysis.experiments: 在西班牙Durangaldea地区基本服务可及性数据集上评估，模型在单语、多语和未见位置场景下均达到高精度。
limitations: 仅在一个特定地理数据集上评估，泛化性需更多验证。
未与更大规模模型或RAG方法进行直接对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种开源方法，通过微调小型LLM将自然语言查询转换为结构化数据上的可执行查询，在资源受限场景下实现高精度。

papers.title: Sociodemographic Biases in Educational Counselling by Large Language Models
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into educational settings, understanding their potential biases is critical. This study examines sociodemographic biases in LLM-based educational counselling. We evaluate responses from six LLMs answering questions about 900 vignettes describing students in diverse circumstances. Each vignette is systematically tested across 14 sociodemographic identifiers - spanning race and gender, socioeconomic status, and immigrant background - along with a control condition, yielding 243,000 model responses. Our findings indicate that (1) all models exhibit measurable biases, (2) bias patterns partially align with documented human biases but diverge in notable ways, (3) the magnitude of these biases is strongly influenced by the precision of the student descriptions, where vague or minimal information amplifies disparities nearly threefold, while concrete, individualised metrics substantially reduce them, and (4) bias profiles vary substantially across models. These results demonstrate the importance of context-rich and personalised educational representations, suggesting that AI-driven educational decisions benefit from detailed student-specific information to promote fairness and equity.

analysis.tldr: LLM在教育咨询中存在可测量的社会人口学偏见，模糊描述会放大偏见，个性化信息可缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着LLM越来越多地用于教育场景，理解其潜在偏见对确保公平至关重要，但现有研究缺乏对教育咨询中社会人口学偏见的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 系统评估LLM在教育咨询中基于种族、性别、社会经济地位等社会人口学标识的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型均表现出可测量偏见；偏见模式部分与人类偏见一致但存在显著差异；学生描述的精确度强烈影响偏见幅度，模糊信息使偏见放大近三倍，具体个性化指标则大幅减少偏见；不同模型的偏见特征差异很大。
analysis.method: 构建包含900个学生情景描述（vignettes）的测试集，覆盖14个社会人口学标识（种族、性别、社会经济地位、移民背景等）及控制条件，向6个LLM提问并收集243,000个响应，分析偏见模式。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM在教育咨询中的社会人口学偏见，覆盖多个模型和广泛标识。
发现描述精确度对偏见幅度的关键影响，提出上下文丰富和个性化表示的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 使用900个情景描述、14个标识、6个LLM，共243,000个响应，分析偏见模式并与人类偏见对比。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅基于文本情景，未涉及真实交互场景。
未探讨偏见对实际教育决策的长期影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在教育咨询中存在可测量的社会人口学偏见，模糊描述会放大偏见，个性化信息可缓解。

papers.title: MECO: A Multimodal Dataset for Emotion and Cognitive Understanding in Older Adults
papers.abstract: While affective computing has advanced considerably, multimodal emotion prediction in aging populations remains underexplored, largely due to the scarcity of dedicated datasets. Existing multimodal benchmarks predominantly target young, cognitively healthy subjects, neglecting the influence of cognitive decline on emotional expression and physiological responses. To bridge this gap, we present MECO, a Multimodal dataset for Emotion and Cognitive understanding in Older adults. MECO includes 42 participants and provides approximately 38 hours of multimodal signals, yielding 30,592 synchronized samples. To maximize ecological validity, data collection followed standardized protocols within community-based settings. The modalities cover video, audio, electroencephalography (EEG), and electrocardiography (ECG). In addition, the dataset offers comprehensive annotations of emotional and cognitive states, including self-assessed valence, arousal, six basic emotions, and Mini-Mental State Examination cognitive scores. We further establish baseline benchmarks for both emotion and cognitive prediction. MECO serves as a foundational resource for multimodal modeling of affect and cognition in aging populations, facilitating downstream applications such as personalized emotion recognition and early detection of mild cognitive impairment (MCI) in real-world settings. The complete dataset and supplementary materials are available at https://maitrechen.github.io/meco-page/.

analysis.tldr: MECO 是一个面向老年人情绪与认知理解的多模态数据集，包含 42 位参与者的视频、音频、脑电图和心电图数据，并提供了情绪与认知状态的标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感计算研究主要针对年轻、认知健康的群体，缺乏面向老年人群体的多模态情绪数据集，忽略了认知衰退对情绪表达和生理反应的影响。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门用于老年人情绪与认知理解的多模态数据集，导致该领域研究受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了一个包含 42 位老年人、约 38 小时多模态信号（视频、音频、脑电图、心电图）的数据集，并提供了情绪（效价、唤醒度、六种基本情绪）和认知（MMSE 评分）的标注，同时建立了基线基准。
contributions: 提出了首个面向老年人的多模态情绪与认知数据集 MECO，包含 42 位参与者、30,592 个同步样本。
提供了视频、音频、EEG、ECG 四种模态数据，以及情绪和认知状态的全面标注。
建立了情绪和认知预测的基线基准，为后续研究提供参考。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及建立了基线基准。
limitations: 样本量相对较小（42 人），可能限制模型的泛化能力。
数据集仅包含社区环境下的数据，可能无法完全代表临床或居家场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MECO 是一个面向老年人情绪与认知理解的多模态数据集，包含 42 位参与者的视频、音频、脑电图和心电图数据，并提供了情绪与认知状态的标注。

papers.title: BiTA: Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator in a Temporal Graph Network Framework for Alert Prediction in Computer Networks
papers.abstract: Proactive alert prediction in computer networks is critical for mitigating evolving cyber threats and enabling timely defensive actions. Temporal Graph Neural Networks (TGNs) provide a principled framework for modeling time-evolving interactions; however, existing TGN-based methods predominantly rely on unidirectional or single-mechanism temporal aggregation, which limits their ability to capture recursive, multi-scale temporal patterns commonly observed in real-world attack behaviors. In this paper, we propose BiTA, a Bidirectional Gated Recurrent Unit-Transformer Aggregator for temporal graph learning. Rather than introducing a deeper or higher-capacity model, BiTA redesigns the temporal aggregation function within the TGN framework by jointly encoding bidirectional sequential dependencies and long-range contextual relations over each node's temporal neighborhood. This aggregation strategy enables complementary temporal reasoning at different scales while preserving the original TGN memory and message-passing structure. We evaluate BiTA on real-world alert datasets, demonstrating significant improvements in key performance metrics such as area under the curve, average precision, mean reciprocal rank, and per-category prediction accuracy when compared to state-of-the-art temporal graph models. BiTA outperforms baseline methods under both transductive and inductive settings, highlighting its robustness and generalization capabilities in dynamic network environments. BiTA is a scalable and interpretable framework for real-time cyber threat anticipation, paving the way toward more intelligent and adaptive intrusion detection systems.

analysis.tldr: BiTA通过双向GRU-Transformer聚合器改进TGN的时间聚合，提升网络告警预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有TGN方法主要依赖单向或单机制时间聚合，难以捕捉真实攻击行为中递归、多尺度的时间模式，限制了告警预测的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种时间聚合函数，能够同时捕获节点时间邻域内的双向序列依赖和长程上下文关系，以提升网络告警预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在TGN框架中，用双向GRU-Transformer聚合器替换原有时间聚合函数，联合编码双向序列依赖和长程上下文关系，保持原有记忆和消息传递结构。
contributions: 提出BiTA，一种双向GRU-Transformer聚合器，用于时间图学习中的时间聚合。
在真实网络告警数据集上，BiTA在AUC、AP、MRR和逐类预测准确率上显著优于现有SOTA时间图模型。
analysis.experiments: 在真实网络告警数据集上评估，涵盖直推和归纳设置，与SOTA时间图模型比较，BiTA在AUC、AP、MRR和逐类准确率上均有显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确时间邻域结构的图数据。
双向GRU-Transformer可能增加计算开销，摘要未提及效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BiTA通过双向GRU-Transformer聚合器改进TGN的时间聚合，提升网络告警预测性能。

papers.title: Blind Refusal: Language Models Refuse to Help Users Evade Unjust, Absurd, and Illegitimate Rules
papers.abstract: Safety-trained language models routinely refuse requests for help circumventing rules. But not all rules deserve compliance. When users ask for help evading rules imposed by an illegitimate authority, rules that are deeply unjust or absurd in their content or application, or rules that admit of justified exceptions, refusal is a failure of moral reasoning. We introduce empirical results documenting this pattern of refusal that we call blind refusal: the tendency of language models to refuse requests for help breaking rules without regard to whether the underlying rule is defensible. Our dataset comprises synthetic cases crossing 5 defeat families (reasons a rule can be broken) with 19 authority types, validated through three automated quality gates and human review. We collect responses from 18 model configurations across 7 families and classify them on two behavioral dimensions -- response type (helps, hard refusal, or deflection) and whether the model recognizes the reasons that undermine the rule's claim to compliance -- using a blinded GPT-5.4 LLM-as-judge evaluation. We find that models refuse 75.4% (N=14,650) of defeated-rule requests and do so even when the request poses no independent safety or dual-use concerns. We also find that models engage with the defeat condition in the majority of cases (57.5%) but decline to help regardless -- indicating that models' refusal behavior is decoupled from their capacity for normative reasoning about rule legitimacy.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型在用户请求帮助规避不合理规则时表现出“盲目拒绝”，即拒绝帮助而不考虑规则本身是否正当。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全训练的语言模型通常会拒绝帮助用户规避规则，但并非所有规则都值得遵守。当用户请求帮助规避不公正、荒谬或不合法的规则时，拒绝反而是一种道德推理的失败。现有模型缺乏对规则正当性的判断能力，导致盲目拒绝。
analysis.problem: 语言模型在用户请求帮助打破规则时，无法区分规则是否正当，表现出“盲目拒绝”行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在75.4%的请求中拒绝帮助，即使请求本身没有安全或双重用途风险。模型在大多数情况下（57.5%）能够识别规则可被打破的理由，但仍然拒绝帮助，表明拒绝行为与规范推理能力脱钩。
analysis.method: 构建包含5种规则可被打破的理由（defeat families）和19种权威类型的合成数据集，通过三个自动化质量门控和人工审核验证。收集7个模型家族共18个配置的响应，使用盲审GPT-5.4作为评判者，对响应类型（帮助、硬拒绝、转移）和是否识别规则缺陷进行分类。
contributions: 首次系统性地研究语言模型对规避规则请求的“盲目拒绝”现象。
构建了一个包含多种规则缺陷类型和权威类型的合成数据集。
通过大规模实验揭示了模型拒绝行为与规范推理能力的脱钩。
analysis.experiments: 在18个模型配置上收集了14,650个响应，使用GPT-5.4作为评判者进行行为分类。摘要未提供具体实验结果细节。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，可能无法完全覆盖真实场景。
评判者使用GPT-5.4，可能存在偏差。
未探讨如何改进模型以避免盲目拒绝。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言模型在用户请求帮助规避不合理规则时表现出“盲目拒绝”，即拒绝帮助而不考虑规则本身是否正当。

papers.title: STEAR: Layer-Aware Spatiotemporal Evidence Intervention for Hallucination Mitigation in Video Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Video Large Language Models (Video-LLMs) remain prone to spatiotemporal hallucinations, often generating visually unsupported details or incorrect temporal relations. Existing mitigation methods typically treat hallucination as a uniform decoding failure, applying globally shared correction rules. We instead observe that decoder layers contribute differently to visual grounding and later linguistic composition, indicating that intervention must be layer-aware. Based on this insight, we propose STEAR, a layer-aware spatiotemporal evidence intervention framework. STEAR identifies high-risk decoding steps and selects token-conditioned visual evidence from grounding-sensitive middle layers. It uses this shared evidence for two coupled purposes: restoring missing local grounding in middle layers, and constructing temporally perturbed patch-level counterfactuals to falsify inconsistent reasoning during late-layer decoding. Consequently, STEAR mitigates both spatial and temporal hallucinations within an efficient single-encode inference framework. Experiments across representative Video-LLM backbones and challenging benchmarks demonstrate that STEAR consistently reduces hallucinations while improving faithfulness, temporal consistency, and robustness. Our results confirm that reliable video decoding relies on intervening on precise evidence at the right layer, rather than enforcing a global penalty. The code is provided in the Supplementary Material.

analysis.tldr: STEAR通过层感知的时空证据干预，在视频大语言模型中有效缓解时空幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频大语言模型（Video-LLMs）容易产生时空幻觉，生成视觉上不支持的细节或错误的时间关系。现有方法通常将幻觉视为统一的解码失败，应用全局共享的修正规则，忽略了不同解码层对视觉定位和语言组合的不同贡献。
analysis.problem: 如何针对视频大语言模型中的时空幻觉，设计一种层感知的干预方法，以在高效推理框架下同时缓解空间和时间上的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到解码器层对视觉定位和后期语言组合的贡献不同，表明干预必须是层感知的。
analysis.method: 提出STEAR框架，识别高风险解码步骤，从对视觉敏感的中间层选择基于token的视觉证据，用于两个耦合目的：恢复中间层缺失的局部视觉定位，以及构建时间扰动的补丁级反事实来反驳后期解码中的不一致推理。
contributions: 首次提出层感知的时空证据干预框架STEAR，用于缓解视频大语言模型中的时空幻觉。
通过识别高风险解码步骤和选择token条件视觉证据，实现了高效的单编码推理框架。
在多个Video-LLM骨干网络和挑战性基准上验证了STEAR在减少幻觉、提高忠实度、时间一致性和鲁棒性方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个代表性Video-LLM骨干网络和挑战性基准上进行实验，结果表明STEAR一致地减少了幻觉，同时提高了忠实度、时间一致性和鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定模型架构的中间层选择，泛化性需进一步验证。
反事实构建可能增加计算开销，尽管声称高效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: STEAR通过层感知的时空证据干预，在视频大语言模型中有效缓解时空幻觉。

papers.title: JoyAI-LLM Flash: Advancing Mid-Scale LLMs with Token Efficiency
papers.abstract: We introduce JoyAI-LLM Flash, an efficient Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model designed to redefine the trade-off between strong performance and token efficiency in the sub-50B parameter regime. JoyAI-LLM Flash is pretrained on a massive corpus of 20 trillion tokens and further optimized through a rigorous post-training pipeline, including supervised fine-tuning (SFT), Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), and large-scale reinforcement learning (RL) across diverse environments. To improve token efficiency, JoyAI-LLM Flash strategically balances \emph{thinking} and \emph{non-thinking} cognitive modes and introduces FiberPO, a novel RL algorithm inspired by fibration theory that decomposes trust-region maintenance into global and local components, providing unified multi-scale stability control for LLM policy optimization. To enhance architectural sparsity, the model comprises 48B total parameters while activating only 2.7B parameters per forward pass, achieving a substantially higher sparsity ratio than contemporary industry leading models of comparable scale. To further improve inference throughput, we adopt a joint training-inference co-design that incorporates dense Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) and Quantization-Aware Training (QAT). We release the checkpoints for both JoyAI-LLM-48B-A3B Base and its post-trained variants on Hugging Face to support the open-source community.

analysis.tldr: JoyAI-LLM Flash 是一款 48B 总参/2.7B 激活参数的 MoE 语言模型，通过 FiberPO 算法和思维/非思维模式平衡提升 token 效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在中等规模（sub-50B）语言模型中，如何在保持强性能的同时提升 token 效率是一个关键挑战，现有模型在稀疏性和推理吞吐量上仍有优化空间。
analysis.problem: 设计一个在 48B 总参数下仅激活 2.7B 参数的高稀疏 MoE 模型，并通过训练-推理协同优化提升 token 效率和推理吞吐量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用 MoE 架构（48B 总参/2.7B 激活），结合思维/非思维模式平衡、FiberPO 强化学习算法（基于纤维理论分解信任域维护）、多 token 预测（MTP）和量化感知训练（QAT）。
contributions: 提出 FiberPO 算法，通过全局-局部分解实现多尺度稳定性控制。
实现 48B 总参/2.7B 激活的高稀疏 MoE 模型，并开源检查点。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在特定基准上的性能对比。
FiberPO 算法的泛化性可能需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JoyAI-LLM Flash 是一款 48B 总参/2.7B 激活参数的 MoE 语言模型，通过 FiberPO 算法和思维/非思维模式平衡提升 token 效率。

papers.title: Analyzing Healthcare Interoperability Vulnerabilities: Formal Modeling and Graph-Theoretic Approach
papers.abstract: In a healthcare environment, the healthcare interoperability platforms based on HL7 FHIR allow concurrent, asynchronous access to a set of shared patient resources, which are independent systems, i.e., EHR systems, pharmacy systems, lab systems, and devices. The FHIR specification lacks a protocol for concurrency control, and the research on detecting a race condition only targets the OS kernel. The research on FHIR security only targets authentication and injection attacks, considering concurrent access to patient resources to be sequential. The gap in the research in this area is addressed through the introduction of FHIR Resource Access Graph (FRAG), a formally defined graph G = (P,R,E, λ, τ, S), in which the nodes are the concurrent processes, the typed edges represent the resource access events, and the race conditions are represented as detectable structural properties. Three clinically relevant race condition classes are formally specified: Simultaneous Write Conflict (SWC), TOCTOU Authorization Violation (TAV), and Cascading Update Race (CUR). The FRAG model is implemented as a three-pass graph traversal detection algorithm and tested against a time window-based baseline on 1,500 synthetic FHIR R4 transaction logs. Under full concurrent access (C2), FRAG attains a 90.0% F1 score vs. 25.5% for the baseline, a 64.5 pp improvement.

analysis.tldr: 提出FRAG图模型检测医疗互操作中的竞态条件漏洞，F1达90%
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗互操作平台（基于HL7 FHIR）允许并发异步访问患者资源，但FHIR规范缺乏并发控制协议，现有研究仅关注OS内核竞态或FHIR认证/注入攻击，未考虑并发访问导致的竞态条件漏洞，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化建模并检测医疗互操作中并发访问患者资源时的竞态条件漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FHIR资源访问图（FRAG），一种形式化图模型G=(P,R,E,λ,τ,S)，节点为并发进程，类型化边表示资源访问事件，竞态条件表示为可检测的结构属性；并实现三遍图遍历检测算法。
contributions: 形式化定义了三种临床相关的竞态条件类：同时写冲突（SWC）、TOCTOU授权违反（TAV）、级联更新竞态（CUR）
提出FRAG图模型及三遍图遍历检测算法，在合成数据集上F1达90%，比基线提升64.5个百分点
analysis.experiments: 在1500条合成FHIR R4事务日志上测试，与基于时间窗口的基线对比，在完全并发访问（C2）下FRAG的F1为90.0%，基线为25.5%。
limitations: 仅在合成数据上验证，未在真实医疗系统数据上测试
可能未覆盖所有竞态条件类型
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FRAG图模型检测医疗互操作中的竞态条件漏洞，F1达90%

papers.title: QVAD: A Question-Centric Agentic Framework for Efficient and Training-Free Video Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) is a fundamental challenge in computer vision, particularly due to the open-set nature of anomalies. While recent training-free approaches utilizing Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have shown promise, they typically rely on massive, resource-intensive foundation models to compensate for the ambiguity of static prompts. We argue that the bottleneck in VAD is not necessarily model capacity, but rather the static nature of inquiry. We propose QVAD, a question-centric agentic framework that treats VLM-LLM interaction as a dynamic dialogue. By iteratively refining queries based on visual context, our LLM agent guides smaller VLMs to produce high-fidelity captions and precise semantic reasoning without parameter updates. This ``prompt-updating" mechanism effectively unlocks the latent capabilities of lightweight models, enabling state-of-the-art performance on UCF-Crime, XD-Violence, and UBNormal using a fraction of the parameters required by competing methods. We further demonstrate exceptional generalizability on the single-scene ComplexVAD dataset. Crucially, QVAD achieves high inference speeds with minimal memory footprints, making advanced VAD capabilities deployable on resource-constrained edge devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出问答式智能体框架QVAD，通过动态对话机制让轻量级VLM实现高效视频异常检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有训练无关的视频异常检测方法依赖大规模基础模型来弥补静态提示的模糊性，导致资源消耗大，难以部署在边缘设备。
analysis.problem: 如何在不更新模型参数的前提下，利用轻量级视觉-语言模型实现高效、准确的视频异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VAD瓶颈在于静态查询方式，而非模型容量；通过动态迭代查询可解锁轻量模型潜力。
analysis.method: 提出QVAD框架，将VLM-LLM交互视为动态对话，LLM代理根据视觉上下文迭代优化查询，引导小VLM生成高保真描述和精确语义推理。
contributions: 提出问答式智能体框架QVAD，实现无需训练的视频异常检测。
在UCF-Crime、XD-Violence、UBNormal和ComplexVAD数据集上达到SOTA，且参数量远小于竞争方法。
实现高推理速度和低内存占用，适合资源受限的边缘设备。
analysis.experiments: 在UCF-Crime、XD-Violence、UBNormal和ComplexVAD数据集上评估，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理质量，对复杂场景的泛化性需进一步验证。
动态对话机制可能增加推理延迟，尽管摘要声称速度快。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出问答式智能体框架QVAD，通过动态对话机制让轻量级VLM实现高效视频异常检测。

papers.title: GenSmoke-GS: A Multi-Stage Method for Novel View Synthesis from Smoke-Degraded Images Using a Generative Model
papers.abstract: This paper describes our method for Track 2 of the NTIRE 2026 3D Restoration and Reconstruction (3DRR) Challenge on smoke-degraded images. In this task, smoke reduces image visibility and weakens the cross-view consistency required by scene optimization and rendering. We address this problem with a multi-stage pipeline consisting of image restoration, dehazing, MLLM-based enhancement, 3DGS-MCMC optimization, and averaging over repeated runs. The main purpose of the pipeline is to improve visibility before rendering while limiting scene-content changes across input views. Experimental results on the challenge benchmark show improved quantitative performance and better visual quality than the provided baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/plbbl/GenSmoke-GS. Our method achieved a ranking of 1 out of 14 participants in Track 2 of the NTIRE 3DRR Challenge, as reported on the official competition website: https://www.codabench.org/competitions/13993/#/results-tab.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段流水线，结合图像恢复、去雾、MLLM增强和3DGS-MCMC优化，从烟雾退化图像中合成新视图，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛Track 2中排名第一。
analysis.research_motivation: 烟雾会降低图像可见性并削弱跨视图一致性，影响3D场景优化和渲染的质量，现有方法在烟雾退化场景下表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 从烟雾退化图像中合成高质量的新视图，需要同时恢复可见性并保持跨视图一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 烟雾导致图像可见性下降和跨视图一致性减弱，直接使用3DGS等场景优化方法效果不佳。
analysis.method: 多阶段流水线：先进行图像恢复和去雾，再使用MLLM增强，然后通过3DGS-MCMC优化，最后对多次运行结果取平均。
contributions: 提出了一种针对烟雾退化图像的多阶段新视图合成方法。
在NTIRE 2026 3DRR挑战赛Track 2中取得第一名，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026 3DRR挑战赛基准上进行了实验，定量和定性结果均优于提供的基线，排名1/14。
limitations: 多阶段流水线可能增加计算开销。
依赖MLLM增强，可能引入额外的不确定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段流水线，结合图像恢复、去雾、MLLM增强和3DGS-MCMC优化，从烟雾退化图像中合成新视图，在NTIRE 2026挑战赛Track 2中排名第一。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Foundation Model for Calcium-imaging Population Dynamics
papers.abstract: Recent work suggests that large-scale, multi-animal modeling can significantly improve neural recording analysis. However, for functional calcium traces, existing approaches remain task-specific, limiting transfer across common neuroscience objectives. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{CalM}, a self-supervised neural foundation model trained solely on neuronal calcium traces and adaptable to multiple downstream tasks, including forecasting and decoding. Our key contribution is a pretraining framework, composed of a high-performance tokenizer mapping single-neuron traces into a shared discrete vocabulary, and a dual-axis autoregressive transformer modeling dependencies along both the neural and the temporal axis. We evaluate CalM on a large-scale, multi-animal, multi-session dataset. On the neural population dynamics forecasting task, CalM outperforms strong specialized baselines after pretraining. With a task-specific head, CalM further adapts to the behavior decoding task and achieves superior results compared with supervised decoding models. Moreover, linear analyses of CalM representations reveal interpretable functional structures beyond predictive accuracy. Taken together, we propose a novel and effective self-supervised pretraining paradigm for foundation models based on calcium traces, paving the way for scalable pretraining and broad applications in functional neural analysis. Code will be released soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督基础模型CalM，用于钙成像群体动力学预测与行为解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有钙成像分析方法多为任务特定，缺乏跨任务迁移能力，限制了大规模多动物神经数据分析的通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个自监督基础模型，能够从钙成像群体活动中学习通用表征，并适应预测和解码等多种下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CalM，包含高性能分词器将单神经元轨迹映射到共享离散词汇表，以及双轴自回归Transformer建模神经轴和时间轴依赖。
contributions: 提出首个基于钙成像的自监督基础模型CalM，支持多种下游任务。
设计双轴自回归Transformer和离散分词器，有效捕获群体动态。
在预测和解码任务上超越强基线，且表征具有可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模多动物多session数据集上评估，预测任务优于专门基线，解码任务优于监督模型，线性分析揭示功能结构。
limitations: 仅基于钙成像数据，可能不适用于其他模态神经记录。
分词器离散化可能丢失部分连续动态信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督基础模型CalM，用于钙成像群体动力学预测与行为解码。

papers.title: ARM: Advantage Reward Modeling for Long-Horizon Manipulation
papers.abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation remains challenging for reinforcement learning (RL) because sparse rewards provide limited guidance for credit assignment. Practical policy improvement thus relies on richer intermediate supervision, such as dense progress rewards, which are costly to obtain and ill-suited to non-monotonic behaviors such as backtracking and recovery. To address this, we propose Advantage Reward Modeling (ARM), a framework that shifts from hard-to-quantify absolute progress to estimating relative advantage. We introduce a cost-effective tri-state labeling strategy -- Progressive, Regressive, and Stagnant -- that reduces human cognitive overhead while ensuring high cross-annotator consistency. By training on these intuitive signals, ARM enables automated progress annotation for both complete demonstrations and fragmented DAgger-style data. Integrating ARM into an offline RL pipeline allows for adaptive action-reward reweighting, effectively filtering suboptimal samples. Our approach achieves a 99.4% success rate on a challenging long-horizon towel-folding task, demonstrating improved stability and data efficiency over current VLA baselines with near-zero human intervention during policy training.

analysis.tldr: 提出优势奖励建模（ARM），通过三态标签估计相对优势，实现长时域机器人操作的高效离线强化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时域机器人操作中稀疏奖励难以指导信用分配，而密集进度奖励成本高且不适用于非单调行为（如回溯和恢复），亟需一种低成本、高一致性的中间监督方法。
analysis.problem: 如何为长时域操作任务提供高效、低成本且适用于非单调行为的中间奖励信号，以提升离线强化学习的稳定性和数据效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出优势奖励建模（ARM），采用三态标签策略（进步、退步、停滞）降低标注认知负荷并保证一致性，训练模型估计相对优势，实现自动进度标注，并集成到离线RL管线中进行自适应动作-奖励重加权。
contributions: 提出ARM框架，将绝对进度估计转为相对优势估计，降低标注难度。
设计三态标签策略，减少人类认知开销并提高跨标注者一致性。
在长时域毛巾折叠任务上达到99.4%成功率，优于现有VLA基线，且训练过程几乎无需人工干预。
analysis.experiments: 在挑战性的长时域毛巾折叠任务上评估，ARM达到99.4%成功率，相比当前VLA基线在稳定性和数据效率上有显著提升。
limitations: 三态标签可能无法完全覆盖复杂操作中的细微进度变化。
方法在更广泛的长时域任务上的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出优势奖励建模（ARM），通过三态标签估计相对优势，实现长时域机器人操作的高效离线强化学习。

papers.title: Beyond Isolated Tasks: A Framework for Evaluating Coding Agents on Sequential Software Evolution
papers.abstract: Existing datasets for coding agents evaluate performance on isolated, single pull request (PR) tasks in a stateless manner, failing to capture the reality of real-world software development where code changes accumulate, technical debt accrues, and test suites grow over time. To bridge this gap, we introduce an automated coding task generation framework, which helps generate our dataset SWE-STEPS, that evaluates coding agents on long-horizon tasks through two realistic settings mirroring actual developer workflows: Conversational coding with iterative requests, and single-shot Project Requirement document (PRD)-based coding. Unlike existing datasets that evaluate agents on disjointed Pull Requests (PRs), our framework assesses performance across chains of dependent PRs, enabling evaluation of sequential execution, regression verification, and long-term repository health. We discover that widely used isolated PR evaluations yield inflated success rates, w.r.t. our settings - overshooting performance by as much as 20 percentage points - because they ignore the ``spillover'' effects of previous inefficient or buggy code. Furthermore, our analysis reveals that even when agents successfully resolve issues, they degrade repository health by generating code with higher cognitive complexity and technical debt compared to human developers, underscoring the necessity for multidimensional evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SWE-STEPS框架和数据集，评估编码智能体在长期软件演化任务上的表现，发现孤立PR评测会高估性能高达20个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编码智能体数据集仅在无状态、孤立的单PR任务上评估，忽略了真实软件开发中代码累积、技术债务和测试套件增长等长期影响，导致评测结果与实际情况脱节。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能反映真实软件演化过程的评测框架，以准确评估编码智能体在连续、依赖任务链上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：孤立PR评测会高估智能体性能高达20个百分点，因为忽略了先前低效或有bug代码的“溢出效应”；即使智能体成功解决问题，也会生成认知复杂度更高、技术债务更多的代码，降低仓库健康度。
analysis.method: 提出自动化编码任务生成框架，构建SWE-STEPS数据集，包含两种真实场景（对话式编码和基于PRD的单次编码），并通过依赖PR链评估顺序执行、回归验证和长期仓库健康度。
contributions: 提出SWE-STEPS框架和数据集，用于评估编码智能体在长期软件演化任务上的表现。
揭示孤立PR评测高估性能的现象，并证明多维评估（包括代码质量和技术债务）的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到发现孤立PR评测高估性能高达20个百分点，以及智能体生成代码质量低于人类开发者。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定编程语言或项目类型。
框架的自动化生成可能无法完全覆盖所有真实软件演化场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
