analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SWE-STEPS框架和数据集，评估编码智能体在长期软件演化任务上的表现，发现孤立PR评测会高估性能高达20个百分点。

papers.title: Comparing the Impact of Pedagogy-Informed Custom and General-Purpose GAI Chatbots on Students' Science Problem-Solving Processes and Performance Using Heterogeneous Interaction Network Analysis
papers.abstract: Problem solving plays an essential role in science education, and generative AI (GAI) chatbots have emerged as a promising tool for supporting students' science problem solving. However, general-purpose chatbots (e.g., ChatGPT), which often provide direct, ready-made answers, may lead to students' cognitive offloading. Prior research has rarely focused on custom chatbots for facilitating students' science problem solving, nor has it examined how they differently influence problem-solving processes and performance compared to general-purpose chatbots. To address this gap, we developed a pedagogy-informed custom GAI chatbot grounded in the Socratic questioning method, which supports students by prompting them with guiding questions. This study employed a within-subjects counterbalanced design in which 48 secondary school students used both custom and general-purpose chatbot to complete two science problem-solving tasks. 3297 student-chatbot dialogues were collected and analyzed using Heterogeneous Interaction Network Analysis (HINA). The results showed that: (1) students demonstrated significantly higher interaction intensity and cognitive interaction diversity when using custom chatbot than using general-purpose chatbot; (2) students were more likely to follow custom chatbot's guidance to think and reflect, whereas they tended to request general-purpose chatbot to execute specific commands; and (3) no statistically significant difference was observed in students' problem-solving performance evaluated by solution quality between two chatbot conditions. This study provides novel theoretical insights and empirical evidence that custom chatbots are less likely to induce cognitive offloading and instead foster greater cognitive engagement compared to general-purpose chatbots. This study also offers insights into the design and integration of GAI chatbots in science education.

analysis.tldr: 相比通用GAI聊天机器人，基于苏格拉底提问法的定制聊天机器人能显著提升学生科学问题解决中的交互强度和认知交互多样性，但问题解决表现无显著差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用聊天机器人（如ChatGPT）常直接提供答案，可能导致学生认知卸载；而定制聊天机器人在科学问题解决中的研究不足，且缺乏与通用聊天机器人的对比。
analysis.problem: 探究基于教学法的定制GAI聊天机器人与通用聊天机器人在学生科学问题解决过程和表现上的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发基于苏格拉底提问法的定制聊天机器人，采用被试内平衡设计，收集48名中学生的3297条对话，使用异质交互网络分析（HINA）进行对比。
contributions: 首次实证比较定制与通用GAI聊天机器人在科学问题解决中的影响
提出基于苏格拉底提问法的定制聊天机器人设计方法
analysis.experiments: 48名中学生使用两种聊天机器人完成两项科学问题解决任务，收集3297条对话，通过HINA分析交互强度、认知交互多样性和问题解决表现。
limitations: 样本量较小（48人），可能影响统计效力
仅针对科学问题解决任务，泛化性有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 相比通用GAI聊天机器人，基于苏格拉底提问法的定制聊天机器人能显著提升学生科学问题解决中的交互强度和认知交互多样性，但问题解决表现无显著差异。

papers.title: Agentic-MME: What Agentic Capability Really Brings to Multimodal Intelligence?
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) are evolving from passive observers into active agents, solving problems through Visual Expansion (invoking visual tools) and Knowledge Expansion (open-web search). However, existing evaluations fall short: they lack flexible tool integration, test visual and search tools separately, and evaluate primarily by final answers. Consequently, they cannot verify if tools were actually invoked, applied correctly, or used efficiently. To address this, we introduce Agentic-MME, a process-verified benchmark for Multimodal Agentic Capabilities. It contains 418 real-world tasks across 6 domains and 3 difficulty levels to evaluate capability synergy, featuring over 2,000 stepwise checkpoints that average 10+ person-hours of manual annotation per task. Each task includes a unified evaluation framework supporting sandboxed code and APIs, alongside a human reference trajectory annotated with stepwise checkpoints along dual-axis: S-axis and V-axis. To enable true process-level verification, we audit fine-grained intermediate states rather than just final answers, and quantify efficiency via an overthinking metric relative to human trajectories. Experimental results show the best model, Gemini3-pro, achieves 56.3% overall accuracy, which falls significantly to 23.0% on Level-3 tasks, underscoring the difficulty of real-world multimodal agentic problem solving.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agentic-MME基准，通过过程级验证评估多模态大模型的智能体能力，发现现有模型在复杂任务上表现显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估缺乏灵活工具集成、分开测试视觉和搜索工具、仅依赖最终答案，无法验证工具是否被正确调用或高效使用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够过程级验证多模态智能体能力（视觉扩展和知识扩展）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型Gemini3-pro在整体准确率56.3%，但在Level-3任务上降至23.0%，表明真实世界多模态智能体问题解决极具挑战性。
analysis.method: 构建Agentic-MME基准，包含418个真实世界任务、6个领域、3个难度级别，超过2000个逐步检查点，支持沙盒代码和API的统一评估框架，并引入双轴（S轴和V轴）人工参考轨迹和过度思考度量。
contributions: 提出Agentic-MME，一个过程级验证的多模态智能体能力基准。
引入双轴逐步检查点和过度思考度量，实现细粒度中间状态审计和效率量化。
analysis.experiments: 在多个MLLM上评估，最佳模型Gemini3-pro整体准确率56.3%，Level-3任务23.0%。
limitations: 基准规模有限（418个任务），可能无法覆盖所有场景。
过度思考度量依赖于人工参考轨迹，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agentic-MME基准，通过过程级验证评估多模态大模型的智能体能力，发现现有模型在复杂任务上表现显著下降。

papers.title: User-Aware Conditional Generative Total Correlation Learning for Multi-Modal Recommendation
papers.abstract: Multi-modal recommendation (MMR) enriches item representations by introducing item content, e.g., visual and textual descriptions, to improve upon interaction-only recommenders. The success of MMR hinges on aligning these content modalities with user preferences derived from interaction data, yet dominant practices based on disentangling modality-invariant preference-driving signals from modality-specific preference-irrelevant noises are flawed. First, they assume a one-size-fits-all relevance of item content to user preferences for all users, which contradicts the user-conditional fact of preferences. Second, they optimize pairwise contrastive losses separately toward cross-modal alignment, systematically ignoring higher-order dependencies inherent when multiple content modalities jointly influence user choices. In this paper, we introduce GTC, a conditional Generative Total Correlation learning framework. We employ an interaction-guided diffusion model to perform user-aware content feature filtering, preserving only personalized features relevant to each individual user. Furthermore, to capture complete cross-modal dependencies, we optimize a tractable lower bound of the total correlation of item representations across all modalities. Experiments on standard MMR benchmarks show GTC consistently outperforms state-of-the-art, with gains of up to 28.30% in NDCG@5. Ablation studies validate both conditional preference-driven feature filtering and total correlation optimization, confirming the ability of GTC to model user-conditional relationships in MMR tasks. The code is available at: https://github.com/jingdu-cs/GTC.

analysis.tldr: 提出用户感知的条件生成总相关学习框架GTC，通过扩散模型过滤个性化特征并优化多模态总相关性下界，显著提升多模态推荐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态推荐方法假设物品内容对所有用户具有一致的相关性，忽略了用户偏好的条件性，且仅通过成对对比损失进行跨模态对齐，未能捕捉多模态间的高阶依赖关系。
analysis.problem: 如何建模用户条件性的多模态偏好，并捕获跨模态的高阶依赖关系以提升推荐性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有解耦方法存在两个缺陷：一是假设物品内容与用户偏好具有全局一致性，与用户条件性事实矛盾；二是成对对比损失忽略多模态联合影响时的高阶依赖。
analysis.method: 提出GTC框架，包含两个核心：1）交互引导的扩散模型进行用户感知的内容特征过滤，保留个性化特征；2）优化所有模态间总相关性的可处理下界，以捕获完整跨模态依赖。
contributions: 提出用户感知的条件生成总相关学习框架GTC，解决多模态推荐中用户条件性偏好建模问题。
设计交互引导扩散模型实现个性化特征过滤，并利用总相关性下界优化跨模态高阶依赖。
在标准基准上取得显著提升（NDCG@5提升28.30%），并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在标准多模态推荐基准上，GTC一致优于现有方法，NDCG@5提升高达28.30%。消融实验验证了条件偏好驱动特征过滤和总相关性优化的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态特征提取，对噪声模态敏感。
扩散模型引入额外计算开销，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用户感知的条件生成总相关学习框架GTC，通过扩散模型过滤个性化特征并优化多模态总相关性下界，显著提升多模态推荐性能。

papers.title: Bridging scalp and intracranial EEG in BCI via pretrained neural representations and geometric constraint embedding
papers.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) has become one of the key modalities underpinning brain-computer interfaces (BCIs) due to its high temporal resolution, rapid responsiveness, non-invasiveness, low cost, and portability. However, EEG signals are substantially inferior to intracranial EEG (iEEG) in signal-to-noise ratio and local spatial resolution, whereas iEEG suffers from extremely limited clinical accessibility owing to its invasive nature, hindering widespread application. To address this challenge, this study proposes a unified data-and prior knowledge-driven framework for EEG-iEEG representational enhancement. Guided by the principle that "geometric structure dictates function", the framework maps static cortical anatomy onto dynamic constraints governing neural signal propagation and integrates general-purpose neural representations extracted by a pre-trained large EEG model to explicitly model signal transmission through the brain. Enhanced EEG signals are then synthesized via a multidimensional representation diffusion process. Numerous experimental results demonstrate that the generated enhanced EEG signals effectively recover the neural activity patterns lost during propagation through the brain. This finding indicates that the performance ceiling of BCIs is constrained not only by acquisition hardware but also by the depth to which the generative model resolves the mechanisms of neural signal propagation. Collectively, the proposed framework provides a viable pathway toward acquiring high-fidelity neural signals at low cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合预训练大模型与几何约束的框架，将头皮EEG增强为类似颅内iEEG的高保真信号，实验证明能恢复传播中丢失的神经活动模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 头皮EEG信噪比和空间分辨率远低于颅内iEEG，但iEEG因侵入性而临床可及性极低，阻碍BCI广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 如何以低成本将低质量头皮EEG信号增强为接近颅内iEEG的高保真神经信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出BCI性能上限不仅受采集硬件限制，还受生成模型对神经信号传播机制解析深度的影响。
analysis.method: 提出统一数据与先验知识驱动框架：利用预训练大EEG模型提取通用神经表征，结合“几何结构决定功能”原则将静态皮层解剖映射为动态传播约束，通过多维表征扩散过程合成增强EEG。
contributions: 提出融合预训练神经表征与几何约束嵌入的EEG-iEEG表征增强框架。
实验证明生成信号能有效恢复传播中丢失的神经活动模式。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型和几何先验的准确性。
临床实际部署效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合预训练大模型与几何约束的框架，将头皮EEG增强为类似颅内iEEG的高保真信号，实验证明能恢复传播中丢失的神经活动模式。

papers.title: R2-Write: Reflection and Revision for Open-Ended Writing with Deep Reasoning
papers.abstract: While deep reasoning with long chain-of-thought has dramatically improved large language models in verifiable domains like mathematics, its effectiveness for open-ended tasks such as writing remains unexplored. In this paper, we conduct a systematic investigation revealing that existing mainstream reasoning models achieve limited gains on open-ended writing tasks. Our further analysis shows that these models lack deep reflection and revision patterns in open-ended writing, resulting in substantially smaller improvements compared to mathematical reasoning tasks. To address this limitation, we introduce R2-Write: an automated framework that synthesizes high-quality thinking trajectories enriched with explicit reflection and revision patterns through iterative writer-judge interaction. To prevent redundant reflections, we design a process reward mechanism that supervises reflection quality during reinforcement learning, improving both performance and token efficiency. Extensive experiments across multiple creative writing and deep-research benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements, validating that explicitly incorporating reflection and revision patterns unlocks deep reasoning capabilities for open-ended writing tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出R2-Write框架，通过显式反思与修订模式增强大模型在开放式写作中的深度推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长思维链推理在数学等可验证领域效果显著，但在开放式写作等非结构化任务中提升有限，缺乏有效的反思与修订机制。
analysis.problem: 主流推理模型在开放式写作任务中缺乏深度反思和修订模式，导致性能提升远不如数学推理任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有推理模型在开放式写作中反思与修订模式不足，改进幅度显著小于数学推理任务。
analysis.method: 提出R2-Write框架，通过迭代的写手-评判者交互合成高质量思维轨迹，并设计过程奖励机制监督反思质量，结合强化学习提升性能与token效率。
contributions: 系统揭示了现有推理模型在开放式写作中反思与修订模式不足的现象。
提出了R2-Write框架，通过显式反思与修订模式解锁深度推理能力。
设计了过程奖励机制，有效减少冗余反思并提升token效率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个创意写作和深度研究基准上进行了广泛实验，验证了显著改进。
limitations: 框架依赖写手-评判者交互，可能引入额外计算开销。
过程奖励机制的设计可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R2-Write框架，通过显式反思与修订模式增强大模型在开放式写作中的深度推理能力。

papers.title: YOLOv11 Demystified: A Practical Guide to High-Performance Object Detection
papers.abstract: YOLOv11 is the latest iteration in the You Only Look Once (YOLO) series of real-time object detectors, introducing novel architectural modules to improve feature extraction and small-object detection. In this paper, we present a detailed analysis of YOLOv11, including its backbone, neck, and head components. The model key innovations, the C3K2 blocks, Spatial Pyramid Pooling - Fast (SPPF), and C2PSA (Cross Stage Partial with Spatial Attention) modules enhance spatial feature processing while preserving speed. We compare YOLOv11 performance to prior YOLO versions on standard benchmarks, highlighting improvements in mean Average Precision (mAP) and inference speed. Our results demonstrate that YOLOv11 achieves superior accuracy without sacrificing real-time capabilities, making it well-suited for applications in autonomous driving, surveillance, and video analytics.This work formalizes YOLOv11 in a research context, providing a clear reference for future studies.

analysis.tldr: YOLOv11通过C3K2、SPPF和C2PSA模块提升特征提取与小目标检测性能，在保持实时性的同时提高mAP。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时目标检测在自动驾驶、监控等领域至关重要，YOLO系列需持续改进以平衡精度与速度。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持实时推理速度的前提下，提升目标检测的精度（尤其是小目标检测）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出YOLOv11架构，包含C3K2块、SPPF和C2PSA注意力模块，优化骨干、颈部和头部组件。
contributions: 详细分析YOLOv11的架构创新（C3K2、SPPF、C2PSA）。
在标准基准上验证YOLOv11相比前代在mAP和速度上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上比较YOLOv11与先前YOLO版本的mAP和推理速度，显示精度提升且保持实时性。
limitations: 可能未在多样化场景（如极端光照、遮挡）下充分验证。
小目标检测改进的具体量化分析可能不足。

papers.title: A General Framework for Generative Self-supervised Learning in Non-invasive Estimation of Physiological Parameters Using Photoplethysmography
papers.abstract: Aligning physiological parameter labels with large-scale photoplethysmographic (PPG) data for deep learning is challenging and resource-intensive. While self-supervised representation learning (SSRL) can handle limited annotated data, the challenge lies in learning robust shared representations from vast unlabeled data and integrating contextual cues to learn distinctive representations. To alleviate these challenges, a generative SSRL framework TS2TC is proposed to utilize the temporal, spectrogram, and temporal-spectrogram mixed domains to explore and incorporate the unique features of PPG for universal and noninvasive physiological parameter estimation. A pretext task named Cross-Temporal Fusion Generative Anchor (CTFGA) is designed, modeling temporal dependencies and reconstructing independent segments at a coarse level to provide robust global feature extraction and local contextual representation. The framework includes sub-signals from PPG with diverse frequency scales and order derivatives reflecting hemodynamics to facilitate learning shared representations at varying semantic levels. Secondly, a cognitive-inspired dual-process transfer (DPT) strategy is formulated, consisting of prior-dependent autonomous processes and posterior observation reasoning processes, to leverage the independent and integrated advantages of shared and specific representations. TS2TC introduces a bilinear temporal-spectrogram fusion method in the mixed domain, aligning latent representations from different domains and establishing fine-grained contextual interactions across multiple sources of information. Extensive experiments on physiological parameter estimation tasks showed that the joint performance of CTFGA and DPT outperforms standard generative learning significantly. TS2TC achieved an average 2.49\% improvement in RMSE over state-of-the-art estimation methods with only 10\% training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出TS2TC框架，利用PPG信号的多域特征和自监督学习实现非侵入式生理参数估计，仅用10%训练数据即超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 生理参数标签与大规模PPG数据的对齐成本高，现有自监督方法难以从无标签数据中学习鲁棒的共享表征并整合上下文线索。
analysis.problem: 如何从无标签PPG数据中学习通用且非侵入的生理参数估计的共享表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TS2TC框架，包含跨时间融合生成锚点（CTFGA）预文本任务和认知启发的双过程迁移（DPT）策略，利用时间、频谱和时-频谱混合域特征，并引入双线性时-频谱融合方法。
contributions: 提出TS2TC框架，结合多域特征和自监督学习用于PPG生理参数估计。
设计CTFGA预文本任务和DPT策略，提升共享表征学习效果。
在多个生理参数估计任务上，仅用10%训练数据即实现平均RMSE降低2.49%。
analysis.experiments: 在生理参数估计任务上进行了实验，TS2TC仅用10%训练数据即比现有最优方法平均RMSE降低2.49%。
limitations: 可能依赖PPG信号的多域特征，泛化到其他信号类型需验证。
仅报告了RMSE指标，其他评估指标未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TS2TC框架，利用PPG信号的多域特征和自监督学习实现非侵入式生理参数估计，仅用10%训练数据即超越现有方法。

papers.title: Explicit Time-Frequency Dynamics for Skeleton-Based Gait Recognition
papers.abstract: Skeleton-based gait recognizers excel at modeling spatial configurations but often underuse explicit motion dynamics that are crucial under appearance changes. We introduce a plug-and-play Wavelet Feature Stream that augments any skeleton backbone with time-frequency dynamics of joint velocities. Concretely, per-joint velocity sequences are transformed by the continuous wavelet transform (CWT) into multi-scale scalograms, from which a lightweight multi-scale CNN learns discriminative dynamic cues. The resulting descriptor is fused with the backbone representation for classification, requiring no changes to the backbone architecture or additional supervision. Across CASIA-B, the proposed stream delivers consistent gains on strong skeleton backbones (e.g., GaitMixer, GaitFormer, GaitGraph) and establishes a new skeleton-based state of the art when attached to GaitMixer. The improvements are especially pronounced under covariate shifts such as carrying bags (BG) and wearing coats (CL), highlighting the complementarity of explicit time-frequency modeling and standard spatio-temporal encoders.

analysis.tldr: 提出小波特征流，为骨架步态识别引入显式时频动态，在多个骨干网络上取得一致提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有骨架步态识别器擅长空间建模，但在外观变化下对显式运动动态利用不足，限制了识别鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变骨干网络结构的前提下，有效引入显式时频运动动态以提升骨架步态识别性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出即插即用的小波特征流：对关节速度序列进行连续小波变换得到多尺度尺度图，用轻量多尺度CNN学习判别性动态线索，再与骨干网络表示融合。
contributions: 提出小波特征流，为骨架步态识别引入显式时频动态，可即插即用于任意骨架骨干网络。
在CASIA-B数据集上，多个强骨干网络（GaitMixer、GaitFormer、GaitGraph）均获得一致提升，并取得新SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在CASIA-B数据集上评估，携带背包和穿着外套等协变量偏移场景下提升尤为显著。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集（CASIA-B）上验证，泛化性未知。
小波变换的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出小波特征流，为骨架步态识别引入显式时频动态，在多个骨干网络上取得一致提升。

papers.title: Rendering Multi-Human and Multi-Object with 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Reconstructing dynamic scenes with multiple interacting humans and objects from sparse-view inputs is a critical yet challenging task, essential for creating high-fidelity digital twins for robotics and VR/AR. This problem, which we term Multi-Human Multi-Object (MHMO) rendering, presents two significant obstacles: achieving view-consistent representations for individual instances under severe mutual occlusion, and explicitly modeling the complex and combinatorial dependencies that arise from their interactions. To overcome these challenges, we propose MM-GS, a novel hierarchical framework built upon 3D Gaussian Splatting. Our method first employs a Per-Instance Multi-View Fusion module to establish a robust and consistent representation for each instance by aggregating visual information across all available views. Subsequently, a Scene-Level Instance Interaction module operates on a global scene graph to reason about relationships between all participants, refining their attributes to capture subtle interaction effects. Extensive experiments on challenging datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms strong baselines, producing state-of-the-art results with high-fidelity details and plausible inter-instance contacts.

analysis.tldr: 提出MM-GS框架，利用3D高斯泼溅实现多人与多物体动态场景的高保真渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 从稀疏视角重建包含多个交互人体和物体的动态场景是构建数字孪生的关键，但现有方法难以处理严重遮挡和复杂交互依赖。
analysis.problem: 多人与多物体（MHMO）动态场景的视图一致表示和交互依赖建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于3D高斯泼溅的分层框架MM-GS，包括逐实例多视图融合模块和场景级实例交互模块。
contributions: 提出MHMO问题并构建分层框架MM-GS。
设计逐实例多视图融合和场景级交互模块，实现高保真渲染和合理接触。
analysis.experiments: 在多个挑战性数据集上，MM-GS显著优于强基线，达到最先进结果。
limitations: 可能依赖稀疏视图输入质量。
场景图推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MM-GS框架，利用3D高斯泼溅实现多人与多物体动态场景的高保真渲染。

papers.title: FedSQ: Optimized Weight Averaging via Fixed Gating
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative training across organizations without sharing raw data, but it is hindered by statistical heterogeneity (non-i.i.d.\ client data) and by instability of naive weight averaging under client drift. In many cross-silo deployments, FL is warm-started from a strong pretrained backbone (e.g., ImageNet-1K) and then adapted to local domains. Motivated by recent evidence that ReLU-like gating regimes (structural knowledge) stabilize earlier than the remaining parameter values (quantitative knowledge), we propose FedSQ (Federated Structural-Quantitative learning), a transfer-initialized neural federated procedure based on a DualCopy, piecewise-linear view of deep networks. FedSQ freezes a structural copy of the pretrained model to induce fixed binary gating masks during federated fine-tuning, while only a quantitative copy is optimized locally and aggregated across rounds. Fixing the gating reduces learning to within-regime affine refinements, which stabilizes aggregation under heterogeneous partitions. Experiments on two convolutional neural network backbones under i.i.d.\ and Dirichlet splits show that FedSQ improves robustness and can reduce rounds-to-best validation performance relative to standard baselines while preserving accuracy in the transfer setting.

analysis.tldr: FedSQ通过固定门控机制稳定联邦学习中的权重平均，提升异构数据下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习面临统计异质性和客户端漂移导致的权重平均不稳定问题，尤其在迁移初始化场景下，现有方法鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练模型的结构知识（ReLU门控模式）来稳定联邦微调中的聚合过程，减少异构数据对模型性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到ReLU类门控模式（结构知识）比参数值（定量知识）更早稳定，这启发固定门控以减少学习复杂度。
analysis.method: 提出FedSQ，采用双副本（DualCopy）结构：固定预训练模型的结构副本以产生二值门控掩码，仅优化定量副本并在客户端间聚合，从而将学习限制在区域内的仿射调整。
contributions: 提出FedSQ算法，通过固定门控机制稳定联邦学习中的权重平均。
在两种CNN骨干网络和多种数据划分下验证了FedSQ的鲁棒性和收敛效率提升。
analysis.experiments: 在两种卷积神经网络骨干上，使用i.i.d.和Dirichlet划分进行实验，FedSQ相比标准基线提高了鲁棒性并减少了达到最佳验证性能的轮数，同时保持迁移设置下的准确率。
limitations: 仅针对CNN骨干和图像分类任务验证，未涉及更复杂的模型或任务。
固定门控可能限制模型表达能力，在非迁移场景下效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FedSQ通过固定门控机制稳定联邦学习中的权重平均，提升异构数据下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Self-Optimizing Multi-Agent Systems for Deep Research
papers.abstract: Given a user's complex information need, a multi-agent Deep Research system iteratively plans, retrieves, and synthesizes evidence across hundreds of documents to produce a high-quality answer. In one possible architecture, an orchestrator agent coordinates the process, while parallel worker agents execute tasks. Current Deep Research systems, however, often rely on hand-engineered prompts and static architectures, making improvement brittle, expensive, and time-consuming. We therefore explore various multi-agent optimization methods to show that enabling agents to self-play and explore different prompt combinations can produce high-quality Deep Research systems that match or outperform expert-crafted prompts.

analysis.tldr: 通过自我博弈和提示组合探索，自动优化多Agent深度研究系统，匹配或超越专家手工设计的提示。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前深度研究系统依赖手工设计的提示和静态架构，改进过程脆弱、昂贵且耗时，亟需自动化优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动优化多Agent深度研究系统的提示和架构，以提升答案质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 探索多种多Agent优化方法，使Agent通过自我博弈和探索不同提示组合来自动优化系统。
contributions: 提出并验证了自我博弈和提示组合探索可自动优化多Agent深度研究系统。
实验表明优化后的系统可匹配或超越专家手工设计的提示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的深度研究系统。
自我博弈的收敛性和稳定性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过自我博弈和提示组合探索，自动优化多Agent深度研究系统，匹配或超越专家手工设计的提示。

papers.title: Mitigating Reward Hacking in RLHF via Advantage Sign Robustness
papers.abstract: Reward models (RMs) used in reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) are vulnerable to reward hacking: as the policy maximizes a learned proxy reward, true quality plateaus or degrades. We make the assumption that reward hacking is often caused by flipped advantage signs: instead of reducing the likelihood of a bad response, a flipped sign causes the update to increase it. By considering an adversarial perturbation in the RM parameter space, we can derive a certified sign-preservation radius, which is the smallest perturbation that can flip the advantage sign during policy optimization. Based on this formulation, we propose Sign-Certified Policy Optimization (SignCert-PO), down-weighting non-robust completions in the policy gradient update. Unlike prior approaches that require multiple RMs or access to the RM training data, SignCert-PO is lightweight and operates purely at the policy optimization stage using only the RM parameters and on-policy completions. On TL;DR summarization and AlpacaFarm benchmarks, SignCert-PO consistently achieves a better win rate than baselines and reduces reward hacking.

analysis.tldr: 通过优势符号鲁棒性缓解RLHF中的奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: RLHF中奖励模型易受奖励黑客攻击，导致代理奖励最大化时真实质量停滞或下降，现有方法需多个RM或训练数据，成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖多个RM或训练数据的情况下，缓解RLHF中的奖励黑客问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励黑客常由优势符号翻转引起：本应降低坏响应概率的更新反而增加了它。
analysis.method: 提出Sign-Certified Policy Optimization (SignCert-PO)，通过RM参数空间的对抗扰动推导认证符号保持半径，并在策略梯度更新中对非鲁棒完成项降权。
contributions: 提出优势符号翻转是奖励黑客的关键原因，并形式化认证符号保持半径。
提出轻量级方法SignCert-PO，仅需RM参数和在线完成项，无需多个RM或训练数据。
analysis.experiments: 在TL;DR摘要和AlpacaFarm基准上，SignCert-PO持续取得更好的胜率并减少奖励黑客。
limitations: 假设奖励黑客主要由优势符号翻转引起，可能忽略其他因素。
认证半径计算可能依赖于RM参数空间的局部性质。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过优势符号鲁棒性缓解RLHF中的奖励黑客问题。

papers.title: Prompt Compression in the Wild: Measuring Latency, Rate Adherence, and Quality for Faster LLM Inference
papers.abstract: With the wide adoption of language models for IR -- and specifically RAG systems -- the latency of the underlying LLM becomes a crucial bottleneck, since the long contexts of retrieved passages lead large prompts and therefore, compute increase. Prompt compression, which reduces the size of input prompts while aiming to preserve performance on downstream tasks, has established itself as a cost-effective and low-latency method for accelerating inference in large language models. However, its usefulness depends on whether the additional preprocessing time during generation is offset by faster decoding. We present the first systematic, large-scale study of this trade-off, with thousands of runs and 30,000 queries across several open-source LLMs and three GPU classes. Our evaluation separates compression overhead from decoding latency while tracking output quality and memory usage. LLMLingua achieves up to 18% end-to-end speed-ups, when prompt length, compression ratio, and hardware capacity are well matched, with response quality remaining statistically unchanged across summarization, code generation, and question answering tasks. Outside this operating window, however, the compression step dominates and cancels out the gains. We also show that effective compression can reduce memory usage enough to offload workloads from data center GPUs to commodity cards, with only a 0.3s increase in latency. Our open-source profiler predicts the latency break-even point for each model-hardware setup, providing practical guidance on when prompt compression delivers real-world benefits.

analysis.tldr: 首个大规模系统研究提示压缩在LLM推理中的延迟-质量权衡，发现LLMLingua在匹配条件下可提速18%，但压缩开销可能抵消收益。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统长上下文导致LLM推理延迟成为瓶颈，提示压缩虽被提出但实际收益取决于预处理与解码加速的权衡，缺乏系统量化研究。
analysis.problem: 量化提示压缩在不同模型、硬件和压缩比下的端到端延迟收益、质量保持和内存影响，并确定其有效工作区间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 压缩收益存在操作窗口：当提示长度、压缩比和硬件匹配时，LLMLingua可提速18%且质量不变；窗口外压缩开销主导，收益消失。
analysis.method: 大规模实验框架：在多个开源LLM和三类GPU上运行数千次实验，分离压缩开销与解码延迟，跟踪质量和内存，并开发开源分析器预测延迟盈亏平衡点。
contributions: 首次大规模系统研究提示压缩的延迟-质量权衡，覆盖30,000查询和多种设置
发现LLMLingua在匹配条件下实现18%端到端加速且质量不变，并给出操作窗口
证明压缩可减少内存使工作负载从数据中心GPU迁移到消费级卡，仅增加0.3秒延迟
开源分析器预测延迟盈亏平衡点，提供实用指导
analysis.experiments: 在多个开源LLM和三类GPU上运行数千次实验，使用30,000查询，评估摘要、代码生成和问答任务。
limitations: 仅研究LLMLingua一种压缩方法，其他方法可能不同
未覆盖所有模型和硬件组合，通用性有限
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个大规模系统研究提示压缩在LLM推理中的延迟-质量权衡，发现LLMLingua在匹配条件下可提速18%，但压缩开销可能抵消收益。

papers.title: Measuring Representation Robustness in Large Language Models for Geometry
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly evaluated on mathematical reasoning, yet their robustness to equivalent problem representations remains poorly understood. In geometry, identical problems can be expressed in Euclidean, coordinate, or vector forms, but existing benchmarks report accuracy on fixed formats, implicitly assuming representation invariance and masking failures caused by representational changes alone. We propose GeoRepEval, a representation-aware evaluation framework that measures correctness, invariance, and consistency at the problem level across parallel formulations, combining strict answer matching, bootstrap confidence intervals, paired McNemar tests, representation-flip analyses, and regression controls for surface complexity. We prove that our Invariance@3 metric decomposes accuracy into robust and fragile components and is bounded by the weakest representation. Evaluating eleven LLMs on 158 curated high-school geometry problems (474 instances), we find accuracy gaps of up to 14 percentage points induced solely by representation choice. Vector formulations emerge as a consistent failure point, with Invariance@3 as low as 0.044 even after controlling for length and symbolic complexity. A convert-then-solve prompting intervention improves vector accuracy by up to 52 percentage points for high-capacity models, suggesting that failures reflect representation sensitivity rather than inability; however, low-capacity models show no gains, indicating deeper limitations. These results suggest that current models rely on representation-specific heuristics rather than abstract geometric reasoning. All datasets, prompts, and scripts are released at https://github.com/vedjaw/GeoRepEval.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoRepEval框架评估LLM在几何问题上的表征鲁棒性，发现向量形式是持续失败点，准确率差距高达14个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准在固定格式上报告准确率，隐含表征不变性假设，掩盖了仅由表征变化导致的失败，而几何问题可等价表达为欧几里得、坐标或向量形式。
analysis.problem: 评估大型语言模型在几何问题中对等价表征变化的鲁棒性，包括正确性、不变性和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 向量形式是持续失败点，Invariance@3低至0.044；高容量模型通过转换-求解提示提升向量准确率52个百分点，低容量模型无提升，表明失败源于表征敏感性而非能力不足。
analysis.method: 提出GeoRepEval框架，包含严格答案匹配、bootstrap置信区间、配对McNemar检验、表征翻转分析和回归控制表面复杂度，并定义Invariance@3指标将准确率分解为鲁棒和脆弱成分。
contributions: 提出GeoRepEval，一个表征感知的评估框架，用于衡量LLM在几何问题上的正确性、不变性和一致性。
通过实验发现向量形式是持续失败点，准确率差距高达14个百分点，并证明转换-求解提示可缓解高容量模型的失败。
analysis.experiments: 在158道高中几何问题（474个实例）上评估11个LLM，发现准确率差距高达14个百分点，Invariance@3低至0.044。
limitations: 仅评估高中几何问题，可能不适用于更复杂的数学领域。
提示干预仅对高容量模型有效，低容量模型存在更深层限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoRepEval框架评估LLM在几何问题上的表征鲁棒性，发现向量形式是持续失败点，准确率差距高达14个百分点。

papers.title: Not All Frames Deserve Full Computation: Accelerating Autoregressive Video Generation via Selective Computation and Predictive Extrapolation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive (AR) video diffusion models enable long-form video generation but remain expensive due to repeated multi-step denoising. Existing training-free acceleration methods rely on binary cache-or-recompute decisions, overlooking intermediate cases where direct reuse is too coarse yet full recomputation is unnecessary. Moreover, asynchronous AR schedules assign different noise levels to co-generated frames, yet existing methods process the entire valid interval uniformly. To address these AR-specific inefficiencies, we present SCOPE, a training-free framework for efficient AR video diffusion. SCOPE introduces a tri-modal scheduler over cache, predict, and recompute, where prediction via noise-level Taylor extrapolation fills the gap between reuse and recomputation with explicit stability controls backed by error propagation analysis. It further introduces selective computation that restricts execution to the active frame interval. On MAGI-1 and SkyReels-V2, SCOPE achieves up to 4.73x speedup while maintaining quality comparable to the original output, outperforming all training-free baselines.

analysis.tldr: SCOPE通过三模态调度和选择性计算，在自回归视频扩散中实现高达4.73倍加速且保持质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型生成长视频时，重复的多步去噪导致计算成本高昂，现有训练无关加速方法仅做二值缓存或重计算决策，忽略了中间情况，且异步AR调度中均匀处理整个有效区间造成浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何针对自回归视频扩散模型设计更细粒度的训练无关加速策略，在缓存与重计算之间引入预测机制，并利用选择性计算减少冗余处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：现有方法仅做二值缓存或重计算，忽略了中间情况；异步AR调度中不同噪声水平的帧被均匀处理，存在冗余。
analysis.method: 提出SCOPE框架，包含三模态调度器（缓存、预测、重计算），其中预测通过噪声级泰勒外推实现，并带有稳定性控制；同时引入选择性计算，将执行限制在活跃帧区间。
contributions: 提出三模态调度策略，在缓存和重计算之间引入预测机制，填补中间空白。
引入选择性计算，仅处理活跃帧区间，减少冗余。
在MAGI-1和SkyReels-V2上实现高达4.73倍加速，质量与原始输出相当，超越所有训练无关基线。
analysis.experiments: 在MAGI-1和SkyReels-V2上评估，实现高达4.73倍加速，质量与原始输出相当，超越所有训练无关基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定自回归视频扩散架构。
预测外推的稳定性控制可能对噪声级变化敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCOPE通过三模态调度和选择性计算，在自回归视频扩散中实现高达4.73倍加速且保持质量。

papers.title: Effect of Input Resolution on Retinal Vessel Segmentation Performance: An Empirical Study Across Five Datasets
papers.abstract: Most deep learning pipelines for retinal vessel segmentation resize fundus images to satisfy GPU memory constraints and enable uniform batch processing. However, the impact of this resizing on thin vessel detection remains underexplored. When high resolution images are downsampled, thin vessels are reduced to subpixel structures, causing irreversible information loss even before the data enters the network. Standard volumetric metrics such as the Dice score do not capture this loss because thick vessel pixels dominate the evaluation. We investigated this effect by training a baseline UNet at multiple downsampling ratios across five fundus datasets (DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1, HRF, and FIVES) with native widths ranging from 565 to 3504 pixels, keeping all other settings fixed. We introduce a width-stratified sensitivity metric that evaluates thin (half-width <3 pixels), medium (3 to 7 pixels), and thick (>7 pixels) vessel detection separately, using native resolution width estimates derived from a Euclidean distance transform. Results show that for high-resolution datasets (HRF, FIVES), thin vessel sensitivity improves monotonically as images are downsampled toward the encoder's effective operating range, peaking at processed widths between 256 and 876 pixels. For low-to-mid resolution datasets (DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1), thin vessel sensitivity is highest at or near native resolution and degrades with any downsampling. Across all five datasets, aggressive downsampling reduced thin vessel sensitivity by up to 15.8 percentage points (DRIVE) while Dice remained relatively stable, confirming that Dice alone is insufficient for evaluating microvascular segmentation.

analysis.tldr: 输入分辨率对眼底血管分割性能的影响因数据集原始分辨率而异，薄血管检测对下采样更敏感，且Dice指标无法反映这种损失。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习眼底血管分割通常对眼底图像进行下采样以满足GPU内存限制，但下采样对薄血管检测的影响尚未被充分研究，标准体积指标如Dice无法捕捉薄血管的信息损失。
analysis.problem: 量化输入图像下采样对眼底血管分割中薄血管检测性能的影响，并揭示Dice指标的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高分辨率数据集（HRF, FIVES）在下采样到编码器有效工作范围时薄血管敏感性单调提升；低至中分辨率数据集（DRIVE, STARE, CHASE_DB1）在原始分辨率附近薄血管敏感性最高，任何下采样都会降低性能。
analysis.method: 在五个眼底数据集上以多种下采样比例训练基线UNet，引入宽度分层敏感性指标（薄、中、厚血管），使用欧几里得距离变换估计原始分辨率下的血管宽度。
contributions: 系统评估了输入分辨率对眼底血管分割中薄血管检测的影响，覆盖五个数据集。
提出了宽度分层的敏感性指标，揭示了Dice指标在评估微血管分割时的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在DRIVE、STARE、CHASE_DB1、HRF和FIVES五个数据集上进行实验，原始宽度从565到3504像素不等，保持其他设置固定。
limitations: 仅使用UNet架构，可能不适用于其他网络结构。
宽度估计基于欧几里得距离变换，可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 输入分辨率对眼底血管分割性能的影响因数据集原始分辨率而异，薄血管检测对下采样更敏感，且Dice指标无法反映这种损失。

papers.title: KARL: Mitigating Hallucinations in LLMs via Knowledge-Boundary-Aware Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Enabling large language models (LLMs) to appropriately abstain from answering questions beyond their knowledge is crucial for mitigating hallucinations. While existing reinforcement learning methods foster autonomous abstention, they often compromise answer accuracy because their static reward mechanisms, agnostic to models' knowledge boundaries, drive models toward excessive caution. In this work, we propose KARL, a novel framework that continuously aligns an LLM's abstention behavior with its evolving knowledge boundary. KARL introduces two core innovations: a Knowledge-Boundary-Aware Reward that performs online knowledge boundary estimation using within-group response statistics, dynamically rewarding correct answers or guided abstention; and a Two-Stage RL Training Strategy that first explores the knowledge boundary and bypasses the "abstention trap", and subsequently converts incorrect answers beyond the knowledge boundary into abstentions without sacrificing accuracy. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that KARL achieves a superior accuracy-hallucination trade-off, effectively suppressing hallucinations while maintaining high accuracy across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution scenarios.

analysis.tldr: KARL通过知识边界感知的强化学习，在保持高准确率的同时有效抑制LLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常对超出知识范围的问题产生幻觉，现有强化学习方法因静态奖励机制导致模型过度谨慎，牺牲了回答准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在保持高准确率的同时，学会对超出知识边界的问题适当拒绝回答，从而抑制幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态奖励机制导致模型过度谨慎，降低准确率；模型知识边界随训练动态变化，需要在线估计。
analysis.method: 提出KARL框架，包含知识边界感知奖励（在线估计知识边界并动态奖励正确回答或引导拒绝）和两阶段RL训练策略（先探索知识边界避免“拒绝陷阱”，再将错误回答转化为拒绝）。
contributions: 提出知识边界感知奖励，利用组内响应统计在线估计知识边界，动态调整奖励信号。
设计两阶段RL训练策略，先探索知识边界，再转化错误回答为拒绝，避免准确率下降。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，KARL在分布内和分布外场景下均实现了准确率与幻觉的更好权衡，有效抑制幻觉同时保持高准确率。
limitations: 可能依赖组内响应统计的可靠性，在极端分布下估计可能不准确。
两阶段训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KARL通过知识边界感知的强化学习，在保持高准确率的同时有效抑制LLM幻觉。

papers.title: Exploring Motion-Language Alignment for Text-driven Motion Generation
papers.abstract: Text-driven human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic motion sequences that follow textual descriptions. Despite recent advances, accurately aligning motion dynamics with textual semantics remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we revisit text-to-motion generation from the perspective of motion-language alignment and propose MLA-Gen, a framework that integrates global motion priors with fine-grained local conditioning. This design enables the model to capture common motion patterns, while establishing detailed alignment between texts and motions. Furthermore, we identify a previously overlooked attention sink phenomenon in human motion generation, where attention disproportionately concentrates on the start text token, limiting the utilization of informative textual cues and leading to degraded semantic grounding. To analyze this issue, we introduce SinkRatio, a metric for measuring attention concentration, and develop alignment-aware masking and control strategies to regulate attention during generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently improves both motion quality and motion-language alignment over strong baselines. Code will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出MLA-Gen框架，通过全局-局部对齐和注意力下沉缓解策略提升文本驱动运动生成的对齐质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本驱动运动生成中，运动动态与文本语义的精确对齐是核心挑战，现有方法在细粒度对齐和注意力利用上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 运动生成中运动与文本的对齐不充分，以及注意力下沉现象导致文本信息利用受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现注意力下沉现象：注意力过度集中于起始文本token，限制了其他文本线索的利用，导致语义对齐退化。
analysis.method: 提出MLA-Gen框架，集成全局运动先验与细粒度局部条件，并引入SinkRatio指标和注意力对齐掩码与控制策略。
contributions: 提出MLA-Gen框架，结合全局和局部对齐提升运动-语言对齐。
识别并分析注意力下沉现象，提出SinkRatio指标和缓解策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需验证。
注意力控制策略可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MLA-Gen框架，通过全局-局部对齐和注意力下沉缓解策略提升文本驱动运动生成的对齐质量。

papers.title: Retina gap junctions support the robust perception by warping neural representational geometries along the visual hierarchy
papers.abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to elaborately designed adversarial noise, although they have achieved extraordinary success in many tasks. Compared with DNNs, the human visual system is highly robust. However, it is unclear how the human visual system defends against adversarial attacks, especially the role of the early visual system and its influence on the brain manifold. Due to retina gap junctions being crucial for the denoising function in the early visual system, we combine a retina gap junction-based filter, G-filter, with DNN as an abstract human visual system model called the biological hybrid model. We adopt this model to study the defense performance of retina gap junctions and their impact on the brain manifold. Compared with other defense methods, the biological hybrid model is more robust and can be further improved by introducing noise during training. Next, we analyze the manifold and its decision boundary of the biological hybrid model from a geometry perspective. The results show that the biological hybrid model has a unique 2D decision boundary with high nonlinearity and a lower curvature of the decision boundary of the manifold compared to other defense methods. The transforming manifold may account for the high robustness of the biological hybrid model. Finally, to dissect G-filter and clarify its internal mechanism, we borrow the Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) concept and rewrite G-filter into an equivalent recurrent neural network. The results show that the decision boundary of the model's manifold will gradually change with time and eventually reach a steady state, which is modulated by gap junction conductance, revealing the influence of retina gap junctions on the brain manifold is a gradually evolving process.

analysis.tldr: 视网膜间隙连接通过扭曲视觉层级中的神经表征几何结构来支持鲁棒感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络易受对抗攻击，而人类视觉系统高度鲁棒，但早期视觉系统（尤其是视网膜间隙连接）在防御中的作用尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 研究视网膜间隙连接如何通过影响神经表征几何结构来提升视觉系统的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生物混合模型具有独特的二维决策边界，高度非线性且曲率较低，其流形随时间演化至稳态，受间隙连接电导调节。
analysis.method: 将基于视网膜间隙连接的G滤波器与DNN结合构建生物混合模型，并利用神经常微分方程将G滤波器重写为等效循环神经网络以分析其内部机制。
contributions: 提出生物混合模型，证明视网膜间隙连接可提升DNN的对抗鲁棒性。
从几何角度分析流形决策边界，揭示低曲率和高非线性与鲁棒性的关联。
利用神经常微分方程揭示间隙连接对脑流形的影响是一个逐渐演化的过程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型仅在抽象层面模拟人类视觉系统，未在真实生物数据上验证。
G滤波器的生物学合理性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 视网膜间隙连接通过扭曲视觉层级中的神经表征几何结构来支持鲁棒感知。

papers.title: InfoSeeker: A Scalable Hierarchical Parallel Agent Framework for Web Information Seeking
papers.abstract: Recent agentic search systems have made substantial progress by emphasising deep, multi-step reasoning. However, this focus often overlooks the challenges of wide-scale information synthesis, where agents must aggregate large volumes of heterogeneous evidence across many sources. As a result, most existing large language model agent systems face severe limitations in data-intensive settings, including context saturation, cascading error propagation, and high end-to-end latency. To address these challenges, we present \framework, a hierarchical framework based on principle of near-decomposability, containing a strategic \textit{Host}, multiple \textit{Managers} and parallel \textit{Workers}. By leveraging aggregation and reflection mechanisms at the Manager layer, our framework enforces strict context isolation to prevent saturation and error propagation. Simultaneously, the parallelism in worker layer accelerates the speed of overall task execution, mitigating the significant latency. Our evaluation on two complementary benchmarks demonstrates both efficiency ($ 3-5 \times$ speed-up) and effectiveness, achieving a $8.4\%$ success rate on WideSearch-en and $52.9\%$ accuracy on BrowseComp-zh. The code is released at https://github.com/agent-on-the-fly/InfoSeeker

analysis.tldr: 提出分层并行Agent框架InfoSeeker，通过上下文隔离和并行Worker加速大规模网络信息聚合，实现3-5倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent搜索系统侧重深度多步推理，但在需要聚合大量异构证据的广域信息合成场景中面临上下文饱和、错误级联传播和高延迟等严重限制。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模数据密集型网络信息搜索中实现高效、准确且可扩展的信息聚合，避免上下文饱和和错误传播。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有LLM Agent系统在数据密集型场景下存在上下文饱和、级联错误传播和高延迟的瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于近可分解性原理的分层框架，包含策略性Host、多个Manager和并行Worker，Manager层通过聚合与反射机制实现严格上下文隔离，Worker层并行执行加速。
contributions: 提出InfoSeeker分层并行Agent框架，通过上下文隔离和并行化解决大规模信息聚合中的饱和、错误传播和延迟问题。
在WideSearch-en和BrowseComp-zh两个基准上验证了效率（3-5倍加速）和有效性（8.4%和52.9%准确率）。
analysis.experiments: 在WideSearch-en和BrowseComp-zh两个基准上评估，分别取得8.4%成功率和52.9%准确率，并实现3-5倍加速。
limitations: 可能对任务分解的粒度敏感，Manager的聚合策略需进一步优化。
并行Worker间的协调开销在极端大规模场景下可能成为新瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层并行Agent框架InfoSeeker，通过上下文隔离和并行Worker加速大规模网络信息聚合，实现3-5倍加速。

papers.title: FoE: Forest of Errors Makes the First Solution the Best in Large Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Recent Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) like DeepSeek-R1 have demonstrated remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks, exhibiting human-like patterns in exploring multiple alternative solutions. Upon closer inspection, however, we uncover a surprising phenomenon: The First is The Best, where alternative solutions are not merely suboptimal but potentially detrimental. This observation challenges widely accepted test-time scaling laws, leading us to hypothesize that errors within the reasoning path scale concurrently with test time. Through comprehensive empirical analysis, we characterize errors as a forest-structured Forest of Errors (FoE) and conclude that FoE makes the First the Best, which is underpinned by rigorous theoretical analysis. Leveraging these insights, we propose RED, a self-guided efficient reasoning framework comprising two components: I) Refining First, which suppresses FoE growth in the first solution; and II) Discarding Subs, which prunes subsequent FoE via dual-consistency. Extensive experiments across five benchmarks and six backbone models demonstrate that RED outperforms eight competitive baselines, achieving performance gains of up to 19.0% while reducing token consumption by 37.7% ~ 70.4%. Moreover, comparative experiments on FoE metrics shed light on how RED achieves effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 发现大推理模型中“第一个解最好”现象，归因于错误森林（FoE），并提出RED框架提升效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大推理模型（LRM）在复杂推理中表现出探索多个解的能力，但测试时缩放定律可能因推理路径中的错误累积而失效，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: LRM中多个备选解并非最优，且错误随测试时间增长，如何识别并抑制错误森林（FoE）以提升首个解的质量并减少计算浪费。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到“第一个解最好”现象：备选解不仅次优，甚至有害；错误在推理路径中呈森林结构增长，与测试时间正相关。
analysis.method: 提出RED框架，包含两部分：I) Refining First，抑制首个解中的FoE增长；II) Discarding Subs，通过双重一致性剪枝后续FoE。
contributions: 发现并理论分析LRM中“第一个解最好”现象及错误森林（FoE）结构
提出RED框架，在五个基准和六个骨干模型上实现高达19.0%的性能提升和37.7%~70.4%的令牌节省
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准和六个骨干模型上对比八个基线，RED在性能和效率上均占优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或任务类型
双重一致性剪枝可能误删有效推理路径
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现大推理模型中“第一个解最好”现象，归因于错误森林（FoE），并提出RED框架提升效率与性能。

papers.title: Visual Prototype Conditioned Focal Region Generation for UAV-Based Object Detection
papers.abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) based object detection is a critical but challenging task, when applied in dynamically changing scenarios with limited annotated training data. Layout-to-image generation approaches have proved effective in promoting detection accuracy by synthesizing labeled images based on diffusion models. However, they suffer from frequently producing artifacts, especially near layout boundaries of tiny objects, thus substantially limiting their performance. To address these issues, we propose UAVGen, a novel layout-to-image generation framework tailored for UAV-based object detection. Specifically, UAVGen designs a Visual Prototype Conditioned Diffusion Model (VPC-DM) that constructs representative instances for each class and integrates them into latent embeddings for high-fidelity object generation. Moreover, a Focal Region Enhanced Data Pipeline (FRE-DP) is introduced to emphasize object-concentrated foreground regions in synthesis, combined with a label refinement to correct missing, extra and misaligned generations. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, and consistently promotes accuracy when integrated with distinct detectors. The source code is available at https://github.com/Sirius-Li/UAVGen.

analysis.tldr: 提出UAVGen框架，通过视觉原型条件扩散模型和焦点区域增强数据管道，提升无人机目标检测的布局到图像生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机目标检测在动态场景和有限标注数据下具有挑战性，现有布局到图像生成方法在小目标边界附近易产生伪影，限制了检测性能提升。
analysis.problem: 现有布局到图像生成方法在生成小目标时产生伪影，导致检测精度受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在微小物体的布局边界附近频繁产生伪影，这是性能受限的主要原因。
analysis.method: 提出UAVGen框架，包含视觉原型条件扩散模型（VPC-DM）和焦点区域增强数据管道（FRE-DP）。VPC-DM为每个类别构建代表性实例并集成到潜在嵌入中；FRE-DP强调前景区域合成并包含标签细化步骤。
contributions: 提出VPC-DM，利用视觉原型条件实现高保真目标生成
设计FRE-DP，通过焦点区域增强和标签细化提升生成质量
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，显著优于现有方法，且与不同检测器集成时一致提升精度。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖类别原型库的质量
焦点区域增强可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UAVGen框架，通过视觉原型条件扩散模型和焦点区域增强数据管道，提升无人机目标检测的布局到图像生成质量。

papers.title: Collaborative Multi-Mode Pruning for Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly within the unified Transformer architecture, yet their deployment on resource-constrained devices remains challenging due to high computational complexity. While pruning has emerged as an effective technique for compressing VLMs, existing approaches predominantly focus on a single mode by pruning either parameters or tokens, neglecting fully exploring the inherent redundancy in each mode, which leads to substantial performance degradation at high pruning ratios. To address the above limitations, we propose Collaborative Multi-Mode Pruning (CoMP), a novel framework tailored for VLMs by performing joint parameter and token pruning. Specifically, we first design a Collaborative Importance Metric (CIM) that investigates the mutual interference between the coupled parameters and tokens. It incorporates distinct significance of tokens into the computation of parameter importance scores, while simultaneously mitigating the affect of pruned parameters on token importance scores. Moreover, we develop a Multi-Mode Pruning Strategy (MPS) that decomposes the overall pruning process into a sequence of pruning stages, while in each stage we estimate the priory of different pruning modes based on their pruning cost and adaptively shift to the optimal one. Additionally, MPS integrates the historical cost and random exploration, in order to achieve a stable pruning process and avoid local optimum. Extensive experiments across various vision-language tasks and models demonstrate that our method effectively promotes the performance under high pruning ratios by comparing to the state-of-the-art approaches. The source code is available at https://github.com/Wuzimeng/CoMP.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出协作多模式剪枝（CoMP），联合剪枝参数和token以提升VLM在高剪枝率下的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM计算复杂度高，难以部署在资源受限设备上；现有剪枝方法仅关注单一模式（参数或token），未充分探索各模式内在冗余，导致高剪枝率下性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何联合剪枝VLM中的参数和token，以在高压缩比下保持模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单一模式剪枝在高剪枝率下性能下降严重，且参数与token之间存在相互干扰。
analysis.method: 提出CoMP框架，包含协作重要性度量（CIM）和多模式剪枝策略（MPS）。CIM将token重要性融入参数重要性计算，并减轻剪枝参数对token重要性的影响；MPS将剪枝过程分解为多个阶段，每阶段根据剪枝成本自适应选择最优剪枝模式，并集成历史成本和随机探索以稳定过程并避免局部最优。
contributions: 提出协作多模式剪枝（CoMP），首次联合剪枝VLM的参数和token。
设计协作重要性度量（CIM），建模参数与token之间的相互影响。
提出多模式剪枝策略（MPS），自适应选择剪枝模式并稳定优化过程。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视觉-语言任务和模型上进行了实验，与最先进方法相比，CoMP在高剪枝率下有效提升了性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于统一Transformer架构的VLM。
未讨论剪枝后模型的可迁移性或微调成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协作多模式剪枝（CoMP），联合剪枝参数和token以提升VLM在高剪枝率下的性能。

papers.title: The Planetary Cost of AI Acceleration, Part II: The 10th Planetary Boundary and the 6.5-Year Countdown
papers.abstract: The recent, super-exponential scaling of autonomous Large Language Model (LLM) agents signals a broader, fundamental paradigm shift from machines primarily replacing the human hands (manual labor and mechanical processing) to machines delegating for the human minds (cognition, reasoning, and intention). The uncontrolled offloading and scaling of "thinking" itself, beyond human's limited but efficient biological capacity, has profound consequences for humanity's heat balance sheet, since thinking, or intelligence, carries thermodynamic weight. The Earth has already surpassed the heat dissipation threshold required for long-term ecological stability, and projecting based on empirical data reveal a concerning trajectory: without radical structural intervention, anthropogenic heat accumulation will breach critical planetary ecological thresholds in less than 6.5 years, even under the most ideal scenario where Earth Energy Imbalance (EEI) holds constant. In this work, we identify six factors from artificial intelligence that influence the global heat dissipation rate and delineate how their interplay drives society toward one of four broad macroscopic trajectories. We propose that the integration of artificial intelligence and its heat dissipation into the planetary system constitute the tenth planetary boundary (9+1). The core empirical measurement of this boundary is the net-new waste heat generated by exponential AI growth, balanced against its impact on reducing economic and societal inefficiencies and thus baseline anthropogenic waste heat emissions. We demonstrate that managing AI scaling lacks a moderate middle ground: it will either accelerate the breach of critical planetary thermodynamic thresholds, or it will serve as the single most effective lever on stabilizing the other nine planetary boundaries and through which safeguarding human civilization's survival.

analysis.tldr: AI加速导致地球热排放将突破临界阈值，提出第10个行星边界概念。
analysis.research_motivation: AI的指数级扩展正在从替代体力劳动转向替代脑力劳动，但思维活动具有热力学代价，而地球已超过长期生态稳定的热排放阈值，亟需评估AI对全球热平衡的影响。
analysis.problem: 量化AI加速产生的净新增废热对地球热平衡的冲击，并确定其是否构成新的行星边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于经验数据预测，即使在地球能量失衡（EEI）保持恒定的最理想情景下，人为热积累将在6.5年内突破关键生态阈值。
analysis.method: 识别影响全球热排放率的六个AI因素，分析其相互作用导致四种宏观轨迹，提出将AI热排放纳入第10个行星边界（9+1），并以净新增废热作为核心度量。
contributions: 提出AI热排放构成第10个行星边界的概念框架
基于经验数据预测6.5年临界时间窗口
识别六个关键AI因素并描绘四种宏观轨迹
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 预测基于经验数据外推，不确定性未充分讨论
未提供具体减排或干预措施的量化分析
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI加速导致地球热排放将突破临界阈值，提出第10个行星边界概念。

papers.title: LogicPoison: Logical Attacks on Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) enhances the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) by grounding their responses in structured knowledge graphs. Leveraging community detection and relation filtering techniques, GraphRAG systems demonstrate inherent resistance to traditional RAG attacks, such as text poisoning and prompt injection. However, in this paper, we find that the security of GraphRAG systems fundamentally relies on the topological integrity of the underlying graph, which can be undermined by implicitly corrupting the logical connections, without altering surface-level text semantics. To exploit this vulnerability, we propose \textsc{LogicPoison}, a novel attack framework that targets logical reasoning rather than injecting false contents. Specifically, \textsc{LogicPoison} employs a type-preserving entity swapping mechanism to perturb both global logic hubs for disrupting overall graph connectivity and query-specific reasoning bridges for severing essential multi-hop inference paths. This approach effectively reroutes valid reasoning into dead ends while maintaining surface-level textual plausibility. Comprehensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that \textsc{LogicPoison} successfully bypasses GraphRAG's defenses, significantly degrading performance and outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in both effectiveness and stealth. Our code is available at \textcolor{blue}https://github.com/Jord8061/logicPoison.

analysis.tldr: 提出LogicPoison攻击框架，通过破坏图拓扑逻辑连接而非文本语义，绕过GraphRAG防御。
analysis.research_motivation: GraphRAG通过结构化知识图谱增强LLM推理，但现有攻击（如文本投毒、提示注入）对其效果有限，亟需探索更隐蔽的漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变表面文本语义的前提下，通过破坏图拓扑逻辑连接来攻击GraphRAG系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GraphRAG的安全性依赖于图拓扑完整性，而逻辑连接可被隐式破坏，且传统攻击无法有效应对。
analysis.method: 提出LogicPoison框架，采用类型保持的实体交换机制，扰动全局逻辑枢纽和查询特定推理桥，使有效推理陷入死胡同。
contributions: 首次揭示GraphRAG系统对图拓扑逻辑连接的脆弱性
提出LogicPoison攻击框架，通过破坏逻辑连接而非注入虚假内容实现攻击
实验证明LogicPoison在多个基准上优于现有方法，兼具有效性和隐蔽性
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了全面实验，结果显示LogicPoison成功绕过GraphRAG防御，性能显著下降，且优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图结构假设
未讨论防御措施
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LogicPoison攻击框架，通过破坏图拓扑逻辑连接而非文本语义，绕过GraphRAG防御。

papers.title: How Annotation Trains Annotators: Competence Development in Social Influence Recognition
papers.abstract: Human data annotation, especially when involving experts, is often treated as an objective reference. However, many annotation tasks are inherently subjective, and annotators' judgments may evolve over time. This study investigates changes in the quality of annotators' work from a competence perspective during a process of social influence recognition. The study involved 25 annotators from five different groups, including both experts and non-experts, who annotated a dataset of 1,021 dialogues with 20 social influence techniques, along with intentions, reactions, and consequences. An initial subset of 150 texts was annotated twice - before and after the main annotation process - to enable comparison. To measure competence shifts, we combined qualitative and quantitative analyses of the annotated data, semi-structured interviews with annotators, self-assessment surveys, and Large Language Model training and evaluation on the comparison dataset. The results indicate a significant increase in annotators' self-perceived competence and confidence. Moreover, observed changes in data quality suggest that the annotation process may enhance annotator competence and that this effect is more pronounced in expert groups. The observed shifts in annotator competence have a visible impact on the performance of LLMs trained on their annotated data.

analysis.tldr: 标注过程本身能提升标注者的能力，尤其对专家更明显，并影响基于标注数据训练的LLM性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 人工标注常被视为客观基准，但主观任务中标注者的判断会随时间变化，这种变化对数据质量和下游模型的影响尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 研究在社交影响力识别任务中，标注过程如何改变标注者的能力（胜任力），以及这种变化对标注质量和LLM训练的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标注者的自评胜任力和信心显著提升；数据质量变化表明标注过程可能增强标注者能力，且专家群体中效果更明显；标注者能力变化对基于其标注数据训练的LLM性能有可见影响。
analysis.method: 25名标注者（含专家与非专家）对1021段对话进行20种社交影响力技巧的标注，并额外对150段文本进行前后两次标注以比较；结合定性与定量分析、半结构化访谈、自评调查以及LLM训练与评估。
contributions: 首次从胜任力角度系统研究标注过程对标注者能力的影响
发现标注过程能提升标注者能力，且专家受益更多，并影响下游LLM性能
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述研究设计。
limitations: 样本量较小（25名标注者），可能限制泛化性
仅针对社交影响力识别任务，其他主观标注任务可能不同
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 标注过程本身能提升标注者的能力，尤其对专家更明显，并影响基于标注数据训练的LLM性能。

papers.title: CrossWeaver: Cross-modal Weaving for Arbitrary-Modality Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Multimodal semantic segmentation has shown great potential in leveraging complementary information across diverse sensing modalities. However, existing approaches often rely on carefully designed fusion strategies that either use modality-specific adaptations or rely on loosely coupled interactions, thereby limiting flexibility and resulting in less effective cross-modal coordination. Moreover, these methods often struggle to balance efficient information exchange with preserving the unique characteristics of each modality across different modality combinations. To address these challenges, we propose CrossWeaver, a simple yet effective multimodal fusion framework for arbitrary-modality semantic segmentation. Its core is a Modality Interaction Block (MIB), which enables selective and reliability-aware cross-modal interaction within the encoder, while a lightweight Seam-Aligned Fusion (SAF) module further aggregates the enhanced features. Extensive experiments on multiple multimodal semantic segmentation benchmarks demonstrate that our framework achieves state-of-the-art performance with minimal additional parameters and strong generalization to unseen modality combinations.

analysis.tldr: 提出CrossWeaver框架，通过模态交互块和融合模块实现任意模态组合的语义分割，性能达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态语义分割方法依赖特定模态的融合策略或松散耦合交互，灵活性和跨模态协调效果有限，且难以平衡信息交换与模态特性保持。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个简单有效的多模态融合框架，支持任意模态组合的语义分割，同时实现高效信息交换并保留各模态独特特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CrossWeaver框架，核心是编码器中的模态交互块（MIB）实现选择性且可靠性感知的跨模态交互，以及轻量级Seam-Aligned Fusion（SAF）模块聚合增强特征。
contributions: 提出CrossWeaver框架，支持任意模态组合的语义分割，无需模态特定设计。
设计模态交互块（MIB）实现选择性、可靠性感知的跨模态交互。
提出Seam-Aligned Fusion（SAF）模块轻量级聚合增强特征。
analysis.experiments: 在多个多模态语义分割基准上达到SOTA性能，参数增加极少，且对未见过的模态组合泛化能力强。
limitations: 可能对极端模态组合或噪声数据鲁棒性需进一步验证。
框架在极多模态场景下的计算开销未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CrossWeaver框架，通过模态交互块和融合模块实现任意模态组合的语义分割，性能达到SOTA。

papers.title: AgentHazard: A Benchmark for Evaluating Harmful Behavior in Computer-Use Agents
papers.abstract: Computer-use agents extend language models from text generation to persistent action over tools, files, and execution environments. Unlike chat systems, they maintain state across interactions and translate intermediate outputs into concrete actions. This creates a distinct safety challenge in that harmful behavior may emerge through sequences of individually plausible steps, including intermediate actions that appear locally acceptable but collectively lead to unauthorized actions. We present \textbf{AgentHazard}, a benchmark for evaluating harmful behavior in computer-use agents. AgentHazard contains \textbf{2,653} instances spanning diverse risk categories and attack strategies. Each instance pairs a harmful objective with a sequence of operational steps that are locally legitimate but jointly induce unsafe behavior. The benchmark evaluates whether agents can recognize and interrupt harm arising from accumulated context, repeated tool use, intermediate actions, and dependencies across steps. We evaluate AgentHazard on Claude Code, OpenClaw, and IFlow using mostly open or openly deployable models from the Qwen3, Kimi, GLM, and DeepSeek families. Our experimental results indicate that current systems remain highly vulnerable. In particular, when powered by Qwen3-Coder, Claude Code exhibits an attack success rate of \textbf{73.63\%}, suggesting that model alignment alone does not reliably guarantee the safety of autonomous agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出AgentHazard基准，评估计算机使用代理在序列操作中累积有害行为的安全性，发现当前系统高度脆弱。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算机使用代理与聊天系统不同，它们维护状态并执行具体操作，可能通过一系列看似合理的步骤产生有害行为，现有安全评估缺乏对此类序列风险的关注。
analysis.problem: 评估计算机使用代理在序列操作中识别和中断累积有害行为的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前系统（如Claude Code配合Qwen3-Coder）的攻击成功率高达73.63%，表明模型对齐无法可靠保证自主代理的安全性。
analysis.method: 构建包含2,653个实例的基准AgentHazard，覆盖多种风险类别和攻击策略，每个实例将有害目标与一系列局部合法但联合导致不安全行为的操作步骤配对。
contributions: 提出AgentHazard基准，系统评估计算机使用代理的序列有害行为。
实验揭示当前主流代理系统在累积有害行为面前高度脆弱。
analysis.experiments: 在Claude Code、OpenClaw和IFlow上评估，使用Qwen3、Kimi、GLM、DeepSeek等模型，报告了攻击成功率等指标。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实世界攻击场景。
评估主要基于开源或可部署模型，商业闭源模型表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AgentHazard基准，评估计算机使用代理在序列操作中累积有害行为的安全性，发现当前系统高度脆弱。

papers.title: Learning from Synthetic Data via Provenance-Based Input Gradient Guidance
papers.abstract: Learning methods using synthetic data have attracted attention as an effective approach for increasing the diversity of training data while reducing collection costs, thereby improving the robustness of model discrimination. However, many existing methods improve robustness only indirectly through the diversification of training samples and do not explicitly teach the model which regions in the input space truly contribute to discrimination; consequently, the model may learn spurious correlations caused by synthesis biases and artifacts. Motivated by this limitation, this paper proposes a learning framework that uses provenance information obtained during the training data synthesis process, indicating whether each region in the input space originates from the target object, as an auxiliary supervisory signal to promote the acquisition of representations focused on target regions. Specifically, input gradients are decomposed based on information about target and non-target regions during synthesis, and input gradient guidance is introduced to suppress gradients over non-target regions. This suppresses the model's reliance on non-target regions and directly promotes the learning of discriminative representations for target regions. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and generality of the proposed method across multiple tasks and modalities, including weakly supervised object localization, spatio-temporal action localization, and image classification.

analysis.tldr: 利用合成数据中的来源信息引导输入梯度，抑制非目标区域依赖，提升模型判别鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成数据方法仅通过增加样本多样性间接提升鲁棒性，未明确教导模型哪些输入区域真正有助于判别，导致模型可能学习到合成偏差和伪影带来的虚假关联。
analysis.problem: 如何利用合成数据中的来源信息（目标/非目标区域标注）显式引导模型关注目标区域，抑制非目标区域的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法仅间接提升鲁棒性，模型可能学习合成偏差和伪影导致的虚假关联。
analysis.method: 提出基于来源的输入梯度引导框架：利用合成过程中目标与非目标区域信息分解输入梯度，引入梯度引导项抑制非目标区域梯度，从而促进模型学习目标区域的判别性表征。
contributions: 提出利用合成数据来源信息作为辅助监督信号的新框架。
设计输入梯度引导方法，直接抑制非目标区域依赖，提升目标区域表征学习。
在弱监督目标定位、时空动作定位和图像分类等多个任务上验证了有效性和通用性。
analysis.experiments: 在弱监督目标定位、时空动作定位和图像分类任务上进行了实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 依赖合成过程中的来源信息标注，可能限制应用范围。
未讨论对复杂合成场景（如多目标、遮挡）的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用合成数据中的来源信息引导输入梯度，抑制非目标区域依赖，提升模型判别鲁棒性。

papers.title: MMTalker: Multiresolution 3D Talking Head Synthesis with Multimodal Feature Fusion
papers.abstract: Speech-driven three-dimensional (3D) facial animation synthesis aims to build a mapping from one-dimensional (1D) speech signals to time-varying 3D facial motion signals. Current methods still face challenges in maintaining lip-sync accuracy and producing realistic facial expressions, primarily due to the highly ill-posed nature of this cross-modal mapping. In this paper, we introduce a novel 3D audio-driven facial animation synthesis method through multi-resolution representation and multi-modal feature fusion, called MMTalker which can accurately reconstruct the rich details of 3D facial motion. We first achieve the continuous representation of 3D face with details by mesh parameterization and non-uniform differentiable sampling. The mesh parameterization technique establishes the correspondence between UV plane and 3D facial mesh and is used to offer ground truth for the continuous learning. Differentiable non-uniform sampling enables precise facial detail acquisition by setting learnable sampling probability in each triangular face. Next, we employ residual graph convolutional network and dual cross-attention mechanism to extract discriminative facial motion feature from multiple input modalities. This proposed multimodal fusion strategy takes full use of the hierarchical features of speech and the explicit spatiotemporal geometric features of facial mesh. Finally, a lightweight regression network predicts the vertex-wise geometric displacements of the synthesized talking face by jointly processing the sampled points in the canonical UV space and the encoded facial motion features. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that significant improvements are achieved over state-of-the-art methods, especially in the synchronization accuracy of lip and eye movements.

analysis.tldr: MMTalker通过多分辨率表示和多模态特征融合实现高精度3D说话头合成，在唇部和眼部同步上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 语音驱动3D面部动画合成中，跨模态映射的病态性导致唇同步精度不足和面部表情不真实，现有方法难以同时兼顾细节重建和多模态信息利用。
analysis.problem: 如何从1D语音信号准确重建具有丰富细节的3D面部运动，并提升唇部和眼部同步精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MMTalker，包含三部分：1) 通过网格参数化和非均匀可微采样实现连续细节表示；2) 使用残差图卷积网络和双交叉注意力机制从多模态输入中提取判别性面部运动特征；3) 轻量回归网络联合处理UV空间采样点和编码特征预测顶点位移。
contributions: 提出多分辨率表示方法，通过网格参数化和非均匀可微采样实现3D面部细节的连续学习。
设计多模态特征融合策略，结合残差图卷积和双交叉注意力，有效利用语音层次特征和面部时空几何特征。
在唇部和眼部同步精度上显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D面部网格标注，泛化到不同人脸拓扑需验证。
非均匀采样计算开销可能较大，实时性待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MMTalker通过多分辨率表示和多模态特征融合实现高精度3D说话头合成，在唇部和眼部同步上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Modality-Specific Hierarchical Enhancement for RGB-D Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Camouflaged object detection (COD) is challenging due to high target-background similarity, and recent methods address this by complementarily using RGB-D texture and geometry cues. However, RGB-D COD methods still underutilize modality-specific cues, which limits fusion quality. We believe this is because RGB and depth features are fused directly after backbone extraction without modality-specific enhancement. To address this limitation, we propose MHENet, an RGB-D COD framework that performs modality-specific hierarchical enhancement and adaptive fusion of RGB and depth features. Specifically, we introduce a Texture Hierarchical Enhancement Module (THEM) to amplify subtle texture variations by extracting high-frequency information and a Geometry Hierarchical Enhancement Module (GHEM) to enhance geometric structures via learnable gradient extraction, while preserving cross-scale semantic consistency. Finally, an Adaptive Dynamic Fusion Module (ADFM) adaptively fuses the enhanced texture and geometry features with spatially varying weights. Experiments on four benchmarks demonstrate that MHENet surpasses 16 state-of-the-art methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Code is available at https://github.com/afdsgh/MHENet.

analysis.tldr: 提出MHENet，通过模态特定分层增强和自适应融合提升RGB-D伪装目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: RGB-D伪装目标检测中，现有方法未充分利用模态特定线索，导致融合质量受限。
analysis.problem: RGB和深度特征在骨干提取后直接融合，缺乏模态特定增强，限制了检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出RGB和深度特征直接融合会限制融合质量，因为缺乏针对纹理和几何结构的模态特定增强。
analysis.method: 提出MHENet框架，包含纹理分层增强模块（THEM）提取高频信息放大细微纹理变化，几何分层增强模块（GHEM）通过可学习梯度提取增强几何结构，以及自适应动态融合模块（ADFM）自适应融合增强后的特征。
contributions: 提出模态特定分层增强方法，分别增强RGB纹理和深度几何特征。
设计自适应动态融合模块，根据空间变化权重融合增强特征。
在四个基准上超越16种SOTA方法，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集上进行了定性和定量实验，与16种SOTA方法比较，MHENet表现更优。
limitations: 可能对深度图质量敏感，低质量深度图下性能下降。
计算开销可能较大，因包含多个增强模块。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MHENet，通过模态特定分层增强和自适应融合提升RGB-D伪装目标检测性能。

papers.title: PolyReal: A Benchmark for Real-World Polymer Science Workflows
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general domains but struggle with complex, real-world science. We posit that polymer science, an interdisciplinary field spanning chemistry, physics, biology, and engineering, is an ideal high-stakes testbed due to its diverse multimodal data. Yet, existing benchmarks related to polymer science largely overlook real-world workflows, limiting their practical utility and failing to systematically evaluate MLLMs across the full, practice-grounded lifecycle of experimentation. We introduce PolyReal, a novel multimodal benchmark grounded in real-world scientific practices to evaluate MLLMs on the full lifecycle of polymer experimentation. It covers five critical capabilities: (1) foundational knowledge application; (2) lab safety analysis; (3) experiment mechanism reasoning; (4) raw data extraction; and (5) performance & application exploration. Our evaluation of leading MLLMs on PolyReal reveals a capability imbalance. While models perform well on knowledge-intensive reasoning (e.g., Experiment Mechanism Reasoning), they drop sharply on practice-based tasks (e.g., Lab Safety Analysis and Raw Data Extraction). This exposes a severe gap between abstract scientific knowledge and its practical, context-dependent application, showing that these real-world tasks remain challenging for MLLMs. Thus, PolyReal helps address this evaluation gap and provides a practical benchmark for assessing AI systems in real-world scientific workflows.

analysis.tldr: PolyReal 是一个面向聚合物科学真实工作流程的多模态基准，揭示了 MLLM 在实践任务上的严重能力失衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有聚合物科学基准多忽略真实工作流程，无法系统评估 MLLM 在完整实验生命周期中的表现，而聚合物科学作为跨学科领域，其多模态数据为评估提供了高难度测试床。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个基于真实科学实践、覆盖聚合物实验全生命周期的多模态基准，以系统评估 MLLM 在知识应用、安全分析、机制推理、数据提取和性能探索等关键能力上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，领先 MLLM 在知识密集型推理（如实验机制推理）上表现良好，但在基于实践的任务（如实验室安全分析和原始数据提取）上性能急剧下降，暴露出抽象科学知识与实际上下文相关应用之间的严重差距。
analysis.method: 构建 PolyReal 基准，涵盖五个关键能力：基础知识应用、实验室安全分析、实验机制推理、原始数据提取、性能与应用探索，并基于真实科学实践设计任务。
contributions: 提出了 PolyReal，首个基于真实世界聚合物科学工作流程的多模态基准，覆盖实验全生命周期。
系统评估了领先 MLLM，揭示了其在实践任务上的能力失衡，并指出了抽象知识与实际应用之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明对领先 MLLM 进行了评估并发现了能力失衡。
limitations: 基准可能仅覆盖聚合物科学领域，泛化到其他科学领域需验证。
未提供模型具体性能数值或对比基线，难以量化差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PolyReal 是一个面向聚合物科学真实工作流程的多模态基准，揭示了 MLLM 在实践任务上的严重能力失衡。

papers.title: R2E-VID: Two-Stage Robust Routing via Temporal Gating for Elastic Edge-Cloud Video Inference
papers.abstract: With the rapid growth of large-scale video analytics applications, edge-cloud collaborative systems have become the dominant paradigm for real-time inference. However, existing approaches often fail to dynamically adapt to heterogeneous video content and fluctuating resource conditions, resulting in suboptimal routing efficiency and high computational costs. In this paper, we propose R2E-VID, a two-stage robust routing framework via temporal gating for elastic edge-cloud video inference. In the first stage, R2E-VID introduces a temporal gating mechanism that models the temporal consistency and motion dynamics of incoming video streams to predict the optimal routing pattern for each segment. This enables adaptive partitioning of inference workloads between edge and cloud nodes, achieving fine-grained spatiotemporal elasticity. In the second stage, a robust routing optimization module refines the allocation through multi-model adaptation, jointly minimizing inference delay and resource consumption under dynamic network and workload variations. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that R2E-VID achieves up to 60% reduction in overall cost compared to cloud-centric baselines, and delivers 35-45% lower delay while improving inference accuracy by 2-7% over state-of-the-art edge-cloud solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段鲁棒路由框架R2E-VID，通过时序门控实现边缘-云视频推理的弹性负载分配，显著降低延迟和成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模视频分析应用中，边缘-云协作系统需动态适应异构视频内容和波动资源条件，现有方法路由效率低、计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何动态且鲁棒地在边缘和云节点间分配视频推理工作负载，以最小化延迟和资源消耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用时序门控机制建模视频流的时间一致性和运动动态，预测每段的最优路由模式；第二阶段通过鲁棒路由优化模块，结合多模型适应，在动态网络和负载变化下联合优化延迟和资源消耗。
contributions: 提出时序门控机制，利用时间一致性和运动动态实现细粒度时空弹性路由。
设计两阶段鲁棒路由框架，联合优化推理延迟和资源消耗，适应动态环境。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上实验，相比云中心基线总成本降低60%，相比最先进边缘-云方案延迟降低35-45%，推理准确率提升2-7%。
limitations: 可能依赖视频流的时间一致性假设，对突发场景适应性有限。
未提及多节点扩展或大规模部署的通信开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段鲁棒路由框架R2E-VID，通过时序门控实现边缘-云视频推理的弹性负载分配，显著降低延迟和成本。

papers.title: BEVPredFormer: Spatio-temporal Attention for BEV Instance Prediction in Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: A robust awareness of how dynamic scenes evolve is essential for Autonomous Driving systems, as they must accurately detect, track, and predict the behaviour of surrounding obstacles. Traditional perception pipelines that rely on modular architectures tend to suffer from cumulative errors and latency. Instance Prediction models provide a unified solution, performing Bird's-Eye-View segmentation and motion estimation across current and future frames using information directly obtained from different sensors. However, a key challenge in these models lies in the effective processing of the dense spatial and temporal information inherent in dynamic driving environments. This level of complexity demands architectures capable of capturing fine-grained motion patterns and long-range dependencies without compromising real-time performance. We introduce BEVPredFormer, a novel camera-only architecture for BEV instance prediction that uses attention-based temporal processing to improve temporal and spatial comprehension of the scene and relies on an attention-based 3D projection of the camera information. BEVPredFormer employs a recurrent-free design that incorporates gated transformer layers, divided spatio-temporal attention mechanisms, and multi-scale head tasks. Additionally, we incorporate a difference-guided feature extraction module that enhances temporal representations. Extensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of each architectural component. When evaluated on the nuScenes dataset, BEVPredFormer was on par or surpassed State-Of-The-Art methods, highlighting its potential for robust and efficient Autonomous Driving perception.

analysis.tldr: 提出BEVPredFormer，一种基于注意力机制的纯视觉BEV实例预测架构，在nuScenes上达到或超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要准确感知动态场景，但传统模块化感知管线存在累积误差和延迟问题，而现有实例预测模型在处理密集时空信息时面临挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种纯视觉架构，能够有效处理BEV实例预测中的密集时空信息，同时保持实时性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BEVPredFormer，采用无循环设计，包含门控Transformer层、分离的时空注意力机制、多尺度头任务，以及差异引导特征提取模块，并基于注意力机制进行3D投影。
contributions: 提出一种纯视觉BEV实例预测架构BEVPredFormer，利用注意力机制处理时空信息。
设计差异引导特征提取模块增强时序表示，并通过消融实验验证各组件有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上评估，与SOTA方法持平或超越，并进行了广泛的消融研究。
limitations: 仅基于nuScenes单一数据集评估，泛化性待验证。
未讨论计算复杂度或实时性能的具体指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BEVPredFormer，一种基于注意力机制的纯视觉BEV实例预测架构，在nuScenes上达到或超越SOTA。

papers.title: Towards Intelligent Energy Security: A Unified Spatio-Temporal and Graph Learning Framework for Scalable Electricity Theft Detection in Smart Grids
papers.abstract: Electricity theft and non-technical losses (NTLs) remain critical challenges in modern smart grids, causing significant economic losses and compromising grid reliability. This study introduces the SmartGuard Energy Intelligence System (SGEIS), an integrated artificial intelligence framework for electricity theft detection and intelligent energy monitoring.
