analysis.problem: 缺乏一个可扩展、有结构化真值的基准来评估健康智能体在长时间跨度的多源轨迹上的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DB智能体（48-58%）显著优于记忆增强RAG基线（30-38%），差距集中在需要多跳推理和证据归因的比较和解释类查询上。
analysis.method: 事件驱动的合成框架：为100个合成用户生成1-5年轨迹，包含健康档案、多阶段叙事计划、日常设备测量、周期性检查记录和事件日志；指标动态由离散事件驱动，使用sigmoid-onset指数衰减核，结合LLM规划稀疏语义和算法模拟密集指标。
contributions: 提出ESL-Bench，一个事件驱动的合成纵向健康基准，包含100个合成用户和100个评估查询。
提供可编程计算的真值，支持五种查询类型（查找、趋势、比较、异常、解释）和三个难度级别。
评估13种方法，揭示DB智能体在需要多跳推理的查询上显著优于记忆增强RAG。
analysis.experiments: 评估了13种方法，包括LLM+工具、DB原生智能体和记忆增强RAG，在100个合成用户的100个查询上测试。
limitations: 合成数据可能无法完全反映真实世界的复杂性和噪声。
基准仅覆盖健康领域，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个事件驱动的合成纵向健康基准ESL-Bench，用于评估健康智能体在长时间跨度的多源轨迹推理能力。

papers.title: STRNet: Visual Navigation with Spatio-Temporal Representation through Dynamic Graph Aggregation
papers.abstract: Visual navigation requires the robot to reach a specified goal such as an image, based on a sequence of first-person visual observations. While recent learning-based approaches have made significant progress, they often focus on improving policy heads or decision strategies while relying on simplistic feature encoders and temporal pooling to represent visual input. This leads to the loss of fine-grained spatial and temporal structure, ultimately limiting accurate action prediction and progress estimation. In this paper, we propose a unified spatio-temporal representation framework that enhances visual encoding for robotic navigation. Our approach extracts features from both image sequences and goal observations, and fuses them using the designed spatio-temporal fusion module. This module performs spatial graph reasoning within each frame and models temporal dynamics using a hybrid temporal shift module combined with multi-resolution difference-aware convolution. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach consistently improves navigation performance and offers a generalizable visual backbone for goal-conditioned control. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/hren20/STRNet}{https://github.com/hren20/STRNet}.

analysis.tldr: 提出STRNet，通过动态图聚合的时空表示增强视觉导航中的特征编码，提升导航性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉导航方法多关注策略头或决策机制，而使用简单的特征编码器和时序池化，丢失了细粒度的空间和时间结构，限制了动作预测和进度估计的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计统一的时空表示框架，以增强视觉导航中视觉编码的细粒度空间和时间结构信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STRNet，包含时空融合模块：在每帧内进行空间图推理，并通过混合时间移位模块结合多分辨率差分感知卷积建模时间动态。
contributions: 提出统一的时空表示框架STRNet，增强视觉导航的视觉编码。
设计时空融合模块，结合空间图推理和混合时间移位模块，有效捕获细粒度时空结构。
实验表明该方法持续提升导航性能，并提供可泛化的视觉骨干网络。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定导航场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
计算复杂度可能较高，实时性需评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STRNet，通过动态图聚合的时空表示增强视觉导航中的特征编码，提升导航性能。

papers.title: NavCrafter: Exploring 3D Scenes from a Single Image
papers.abstract: Creating flexible 3D scenes from a single image is vital when direct 3D data acquisition is costly or impractical. We introduce NavCrafter, a novel framework that explores 3D scenes from a single image by synthesizing novel-view video sequences with camera controllability and temporal-spatial consistency. NavCrafter leverages video diffusion models to capture rich 3D priors and adopts a geometry-aware expansion strategy to progressively extend scene coverage. To enable controllable multi-view synthesis, we introduce a multi-stage camera control mechanism that conditions diffusion models with diverse trajectories via dual-branch camera injection and attention modulation. We further propose a collision-aware camera trajectory planner and an enhanced 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) pipeline with depth-aligned supervision, structural regularization and refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NavCrafter achieves state-of-the-art novel-view synthesis under large viewpoint shifts and substantially improves 3D reconstruction fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 从单张图像生成可控、时空一致的3D场景探索视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 直接获取3D数据成本高或不可行，需要从单张图像灵活创建3D场景。
analysis.problem: 从单张图像生成具有相机可控性和时空一致性的新颖视角视频序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用视频扩散模型捕获3D先验，结合几何感知扩展策略逐步覆盖场景；提出多阶段相机控制机制（双分支相机注入和注意力调制）实现可控多视角合成；引入碰撞感知相机轨迹规划器和增强的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）管线（含深度对齐监督、结构正则化和细化）。
contributions: 提出NavCrafter框架，从单张图像合成可控、时空一致的新颖视角视频。
设计多阶段相机控制机制和碰撞感知轨迹规划器。
增强3DGS管线，提升3D重建保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，表明在大视角变化下达到SOTA新颖视角合成，并显著提升3D重建保真度。
limitations: 可能依赖视频扩散模型的质量和泛化能力。
碰撞感知规划器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从单张图像生成可控、时空一致的3D场景探索视频。

papers.title: The Ideation Bottleneck: Decomposing the Quality Gap Between AI-Generated and Human Economics Research
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI systems can now generate complete economics research papers, but they substantially underperform human-authored publications in head-to-head comparisons. This paper decomposes the quality gap into two independent components: research idea quality and execution quality. Using a two-model ensemble of fine-tuned language models trained on publication decisions (Gong, Li, and Zhou, 2026) to evaluate idea quality and a comprehensive six-dimension rubric assessed by Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite -- the same model family used as the APE tournament judge, ensuring methodological consistency -- to evaluate execution quality, we analyze 953 economics papers -- 912 AI-generated papers from the APE project and 41 human papers published in the American Economic Review and AEJ: Economic Policy. The idea quality gap is large (Cohen's d = 2.23, p < 0.001), with human papers achieving 47.1% mean ensemble exceptional probability versus 16.5% for AI. The execution quality gap is also significant but smaller (d = 0.90, p < 0.001), with human papers scoring 4.38/5.0 versus 3.84. Idea quality accounts for approximately 71% of the overall quality difference, with execution contributing 29%. The largest execution weakness is mechanism analysis depth (d = 1.43); no significant difference is found on robustness. We document that 74% of AI papers employ difference-in-differences, and only 7 AI papers (0.8%) surpass the median human paper on both idea and execution quality simultaneously. The primary bottleneck to competitive AI-generated economics research remains ideation.

analysis.tldr: AI生成经济学论文与人类论文的质量差距主要源于研究想法质量，而非执行质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI系统已能生成完整经济学论文，但在直接比较中显著落后于人类发表论文，理解质量差距的来源对于提升AI研究能力至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化并分解AI生成与人类经济学论文之间的质量差距，识别主要瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 想法质量差距巨大（Cohen's d=2.23），执行质量差距较小（d=0.90），想法质量解释了约71%的整体质量差异；74%的AI论文使用双重差分法，仅0.8%的AI论文在想法和执行上同时超过人类中位数。
analysis.method: 使用两个微调语言模型组成的集成模型评估想法质量，采用Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite的六维度评分标准评估执行质量，分析953篇经济学论文。
contributions: 首次将AI与人类经济学论文的质量差距分解为想法质量和执行质量两个独立成分。
量化了想法质量是主要瓶颈，占质量差距的71%。
提供了大规模实证分析，涵盖912篇AI生成论文和41篇人类论文。
analysis.experiments: 分析了953篇经济学论文，包括912篇AI生成论文（来自APE项目）和41篇人类论文（来自AER和AEJ: Economic Policy），使用集成模型和Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite进行评估。
limitations: 评估模型可能无法完全捕捉研究想法的创新性。
人类论文样本量较小（41篇），可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI生成经济学论文与人类论文的质量差距主要源于研究想法质量，而非执行质量。

papers.title: Breaking Validity-Induced Boundaries to Expand Algorithm Search Space: A Two-Stage AST-Based Operator for LLM-Driven Automated Heuristic Evolution
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based automated heuristic design (AHD) has shown great potential in discovering efficient heuristics. Most existing LLM-AHD frameworks use semantic evolutionary operators that rely entirely on the LLM's pre-trained knowledge. These one-stage methods strictly require the generated code to be valid during the operation and often rely on a ``thought-code'' representation. We argue that this end-to-end generation fundamentally limits the exploration ability within the algorithm search space. In this paper, we propose a two-stage, structure-based evolutionary operator for LLM-AHD. In the first stage, our approach directly performs crossover and mutation on the Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) of the heuristic code, intentionally generating diverse but often invalid structural variants. In the second stage, the LLM is employed to repair these invalid heuristics into executable, high-quality code. Depending on the underlying framework, either the raw invalid variants or the repaired heuristics are integrated into the population to preserve potential structural patterns. We demonstrate that the proposed operator can significantly enhance the search ability of state-of-the-art LLM-AHD algorithms, such as EoH-S. Experimental results on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) and the Online Bin Packing Problem (OBP) show that our method effectively improves both optimization performance and convergence speed.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段AST进化算子，通过故意生成无效代码再修复来扩展LLM自动启发式搜索空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动启发式设计方法依赖语义进化算子，要求生成代码必须有效，限制了算法搜索空间的探索能力。
analysis.problem: 如何突破LLM-AHD中代码必须有效的约束，扩大搜索空间以发现更优启发式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段结构进化算子：第一阶段在AST上直接交叉和变异，生成多样但通常无效的结构变体；第二阶段用LLM修复为可执行高质量代码。
contributions: 提出两阶段AST进化算子，突破有效性边界，扩展搜索空间。
在TSP和OBP上验证了方法能提升优化性能和收敛速度。
analysis.experiments: 在旅行商问题和在线装箱问题上进行实验，显示方法有效提升优化性能和收敛速度。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM修复能力，修复失败时影响性能。
AST操作可能引入过多无效变体，增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段AST进化算子，通过故意生成无效代码再修复来扩展LLM自动启发式搜索空间。

papers.title: MMPhysVideo: Scaling Physical Plausibility in Video Generation via Joint Multimodal Modeling
papers.abstract: Despite advancements in generating visually stunning content, video diffusion models (VDMs) often yield physically inconsistent results due to pixel-only reconstruction. To address this, we propose MMPhysVideo, the first framework to scale physical plausibility in video generation through joint multimodal modeling. We recast perceptual cues, specifically semantics, geometry, and spatio-temporal trajectory, into a unified pseudo-RGB format, enabling VDMs to directly capture complex physical dynamics. To mitigate cross-modal interference, we propose a Bidirectionally Controlled Teacher architecture, which utilizes parallel branches to fully decouple RGB and perception processing and adopts two zero-initialized control links to gradually learn pixel-wise consistency. For inference efficiency, the teacher's physical prior is distilled into a single-stream student model via representation alignment. Furthermore, we present MMPhysPipe, a scalable data curation and annotation pipeline tailored for constructing physics-rich multimodal datasets. MMPhysPipe employs a vision-language model (VLM) guided by a chain-of-visual-evidence rule to pinpoint physical subjects, enabling expert models to extract multi-granular perceptual information. Without additional inference costs, MMPhysVideo consistently improves physical plausibility and visual quality over advanced models across various benchmarks and achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出MMPhysVideo框架，通过联合多模态建模提升视频生成的物理合理性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型虽能生成视觉上令人满意的内容，但由于仅基于像素重建，常产生物理上不一致的结果，限制了其在科学模拟、自动驾驶等对物理真实性要求高的场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 视频生成中物理合理性不足，现有方法难以有效建模复杂物理动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将语义、几何和时空轨迹等感知线索统一为伪RGB格式，使VDM直接捕获物理动态；提出双向控制教师架构解耦RGB与感知处理，并通过零初始化控制链接学习像素级一致性；利用表示对齐将教师先验蒸馏到单流学生模型；构建MMPhysPipe数据流水线，使用VLM和链式视觉证据规则提取多粒度感知信息。
contributions: 首个通过联合多模态建模扩展视频生成物理合理性的框架MMPhysVideo。
提出双向控制教师架构和蒸馏策略，实现高效推理且保持物理合理性。
构建可扩展的数据流水线MMPhysPipe，用于生成富含物理信息的多模态数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，MMPhysVideo一致提升了物理合理性和视觉质量，并达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM和专家模型的质量，数据流水线存在误差累积风险。
物理合理性提升的量化评估标准可能不够全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMPhysVideo框架，通过联合多模态建模提升视频生成的物理合理性。

papers.title: QAPruner: Quantization-Aware Vision Token Pruning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong reasoning ability, but their high computational and memory costs hinder deployment in resource-constrained settings. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) and vision token pruning are standard compression techniques, they are usually treated as independent optimizations. In this paper, we show that these two techniques are strongly coupled: naively applying semantic-based token pruning to PTQ-optimized MLLMs can discard activation outliers that are important for numerical stability and thus worsen quantization errors in low-bit regimes (\textit{e.g.}, W4A4). To address this issue, we propose a quantization-aware vision token pruning framework. Our method introduces a lightweight hybrid sensitivity metric that combines simulated group-wise quantization error with outlier intensity. By combining this metric with standard semantic relevance scores, the method retains tokens that are both semantically informative and robust to quantization. Experiments on standard LLaVA architectures show that our method consistently outperforms naive integration baselines. At an aggressive pruning ratio that retains only 12.5\% of visual tokens, our framework improves accuracy by 2.24\% over the baseline and even surpasses dense quantization without pruning. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first method that explicitly co-optimizes vision token pruning and PTQ for accurate low-bit MLLM inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出量化感知的视觉令牌剪枝框架QAPruner，联合优化剪枝与后训练量化，在低比特MLLM中提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型计算和内存成本高，后训练量化与视觉令牌剪枝是常用压缩技术，但两者独立优化时，语义剪枝会丢弃对数值稳定性重要的激活异常值，加剧低比特量化误差。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化视觉令牌剪枝与后训练量化，避免剪枝破坏量化稳定性，实现低比特MLLM的高效推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义令牌剪枝与PTQ强耦合：朴素剪枝会丢弃激活异常值，导致低比特（如W4A4）量化误差增大。
analysis.method: 提出量化感知剪枝框架，引入轻量混合敏感性指标，结合模拟分组量化误差与异常值强度，并与语义相关性分数融合，保留语义重要且对量化鲁棒的令牌。
contributions: 首次明确视觉令牌剪枝与PTQ的耦合问题，并量化其负面影响。
提出量化感知剪枝框架，通过混合敏感性指标联合优化剪枝与量化。
在LLaVA架构上验证，仅保留12.5%令牌时精度提升2.24%，超越无剪枝的密集量化。
analysis.experiments: 在标准LLaVA架构上实验，与朴素集成基线对比，在激进剪枝比（12.5%令牌）下精度提升2.24%，并超越无剪枝的密集量化。
limitations: 仅验证了LLaVA架构，可能不适用于其他MLLM架构。
混合敏感性指标的计算开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量化感知的视觉令牌剪枝框架QAPruner，联合优化剪枝与后训练量化，在低比特MLLM中提升精度。

papers.title: ChatSVA: Bridging SVA Generation for Hardware Verification via Task-Specific LLMs
papers.abstract: Functional verification consumes over 50% of the IC development lifecycle, where SystemVerilog Assertions (SVAs) are indispensable for formal property verification and enhanced simulation-based debugging. However, manual SVA authoring is labor-intensive and error-prone. While Large Language Models (LLMs) show promise, their direct deployment is hindered by low functional accuracy and a severe scarcity of domain-specific data. To address these challenges, we introduce ChatSVA, an end-to-end SVA generation system built upon a multi-agent framework. At its core, the AgentBridge platform enables this multi-agent approach by systematically generating high-purity datasets, overcoming the data scarcity inherent to few-shot scenarios. Evaluated on 24 RTL designs, ChatSVA achieves 98.66% syntax and 96.12% functional pass rates, generating 139.5 SVAs per design with 82.50% function coverage. This represents a 33.3 percentage point improvement in functional correctness and an over 11x enhancement in function coverage compared to the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA). ChatSVA not only sets a new SOTA in automated SVA generation but also establishes a robust framework for solving long-chain reasoning problems in few-shot, domain-specific scenarios. An online service has been publicly released at https://www.nctieda.com/CHATDV.html.

analysis.tldr: ChatSVA 通过多智能体框架和 AgentBridge 平台生成高质量数据集，在硬件验证的 SystemVerilog Assertion 生成任务上显著提升功能正确率和覆盖率。
analysis.research_motivation: 功能验证占据 IC 开发周期超 50%，手动编写 SVA 耗时易错，而直接使用 LLM 面临功能准确率低和领域数据稀缺的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用 LLM 在数据稀缺的领域自动生成高功能正确率和覆盖率的 SystemVerilog Assertions。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多智能体框架的端到端 SVA 生成系统，核心是 AgentBridge 平台，通过系统生成高纯度数据集克服少样本场景下的数据稀缺。
contributions: 提出 ChatSVA，一个多智能体驱动的 SVA 自动生成系统，在 24 个 RTL 设计上达到 98.66% 语法通过率和 96.12% 功能通过率。
相比之前 SOTA，功能正确率提升 33.3 个百分点，功能覆盖率提升超过 11 倍，并建立了解决少样本领域长链推理问题的框架。
analysis.experiments: 在 24 个 RTL 设计上评估，报告了语法通过率、功能通过率、生成 SVA 数量和功能覆盖率。
limitations: 可能仅在特定 RTL 设计上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
多智能体框架的复杂性和计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChatSVA 通过多智能体框架和 AgentBridge 平台生成高质量数据集，在硬件验证的 SystemVerilog Assertion 生成任务上显著提升功能正确率和覆盖率。

papers.title: Significance and Stability Analysis of Gene-Environment Interaction using RGxEStat
papers.abstract: Genotype-by-Environment (GxE) interactions influence the performance of genotypes across diverse environments, reducing the predictability of phenotypes in target environments. In-depth analysis of GxE interactions facilitates the identification of how genetic advantages or defects are expressed or suppressed under specific environmental conditions, thereby enabling genetic selection and enhancing breeding practices. This paper introduces two key models for GxE interaction research. Specifically, it includes significance analysis based on the mixed effect model to determine whether genes or GxE interactions significantly affect phenotypic traits; stability analysis, which further investigates the interactive relationships between genes and environments, as well as the relative superiority or inferiority of genotypes across environments. Additionally, this paper presents RGxEStat, a lightweight interactive tool, which is developed by the authors and integrates the construction, solution, and visualization of the aforementioned models. Designed to eliminate the need for breeders and agronomists to learn complex SAS or R programming, RGxEStat provides a user-friendly interface for streamlined breeding data analysis, significantly accelerating research cycles. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/mason-ching/RGxEStat.

analysis.tldr: 提出RGxEStat工具，用于基因-环境交互作用的显著性和稳定性分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 基因-环境交互作用影响表型可预测性，但现有分析工具需要复杂的编程技能，限制了育种研究效率。
analysis.problem: 如何简化基因-环境交互作用的显著性检验和稳定性分析，降低育种人员的使用门槛。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合效应模型进行显著性分析，以及稳定性分析方法，并开发了轻量级交互工具RGxEStat集成模型构建、求解和可视化。
contributions: 提出两种关键模型：基于混合效应模型的显著性分析和稳定性分析方法。
开发RGxEStat工具，无需编程即可进行育种数据分析，加速研究周期。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的基因-环境交互数据。
工具的功能和性能未在摘要中详细评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RGxEStat工具，用于基因-环境交互作用的显著性和稳定性分析。

papers.title: CMCC-ReID: Cross-Modality Clothing-Change Person Re-Identification
papers.abstract: Person Re-Identification (ReID) faces severe challenges from modality discrepancy and clothing variation in long-term surveillance scenario. While existing studies have made significant progress in either Visible-Infrared ReID (VI-ReID) or Clothing-Change ReID (CC-ReID), real-world surveillance system often face both challenges simultaneously. To address this overlooked yet realistic problem, we define a new task, termed Cross-Modality Clothing-Change Re-Identification (CMCC-ReID), which targets pedestrian matching across variations in both modality and clothing. To advance research in this direction, we construct a new benchmark SYSU-CMCC, where each identity is captured in both visible and infrared domains with distinct outfits, reflecting the dual heterogeneity of long-term surveillance. To tackle CMCC-ReID, we propose a Progressive Identity Alignment Network (PIA) that progressively mitigates the issues of clothing variation and modality discrepancy. Specifically, a Dual-Branch Disentangling Learning (DBDL) module separates identity-related cues from clothing-related factors to achieve clothing-agnostic representation, and a Bi-Directional Prototype Learning (BPL) module performs intra-modality and inter-modality contrast in the embedding space to bridge the modality gap while further suppressing clothing interference. Extensive experiments on the SYSU-CMCC dataset demonstrate that PIA establishes a strong baseline for this new task and significantly outperforms existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态换衣行人重识别新任务、基准数据集及渐进式对齐网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有行人重识别研究分别处理模态差异或换衣问题，但实际长期监控场景中两者同时存在，缺乏统一解决方案。
analysis.problem: 解决同时存在模态差异（可见光-红外）和服装变化时的行人匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出渐进式身份对齐网络（PIA），包含双分支解耦学习模块分离身份与服装特征，以及双向原型学习模块进行模态内和模态间对比以缩小模态差距并抑制服装干扰。
contributions: 定义了跨模态换衣行人重识别（CMCC-ReID）新任务。
构建了包含可见光和红外双模态、不同服装的基准数据集SYSU-CMCC。
提出PIA网络，在SYSU-CMCC上建立强基线并显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在SYSU-CMCC数据集上进行实验，PIA显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性待考。
方法复杂度可能较高，实时性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨模态换衣行人重识别新任务、基准数据集及渐进式对齐网络。

papers.title: PaveBench: A Versatile Benchmark for Pavement Distress Perception and Interactive Vision-Language Analysis
papers.abstract: Pavement condition assessment is essential for road safety and maintenance. Existing research has made significant progress. However, most studies focus on conventional computer vision tasks such as classification, detection, and segmentation. In real-world applications, pavement inspection requires more than visual recognition. It also requires quantitative analysis, explanation, and interactive decision support. Current datasets are limited. They focus on unimodal perception. They lack support for multi-turn interaction and fact-grounded reasoning. They also do not connect perception with vision-language analysis. To address these limitations, we introduce PaveBench, a large-scale benchmark for pavement distress perception and interactive vision-language analysis on real-world highway inspection images. PaveBench supports four core tasks: classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, and vision-language question answering. It provides unified task definitions and evaluation protocols. On the visual side, PaveBench provides large-scale annotations and includes a curated hard-distractor subset for robustness evaluation. It contains a large collection of real-world pavement images. On the multimodal side, we introduce PaveVQA, a real-image question answering (QA) dataset that supports single-turn, multi-turn, and expert-corrected interactions. It covers recognition, localization, quantitative estimation, and maintenance reasoning. We evaluate several state-of-the-art methods and provide a detailed analysis. We also present a simple and effective agent-augmented visual question answering framework that integrates domain-specific models as tools alongside vision-language models. The dataset is available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/MML-Group/PaveBench.

analysis.tldr: PaveBench 是一个面向路面病害感知与交互式视觉-语言分析的大规模基准，支持分类、检测、分割和视觉问答四项任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有路面检测研究多限于传统视觉任务，缺乏对定量分析、解释和交互决策支持的能力，且现有数据集不支持多轮交互和事实推理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一的大规模基准，能够同时支持路面病害的视觉感知任务（分类、检测、分割）和交互式视觉-语言分析（单轮、多轮、专家修正问答）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了包含大量真实路面图像的大规模基准 PaveBench，提供统一任务定义和评估协议；视觉侧包含大尺度标注和困难子集；多模态侧引入 PaveVQA 数据集，支持单轮、多轮和专家修正交互；并提出了一个基于智能体增强的视觉问答框架，集成领域专用模型作为工具。
contributions: 提出了 PaveBench，一个大规模路面病害感知与交互式视觉-语言分析基准，支持四项核心任务。
引入了 PaveVQA 数据集，支持单轮、多轮和专家修正交互，覆盖识别、定位、定量估计和维护推理。
评估了多种现有方法，并提出了一个简单有效的智能体增强视觉问答框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对高速公路路面图像，泛化到其他道路类型需验证。
智能体增强框架的复杂度和实时性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PaveBench 是一个面向路面病害感知与交互式视觉-语言分析的大规模基准，支持分类、检测、分割和视觉问答四项任务。

papers.title: UNICA: A Unified Neural Framework for Controllable 3D Avatars
papers.abstract: Controllable 3D human avatars have found widespread applications in 3D games, the metaverse, and AR/VR scenarios. The conventional approach to creating such a 3D avatar requires a lengthy, intricate pipeline encompassing appearance modeling, motion planning, rigging, and physical simulation. In this paper, we introduce UNICA (UNIfied neural Controllable Avatar), a skeleton-free generative model that unifies all avatar control components into a single neural framework. Given keyboard inputs akin to video game controls, UNICA generates the next frame of a 3D avatar's geometry through an action-conditioned diffusion model operating on 2D position maps. A point transformer then maps the resulting geometry to 3D Gaussian Splatting for high-fidelity free-view rendering. Our approach naturally captures hair and loose clothing dynamics without manually designed physical simulation, and supports extra-long autoregressive generation. To the best of our knowledge, UNICA is the first model to unify the workflow of "motion planning, rigging, physical simulation, and rendering". Code is released at https://github.com/zjh21/UNICA.

analysis.tldr: 提出UNICA，首个将运动规划、蒙皮、物理模拟和渲染统一为单个神经框架的无骨架可控3D化身生成模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D化身创建流程繁琐且耗时，需要分别处理外观建模、运动规划、蒙皮和物理模拟，缺乏统一高效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将3D化身控制的所有组件（运动规划、蒙皮、物理模拟、渲染）统一到一个端到端的神经框架中，实现无骨架、高保真、支持长序列的自回归生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: UNICA：基于动作条件扩散模型在2D位置图上生成下一帧几何，再通过点变换器将几何映射到3D高斯泼溅实现自由视角渲染。
contributions: 首次统一运动规划、蒙皮、物理模拟和渲染到单个神经框架中。
无骨架设计，自然捕捉头发和宽松衣物动态，无需手动物理模拟。
支持超长自回归生成，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定输入格式（键盘控制），泛化到其他控制方式需验证。
生成质量可能受限于2D位置图表示和扩散模型效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出UNICA，首个将运动规划、蒙皮、物理模拟和渲染统一为单个神经框架的无骨架可控3D化身生成模型。

papers.title: Rubrics to Tokens: Bridging Response-level Rubrics and Token-level Rewards in Instruction Following Tasks
papers.abstract: Rubric-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a promising approach for aligning Large Language Models (LLMs) with complex, open-domain instruction following tasks. However, existing methods predominantly rely on response-level rewards, introducing severe reward sparsity and reward ambiguity problems. To address these issues, we propose Rubrics to Tokens (RTT), a novel rubric-based RL framework that bridges coarse response-level scores and fine-grained token-level credit assignment. RTT introduces a Token-Level Relevance Discriminator to predict which tokens in the response are responsible for a specific constraint, and optimizes the policy model via RTT-GRPO, which integrates response-level and token-level advantages within a unified framework. Furthermore, when transitioning from one-dimensional, outcome-level reward to three-dimensional reward space in the token-level rubric-based RL, we propose a novel group normalization method, called Intra-sample Token Group Normalization, to accommodate this shift. Extensive experiments and benchmarks demonstrate that RTT consistently outperforms other baselines in both instruction- and rubric-level accuracy across different models.

analysis.tldr: 提出RTT框架，通过令牌级奖励弥合响应级评分与细粒度信用分配之间的鸿沟，提升指令遵循任务的对齐效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于评分标准的强化学习方法主要依赖响应级奖励，导致奖励稀疏性和模糊性问题，难以有效对齐复杂开放域指令遵循任务。
analysis.problem: 如何将粗粒度的响应级评分转化为细粒度的令牌级信用分配，以解决奖励稀疏和模糊问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出响应级奖励存在严重的稀疏性和模糊性，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RTT框架，包含令牌级相关性判别器（Token-Level Relevance Discriminator）预测负责特定约束的令牌，并通过RTT-GRPO统一响应级和令牌级优势；同时引入样本内令牌组归一化（Intra-sample Token Group Normalization）适应三维奖励空间。
contributions: 提出RTT框架，将响应级评分桥接到令牌级奖励，解决奖励稀疏和模糊问题。
设计令牌级相关性判别器和RTT-GRPO优化方法。
提出样本内令牌组归一化方法，适应令牌级评分标准RL的三维奖励空间。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，RTT在不同模型上均优于其他基线，在指令级和评分标准级准确率上均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量评分标准定义。
令牌级判别器的训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RTT框架，通过令牌级奖励弥合响应级评分与细粒度信用分配之间的鸿沟，提升指令遵循任务的对齐效果。

papers.title: CharTool: Tool-Integrated Visual Reasoning for Chart Understanding
papers.abstract: Charts are ubiquitous in scientific and financial literature for presenting structured data. However, chart reasoning remains challenging for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to the lack of high-quality training data, as well as the need for fine-grained visual grounding and precise numerical computation. To address these challenges, we first propose DuoChart, a scalable dual-source data pipeline that combines synthesized charts with real-world charts to construct diverse, high-quality chart training data. We then introduce CharTool, which equips MLLMs with external tools, including image cropping for localized visual perception and code-based computation for accurate numerical reasoning. Through agentic reinforcement learning on DuoChart, CharTool learns tool-integrated reasoning grounded in chart content. Extensive experiments on six chart benchmarks show that our method consistently improves over strong MLLM baselines across model scales. Notably, CharTool-7B outperforms the base model by **+8.0%** on CharXiv (Reasoning) and **+9.78%** on ChartQAPro, while achieving competitive performance with substantially larger or proprietary models. Moreover, CharTool demonstrates positive generalization to out-of-domain visual math reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出CharTool，通过双源数据管道和工具增强的强化学习，提升MLLM图表理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 图表理解对多模态大模型具有挑战性，主要因为缺乏高质量训练数据、细粒度视觉定位和精确数值计算的需求。
analysis.problem: 现有MLLM在图表推理中表现不佳，需要更好的数据构建和工具集成方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DuoChart双源数据管道（合成+真实图表）构建高质量训练数据，并设计CharTool，通过agentic强化学习让MLLM学会使用图像裁剪和代码计算等外部工具进行推理。
contributions: 提出DuoChart，一种可扩展的双源数据管道，用于生成多样化、高质量的图表训练数据。
提出CharTool，通过工具增强的强化学习使MLLM具备工具集成推理能力。
在六个图表基准上取得显著提升，并展现出对域外视觉数学推理的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在六个图表基准上进行实验，CharTool-7B在CharXiv (Reasoning)上提升+8.0%，在ChartQAPro上提升+9.78%，性能与更大或专有模型相当。
limitations: 可能依赖外部工具的执行环境。
泛化性仅在视觉数学推理上验证，其他域外任务未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CharTool，通过双源数据管道和工具增强的强化学习，提升MLLM图表理解能力。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Consensus-Progressive Reasoning for Efficient Multi-Agent Debate
papers.abstract: Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) is a collaborative framework in which multiple agents iteratively refine solutions through the generation of reasoning and alternating critique cycles. Current work primarily optimizes intra-round topologies and inter-round interactions separately, which still results in high token costs regardless of task complexity. This work introduces Heterogeneous Consensus-Progressive Reasoning for Efficient Multi-Agent Debate (HCP-MAD), leveraging consensus as a dynamic signal to facilitate progressive reasoning. The core motivation is that a majority of straightforward tasks can be effectively resolved via lightweight pair-agent debates, while complex tasks require expanded collaboration. Consequently, HCP-MAD employs a three-stage progressive reasoning mechanism to develop adaptive solutions across varying task complexities. Firstly, Heterogeneous Consensus Verification conducts rapid consensus verification using a pair of heterogeneous agents for early stopping. Next, the Heterogeneous Pair-Agent Debate applies an adaptive stopping criterion to dynamically terminate mutual critique of recorded reasoning traces. Finally, the unresolved tasks are addressed through Escalated Collective Voting by aggregating diverse perspectives from additional agents. Experiments across multiple benchmarks show that HCP-MAD significantly enhances accuracy while substantially reducing token costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于共识驱动的渐进式推理多智能体辩论框架，在提升准确率的同时大幅降低token成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MAD方法分别优化轮内拓扑和轮间交互，导致无论任务复杂度如何都产生高token成本，缺乏自适应机制。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务复杂度动态调整多智能体辩论的协作规模，以平衡准确率和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数简单任务可通过轻量级双智能体辩论解决，而复杂任务需要更广泛的协作。
analysis.method: 三阶段渐进推理：异质共识验证（早期停止）、异质双智能体辩论（自适应停止）、升级集体投票（聚合多视角）。
contributions: 提出基于共识信号的动态渐进推理框架，自适应调整辩论深度和参与智能体数量。
在多个基准上验证了方法在提升准确率的同时显著降低token成本。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了实验，显示准确率提升且token成本大幅降低。
limitations: 未讨论异质智能体的具体设计对性能的影响。
可能对共识阈值敏感，需要进一步调参分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于共识驱动的渐进式推理多智能体辩论框架，在提升准确率的同时大幅降低token成本。

papers.title: LumaFlux: Lifting 8-Bit Worlds to HDR Reality with Physically-Guided Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of HDR-capable devices has created a pressing need to convert the 8-bit Standard Dynamic Range (SDR) content into perceptually and physically accurate 10-bit High Dynamic Range (HDR). Existing inverse tone-mapping (ITM) methods often rely on fixed tone-mapping operators that struggle to generalize to real-world degradations, stylistic variations, and camera pipelines, frequently producing clipped highlights, desaturated colors, or unstable tone reproduction. We introduce LumaFlux, a first physically and perceptually guided diffusion transformer (DiT) for SDR-to-HDR reconstruction by adapting a large pretrained DiT. Our LumaFlux introduces (1) a Physically-Guided Adaptation (PGA) module that injects luminance, spatial descriptors, and frequency cues into attention through low-rank residuals; (2) a Perceptual Cross-Modulation (PCM) layer that stabilizes chroma and texture via FiLM conditioning from vision encoder features; and (3) an HDR Residual Coupler that fuses physical and perceptual signals under a timestep- and layer-adaptive modulation schedule. Finally, a lightweight Rational-Quadratic Spline decoder reconstructs smooth, interpretable tone fields for highlight and exposure expansion, enhancing the output of the VAE decoder to generate HDR. To enable robust HDR learning, we curate the first large-scale SDR-HDR training corpus. For fair and reproducible comparison, we further establish a new evaluation benchmark, comprising HDR references and corresponding expert-graded SDR versions. Across benchmarks, LumaFlux outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving superior luminance reconstruction and perceptual color fidelity with minimal additional parameters.

analysis.tldr: LumaFlux 提出首个物理与感知引导的扩散 Transformer，将 8 位 SDR 图像重建为 10 位 HDR 图像，在亮度重建和色彩保真度上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: HDR 设备普及但大量内容仍为 8 位 SDR，现有逆色调映射方法难以泛化到真实退化、风格变化和相机管线，常产生高光裁剪、色彩饱和度不足或色调不稳定等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将 8 位标准动态范围（SDR）图像转换为感知和物理上准确的 10 位高动态范围（HDR）图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有逆色调映射方法依赖固定算子，泛化能力差，导致高光裁剪、色彩饱和度不足或色调不稳定。
analysis.method: 基于预训练扩散 Transformer，引入物理引导适应模块（注入亮度、空间描述子和频率线索）、感知交叉调制层（通过 FiLM 稳定色度和纹理）、HDR 残差耦合器（融合物理和感知信号）以及有理二次样条解码器（重建平滑色调场）。
contributions: 首个物理和感知引导的扩散 Transformer 用于 SDR 到 HDR 重建。
提出物理引导适应、感知交叉调制和 HDR 残差耦合器三个创新模块。
构建大规模 SDR-HDR 训练语料库和新的评估基准。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，LumaFlux 优于现有最先进方法，实现更优的亮度重建和感知色彩保真度，且额外参数极少。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模预训练 DiT，计算资源需求较高。
仅针对静态图像，未涉及视频 HDR 重建。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LumaFlux 提出首个物理与感知引导的扩散 Transformer，将 8 位 SDR 图像重建为 10 位 HDR 图像，在亮度重建和色彩保真度上超越现有方法。

papers.title: CANDLE: Illumination-Invariant Semantic Priors for Color Ambient Lighting Normalization
papers.abstract: Color ambient lighting normalization under multi-colored illumination is challenging due to severe chromatic shifts, highlight saturation, and material-dependent reflectance. Existing geometric and low-level priors are insufficient for recovering object-intrinsic color when illumination-induced chromatic bias dominates. We observe that DINOv3's self-supervised features remain highly consistent between colored-light inputs and ambient-lit ground truth, motivating their use as illumination-robust semantic priors. We propose CANDLE (Color Ambient Normalization with DINO Layer Enhancement), which introduces DINO Omni-layer Guidance (D.O.G.) to adaptively inject multi-layer DINOv3 features into successive encoder stages, and a color-frequency refinement design (BFACG + SFFB) to suppress decoder-side chromatic collapse and detail contamination. Experiments on CL3AN show a +1.22 dB PSNR gain over the strongest prior method. CANDLE achieves 3rd place on the NTIRE 2026 ALN Color Lighting Challenge and 2nd place in fidelity on the White Lighting track with the lowest FID, confirming strong generalization across both chromatic and luminance-dominant illumination conditions. Code is available at https://github.com/ron941/CANDLE.

analysis.tldr: 利用DINOv3自监督特征作为光照鲁棒语义先验，实现多色光照下的颜色环境光归一化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多色光照下颜色环境光归一化因色偏、高光饱和及材质依赖反射而极具挑战，现有几何和低级先验在光照主导色偏时无法恢复物体固有颜色。
analysis.problem: 解决多色光照下颜色环境光归一化中，因光照引起的色偏导致物体固有颜色难以恢复的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到DINOv3的自监督特征在彩色光照输入与环境光真值之间保持高度一致性，可作为光照鲁棒的语义先验。
analysis.method: 提出CANDLE方法，包含DINO Omni-layer Guidance (D.O.G.)自适应注入多层DINOv3特征到编码器各阶段，以及颜色频率精炼设计（BFACG + SFFB）抑制解码器色崩和细节污染。
contributions: 首次利用DINOv3自监督特征作为光照鲁棒语义先验用于颜色环境光归一化。
提出D.O.G.模块和颜色频率精炼设计，显著提升归一化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在CL3AN数据集上相比最强先验方法PSNR提升1.22 dB；在NTIRE 2026 ALN挑战赛中获得第三名，在白光照赛道获得第二名（最低FID）。
limitations: 可能依赖DINOv3在特定光照条件下的泛化能力。
计算开销可能因多层特征注入而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用DINOv3自监督特征作为光照鲁棒语义先验，实现多色光照下的颜色环境光归一化。

papers.title: EnsemHalDet: Robust VLM Hallucination Detection via Ensemble of Internal State Detectors
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) excel at multimodal tasks, but they remain vulnerable to hallucinations that are factually incorrect or ungrounded in the input image. Recent work suggests that hallucination detection using internal representations is more efficient and accurate than approaches that rely solely on model outputs. However, existing internal-representation-based methods typically rely on a single representation or detector, limiting their ability to capture diverse hallucination signals. In this paper, we propose EnsemHalDet, an ensemble-based hallucination detection framework that leverages multiple internal representations of VLMs, including attention outputs and hidden states. EnsemHalDet trains independent detectors for each representation and combines them through ensemble learning. Experimental results across multiple VQA datasets and VLMs show that EnsemHalDet consistently outperforms prior methods and single-detector models in terms of AUC. These results demonstrate that ensembling diverse internal signals significantly improves robustness in multimodal hallucination detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出集成多种内部表示的VLM幻觉检测框架，显著提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在多模态任务中易产生幻觉，现有基于内部表示的检测方法通常依赖单一表示或检测器，难以捕捉多样化的幻觉信号，导致检测鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用VLM的多种内部表示（注意力输出和隐藏状态）进行集成学习，以提升幻觉检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单一内部表示或检测器无法充分捕捉VLM的多样化幻觉信号，集成多种内部表示可互补信息，提升检测性能。
analysis.method: 提出EnsemHalDet框架，提取VLM的多种内部表示（如注意力输出和隐藏状态），为每种表示训练独立的检测器，并通过集成学习（如投票或加权平均）组合检测结果。
contributions: 提出一种基于集成学习的VLM幻觉检测框架，利用多种内部表示提升检测鲁棒性。
在多个VQA数据集和VLM上验证了该方法优于现有方法和单检测器模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个VQA数据集和VLM上评估，以AUC为指标，EnsemHalDet一致优于先前方法和单检测器模型。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销，因为需要训练多个检测器。
集成策略的选择（如投票或加权平均）可能影响最终性能，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出集成多种内部表示的VLM幻觉检测框架，显著提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: Disrupting Cognitive Passivity: Rethinking AI-Assisted Data Literacy through Cognitive Alignment
papers.abstract: AI chatbots are increasingly stepping into roles as collaborators or teachers in analyzing, visualizing, and reasoning through data and domain problem. Yet, AI's default assistant mode with its comprehensive and one-off responses may undermine opportunities for practitioners to develop literacy through their own thinking, inducing cognitive passivity. Drawing on evidence from empirical studies and theories, we argue that disrupting cognitive passivity necessitates a nuanced approach: rather than simply making AI promote deliberative thinking, there is a need for more dynamic and adaptive strategy through cognitive alignment -- a framework that characterizes effective human-AI interaction as a function of alignment between users' cognitive demand and AI's interaction mode. In the framework, we provide the mapping between AI's interaction mode (transmissive or deliberative) and users' cognitive demand (receptive or deliberative), otherwise leading to either cognitive passivity or friction. We further discuss implications and offer open questions for future research on data literacy.

analysis.tldr: 提出认知对齐框架，通过动态匹配AI交互模式与用户认知需求来打破AI辅助数据素养中的认知被动性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI聊天机器人作为协作或教学工具时，其默认的全面一次性回答模式可能削弱用户通过自主思考发展数据素养的机会，导致认知被动性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计AI交互策略以有效打破认知被动性，促进用户主动思考和数据素养发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出AI的默认助手模式（全面一次性回答）会诱导认知被动性，而简单促进审慎思考并不足够，需要更动态自适应的策略。
analysis.method: 提出认知对齐框架，将AI交互模式（传递型或审慎型）与用户认知需求（接受型或审慎型）进行匹配，避免认知被动或摩擦。
contributions: 提出认知对齐框架，用于描述有效人机交互取决于用户认知需求与AI交互模式的匹配。
提供了AI交互模式与用户认知需求之间的映射关系，并讨论了其对数据素养研究的意义和开放问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚未经过实证验证，缺乏定量评估。
未讨论不同用户群体或任务类型下的适用性差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出认知对齐框架，通过动态匹配AI交互模式与用户认知需求来打破AI辅助数据素养中的认知被动性。

papers.title: A Unified Perspective on Adversarial Membership Manipulation in Vision Models
papers.abstract: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) aim to determine whether a specific data point was part of a model's training set, serving as effective tools for evaluating privacy leakage of vision models. However, existing MIAs implicitly assume honest query inputs, and their adversarial robustness remains unexplored. We show that MIAs for vision models expose a previously overlooked adversarial surface: adversarial membership manipulation, where imperceptible perturbations can reliably push non-member images into the "member" region of state-of-the-art MIAs. In this paper, we provide the first unified perspective on this phenomenon by analyzing its mechanism and implications. We begin by demonstrating that adversarial membership fabrication is consistently effective across diverse architectures and datasets. We then reveal a distinctive geometric signature - a characteristic gradient-norm collapse trajectory - that reliably separates fabricated from true members despite their nearly identical semantic representations. Building on this insight, we introduce a principled detection strategy grounded in gradient-geometry signals and develop a robust inference framework that substantially mitigates adversarial manipulation. Extensive experiments show that fabrication is broadly effective, while our detection and robust inference strategies significantly enhance resilience. This work establishes the first comprehensive framework for adversarial membership manipulation in vision models.

analysis.tldr: 首次统一视角揭示视觉模型中的对抗性成员操纵现象，并提出基于梯度几何的检测与鲁棒推理框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 成员推断攻击（MIA）是评估视觉模型隐私泄露的重要工具，但现有MIA假设查询输入是诚实的，忽略了对抗性操纵的风险，导致隐私评估存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉模型中对抗性成员操纵（通过微小扰动将非成员图像推入MIA的“成员”区域）的检测与防御问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现对抗性成员伪造在不同架构和数据集上普遍有效，且伪造成员与真实成员在语义表示上几乎相同，但存在独特的梯度范数坍塌轨迹这一几何特征。
analysis.method: 提出基于梯度几何信号的检测策略和鲁棒推理框架，利用梯度范数坍塌轨迹区分伪造成员与真实成员，并增强对对抗性操纵的抵抗能力。
contributions: 首次从统一视角分析视觉模型中对抗性成员操纵的机制与影响。
揭示伪造成员与真实成员在梯度几何上的差异（梯度范数坍塌轨迹），并据此提出检测与鲁棒推理方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的MIA或视觉模型架构。
检测策略可能对更复杂的对抗性扰动失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次统一视角揭示视觉模型中的对抗性成员操纵现象，并提出基于梯度几何的检测与鲁棒推理框架。

papers.title: Generalized Small Object Detection:A Point-Prompted Paradigm and Benchmark
papers.abstract: Small object detection (SOD) remains challenging due to extremely limited pixels and ambiguous object boundaries. These characteristics lead to challenging annotation, limited availability of large-scale high-quality datasets, and inherently weak semantic representations for small objects. In this work, we first address the data limitation by introducing TinySet-9M, the first large-scale, multi-domain dataset for small object detection. Beyond filling the gap in large-scale datasets, we establish a benchmark to evaluate the effectiveness of existing label-efficient detection methods for small objects. Our evaluation reveals that weak visual cues further exacerbate the performance degradation of label-efficient methods in small object detection, highlighting a critical challenge in label-efficient SOD. Secondly, to tackle the limitation of insufficient semantic representation, we move beyond training-time feature enhancement and propose a new paradigm termed Point-Prompt Small Object Detection (P2SOD). This paradigm introduces sparse point prompts at inference time as an efficient information bridge for category-level localization, enabling semantic augmentation. Building upon the P2SOD paradigm and the large-scale TinySet-9M dataset, we further develop DEAL (DEtect Any smalL object), a scalable and transferable point-prompted detection framework that learns robust, prompt-conditioned representations from large-scale data. With only a single click at inference time, DEAL achieves a 31.4% relative improvement over fully supervised baselines under strict localization metrics (e.g., AP75) on TinySet-9M, while generalizing effectively to unseen categories and unseen datasets. Our project is available at https://zhuhaoraneis.github.io/TinySet-9M/.

analysis.tldr: 提出点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD和首个大规模多域数据集TinySet-9M，实现弱监督下的显著性能提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 小目标检测因像素少、边界模糊导致标注困难、数据集匮乏和语义表示弱，现有标签高效方法性能退化严重。
analysis.problem: 小目标检测中的数据稀缺和语义表示不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱视觉线索进一步加剧标签高效方法在小目标检测中的性能退化。
analysis.method: 提出点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD，在推理时引入稀疏点提示作为类别级定位的信息桥梁；构建TinySet-9M数据集，并开发DEAL框架学习鲁棒的提示条件表示。
contributions: 构建首个大规模多域小目标检测数据集TinySet-9M并建立基准。
提出点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD及DEAL框架，实现弱监督下的显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在TinySet-9M上，DEAL在严格定位指标AP75上相比全监督基线提升31.4%，并泛化到未见类别和数据集。
limitations: 依赖推理时的点提示，可能增加用户交互成本。
未在极端小目标或密集场景下充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出点提示小目标检测范式P2SOD和首个大规模多域数据集TinySet-9M，实现弱监督下的显著性能提升。

papers.title: Improving Role Consistency in Multi-Agent Collaboration via Quantitative Role Clarity
papers.abstract: In large language model (LLM)-driven multi-agent systems, disobey role specification (failure to adhere to the defined responsibilities and constraints of an assigned role, potentially leading to an agent behaving like another) is a major failure mode \cite{DBLP:journals/corr/abs-2503-13657}. To address this issue, in the present paper, we propose a quantitative role clarity to improve role consistency. Firstly, we construct a role assignment matrix $S(φ)=[s_{ij}(φ)]$, where $s_{ij}(φ)$ is the semantic similarity between the $i$-th agent's behavior trajectory and the $j$-th agent's role description. Then we define role clarity matrix $M(φ)$ as $\text{softmax}(S(φ))-I$, where $\text{softmax}(S(φ))$ is a row-wise softmax of $S(φ)$ and $I$ is the identity matrix. The Frobenius norm of $M(φ)$ quantifies the alignment between agents' role descriptions and their behaviors trajectory. Moreover, we employ the role clarity matrix as a regularizer during lightweight fine-tuning to improve role consistency, thereby improving end-to-end task performance. Experiments on the ChatDev multi-agent system show that our method substantially improves role consistency and task performance: with Qwen and Llama, the role overstepping rate decreases from $46.4\%$ to $8.4\%$ and from $43.4\%$ to $0.2\%$, respectively, and the role clarity score increases from $0.5328$ to $0.9097$ and from $0.5007$ to $0.8530$, respectively, the task success rate increases from $0.6769$ to $0.6909$ and from $0.6174$ to $0.6763$, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出定量角色清晰度矩阵作为正则化项，通过轻量微调提升多智能体协作中的角色一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的多智能体系统中，智能体常违反角色规范（如越权行为），导致协作失败，现有方法缺乏对角色一致性的定量度量与优化。
analysis.problem: 多智能体协作中智能体行为偏离其角色描述（角色越界）的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出角色越界是主要失败模式，通过实验观察到角色越界率可高达46.4%。
analysis.method: 构建角色分配矩阵S(φ)（行为轨迹与角色描述的语义相似度），定义角色清晰度矩阵M(φ)=softmax(S(φ))-I，以其Frobenius范数作为正则化项进行轻量微调。
contributions: 提出定量角色清晰度矩阵，用于度量多智能体系统中角色描述与行为轨迹的对齐程度。
将该矩阵作为正则化项进行轻量微调，有效提升角色一致性和任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在ChatDev多智能体系统上使用Qwen和Llama模型进行实验，角色越界率分别从46.4%降至8.4%和从43.4%降至0.2%，角色清晰度分数分别从0.5328提升至0.9097和从0.5007提升至0.8530，任务成功率分别从0.6769提升至0.6909和从0.6174提升至0.6763。
limitations: 方法仅在ChatDev系统上验证，泛化性未知。
轻量微调可能无法完全解决复杂场景下的角色冲突。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出定量角色清晰度矩阵作为正则化项，通过轻量微调提升多智能体协作中的角色一致性。

papers.title: PolyBench: Benchmarking LLM Forecasting and Trading Capabilities on Live Prediction Market Data
papers.abstract: Predicting real-world events from live market signals demands systems that fuse qualitative news with quantitative order-book dynamics under strict temporal discipline -- a challenge existing benchmarks fail to capture. We present \textbf{PolyBench}, a multimodal benchmark derived from Polymarket that records point-in-time cross-sections of 38,666 binary prediction markets spanning 4,997 events, synchronously coupling each snapshot with a Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) state and a real-time news stream. Using PolyBench, we evaluate seven state-of-the-art Large Language Models -- spanning open- and closed-source families -- generating 36,165 predictions under identical, timestamp-locked market states collected between February 6 and 12, 2026. Our multidimensional framework assesses directional accuracy, our proposed Confidence-Weighted Return (CWR), Annualized Percentage Yield (APY), and Sharpe ratio via realistic order-book execution simulation. The results reveal a pronounced performance divergence: only two of seven models achieve positive financial returns -- MiMo-V2-Flash at \textbf{17.6%} CWR and Gemini-3-Flash at 6.2% CWR -- while the remaining five incur losses despite uniformly high stated confidence. These findings highlight the gap between surface-level language fluency and genuine probabilistic reasoning under live market uncertainty, and establish PolyBench as a contamination-proof, financially-grounded evaluation standard for future LLM research. Our dataset and code available at \underline{\href{https://github.com/PolyBench/PolyBench}{https://github.com/PolyBench/PolyBench}}.

analysis.tldr: PolyBench 是一个基于 Polymarket 实时预测市场数据的多模态基准，用于评估 LLM 的预测和交易能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准无法捕捉实时市场信号中融合定性新闻与定量订单簿动态的挑战，缺乏对 LLM 在真实市场不确定性下概率推理能力的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估 LLM 在实时预测市场数据上的预测和交易能力，揭示语言流畅性与真实概率推理之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 七个模型中仅两个实现正财务回报，其余五个尽管置信度一致较高但仍亏损，表明表面语言能力与真实市场推理之间存在显著差距。
analysis.method: 构建多模态基准 PolyBench，包含 38,666 个二元预测市场，同步记录时间点截面、CLOB 状态和实时新闻流；使用七个 LLM 生成 36,165 个预测，通过方向准确性、置信度加权回报、年化百分比收益率和夏普比率评估。
contributions: 提出 PolyBench，一个基于实时预测市场数据的多模态基准，用于评估 LLM 的预测和交易能力。
通过实验揭示 LLM 在真实市场不确定性下语言流畅性与概率推理之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在 38,666 个预测市场上评估七个 LLM，生成 36,165 个预测，使用多维框架评估，结果显示仅两个模型实现正财务回报。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 2026 年 2 月 6 日至 12 日的数据，时间范围有限。
仅评估二元预测市场，可能不适用于其他类型市场。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PolyBench 是一个基于 Polymarket 实时预测市场数据的多模态基准，用于评估 LLM 的预测和交易能力。

papers.title: SentinelAgent: Intent-Verified Delegation Chains for Securing Federal Multi-Agent AI Systems
papers.abstract: When Agent A delegates to Agent B, which invokes Tool C on behalf of User X, no existing framework can answer: whose authorization chain led to this action, and where did it violate policy? This paper introduces SentinelAgent, a formal framework for verifiable delegation chains in federal multi-agent AI systems. The Delegation Chain Calculus (DCC) defines seven properties - six deterministic (authority narrowing, policy preservation, forensic reconstructibility, cascade containment, scope-action conformance, output schema conformance) and one probabilistic (intent preservation) - with four meta-theorems and one proposition establishing the practical infeasibility of deterministic intent verification. The Intent-Preserving Delegation Protocol (IPDP) enforces all seven properties at runtime through a non-LLM Delegation Authority Service. A three-point verification lifecycle achieves 100% combined TPR at 0% FPR on DelegationBench v4 (516 scenarios, 10 attack categories, 13 federal domains). Under black-box adversarial conditions, the DAS blocks 30/30 attacks with 0 false positives. Deterministic properties are unbreakable under adversarial stress testing; intent verification degrades to 13% against sophisticated paraphrasing. Fine-tuning the NLI model on 190 government delegation examples improves P2 from 1.7% to 88.3% TPR (5-fold cross-validated, F1=82.1%). Properties P1, P3-P7 are mechanically verified via TLA+ model checking across 2.7 million states with zero violations. Even when intent verification is evaded, the remaining six properties constrain the adversary to permitted API calls, conformant outputs, traceable actions, bounded cascades, and compliant behavior.

analysis.tldr: 提出SentinelAgent框架，通过形式化委托链验证确保联邦多智能体AI系统的安全，实现100%真阳性率和0%假阳性率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有框架无法回答多智能体系统中授权链的来源和策略违反点，导致安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 解决联邦多智能体AI系统中委托链的授权验证问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SentinelAgent框架，包含委托链演算（DCC）定义七个属性，以及意图保持委托协议（IPDP）通过非LLM委托授权服务（DAS）在运行时强制执行所有属性。
contributions: 提出形式化的委托链演算（DCC）定义七个关键属性及元定理。
设计意图保持委托协议（IPDP）和委托授权服务（DAS）实现运行时验证。
构建DelegationBench v4基准并展示100% TPR和0% FPR的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在DelegationBench v4（516个场景，10个攻击类别，13个联邦领域）上达到100%组合TPR和0% FPR；在黑盒对抗条件下DAS阻止30/30攻击且无假阳性；在190个政府委托示例上微调NLI模型，P2从1.7%提升至88.3% TPR（5折交叉验证，F1=82.1%）；TLA+模型检查在270万状态上验证P1、P3-P7零违规。
limitations: 意图验证在复杂改写攻击下退化至13% TPR。
确定性属性虽不可破解，但概率性意图保持存在局限性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SentinelAgent框架，通过形式化委托链验证确保联邦多智能体AI系统的安全，实现100%真阳性率和0%假阳性率。

papers.title: Random Is Hard to Beat: Active Selection in online DPO with Modern LLMs
papers.abstract: Modern LLMs inherit strong priors from web-scale pretraining, which can limit the headroom of post-training data-selection strategies. While Active Preference Learning (APL) seeks to optimize query efficiency in online Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the inherent richness of on-policy candidate pools often renders simple Random sampling a surprisingly formidable baseline. We evaluate uncertainty-based APL against Random across harmlessness, helpfulness, and instruction-following settings, utilizing both reward models and LLM-as-a-judge proxies. We find that APL yields negligible improvements in proxy win-rates compared to Random. Crucially, we observe a dissociation where win-rate improves even as general capability -- measured by standard benchmarks -- degrades. APL fails to mitigate this capability collapse or reduce variance significantly better than random sampling. Our findings suggest that in the regime of strong pre-trained priors, the computational overhead of active selection is difficult to justify against the ``cheap diversity'' provided by simple random samples. Our code is available at https://github.com/BootsofLagrangian/random-vs-apl.

analysis.tldr: 在线DPO中，随机采样作为基线出人意料地难以被主动选择方法超越。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代LLM从大规模预训练中继承了强先验，限制了后训练数据选择策略的改进空间；主动偏好学习（APL）旨在优化在线DPO中的查询效率，但其实际收益尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估主动偏好学习（APL）相对于简单随机采样在在线DPO中的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: APL在代理胜率上相比随机采样提升可忽略不计；胜率提升时通用能力反而下降；APL未能显著缓解能力崩溃或降低方差。
analysis.method: 在无害性、有用性和指令遵循设置中，使用奖励模型和LLM-as-a-judge代理，比较基于不确定性的APL与随机采样。
contributions: 发现随机采样在在线DPO中是一个出人意料的强基线，APL带来的改进可忽略不计。
观察到胜率提升与通用能力下降之间的解耦现象，并指出APL无法有效缓解能力崩溃。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在无害性、有用性和指令遵循设置中进行了评估。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有强预训练先验的现代LLM。
未探索其他主动选择策略或更复杂的查询方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在线DPO中，随机采样作为基线出人意料地难以被主动选择方法超越。

papers.title: An Intelligent Fault Diagnosis Method for General Aviation Aircraft Based on Multi-Fidelity Digital Twin and FMEA Knowledge Enhancement
papers.abstract: Fault diagnosis of general aviation aircraft faces challenges including scarce real fault data, diverse fault types, and weak fault signatures. This paper proposes an intelligent fault diagnosis framework based on multi-fidelity digital twin, integrating four modules: high-fidelity flight dynamics simulation, FMEA-driven fault injection, multi-fidelity residual feature extraction, and large language model (LLM)-enhanced interpretable report generation. A digital twin is constructed using the JSBSim six-degree-of-freedom (6-DoF) flight dynamics engine, generating 23-channel engine health monitoring data via semi-empirical sensor synthesis equations. A three-layer fault injection engine based on failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) models the physical causal propagation of 19 engine fault types. A multi-fidelity residual computation framework comprising paired-mirror residuals and GRU surrogate prediction residuals is proposed: the high-fidelity path obtains clean fault deviation signals using nominal mirror trajectories with identical initial conditions, while the low-fidelity path achieves online real-time residual computation through a multi-step prediction GRU surrogate model. A 1D-CNN classifier performs end-to-end diagnosis of 20 fault classes. An LLM diagnostic report engine enhanced with FMEA knowledge fuses classification results, residual evidence, and domain causal knowledge to generate interpretable natural language reports. Experiments show the paired-mirror residual scheme achieves a Macro-F1 of 96.2% on the 20-class task, while the GRU surrogate scheme achieves 4.3x inference acceleration at only 0.6% performance cost. Comparison across 24 schemes reveals that residual feature quality contributes approximately 5x more to diagnostic performance than classifier architecture, establishing the "residual quality first" design principle.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于多保真数字孪生和FMEA知识增强的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断方法，通过残差特征提取和LLM报告生成实现高精度可解释诊断。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用航空飞机故障诊断面临真实故障数据稀缺、故障类型多样、故障特征微弱等挑战，现有方法难以兼顾精度、实时性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在数据稀缺、故障类型多样的条件下实现高精度、实时且可解释的故障诊断。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明残差特征质量对诊断性能的贡献约为分类器架构的5倍，确立了“残差质量优先”的设计原则。
analysis.method: 构建基于JSBSim六自由度飞行动力学引擎的高保真数字孪生，生成23通道发动机健康监测数据；设计基于FMEA的三层故障注入引擎模拟19种故障的物理因果传播；提出多保真残差计算框架，包括配对镜像残差（高保真）和GRU代理预测残差（低保真）；使用1D-CNN进行20类故障端到端诊断；利用FMEA知识增强的LLM诊断报告引擎生成可解释的自然语言报告。
contributions: 提出多保真数字孪生与FMEA知识增强的故障诊断框架，融合高保真仿真、故障注入、残差提取和LLM报告生成。
设计配对镜像残差和GRU代理预测残差两种方案，在精度和实时性之间取得平衡。
通过24种方案对比，揭示残差特征质量对诊断性能的主导作用，确立“残差质量优先”原则。
analysis.experiments: 在20类故障诊断任务上，配对镜像残差方案达到96.2%的Macro-F1；GRU代理方案实现4.3倍推理加速，性能仅下降0.6%。
limitations: 依赖高保真数字孪生模型，构建成本较高。
故障类型限于19种，实际场景中故障种类可能更多。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于多保真数字孪生和FMEA知识增强的通用航空飞机智能故障诊断方法，通过残差特征提取和LLM报告生成实现高精度可解释诊断。

papers.title: InverseDraping: Recovering Sewing Patterns from 3D Garment Surfaces via BoxMesh Bridging
papers.abstract: Recovering sewing patterns from draped 3D garments is a challenging problem in human digitization research. In contrast to the well-studied forward process of draping designed sewing patterns using mature physical simulation engines, the inverse process of recovering parametric 2D patterns from deformed garment geometry remains fundamentally ill-posed for existing methods. We propose a two-stage framework that centers on a structured intermediate representation, BoxMesh, which serves as the key to bridging the gap between 3D garment geometry and parametric sewing patterns. BoxMesh encodes both garment-level geometry and panel-level structure in 3D, while explicitly disentangling intrinsic panel geometry and stitching topology from draping-induced deformations. This representation imposes a physically grounded structure on the problem, significantly reducing ambiguity. In Stage I, a geometry-driven autoregressive model infers BoxMesh from the input 3D garment. In Stage II, a semantics-aware autoregressive model parses BoxMesh into parametric sewing patterns. We adopt autoregressive modeling to naturally handle the variable-length and structured nature of panel configurations and stitching relationships. This decomposition separates geometric inversion from structured pattern inference, leading to more accurate and robust recovery. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on the GarmentCodeData benchmark and generalizes effectively to real-world scans and single-view images.

analysis.tldr: 提出BoxMesh中间表示，通过两阶段自回归模型从3D服装表面恢复缝纫图案，实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 从变形3D服装恢复参数化2D缝纫图案是病态问题，现有方法难以处理几何变形与结构歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D服装表面准确恢复出参数化的缝纫图案（包括面板几何和缝合拓扑）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：阶段I用几何驱动自回归模型从3D服装推断BoxMesh；阶段II用语义感知自回归模型将BoxMesh解析为参数化缝纫图案。
contributions: 提出BoxMesh作为结构化中间表示，显式解耦面板几何、缝合拓扑与变形效应。
设计两阶段自回归模型，分别处理几何逆映射和结构模式推断。
在GarmentCodeData基准上达到SOTA，并泛化到真实扫描和单视图图像。
analysis.experiments: 在GarmentCodeData基准上评估，并测试了真实扫描和单视图图像的泛化能力，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D输入，对噪声或遮挡敏感。
自回归模型推理速度可能较慢。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BoxMesh中间表示，通过两阶段自回归模型从3D服装表面恢复缝纫图案，实现SOTA。

papers.title: Generative AI for Video Trailer Synthesis: From Extractive Heuristics to Autoregressive Creativity
papers.abstract: The domain of automatic video trailer generation is currently undergoing a profound paradigm shift, transitioning from heuristic-based extraction methods to deep generative synthesis. While early methodologies relied heavily on low-level feature engineering, visual saliency, and rule-based heuristics to select representative shots, recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs), Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), and diffusion-based video synthesis have enabled systems that not only identify key moments but also construct coherent, emotionally resonant narratives. This survey provides a comprehensive technical review of this evolution, with a specific focus on generative techniques including autoregressive Transformers, LLM-orchestrated pipelines, and text-to-video foundation models like OpenAI's Sora and Google's Veo. We analyze the architectural progression from Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) to Trailer Generation Transformers (TGT), evaluate the economic implications of automated content velocity on User-Generated Content (UGC) platforms, and discuss the ethical challenges posed by high-fidelity neural synthesis. By synthesizing insights from recent literature, this report establishes a new taxonomy for AI-driven trailer generation in the era of foundation models, suggesting that future promotional video systems will move beyond extractive selection toward controllable generative editing and semantic reconstruction of trailers.

analysis.tldr: 综述从启发式提取到自回归生成的视频预告片合成技术演进。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动视频预告片生成正从基于规则的方法转向深度生成式合成，但缺乏系统性的技术回顾和分类。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理视频预告片生成从提取式到生成式的技术演进，并建立新的分类体系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 综述性分析，涵盖从图卷积网络到预告片生成Transformer、LLM编排管道及文本到视频基础模型的技术演进。
contributions: 提供了从启发式提取到生成式合成的全面技术回顾
建立了基础模型时代AI驱动预告片生成的新分类体系
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，可能缺乏对具体方法的深入实验比较

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Bridging the Dimensionality Gap: A Taxonomy and Survey of 2D Vision Model Adaptation for 3D Analysis
papers.abstract: The remarkable success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) in 2D vision has spurred significant research in extending these architectures to the complex domain of 3D analysis. Yet, a core challenge arises from a fundamental dichotomy between the regular, dense grids of 2D images and the irregular, sparse nature of 3D data such as point clouds and meshes. This survey provides a comprehensive review and a unified taxonomy of adaptation strategies that bridge this gap, classifying them into three families: (1) Data-centric methods that project 3D data into 2D formats to leverage off-the-shelf 2D models, (2) Architecture-centric methods that design intrinsic 3D networks, and (3) Hybrid methods, which synergistically combine the two modeling paradigms to benefit from both rich visual priors of large 2D datasets and explicit geometric reasoning of 3D models. Through this framework, we qualitatively analyze the fundamental trade-offs between these families concerning computational complexity, reliance on large-scale pre-training, and the preservation of geometric inductive biases. We discuss key open challenges and outline promising future research directions, including the development of 3D foundation models, advancements in self-supervised learning (SSL) for geometric data, and the deeper integration of multi-modal signals.

analysis.tldr: 综述将2D视觉模型适配到3D分析的方法分为数据驱动、架构驱动和混合三类，并分析了各自的权衡与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D视觉模型在图像任务上表现优异，但3D数据（如点云、网格）具有不规则和稀疏的特性，直接应用2D模型存在维度鸿沟，亟需系统性的适配策略总结与分类。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地分类和比较将2D视觉模型（CNN、ViT）适配到3D分析任务的各种方法，并揭示不同策略间的根本权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D图像与3D数据在数据结构（规则密集网格 vs. 不规则稀疏点云/网格）上存在根本差异，导致直接迁移2D模型面临挑战。
analysis.method: 提出一个统一的分类法，将适配策略分为三类：数据驱动（将3D数据投影为2D格式）、架构驱动（设计原生3D网络）和混合方法（结合两者优势）。
contributions: 首次系统性地综述了2D视觉模型适配到3D分析的方法，并提出了统一的分类法。
定性分析了三类方法在计算复杂度、预训练依赖和几何归纳偏置保持之间的权衡。
指出了关键开放挑战和未来研究方向，如3D基础模型、自监督学习和多模态融合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 分类法可能无法覆盖所有新兴方法。
定性分析缺乏定量实验支持。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述将2D视觉模型适配到3D分析的方法分为数据驱动、架构驱动和混合三类，并分析了各自的权衡与未来方向。

papers.title: DeCo-DETR: Decoupled Cognition DETR for efficient Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary Object Detection (OVOD) enables models to recognize objects beyond predefined categories, but existing approaches remain limited in practical deployment. On the one hand, multimodal designs often incur substantial computational overhead due to their reliance on text encoders at inference time. On the other hand, tightly coupled training objectives introduce a trade-off between closed-set detection accuracy and open-world generalization. Thus, we propose Decoupled Cognition DETR (DeCo-DETR), a vision-centric framework that addresses these challenges through a unified decoupling paradigm. Instead of depending on online text encoding, DeCo-DETR constructs a hierarchical semantic prototype space from region-level descriptions generated by pre-trained LVLMs and aligned via CLIP, enabling efficient and reusable semantic representation. Building upon this representation, the framework further disentangles semantic reasoning from localization through a decoupled training strategy, which separates alignment and detection into parallel optimization streams. Extensive experiments on standard OVOD benchmarks demonstrate that DeCo-DETR achieves competitive zero-shot detection performance while significantly improving inference efficiency. These results highlight the effectiveness of decoupling semantic cognition from detection, offering a practical direction for scalable OVOD systems.

analysis.tldr: DeCo-DETR通过解耦语义认知与定位，实现高效开放词汇目标检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇目标检测方法依赖文本编码器导致推理开销大，且训练目标耦合导致闭集精度与开放泛化能力难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲开放词汇检测性能的前提下，降低推理计算成本并消除闭集与开放检测之间的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DeCo-DETR，一种视觉中心框架：1) 利用预训练LVLM生成区域描述，经CLIP对齐构建层次化语义原型空间，避免在线文本编码；2) 采用解耦训练策略，将语义对齐与目标检测分离为并行优化流。
contributions: 提出层次化语义原型空间，实现高效可复用的语义表示。
设计解耦训练策略，消除闭集检测与开放泛化之间的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在标准OVOD基准上，DeCo-DETR在保持竞争性零样本检测性能的同时显著提升推理效率。
limitations: 依赖预训练LVLM和CLIP，可能受限于其质量。
层次化语义原型的构建复杂度未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DeCo-DETR通过解耦语义认知与定位，实现高效开放词汇目标检测。

papers.title: Differentiable Stroke Planning with Dual Parameterization for Efficient and High-Fidelity Painting Creation
papers.abstract: In stroke-based rendering, search methods often get trapped in local minima due to discrete stroke placement, while differentiable optimizers lack structural awareness and produce unstructured layouts. To bridge this gap, we propose a dual representation that couples discrete polylines with continuous Bézier control points via a bidirectional mapping mechanism. This enables collaborative optimization: local gradients refine global stroke structures, while content-aware stroke proposals help escape poor local optima. Our representation further supports Gaussian-splatting-inspired initialization, enabling highly parallel stroke optimization across the image. Experiments show that our approach reduces the number of strokes by 30-50%, achieves more structurally coherent layouts, and improves reconstruction quality, while cutting optimization time by 30-40% compared to existing differentiable vectorization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出双参数化可微笔画规划方法，通过离散折线与连续贝塞尔曲线的双向映射实现高效高保真绘画生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于笔画的渲染方法中，搜索方法因离散笔画放置易陷入局部最优，而可微优化器缺乏结构感知导致布局混乱，亟需一种兼顾全局结构与局部优化的高效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何实现笔画规划中离散布局与连续优化的有效结合，以提升生成绘画的结构连贯性、重建质量和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出搜索方法因离散笔画放置易陷入局部极小值，可微优化器产生无结构布局，表明现有方法在结构感知与优化效率上存在瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出双参数化表示，通过双向映射机制耦合离散折线与连续贝塞尔控制点，实现局部梯度优化全局结构，并结合内容感知笔画提议和类高斯泼溅初始化进行并行优化。
contributions: 提出双参数化笔画表示，实现离散与连续表示的协同优化。
引入内容感知笔画提议和并行优化策略，显著减少笔画数量并提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到相比现有可微矢量化方法，笔画数量减少30-50%，优化时间减少30-40%，重建质量提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定笔画类型或图像内容，泛化性需验证。
双向映射机制的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双参数化可微笔画规划方法，通过离散折线与连续贝塞尔曲线的双向映射实现高效高保真绘画生成。

papers.title: Visual Instruction-Finetuned Language Model for Versatile Brain MR Image Tasks
papers.abstract: LLMs have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in linguistic reasoning and are increasingly adept at vision-language tasks. The integration of image tokens into transformers has enabled direct visual input and output, advancing research from image-to-text descriptions to text-to-image generation. However, simple text-to-image generation holds limited clinical utility. In medical imaging, tasks such as image segmentation for localizing pathologies or image translation for reconstructing missing sequences have much greater clinical importance. Despite this, integrating these diverse, clinically relevant tasks within a single, versatile language model remains unexplored. Our method, LLaBIT (Large Language Model for Brain Image Translation), extends the visual reasoning of LLMs to these clinically meaningful tasks in the brain MRI domain. To mitigate the spatial information loss inherent in image tokenization, we incorporate a mechanism to reuse feature maps from the image encoder, minimizing data degradation. We also generate text data using LLMs with strict predefined instructions to augment limited image-text paired data in brain MRI. We comprehensively evaluated our method on five brain MRI datasets across four distinct tasks: report generation, visual question answering, image segmentation, and image translation. Our model not only demonstrated superior performance across all tasks but also outperformed specialized, task-specific models in direct comparisons, highlighting its efficacy and versatility

analysis.tldr: 提出LLaBIT，将LLM的视觉推理扩展到脑MRI的多种临床任务，通过特征复用和文本增强实现统一模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在医学影像中主要限于文本到图像生成，临床价值有限；而分割、翻译等关键任务缺乏统一的语言模型解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM的视觉推理能力扩展到脑MRI的多种临床任务（报告生成、VQA、分割、翻译），并解决图像token化导致的空间信息损失和数据稀缺问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 图像token化会导致空间信息损失，影响分割等空间敏感任务的性能；脑MRI中图像-文本配对数据有限。
analysis.method: 提出LLaBIT，通过复用图像编码器的特征图来减少token化中的信息损失，并使用LLM生成严格指令下的文本数据以增强配对数据。
contributions: 首次将LLM的视觉推理扩展到脑MRI的多种临床任务（报告生成、VQA、分割、翻译）的统一框架。
提出特征复用机制缓解图像token化导致的空间信息损失。
利用LLM生成文本数据增强有限的图像-文本配对数据。
analysis.experiments: 在五个脑MRI数据集上评估四个任务（报告生成、VQA、分割、翻译），模型在所有任务上表现优越，甚至优于专用模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定脑MRI数据集，泛化到其他模态或身体部位需验证。
特征复用机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLaBIT，将LLM的视觉推理扩展到脑MRI的多种临床任务，通过特征复用和文本增强实现统一模型。

papers.title: Task-Guided Prompting for Unified Remote Sensing Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Remote sensing image restoration (RSIR) is essential for recovering high-fidelity imagery from degraded observations, enabling accurate downstream analysis. However, most existing methods focus on single degradation types within homogeneous data, restricting their practicality in real-world scenarios where multiple degradations often across diverse spectral bands or sensor modalities, creating a significant operational bottleneck. To address this fundamental gap, we propose TGPNet, a unified framework capable of handling denoising, cloud removal, shadow removal, deblurring, and SAR despeckling within a single, unified architecture. The core of our framework is a novel Task-Guided Prompting (TGP) strategy. TGP leverages learnable, task-specific embeddings to generate degradation-aware cues, which then hierarchically modulate features throughout the decoder. This task-adaptive mechanism allows the network to precisely tailor its restoration process for distinct degradation patterns while maintaining a single set of shared weights. To validate our framework, we construct a unified RSIR benchmark covering RGB, multispectral, SAR, and thermal infrared modalities for five aforementioned restoration tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that TGPNet achieves state-of-the-art performance on both unified multi-task scenarios and unseen composite degradations, surpassing even specialized models in individual domains such as cloud removal. By successfully unifying heterogeneous degradation removal within a single adaptive framework, this work presents a significant advancement for multi-task RSIR, offering a practical and scalable solution for operational pipelines. The code and benchmark will be released at https://github.com/huangwenwenlili/TGPNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出TGPNet，通过任务引导提示统一处理多种遥感图像退化，在统一基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像恢复方法多针对单一退化类型，无法应对实际场景中多种退化并存且跨光谱/传感器模态的复杂情况，造成操作瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一框架，能在一个共享架构中处理去噪、去云、去阴影、去模糊和SAR去斑等多种退化任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TGPNet，核心是任务引导提示（TGP）策略，利用可学习的任务特定嵌入生成退化感知线索，在解码器中分层调制特征，实现任务自适应恢复。
contributions: 提出TGPNet统一框架，可处理五种遥感图像退化任务。
设计任务引导提示（TGP）策略，实现任务自适应特征调制。
构建包含RGB、多光谱、SAR和热红外模态的统一RSIR基准。
analysis.experiments: 在统一多任务场景和未见过的复合退化上达到SOTA，在云去除等单个任务上超越专用模型。
limitations: 可能对极端退化或新模态泛化能力有限。
任务特定嵌入的设计可能增加少量参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TGPNet，通过任务引导提示统一处理多种遥感图像退化，在统一基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Cross Event Detection and Topic Evolution Mining in cross events for Man Made Disasters in Social Media Streams
papers.abstract: Social media is widely used to share information globally and it also aids to gain attention from the world. When socially sensitive incidents like rape, human rights march, corruption, political controversy, chemical attacks occur, they gain immense attention from people all over the world, causing microblogging platforms like Twitter to get flooded with tweets related to such events. When an event evolves, many other events of a similar nature have happened in and around the same time frame. These are cross events because they are linked to the nature of the main event. Dissemination of information relating to such cross events helps in engaging the masses to share the varied views that emerge out of the similarities and differences between the events. Cross event detection is critical in determining the nature of events. Cross events have fulcrums points, i.e., topics around which the discussion is focused, as the event evolves which must be considered in topic evolution. We have proposed Cross Event Evolution Detection CEED framework which detects cross events that are similar with regards to their temporal nature resulting from main events. Event detection is based on the tweet segmentation using the Wikipedia title database and clustering segments based on a similarity measure. The cross event detection algorithm reveals events that overlap in both time and context to evaluate the effects of these cross events on deliberate negligent human actions. The topic evolution algorithm puts into perspective the change in topics for an events lifetime. The experimental results on a real Twitter data set demonstrate the effectiveness and precision of our proposed framework for both cross event detection and topic evolution algorithm during the evolution of cross events.

analysis.tldr: 提出CEED框架，从社交媒体流中检测人为灾难的交叉事件并挖掘主题演化。
analysis.research_motivation: 社交媒体中敏感事件常引发大量讨论，且相似事件在时间上重叠形成交叉事件，理解这些交叉事件有助于分析公众观点演变，但现有方法缺乏对交叉事件及其主题演化的系统检测。
analysis.problem: 如何从社交媒体流中检测与主事件时间重叠且性质相似的交叉事件，并追踪其主题演化过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交叉事件具有支点主题，事件演化过程中讨论焦点会变化，需考虑时间与上下文的双重重叠。
analysis.method: 提出CEED框架，包括：基于Wikipedia标题数据库的推文分割、基于相似度度量的聚类进行事件检测，以及主题演化算法。
contributions: 提出交叉事件检测算法，识别时间与上下文重叠的事件。
提出主题演化算法，追踪事件生命周期内的主题变化。
analysis.experiments: 在真实Twitter数据集上验证了框架在交叉事件检测和主题演化上的有效性和精确性。
limitations: 依赖Wikipedia标题数据库，可能覆盖不全。
仅针对人为灾难类事件，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CEED框架，从社交媒体流中检测人为灾难的交叉事件并挖掘主题演化。

papers.title: THOM: Generating Physically Plausible Hand-Object Meshes From Text
papers.abstract: Generating photorealistic 3D hand-object interactions (HOIs) from text is important for applications like robotic grasping and AR/VR content creation. In practice, however, achieving both visual fidelity and physical plausibility remains difficult, as mesh extraction from text-generated Gaussians is inherently ill-posed and the resulting meshes are often unreliable for physics-based optimization. We present THOM, a training-free framework that generates physically plausible 3D HOI meshes directly from text prompts, without requiring template object meshes. THOM follows a two-stage pipeline: it first generates hand and object Gaussians guided by text, and then refines their interaction using physics-based optimization. To enable reliable interaction modeling, we introduce a mesh extraction method with an explicit vertex-to-Gaussian mapping, which enables topology-aware regularization. We further improve physical plausibility through contact-aware optimization and vision-language model (VLM)-guided translation refinement. Extensive experiments show that THOM produces high-quality HOIs with strong text alignment, visual realism, and interaction plausibility.

analysis.tldr: THOM 从文本生成物理合理的 3D 手-物体交互网格，无需训练或模板网格。
analysis.research_motivation: 从文本生成逼真的 3D 手-物体交互（HOI）对机器人抓取和 AR/VR 内容创建等应用至关重要，但现有方法难以同时保证视觉保真度和物理合理性，因为从文本生成的高斯网格提取本质上是病态的，导致网格不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何从文本提示直接生成物理合理的 3D 手-物体交互网格，且无需模板物体网格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出从文本生成的高斯网格提取是病态的，导致网格不可靠，无法用于基于物理的优化。
analysis.method: THOM 是一个两阶段的无训练框架：首先生成文本引导的手和物体高斯，然后通过基于物理的优化细化交互。引入显式顶点到高斯映射的网格提取方法，实现拓扑感知正则化，并通过接触感知优化和 VLM 引导的平移细化提升物理合理性。
contributions: 提出 THOM，首个从文本生成物理合理 3D 手-物体交互网格的无训练框架。
引入显式顶点到高斯映射的网格提取方法，支持拓扑感知正则化。
通过接触感知优化和 VLM 引导的平移细化提升交互的物理合理性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖文本到高斯生成的质量。
物理优化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: THOM 从文本生成物理合理的 3D 手-物体交互网格，无需训练或模板网格。

papers.title: Aligning Progress and Feasibility: A Neuro-Symbolic Dual Memory Framework for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
