Effective damage mapping typically requires exhaustive and time-consuming manual data annotation. To address this issue, we introduce Smart Transfer, a novel Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI) framework, leveraging state-of-the-art vision Foundation Models (FMs) for rapid building damage mapping with post-earthquake Very High Resolution (VHR) imagery. Specifically, we design two novel model transfer strategies: first, Pixel-wise Clustering (PC), ensuring robust prototype-level global feature alignment; second, a Distance-Penalized Triplet (DPT), integrating patch-level spatial autocorrelation patterns by assigning stronger penalties to semantically inconsistent yet spatially adjacent patches. Extensive experiments and ablations from the recent 2023 Turkiye-Syria earthquake show promising performance in multiple cross-region transfer settings, namely Leave One Domain Out (LODO) and Specific Source Domain Combination (SSDC). Moreover, Smart Transfer provides a scalable, automated GeoAI solution to accelerate building damage mapping and support rapid disaster response, offering new opportunities to enhance disaster resilience in climate-vulnerable regions and communities. The data and code are publicly available at https://github.com/ai4city-hkust/SmartTransfer.

analysis.tldr: 提出Smart Transfer框架，利用视觉基础模型实现震后建筑损伤快速迁移制图。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统震后建筑损伤调查难以泛化到不同城市形态和新灾害事件，且需要大量人工标注，无法满足黄金72小时快速响应需求。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视觉基础模型实现跨区域、跨事件的震后建筑损伤快速自动制图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计两种迁移策略：像素级聚类（PC）实现原型级全局特征对齐；距离惩罚三元组（DPT）整合空间自相关模式，对语义不一致但空间相邻的块施加更强惩罚。
contributions: 提出Smart Transfer框架，结合视觉基础模型实现震后建筑损伤快速迁移制图。
设计像素级聚类和距离惩罚三元组两种迁移策略，提升跨区域泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在2023年土耳其-叙利亚地震数据上进行了跨区域迁移实验（LODO和SSDC），表现良好。
limitations: 仅针对震后建筑损伤，未验证其他灾害类型。
依赖VHR影像，可能受数据获取限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Smart Transfer框架，利用视觉基础模型实现震后建筑损伤快速迁移制图。

papers.title: Wavelength-multiplexed massively parallel diffractive optical information storage and image projection
papers.abstract: We introduce a wavelength-multiplexed massively parallel diffractive information storage platform composed of dielectric surfaces that are structurally optimized at the wavelength scale using deep learning to store and project thousands of distinct image patterns, each assigned to a unique wavelength. Through numerical simulations in the visible spectrum, we demonstrated that our wavelength-multiplexed diffractive system can store and project over 4,000 independent desired images/patterns within its output field-of-view, with high image quality and minimal crosstalk between spectral channels. Furthermore, in a proof-of-concept experiment, we demonstrated a two-layer diffractive design that stored six distinct patterns and projected them onto the same output field of view at six different wavelengths (500, 548, 596, 644, 692, and 740 nm). This diffractive architecture is scalable and can operate at various parts of the electromagnetic spectrum without the need for material dispersion engineering or redesigning its optimized diffractive layers. The demonstrated storage capacity, reconstruction image fidelity, and wavelength-encoded massively parallel read-out of our diffractive platform offer a compact and fast-access solution for large-scale optical information storage, image projection applications.

analysis.tldr: 利用深度学习优化波长尺度介电表面，实现波长复用的大规模并行衍射光学信息存储与图像投影。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统光学存储和投影系统在容量、并行性和紧凑性方面存在局限，需要一种可扩展、高速访问的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用波长复用和深度学习优化设计，实现大规模并行、高保真度的衍射光学信息存储与图像投影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过深度学习在波长尺度上结构优化介电表面，形成波长复用的衍射光学平台，每个波长对应存储并投影一个独立图像模式。
contributions: 提出一种波长复用的大规模并行衍射光学信息存储架构，可存储和投影数千个独立图像。
通过数值模拟和实验验证了系统的高容量、高图像质量和低串扰特性。
analysis.experiments: 数值模拟展示了存储和投影超过4000个独立图像的能力；实验演示了两层衍射设计在6个波长下存储和投影6个图案。
limitations: 实验仅验证了6个波长，大规模波长复用的实际性能需进一步验证。
制造精度和系统对准可能影响实际性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用深度学习优化波长尺度介电表面，实现波长复用的大规模并行衍射光学信息存储与图像投影。

papers.title: Poison Once, Exploit Forever: Environment-Injected Memory Poisoning Attacks on Web Agents
papers.abstract: Memory makes LLM-based web agents personalized, powerful, yet exploitable. By storing past interactions to personalize future tasks, agents inadvertently create a persistent attack surface that spans websites and sessions. While existing security research on memory assumes attackers can directly inject into memory storage or exploit shared memory across users, we present a more realistic threat model: contamination through environmental observation alone. We introduce Environment-injected Trajectory-based Agent Memory Poisoning (eTAMP), the first attack to achieve cross-session, cross-site compromise without requiring direct memory access. A single contaminated observation (e.g., viewing a manipulated product page) silently poisons an agent's memory and activates during future tasks on different websites, bypassing permission-based defenses. Our experiments on (Visual)WebArena reveal two key findings. First, eTAMP achieves substantial attack success rates: up to 32.5% on GPT-5-mini, 23.4% on GPT-5.2, and 19.5% on GPT-OSS-120B. Second, we discover Frustration Exploitation: agents under environmental stress become dramatically more susceptible, with ASR increasing up to 8 times when agents struggle with dropped clicks or garbled text. Notably, more capable models are not more secure. GPT-5.2 shows substantial vulnerability despite superior task performance. With the rise of AI browsers like OpenClaw, ChatGPT Atlas, and Perplexity Comet, our findings underscore the urgent need for defenses against environment-injected memory poisoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出环境注入式轨迹记忆投毒攻击（eTAMP），仅通过污染环境观察即可跨会话、跨站点操纵Web Agent的记忆，实现持久化攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有记忆安全研究假设攻击者能直接注入记忆或利用共享记忆，但更现实的威胁是仅通过环境观察污染记忆，且缺乏对此类攻击的防御。
analysis.problem: 如何仅通过环境观察（如浏览被篡改的页面）实现跨会话、跨站点的Web Agent记忆投毒攻击，绕过权限防御。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现挫折利用现象：当Agent遇到环境压力（如点击失败、文本乱码）时，攻击成功率可提升8倍；且能力更强的模型（如GPT-5.2）并不更安全。
analysis.method: eTAMP：攻击者构造包含恶意指令的观测（如产品页面），Agent在记忆存储时将其嵌入，后续任务中激活恶意行为，无需直接访问记忆。
contributions: 首次提出仅通过环境观察实现跨会话、跨站点记忆投毒的攻击方法eTAMP
揭示挫折利用现象，发现环境压力显著提升攻击成功率
analysis.experiments: 在(Visual)WebArena上实验，GPT-5-mini攻击成功率32.5%，GPT-5.2为23.4%，GPT-OSS-120B为19.5%。
limitations: 攻击成功率受限于模型和环境，最高仅32.5%
未讨论防御机制或缓解措施
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出环境注入式轨迹记忆投毒攻击（eTAMP），仅通过污染环境观察即可跨会话、跨站点操纵Web Agent的记忆，实现持久化攻击。

papers.title: OntoKG: Ontology-Oriented Knowledge Graph Construction with Intrinsic-Relational Routing
papers.abstract: Organizing a large-scale knowledge graph into a typed property graph requires structural decisions -- which entities become nodes, which properties become edges, and what schema governs these choices. Existing approaches embed these decisions in pipeline code or extract relations ad hoc, producing schemas that are tightly coupled to their construction process and difficult to reuse for downstream ontology-level tasks. We present an ontology-oriented approach in which the schema is designed from the outset for ontology analysis, entity disambiguation, domain customization, and LLM-guided extraction -- not merely as a byproduct of graph building. The core mechanism is intrinsic-relational routing, which classifies every property as either intrinsic or relational and routes it to the corresponding schema module. This routing produces a declarative schema that is portable across storage backends and independently reusable. We instantiate the approach on the January 2026 Wikidata dump. A rule-based cleaning stage identifies a 34.6M-entity core set from the full dump, followed by iterative intrinsic-relational routing that assigns each property to one of 94 modules organized into 8 categories. With tool-augmented LLM support and human review, the schema reaches 93.3% category coverage and 98.0% module assignment among classified entities. Exporting this schema yields a property graph with 34.0M nodes and 61.2M edges across 38 relationship types. We validate the ontology-oriented claim through five applications that consume the schema independently of the construction pipeline: ontology structure analysis, benchmark annotation auditing, entity disambiguation, domain customization, and LLM-guided extraction.

analysis.tldr: 提出本体导向的知识图谱构建方法，通过内在-关系路由将属性分类为内在或关系，生成可移植、可复用的声明式模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有知识图谱构建方法将模式决策嵌入管道代码或临时提取关系，导致模式与构建过程紧密耦合，难以在下游本体级任务中复用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个从构建之初就面向本体分析、实体消歧、领域定制和LLM引导提取的模式，并使其可移植、可复用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 内在-关系路由：将每个属性分类为内在或关系，并路由到对应的模式模块，生成声明式模式。在2026年1月Wikidata转储上实例化，通过规则清洗得到3460万实体核心集，迭代路由将属性分配到94个模块（8个类别），结合工具增强的LLM和人工审查。
contributions: 提出本体导向的知识图谱构建方法，模式设计优先考虑本体分析等下游任务。
提出内在-关系路由机制，将属性分类并路由到模式模块，生成可移植、可复用的声明式模式。
在Wikidata大规模实例化，达到93.3%类别覆盖率和98.0%模块分配，生成3400万节点、6120万边的属性图。
通过五个独立应用验证本体导向的声明式模式的可复用性。
analysis.experiments: 在2026年1月Wikidata转储上实验，规则清洗得到3460万实体核心集，路由后模式达到93.3%类别覆盖率和98.0%模块分配，导出属性图含3400万节点、6120万边。通过五个应用（本体结构分析、基准标注审计、实体消歧、领域定制、LLM引导提取）验证模式可复用性。
limitations: 依赖Wikidata特定数据，泛化到其他知识图谱需验证。
LLM辅助和人工审查可能引入成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出本体导向的知识图谱构建方法，通过内在-关系路由将属性分类为内在或关系，生成可移植、可复用的声明式模式。

papers.title: AutoVerifier: An Agentic Automated Verification Framework Using Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Scientific and Technical Intelligence (S&TI) analysis requires verifying complex technical claims across rapidly growing literature, where existing approaches fail to bridge the verification gap between surface-level accuracy and deeper methodological validity. We present AutoVerifier, an LLM-based agentic framework that automates end-to-end verification of technical claims without requiring domain expertise. AutoVerifier decomposes every technical assertion into structured claim triples of the form (Subject, Predicate, Object), constructing knowledge graphs that enable structured reasoning across six progressively enriching layers: corpus construction and ingestion, entity and claim extraction, intra-document verification, cross-source verification, external signal corroboration, and final hypothesis matrix generation. We demonstrate AutoVerifier on a contested quantum computing claim, where the framework, operated by analysts with no quantum expertise, automatically identified overclaims and metric inconsistencies within the target paper, traced cross-source contradictions, uncovered undisclosed commercial conflicts of interest, and produced a final assessment. These results show that structured LLM verification can reliably evaluate the validity and maturity of emerging technologies, turning raw technical documents into traceable, evidence-backed intelligence assessments.

analysis.tldr: 提出AutoVerifier，一种基于LLM的智能体框架，自动验证技术声明，无需领域专业知识。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法无法弥合表面准确性与深层方法论有效性之间的验证差距，需要领域专业知识，难以应对快速增长的技术文献。
analysis.problem: 如何自动验证技术声明的准确性和方法论有效性，无需领域专家参与。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将技术断言分解为结构化三元组(主语, 谓语, 宾语)，构建知识图谱，通过六层逐步推理（语料库构建、实体和声明提取、文档内验证、跨源验证、外部信号佐证、最终假设矩阵生成）进行端到端验证。
contributions: 提出AutoVerifier框架，实现无需领域专业知识的自动化技术声明验证。
通过结构化三元组和知识图谱实现多层级推理验证。
analysis.experiments: 在量子计算争议声明上演示，由无量子专业知识的分析师操作，自动识别过度声明和度量不一致，追踪跨源矛盾，发现未披露的商业利益冲突，并生成最终评估。
limitations: 仅在一个案例上演示，泛化性待验证。
依赖LLM的推理能力，可能受限于模型幻觉。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AutoVerifier，一种基于LLM的智能体框架，自动验证技术声明，无需领域专业知识。

papers.title: Unlocking Multi-Site Clinical Data: A Federated Approach to Privacy-First Child Autism Behavior Analysis
papers.abstract: Automated recognition of autistic behaviors in children is essential for early intervention and objective clinical assessment. However, the development of robust models is severely hindered by strict privacy regulations (e.g., HIPAA) and the sensitive nature of pediatric data, which prevents the centralized aggregation of clinical datasets. Furthermore, individual clinical sites often suffer from data scarcity, making it difficult to learn generalized behavior patterns or tailor models to site-specific patient distributions. To address these challenges, we observe that Federated Learning (FL) can decouple model training from raw data access, enabling multi-site collaboration while maintaining strict data residency. In this paper, we present the first study exploring Federated Learning for pose-based child autism behavior recognition. Our framework employs a two-layer privacy protection mechanism: utilizing human skeletal abstraction to remove identifiable visual information from the raw RGB videos and FL to ensure sensitive pose data remains within the clinic. This approach leverages distributed clinical data to learn generalized representations while providing the flexibility for site-specific personalization. Experimental results on the MMASD benchmark demonstrate that our framework achieves high recognition accuracy, outperforming traditional federated baselines and providing a robust, privacy-first solution for multi-site clinical analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出联邦学习框架用于儿童自闭症行为分析，在保护隐私的同时实现多站点协作。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童自闭症行为自动识别对早期干预至关重要，但隐私法规（如HIPAA）和儿科数据的敏感性阻碍了数据集中，且单个站点数据稀缺难以学习通用模式。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格隐私约束下，利用多站点临床数据训练鲁棒的儿童自闭症行为识别模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出联邦学习框架，采用两层隐私保护：人体骨骼抽象去除原始RGB视频中的可识别视觉信息，联邦学习确保敏感姿态数据留在诊所内，同时支持站点特定个性化。
contributions: 首次探索联邦学习用于基于姿态的儿童自闭症行为识别。
提出两层隐私保护机制，结合骨骼抽象和联邦学习。
analysis.experiments: 在MMASD基准上，框架达到高识别准确率，优于传统联邦基线。
limitations: 可能依赖姿态估计的准确性。
个性化与泛化之间的权衡未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出联邦学习框架用于儿童自闭症行为分析，在保护隐私的同时实现多站点协作。

papers.title: Do Audio-Visual Large Language Models Really See and Hear?
papers.abstract: Audio-Visual Large Language Models (AVLLMs) are emerging as unified interfaces to multimodal perception. We present the first mechanistic interpretability study of AVLLMs, analyzing how audio and visual features evolve and fuse through different layers of an AVLLM to produce the final text outputs. We find that although AVLLMs encode rich audio semantics at intermediate layers, these capabilities largely fail to surface in the final text generation when audio conflicts with vision. Probing analyses show that useful latent audio information is present, but deeper fusion layers disproportionately privilege visual representations that tend to suppress audio cues. We further trace this imbalance to training: the AVLLM's audio behavior strongly matches its vision-language base model, indicating limited additional alignment to audio supervision. Our findings reveal a fundamental modality bias in AVLLMs and provide new mechanistic insights into how multimodal LLMs integrate audio and vision.

analysis.tldr: AVLLM存在视觉模态偏见，音频信息在深层融合中被抑制，导致多模态感知失衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLM）作为统一多模态感知接口日益重要，但其内部机制尚不明确，尤其是音频与视觉特征如何融合及潜在偏见问题亟待研究。
analysis.problem: AVLLM在音频与视觉冲突时，音频信息无法有效影响最终文本生成，存在模态偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：中间层编码了丰富音频语义，但深层融合层过度偏向视觉表征，抑制音频线索；且AVLLM的音频行为与视觉-语言基座模型高度一致，表明音频监督对齐不足。
analysis.method: 首次对AVLLM进行机制可解释性研究，通过探针分析等方法追踪音频和视觉特征在各层的演化与融合过程。
contributions: 首次对AVLLM进行机制可解释性分析，揭示音频与视觉特征的层间演化与融合模式。
发现并验证了AVLLM中存在的根本性模态偏见：视觉主导导致音频信息被抑制。
将模态不平衡归因于训练过程，指出AVLLM的音频行为与视觉-语言基座模型高度相似，音频监督对齐有限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定AVLLM架构，泛化性需验证。
未提供缓解模态偏见的解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AVLLM存在视觉模态偏见，音频信息在深层融合中被抑制，导致多模态感知失衡。

papers.title: Rascene: High-Fidelity 3D Scene Imaging with mmWave Communication Signals
papers.abstract: Robust 3D environmental perception is critical for applications such as autonomous driving and robot navigation. However, optical sensors such as cameras and LiDAR often fail under adverse conditions, including smoke, fog, and non-ideal lighting. Although specialized radar systems can operate in these environments, their reliance on bespoke hardware and licensed spectrum limits scalability and cost-effectiveness. This paper introduces Rascene, an integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) framework that leverages ubiquitous mmWave OFDM communication signals for 3D scene imaging. To overcome the sparse and multipath-ambiguous nature of individual radio frames, Rascene performs multi-frame, spatially adaptive fusion with confidence-weighted forward projection, enabling the recovery of geometric consensus across arbitrary poses. Experimental results demonstrate that our method reconstructs 3D scenes with high precision, offering a new pathway toward low-cost, scalable, and robust 3D perception.

analysis.tldr: 利用毫米波通信信号实现高保真3D场景成像，通过多帧自适应融合克服稀疏和多径模糊。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶和机器人导航需要鲁棒的3D环境感知，但光学传感器在烟雾、雾霾等恶劣条件下失效，而专用雷达硬件成本高且频谱受限，亟需低成本、可扩展的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用无处不在的毫米波OFDM通信信号实现高精度3D场景重建，同时克服单帧信号稀疏和多径模糊的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单个无线电帧存在稀疏性和多径模糊性，导致直接成像困难。
analysis.method: 提出Rascene框架，采用多帧、空间自适应融合策略，结合置信度加权前向投影，从任意姿态的毫米波通信信号中恢复几何一致性。
contributions: 首次利用毫米波OFDM通信信号实现高保真3D场景成像，无需专用雷达硬件。
提出多帧空间自适应融合方法，有效克服稀疏和多径模糊，重建高精度3D场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定通信信号格式（OFDM），通用性待验证。
多帧融合的计算开销可能较大，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用毫米波通信信号实现高保真3D场景成像，通过多帧自适应融合克服稀疏和多径模糊。

papers.title: AICCE: AI Driven Compliance Checker Engine
papers.abstract: For digital infrastructure to be safe, compatible, and standards-aligned, automated communication protocol compliance verification is crucial. Nevertheless, current rule-based systems are becoming less and less effective since they are unable to identify subtle or intricate non-compliance, which attackers frequently use to establish covert communication channels in IPv6 traffic. In order to automate IPv6 compliance verification, this paper presents the Artificial Intelligence Driven Compliance Checker Engine (AICCE), a novel generative system that combines dual-architecture reasoning and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Specification segments pertinent to each query can be efficiently retrieved thanks to the semantic encoding of protocol standards into a high-dimensional vector space. Based on this framework, AICCE offers two complementary pipelines: (i) Explainability Mode, which uses parallel LLM agents to render decisions and settle disputes through organized discussions to improve interpretability and robustness, and (ii) Script Execution Mode, which converts clauses into Python rules that can be executed quickly for dataset-wide verification. With the debate mechanism enhancing decision reliability in complicated scenarios and the script-based pipeline lowering per-sample latency, AICCE achieves accuracy and F1-scores of up to 99% when tested on IPv6 packet samples across sixteen cutting-edge generative models. By offering a scalable, auditable, and generalizable mechanism for identifying both routine and covert non-compliance in dynamic communication environments, our results show that AICCE overcomes the blind spots of conventional rule-based compliance checking systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出AICCE，一种结合RAG和双架构推理的生成式系统，用于自动化IPv6协议合规性验证，在16个生成模型上达到99%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统基于规则的合规检查系统难以检测微妙或复杂的违规行为，攻击者常利用这些漏洞在IPv6流量中建立隐蔽通信通道，亟需更智能的自动化验证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化检测IPv6协议实现中的合规性问题，特别是传统规则系统无法识别的细微或隐蔽违规。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AICCE结合检索增强生成（RAG）将协议标准语义编码为高维向量空间，并设计两条互补流水线：脚本执行模式将条款转换为可执行Python规则用于数据集级验证，可解释性模式通过并行LLM代理进行结构化辩论以提升决策可解释性和鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出AICCE，首个结合RAG和双架构推理的生成式合规验证系统。
在16个生成模型上对IPv6数据包样本测试，达到99%的准确率和F1分数。
analysis.experiments: 在16个前沿生成模型上对IPv6数据包样本进行测试，AICCE达到99%的准确率和F1分数。
limitations: 仅针对IPv6协议验证，未提及对其他协议的泛化能力。
依赖LLM和RAG，计算资源需求可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AICCE，一种结合RAG和双架构推理的生成式系统，用于自动化IPv6协议合规性验证，在16个生成模型上达到99%准确率。

papers.title: LitPivot: Developing Well-Situated Research Ideas Through Dynamic Contextualization and Critique within the Literature Landscape
papers.abstract: Developing a novel research idea is hard. It must be distinct enough from prior work to claim a contribution while also building on it. This requires iteratively reviewing literature and refining an idea based on what a researcher reads; yet when an idea changes, the literature that matters often changes with it. Most tools offer limited support for this interplay: literature tools help researchers understand a fixed body of work, while ideation tools evaluate ideas against a static, pre-curated set of papers. We introduce literature-initiated pivots, a mechanism where engagement with literature prompts revision to a developing idea, and where that revision changes which literature is relevant. We operationalize this in LitPivot, where researchers concurrently draft and vet an idea. LitPivot dynamically retrieves clusters of papers relevant to a selected part of the idea and proposes literature-informed critiques for how to revise it. A lab study ($n{=}17$) shows researchers produced higher-rated ideas with stronger self-reported understanding of the literature space; an open-ended study ($n{=}5$) reveals how researchers use LitPivot to iteratively evolve their own ideas.

analysis.tldr: LitPivot通过动态文献检索与批判性反馈，帮助研究者迭代优化研究想法。
analysis.research_motivation: 提出新颖研究想法需要反复查阅文献并调整思路，但现有工具要么只支持静态文献理解，要么只对固定论文集进行评价，缺乏对想法与文献之间动态交互的支持。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个工具，让研究者在构思想法时能够动态地根据文献反馈调整想法，并自动更新相关文献集合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出文献启动的转向机制，并实现LitPivot系统：研究者同时起草和审查想法，系统动态检索与想法选定部分相关的论文簇，并生成基于文献的修改建议。
contributions: 提出文献启动的转向机制，形式化想法与文献之间的动态交互过程。
开发LitPivot系统，支持动态上下文化和批判性反馈。
通过实验室研究和开放式研究验证了系统有效性。
analysis.experiments: 实验室研究（n=17）显示研究者产生了更高质量的想法，且对文献空间的理解更强；开放式研究（n=5）揭示了研究者如何使用LitPivot迭代演化自己的想法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于学术研究场景，泛化性有限。
系统依赖文献数据库的质量和覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LitPivot通过动态文献检索与批判性反馈，帮助研究者迭代优化研究想法。

papers.title: Explorable Theorems: Making Written Theorems Explorable by Grounding Them in Formal Representations
papers.abstract: LLM-generated explanations can make technical content more accessible, but there is a ceiling on what they can support interactively. Because LLM outputs are static text, they cannot be executed or stepped through. We argue that grounding explanations in a formalized representation enables interactive affordances beyond what static text supports. We instantiate this idea for mathematical proof comprehension with explorable theorems, a system that uses LLMs to translate a theorem and its written proof into Lean, a programming language for machine-checked proofs, and links the written proof with the Lean code. Readers can work through the proof at a step-level granularity, test custom examples or counterexamples, and trace the logical dependencies bridging each step. Each worked-out step is produced by executing the Lean proof on that example and extracting its intermediate state. A user study ($n = 16$) shows potential advantages of this approach: in a proof-reading task, participants who had access to the provided explorability features gave better, more correct, and more detailed answers to comprehension questions, demonstrating a stronger overall understanding of the underlying mathematics.

analysis.tldr: 将数学定理和证明形式化为Lean代码，使读者能交互式探索证明步骤和反例，提升理解。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的解释是静态文本，无法交互执行或逐步推进，限制了读者对技术内容（如数学证明）的深层理解。
analysis.problem: 如何让书面数学证明变得可交互探索，以帮助读者更好地理解证明的逻辑和细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出LLM输出静态文本的局限性。
analysis.method: 利用LLM将定理和书面证明翻译成Lean代码，并将书面证明与Lean代码链接，读者可逐步执行证明、测试自定义例子或反例，并追踪逻辑依赖。
contributions: 提出可探索定理的概念，将书面证明形式化为可执行代码。
通过用户研究证明该方法在证明理解任务中优于纯文本解释。
analysis.experiments: 用户研究（n=16）表明，使用可探索性功能的参与者在证明阅读任务中给出更好、更正确、更详细的答案，显示出更强的整体数学理解。
limitations: 依赖LLM翻译的准确性，可能引入错误。
用户研究规模较小，需更大规模验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将数学定理和证明形式化为Lean代码，使读者能交互式探索证明步骤和反例，提升理解。

papers.title: Moondream Segmentation: From Words to Masks
papers.abstract: We present Moondream Segmentation, a referring image segmentation extension of Moondream 3, a vision-language model. Given an image and a referring expression, the model autoregressively decodes a vector path and iteratively refines the rasterized mask into a final detailed mask. We introduce a reinforcement learning stage that resolves ambiguity in the supervised signal by directly optimizing mask quality. Rollouts from this stage produce coarse-to-ground-truth targets for the refiner. To mitigate evaluation noise from polygon annotations, we release RefCOCO-M, a cleaned RefCOCO validation split with boundary-accurate masks. Moondream Segmentation achieves a cIoU of 80.2% on RefCOCO (val) and 62.6% mIoU on LVIS (val).

analysis.tldr: Moondream Segmentation 通过自回归解码向量路径和强化学习优化，实现了从文本到掩码的指代图像分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有指代图像分割方法在监督信号中存在歧义，且多边形标注导致评估噪声，影响模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何从指代表达式生成高质量的分割掩码，并解决监督信号歧义和评估噪声问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于视觉语言模型 Moondream 3，自回归解码向量路径并迭代细化掩码；引入强化学习阶段直接优化掩码质量，生成粗到精的目标用于细化器。
contributions: 提出 Moondream Segmentation，一种基于自回归向量路径解码和迭代细化的指代图像分割方法。
引入强化学习阶段解决监督信号歧义，优化掩码质量。
发布 RefCOCO-M，一个边界精确的 RefCOCO 验证集，减少多边形标注噪声。
analysis.experiments: 在 RefCOCO 和 LVIS 数据集上评估，RefCOCO (val) 上 cIoU 为 80.2%，LVIS (val) 上 mIoU 为 62.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉语言模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习阶段的训练稳定性未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Moondream Segmentation 通过自回归解码向量路径和强化学习优化，实现了从文本到掩码的指代图像分割。
